title: DiffusionBench: On Holistic Evaluation of Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Diffusion transformer (DiT) research on image generation has converged to a single evaluation setup: class-conditional generation on ImageNet. While methods improve the FID and related metrics, it is increasingly unclear whether they reflect real progress in generative modeling. The natural alternative, i.e., text-to-image (T2I) generation, is perceived as too costly or inconvenient to train and evaluate and is often skipped. We argue that this perception no longer holds. We introduce NanoGen, a unified DiT training and evaluation framework. NanoGen matches state-of-the-art DiT baselines on ImageNet and, with 12 lines of configuration change, also trains competitive text-to-image models. It currently supports RAE, VAE, pixel-space, and MeanFlow diffusion methods under both ImageNet and T2I setups. Under NanoGen, training T2I requires comparable compute to ImageNet. After training 21 latent diffusion models with NanoGen, we observe that method ranking shows no strong correlation between ImageNet and T2I generation: Pearson correlation is between -0.377 and -0.580 across three metrics. This suggests that a method which improves class-conditional ImageNet FID may show no corresponding improvement on T2I, clearly indicating the necessity of evaluating DiTs on both tasks. To this end, we summarize ImageNet and text-to-image results, which yields DiffusionBench, a holistic benchmark for DiT research. We recommend reporting DiffusionBench in place of ImageNet alone: methods that improve DiffusionBench are more likely to reflect broader progress.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiffusionBench基准和NanoGen框架，强调需同时在ImageNet和T2I上评估DiT模型，因两者结果无强相关性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前DiT研究仅依赖ImageNet类条件生成评估，FID等指标提升是否反映真实进展存疑。T2I评估因成本高常被忽略，但现有方法已改变这一认知。论文揭示仅ImageNet评估可能导致误导性结论，需综合衡量两类任务。
light_analysis.method: 提出NanoGen统一框架，支持RAE、VAE、像素空间及MeanFlow扩散方法，通过12行配置更改即可切换ImageNet与T2I训练。训练21个潜在扩散模型，发现ImageNet与T2I的Pearson相关系数为-0.377至-0.580，表明方法排名无强相关。整合两者结果形成DiffusionBench基准。
light_analysis.result: NanoGen在ImageNet上匹配SOTA，且T2I训练计算量与ImageNet相当。三个指标上ImageNet与T2I排名呈弱负相关，证明单靠ImageNet评估的局限性。DiffusionBench为DiT提供更全面的性能度量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文强调DiT评估应同时覆盖类条件与文本引导任务，避免片面结论。DiffusionBench作为统一基准，有助于识别真正进展。框架NanoGen降低了T2I训练门槛，推动研究标准化。未来可扩展更多任务和模型。

title: BenchX: Benchmarking AI Models for Cancer Detection and Localization with Demographic and Protocol Biases
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) has achieved remarkable success in medical imaging, but it is widely recognized that these models often perform inconsistently across real-world clinical settings. Such inconsistencies occur when patient demographics and imaging protocols vary, for example, in detecting small tumors, analyzing scans from different contrast phases, or evaluating patients of different ages or sexes. To quantify these inconsistencies, we develop a large-scale, open benchmark of 85,355 CT scans that systematically evaluates 12 tumor-detection AI models across tumor size, location, patient subgroup, and imaging protocol. We leverage large language models (LLMs) to extract and organize subgroup information from clinical data, which makes the analysis both scalable and reproducible. Our benchmark reveals that current state-of-the-art AI models, optimized for average accuracy, perform poorly in rare or underrepresented subgroups, such as young, female African Americans. However, collecting sufficient annotated data for these rare cases is often impractical. The benchmark provides a foundation for building more reliable and robust AI models for tumor detection and highlighting the need for rigorous, subgroup-level evaluation in medical imaging and computer vision. Datasets, code

light_analysis.overview: 提出了BenchX基准，系统评估12种肿瘤检测AI模型在人口统计和成像协议偏差下的性能差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管AI在医学影像领域取得显著成功，但模型在真实临床场景中常因患者人口统计特征和成像协议变化而表现不一致，例如检测小肿瘤、不同对比相扫描或不同年龄性别患者。现有方法多优化平均准确率，忽视了对罕见或代表性不足亚组（如年轻非裔美国女性）的性能评估。收集足够标注数据成本高昂，亟需一个可扩展、可复现的基准来量化这些不一致性，推动模型鲁棒性提升。
light_analysis.method: BenchX是一个包含85,355个CT扫描的大型开放基准，系统评估12个肿瘤检测AI模型。利用大语言模型（LLMs）从临床数据中提取和组织亚组信息，确保分析可扩展且可复现。考虑肿瘤大小、位置、患者亚组和成像协议等维度，通过对比不同亚组性能，揭示模型在平均准确率之外的偏差。数据集和代码已公开。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，当前最先进的AI模型在罕见或代表性不足亚组（如年轻非裔美国女性）中表现较差，尽管整体平均准确率较高。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明模型存在显著的亚组性能差异。该基准揭示了需要亚组级别评估的重要性，为构建更可靠鲁棒的肿瘤检测模型奠定了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: BenchX首次大规模系统性地量化了人口统计和协议偏差对肿瘤检测AI模型的影响，推动医学影像社区关注亚组级评估。研究强调了平均准确率的局限性，以及收集多样化数据的必要性。未来可用于指导开发更公平的模型，并促进临床部署中的可靠性评估。潜在局限是仅针对CT扫描肿瘤检测任务，可扩展到其他模态和疾病。

title: FLAT: Feedforward Latent Triangle Splatting for Geometrically Accurate Scene Generation
abstract: Generating explorable 3D scenes from a single image requires strong generative priors and accurate geometric representations suitable for downstream use. Current video diffusion models offer high-quality generation and implicitly encode multi-view geometric structure in latent space. However, existing feedforward latent scene decoders typically output volumetric 3D Gaussians that lack a well-defined surface, limiting their use in simulation or standard graphics pipelines. This motivates decoding surface-aligned primitives that are not only renderable but also closer to explicit geometric assets. We ask whether compressed video diffusion latents can be mapped directly to explicit surface primitives in a single pass. To this end, we introduce FLAT and, for the first time, show that triangle splats can be decoded directly from video diffusion latents. Compared with decoding 3D Gaussians, predicting flat primitives is notoriously more challenging due to high sensitivity to primitive orientations, oftentimes leading to poor gradient flow. FLAT solves with two key ingredients: a ray-centered rotation parameterization for triangle regression and a novel product window function that improves gradient flow during differentiable triangle rendering. On standard benchmarks, FLAT achieves significantly better geometric accuracy while maintaining competitive visual quality compared to state-of-the-art feedforward baselines. We further show that a lightweight test-time refinement step converts the predicted triangle soup into a fully opaque, game-engine-ready representation that supports real-time rendering. By evaluating 3DGS, 2DGS, and triangle splatting variants under an identical training setup, we provide the first systematic analysis of representation tradeoffs in feedforward scene generation. The project page is available at https://flat-splat.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 首次从视频扩散潜变量直接解码三角形表面基元（triangle splats），实现几何精确的场景生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 从单图像生成可探索3D场景需要强生成先验和精确几何表示。现有视频扩散模型隐式编码多视图几何，但前馈场景解码器通常输出体积3D高斯，缺乏明确定义表面，限制了在模拟或标准图形管线中的使用。因此需要解码表面对齐的基元，并探究是否可以直接从压缩视频扩散潜变量映射到显式表面基元。
light_analysis.method: 提出FLAT，首次从视频扩散潜变量直接解码三角形splat。核心包括：射线中心的旋转参数化用于三角形回归，以及新颖的乘积窗口函数改善可微分三角形渲染中的梯度流。解决了预测平坦基元对方向敏感且梯度流差的挑战。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准上，FLAT在保持与最先进前馈基线相当视觉质量的同时，实现了显著更好的几何精度。轻量级测试时精化步骤将预测的三角形集合转换为完全不透明、游戏引擎就绪的表示，支持实时渲染。在相同训练设置下系统分析了3DGS、2DGS和三角形splat变体的表示折衷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次证明可以从视频扩散潜变量直接解码三角形splat，为几何精确的场景生成提供新方法。输出可直接用于游戏引擎和实时渲染，具有实际应用价值。系统分析不同表示的折衷为未来研究提供参考。潜在局限可能包括对复杂场景的泛化性。

title: FLUX3D: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Generation with Diffusion-Aligned Sparse Representation
abstract: Sparse voxel representation has emerged as a scalable foundation for image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) generation, yet current methods struggle to preserve high-frequency visual details of input images due to two structural bottlenecks. First, they adopt discriminative 2D features optimized for semantic abstraction to construct sparse voxel latents, which suppress reconstructive cues and induce a representation bottleneck. Second, in the generation stage, standard diffusion transformers lack effective mechanisms to align dense 2D image tokens with sparse 3D voxel latents, resulting in a cross-modal correspondence bottleneck. To address these issues, we propose FLUX3D, a scalable image-to-3DGS framework that boosts both representation learning and cross-modal alignment during generation. We first revisit 2D feature selection for sparse-voxel-based 3D representation learning, propose Diffusion-Aligned Structured Latents (DA-SLAT) and couple it with a decoder-only architecture to improve 3DGS reconstruction fidelity. We also design a sparse-structure-aware diffusion framework, which integrates the Sparse-structure Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (SMDiT) and Modal-Aware Rotary Positional Embedding (MARoPE) to achieve geometry-agnostic 2D-3D alignment. Extensive benchmark experiments demonstrate that FLUX3D yields substantial improvements in appearance fidelity and significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in generating high-quality 3DGS assets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FLUX3D框架，通过扩散对齐稀疏表示解决3D高斯生成中的高频细节缺失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于稀疏体素的图像到3DGS生成方法难以保持高频视觉细节，原因有二：一是使用判别性2D特征构建稀疏体素潜伏，抑制重建线索；二是标准扩散Transformer缺乏有效机制对齐密集2D图像token与稀疏3D体素潜伏。这些瓶颈导致表示和跨模态对应问题，限制了生成保真度。
light_analysis.method: 提出FLUX3D框架，包含两部分：1) Diffusion-Aligned Structured Latents (DA-SLAT)，重新审视2D特征选择并配合仅解码器架构以提升3DGS重建保真度；2) 稀疏结构感知扩散框架，集成Sparse-structure Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (SMDiT)和Modal-Aware Rotary Positional Embedding (MARoPE)，实现几何无关的2D-3D对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛基准实验中，FLUX3D在外观保真度上取得显著提升，并全面超越所有现有最先进方法，生成高质量3DGS资产。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: FLUX3D通过解决表示和跨模态对齐瓶颈，显著提升了图像到3DGS生成的保真度。其创新在于扩散对齐结构化潜伏和稀疏结构感知扩散框架，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的架构或扩展至多视角生成。

title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
abstract: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct more than 100 controlled ablation experiments to systematically investigate each stage of the pipeline, yielding insights on the importance of task sources and diversity. We then assemble a training set of 100K examples from our pipeline and fine-tune Qwen3-32B on this dataset, which yields an average accuracy of 44.8% across seven agentic benchmarks and a 3.9 percentage point improvement over the strongest existing open data agentic model (Nemotron-Terminal-32B, 40.9%). Moreover, our training data exhibits strong scaling properties, outperforming alternative open datasets at every training set size in compute-controlled comparisons. We publicly release our training sets, data pipeline, experimental data, and models at openthoughts.ai to support future open research on agentic model training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出开放数据流程训练通用智能体模型，通过大量消融实验揭示任务多样性的重要性，并构建100K训练集提升平均准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体语言模型应用广泛，但公开的训练数据整理方法鲜为人知。已有的开源努力如SWE-Smith、SERA等通常针对单一基准，无法训练出能泛化到多种智能体任务的模型。因此需要一种通用的数据整理流程来训练广泛适用的智能体模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent)项目，构建完全开放的数据整理流程。通过100多次受控消融实验系统研究流程各阶段，发现任务来源与多样性的关键作用。基于流程整理100K训练样本，微调Qwen3-32B模型，并在七个智能体基准上评估。公开所有训练集、数据管道、实验数据和模型。
light_analysis.result: 微调后的模型在七个智能体基准上平均准确率44.8%，比最强的现有开源数据智能体模型Nemotron-Terminal-32B（40.9%）提升3.9个百分点。训练数据展现出强扩展性，在每种训练集大小下均优于其他开源数据集（计算量受控比较）。
light_analysis.conclusion: OT-Agent通过开放数据流程和大量消融实验为通用智能体模型训练提供了重要见解。公开资源支持未来研究。局限性包括仅基于Qwen3-32B，未探索更大模型或其他架构；未来可拓展更多任务类型和评估场景。

title: Real vs. Complex Spectral Bases for Neural Operators: The Role of Green's Function Alignment
abstract: Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) learn solution operators of partial differential equations by parameterizing global convolutions in the complex Fourier domain. For real-valued PDE solutions, the complex FFT carries representational redundancy through conjugate symmetry. We introduce the Hartley Neural Operator (HNO), the exact real-valued mirror of FNO: it replaces the FFT with the purely real Discrete Hartley Transform and learns a single real multiplier per retained spectral mode, with no complex arithmetic. Because the real Hartley spectrum is not halved by conjugate symmetry, HNO retains twice as many frequency corners as FNO but one real weight where FNO carries a complex pair, so the two operators are iso-parametric at equal width and differ only in spectral basis. Our central thesis is that the best basis is a property of the operator. Self-adjoint elliptic operators (Poisson, biharmonic) have real, symmetric Green's functions that the real Hartley multiplier diagonalizes exactly, and HNO is favored there. Time-dependent operators carry phase, from oscillation in the wave equation to transport in advection, Burgers, and Navier-Stokes, which a real diagonal multiplier cannot represent, so FNO is favored there, and increasingly so with the operator's phase content, leaving the phaseless heat equation as the borderline case. Training both operators identically and benchmarking across PDE classes, initial-condition families, and boundary conditions, we find an elliptic-versus-time-dependent split that is monotone in operator phase content and matches the Green's-function theory we develop. Rather than a universal winner, our findings give a predictive rule: match the spectral basis to the symmetry of the solution operator.
comment: Submitted to/in consideration for the 62nd Allerton Conference on Communication, Control, and Computing

light_analysis.overview: 提出哈特利神经算子（HNO），作为FNO的严格实值镜像，并给出根据算子对称性选择谱基的预测规则。
light_analysis.motivation: FNO对实值PDE解使用复FFT存在表示冗余（共轭对称）。现有方法忽视算子对称性对谱基选择的影响，导致对特定类型算子非最优。本文旨在通过理论分析和实验验证，明确实值谱基（HNO）与复值谱基（FNO）的适用场景。
light_analysis.method: 引入HNO，用离散哈特利变换（DHT）替代FFT，学习单个实值谱乘子。基于格林函数对称性分析：自伴椭圆算子（泊松、双调和）的实对称格林函数可被HNO精确对角化；时间依赖算子（波动、对流、NS）因含相位，需复值表示。在多种PDE类、初始条件和边界条件下等参数训练HNO和FNO。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明：椭圆型算子（泊松、双调和）HNO表现更优；时间依赖算子（波动、对流、NS）FNO更优且优势随算子相含量单调增加；热方程（无相位）为边界情况。结果与格林函数理论预测一致，验证了谱基选择与算子对称性匹配的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 不存在通用最优神经算子，应基于算子相含量选择谱基：自伴椭圆算子用实谱基（HNO），时间依赖算子用复谱基（FNO）。该发现为算子学习提供了理论指导，但仅考虑两种谱基，未来可探索其他变换。

title: IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation
abstract: Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object counts, spatial relations, attribute bindings, and coarse layouts must be preserved. We attribute this limitation in part to the entanglement of structural planning and appearance rendering within a single conditioning stream. To address this issue, we propose Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought (IV-CoT), a latent visual reasoning framework for query-conditioned image generation. IV-CoT decomposes the visual conditioning queries into a structural-to-semantic cascade, where structural queries first form a latent visual plan and semantic queries then render appearance conditioned on this plan. To guide the structural queries, we introduce training-only sketch supervision, which encourages them to capture structure from sketches without requiring sketch extraction or intermediate decoding at inference time. IV-CoT performs implicit CoT reasoning in a single forward pass and achieves superior results on GenEval and T2I-CompBench. Visualizations and analyses demonstrate that the learned structural and semantic queries play complementary roles in structure-aware generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出隐式视觉链式思维(IV-CoT)框架，将结构规划与外观渲染解耦，通过结构-语义级联提升文本到图像生成的结构遵循能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 统一多模态大语言模型在文本到图像生成中难以准确遵循结构感知提示（如对象计数、空间关系等），原因是结构规划与外观渲染在单一条件流中纠缠。现有方法无法有效分离两者，导致生成结果在结构细节上不足。
light_analysis.method: IV-CoT将视觉条件查询分解为结构到语义的级联：结构查询首先形成潜在视觉计划，语义查询再基于该计划渲染外观。引入仅训练使用的草图监督，引导结构查询捕获草图中的结构信息，推理时无需草图提取或中间解码。通过单次前向传播实现隐式CoT推理。
light_analysis.result: 在GenEval和T2I-CompBench上取得优越结果。可视化与分析表明，学习的结构和语义查询在结构感知生成中发挥互补作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过隐式视觉链式思维有效解耦结构规划与外观渲染，提升了多模态大语言模型在结构感知图像生成中的性能。该方法具有通用性，未来可扩展到更复杂的视觉推理任务。

title: Spherical-to-ERP Epipolar Rectification for Single-Axis Disparity in 360 Stereo
abstract: Omnidirectional stereo images provide full-surround perception but violate the geometric assumptions of classical disparity estimation: in spherical or fisheye views, epipolar correspondences follow curved great-circle paths, producing two-dimensional displacements that cannot be treated as single-axis disparity before geometric rectification. In this work, we adopt a standard spherical-to-equirectangular (ERP) projection as a preprocessing step, which straightens epipolar curves and restores a one-dimensional disparity structure - horizontal for left-right rigs and vertical for top-bottom rigs. Building on our previously introduced RAFT + Epipolar-Aligned Channel Selection (EACS) framework, originally developed for rectilinear and ERP stereo, we examine whether the same modular pipeline remains accurate when the input originates from spherical stereo imagery. After ERP projection, dense optical flow from RAFT is reduced to disparity by retaining only the baseline-aligned flow component. Experiments on synthetic fisheye stereo datasets show that this spherical-to-ERP-to-RAFT+EACS pipeline produces accurate, smooth, and structurally consistent disparity maps at real-time speed. These findings confirm that established ERP preprocessing can be effectively combined with our earlier RAFT+EACS method to enable practical, interpretable, and efficient disparity estimation from spherical stereo, providing a straightforward pathway for extending conventional stereo pipelines to 360 imaging.

light_analysis.overview: 提出球面到ERP极线校正方法，将球面立体图像的二维对应恢复为一维视差，结合RAFT+EACS实现实时且准确的视差估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 全景立体图像提供全环绕感知，但球面或鱼眼视图中的极线对应遵循弯曲的大圆路径，产生二维位移，无法直接作为单轴视差处理。现有经典视差估计算法基于直线极线的几何假设，不适用于球面立体。因此需要几何校正以恢复一维视差结构，从而使现有立体管道可扩展至360度成像。
light_analysis.method: 采用标准球面到等距柱状投影（ERP）作为预处理步骤，将极线曲线拉直，恢复一维视差结构：水平基线为水平视差，垂直基线为垂直视差。结合先前提出的RAFT+EACS框架（用于直线和ERP立体），对ERP投影后的图像，通过RAFT计算密集光流，再保留基线对齐的光流分量得到视差。该方法为模块化管道，无需重新训练。
light_analysis.result: 在合成鱼眼立体数据集上的实验表明，所提球面-ERP-RAFT+EACS管线能生成准确、平滑且结构一致的视差图，且达到实时速度。验证了ERP预处理与RAFT+EACS方法的有效结合，为将传统立体管道扩展到360度成像提供了可行途径。摘要未提具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究确认了标准ERP预处理可以有效地与先前RAFT+EACS方法结合，实现从球面立体中实用、可解释且高效的视差估计。为将常规立体管道扩展到360度成像提供了直接路径。潜在局限性：仅基于合成数据集验证，未来需在真实全景数据上测试。

title: Bridging the Manifold Gap: Riemannian Residual Line Search for One-Step Image Editing
abstract: One-step diffusion editors are fast because they avoid inversion and iterative optimization, but a single transport update must be aggressive enough to realize the target prompt and conservative enough to preserve the source image--and no fixed update strength satisfies both demands across edit types. We treat this tension as a post-hoc candidate-selection problem on top of energy-field transport rather than as a new editing model. Our proposed method, Riemannian Residual Line Search, first builds a stronger edit by estimating the local time curvature of the prompt-delta field and projecting the corrected direction back onto the update norm of the original first-order energy-field transport estimation. It then forms a small residual path from the source image to this strong edit, retains the original first-order output as one candidate, and picks the final image by maximizing target-prompt CLIP alignment. On a 700-sample PIE-Bench++ evaluation across 10 edit type IDs, our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance among current one-step update algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出黎曼残差线搜索方法，通过估计能量场曲率修正单步扩散编辑方向，实现无需迭代的SOTA编辑效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 单步扩散编辑器因无需反演和迭代优化而快速，但单一固定强度的传输更新无法同时满足目标提示的激进性和源图像的保真性。现有方法缺乏自适应调整机制，导致编辑效果在不同类型编辑任务中不稳定。本文将该矛盾视为能量场传输后的候选选择问题，而非设计新编辑模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出黎曼残差线搜索：首先估计提示增量场的局部时间曲率，将校正方向投影回原始一阶能量场传输估计的更新范数，构建从源图像到强编辑的残差路径；保留原始一阶输出作为候选，最后通过最大化目标提示CLIP对齐度选择最终图像。方法在能量场传输基础上仅需少量后处理，不依赖额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在包含700个样本的PIE-Bench++数据集上，覆盖10种编辑类型ID，该方法在所有当前单步更新算法中取得了最优性能（SOTA）。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但明确超越了其他单步方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过将编辑强度矛盾转化为后验候选选择问题，利用黎曼几何优化传输方向，在不牺牲速度的前提下显著提升编辑质量。其残差路径策略兼顾了保真度和编辑强度，为单步扩散编辑提供了实用框架。未来可探索更高效的曲率估计或扩展到多步编辑场景。

title: World Models in Pieces: Structural Certification for General Agents
abstract: In the big-world regime, agents cannot be universally capable and their ability is inevitably specialized across a world model in pieces. Consequently, standard uniform guarantees fail to distinguish between the understanding of critical bottlenecks and irrelevant failures. We first formalize this limitation by proving that general agents are not universal, rendering standard worst-case analysis uninformative. To overcome this, we introduce structural certification, a transition-local framework that maps bounded goal-conditioned performance to entry-wise guarantees on the agent's internal world model. Our main contribution is constructive. We provide algorithms that filter specific transitions using deep compositional goals and prove that a general agent on these goals has a structural world model with a $\mathcal{O}(1/n) + \mathcal{O}(δ)$ error bound. Conversely, this bound is tight in the small-$δ$ regime, whose existence is explicitly guaranteed by our certification. These results enable the certifiable deployment of general agents by localizing the specific transitions where long-horizon planning is reliable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构认证框架，将通用agent的局部规划能力映射到世界模型的逐项保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 在复杂大世界环境中，通用agent无法全知全能，其能力必然专精于世界模型碎片。现有标准统一保证无法区分关键瓶颈与无关失败，导致最坏情况分析无效。因此需要一种新认证方法，定位agent可靠规划的具体转换，实现可认证部署。
light_analysis.method: 引入结构认证，一种过渡局部框架，将有界目标条件性能映射为agent内部世界模型的逐项保证。通过深度组合目标过滤特定转换，算法构造结构世界模型，证明其误差界为O(1/n)+O(δ)，且在小δ区域该界紧。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明通用agent非万能，提出结构认证框架及构造算法，实现误差界O(1/n)+O(δ)且紧。该方法定位长时规划可靠的特定转换，使通用agent可认证部署于大世界环境。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是结构认证，克服标准统一保证局限，为通用agent提供局部可认证性。理论和实际价值在于聚焦关键瓶颈，规避无关失败。未来可扩展至更复杂环境与目标。

title: Matching Tasks to Objectives: Fine-Tuning and Prompt-Tuning Strategies for Encoder-Decoder Pre-trained Language Models
abstract: Prompt-based learning has emerged as a dominant paradigm in natural language processing. This study explores the impact of diverse pre-training objectives on the performance of encoder-decoder pre-trained language models across generation and question answering tasks, with a focus on commonsense knowledge retrieval and completion. We highlight the benefits of incorporating multiple objectives during both pre-training and fine-tuning stages. We introduce the Match Task to Objective (MTO) framework and methods for determining the appropriate objective for a given task. This framework offers automated methods to prepare task-related data for adaptation through unsupervised training, based on the identified objective. In the fine-tuning stage, we design novel templates that align with the objectives of the pre-training and adaptation stages. When aligned with task requirements, these strategies can achieve a performance gain of over 120\% compared to conventional methods in few-shot settings. They significantly outperform related works in few-shot settings and exceed the baseline even in full-dataset scenarios. Furthermore, we extend this approach to include prompt-tuning methodologies, providing guidance for more effective soft prompt engineering and optimization. Our strategies significantly enhance prompt-tuning performance as well. These insights hold substantial value, precisely guiding the selection and optimization of models customized for specific tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/puraminy/MTO/

light_analysis.overview: 提出MTO框架，通过匹配任务与预训练目标，显著提升编码器-解码器预训练语言模型在少样本和全数据场景下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 提示学习已成为自然语言处理的主导范式，但如何根据不同任务选择适当的预训练目标仍缺乏系统研究。现有方法未能充分利用预训练目标与任务之间的匹配关系，导致性能受限。尤其在少样本场景下，传统方法效果不佳。因此，研究如何自动匹配任务与目标并设计对齐的模板以适应不同任务具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 提出Match Task to Objective (MTO)框架，包括自动方法根据任务确定合适的预训练目标，并基于该目标通过无监督方式准备任务相关数据进行适配。在微调阶段，设计新颖模板，使其与预训练和适配阶段的目标对齐。此外，将方法扩展至提示调整，提供软提示工程和优化的指导。该方法可应用于生成和问答任务，聚焦常识知识检索与补全。
light_analysis.result: 在少样本设置下，所提策略相比传统方法性能提升超过120%；在少样本场景下显著优于相关工作，即使在全数据集场景下也超越基线。同时，该方法也显著增强了提示调整的性能。具体数据指标（如准确率）摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是引入MTO框架及自动匹配方法，揭示了任务与预训练目标匹配的重要性，为模型选择和优化提供了精确指导。具有重要的学术价值，可应用于定制化自然语言处理任务。未来工作可探索更广泛的任务类型和目标。代码已开源。

title: Grading the Grader: Lessons from Evaluating an Agentic Data Analysis System
abstract: Agentic data analysis systems produce rich outputs, including code, numerical results, and verbal diagnostics. This makes them more challenging to evaluate than single-turn LLM responses. It is therefore necessary to distinguish genuine disagreement between an agent's output and a ground-truth answer from grading artifacts. We investigate how reliably automated graders assess such a system and what strategies improve grading quality by applying LAMBDA, a multi-agent data-analysis system, on 153 numerical QRData tasks from DSGym. We develop and evaluate a three-layer human-AI grading cascade: strict regex matching, LLM-based lenient grading, and snippet-based human inspection, which combines non-GenAI and GenAI strategies with different failure profiles. Both automated graders achieve 100% observed precision (0/70 false positives). The lenient grader's recall is 97% against human labels. A keyword-anchored extraction pipeline raises the strict grader's recall by 60 percentage points over a last-number heuristic; the lenient grader is architecturally parser-independent. An iterative nudge mechanism raises grading run success from 36% to 97% and lenient-pass rates from 16% to 46%; comparing nudging with and without original-question re-injection shows that re-injection offers no benefit, confirming the nudge as an answer template cue. We further observe in this case study that variable type is the task metadata field most consistently associated with grading pipeline dynamics and observed outcome grades.

light_analysis.overview: 提出三级人机评估级联用于评估代理数据分析系统，实现高精确率和召回率。
light_analysis.motivation: 代理数据分析系统产生丰富输出（代码、数值、文本诊断），使得评估比单轮LLM响应更困难。需要区分真实差异与评估人为因素，以确保评估可靠性。现有方法如严格匹配或单一LLM评估存在不足，因此研究如何可靠地自动评估此类系统并改进评估质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出LAMBDA多代理数据分析系统，在153个QRData数值任务上开发并评估三级人机评估级联：严格正则匹配、基于LLM的宽松评估和基于代码片段的人工审查。结合非生成式AI与生成式AI策略。使用关键词锚定提取管道提高严格评估器召回率，并引入迭代提示机制提高评估成功率。
light_analysis.result: 自动评估器精确率100%（0/70假阳性），宽松评估器召回率97%（相对人工标签）。关键词锚定提取使严格评估器召回率比后数字启发式提高60个百分点。迭代提示机制将评估运行成功率从36%提升至97%，宽松通过率从16%提升至46%，且无需原始问题重新注入。变量类型是最相关的任务元数据字段。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明组合非生成式和生成式策略能可靠评估复杂的数据分析系统。三级级联有效平衡精确性和召回率。迭代提示机制显著提升评估稳定性。变量类型对评估结果影响显著。未来可探索更多任务类型和评估自动化。

title: Accuracy and Satisfaction in Multi-Turn LLM Dialogues for NFR Assessment
abstract: LLM-based dialogue assistants have become mainstream tools for software developers, yet current evaluation benchmarks focus exclusively on functional correctness. This leaves a critical gap in assessing the quality and accuracy of these conversations when handling Non-Functional Requirements (NFRs), which are inherently vague, context-dependent, and involve many parts of a program. Evaluating how well these systems support collaborative reasoning about NFRs requires methods that go beyond single-turn accuracy to capture both the correctness of the system's outputs and the quality of the multi-turn interaction. In this paper, we investigate the accuracy and quality of multi-turn conversations between developers and an LLM-based agent in the domain of Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) regulatory compliance. We hired 49 programmers to interact with GitHub Copilot to assess 148 HIPAA-derived NFRs against the iTrust codebase, a system designed to comply with HIPAA regulations, across three dimensions: requirement satisfaction level, reasoning, and code localization. We find that developers tend to agree with LLM assessments, but accuracy against expert ground truth is low. We model user satisfaction and find that longer system responses and more information-providing turns negatively affect user satisfaction, whereas proactive interactions positively affect it. Our findings provide insights for designing LLM-based dialogue systems that support NFR assessment.
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to SIGDIAL 2026 (27th Annual Meeting of the Special Interest Group on Discourse and Dialogue)

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究LLM在多轮对话中评估非功能性需求（NFRs）的准确性和用户满意度，发现开发者倾向于同意LLM但准确性低，且系统响应长度和提供信息轮次负向影响满意度，而主动交互正向影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM对话助手的评估基准仅关注功能性正确性，忽略了非功能性需求（NFRs）评估的质量和准确性。NFRs本身模糊、依赖上下文且涉及程序多个部分，现有单轮准确性方法无法捕捉多轮交互的协作推理质量。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过真实场景（HIPAA合规性）评估多轮对话的准确性和用户满意度。
light_analysis.method: 招募49名程序员，使用GitHub Copilot与iTrust代码库交互，对148个HIPAA衍生的NFRs进行三维评估：需求满足程度、推理和代码定位。通过对话记录分析准确性与用户满意度，构建模型分析系统响应长度、信息提供轮次和主动交互对满意度的影响。
light_analysis.result: 开发者倾向于认同LLM的评估，但与专家标注的ground truth对比，准确性较低。用户满意度建模显示，较长的系统响应和更多信息提供轮次会降低满意度，而主动交互（如提问）则提升满意度。摘要未提供具体数值，如准确率或满意度评分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了LLM在辅助NFR评估中的不足：用户感知准确但实际准确性差，且对话设计影响满意度。为LLM对话系统设计提供了指导：应减少冗长回复，增加主动交互。未来可探索提升准确性的方法及更广泛NFR域的应用。

title: Difference-Making without Making a Difference
abstract: Over a series of seven papers, Andreas & Günther have introduced seven definitions of actual causation and have classified them as belonging to three different, competing, types of accounts: factual difference-making, counterfactual difference-making, and regularity-based. I show that their most recent - factual difference-making - definition instantiates all three types, thereby proving that these are distinctions without a difference. I further compare their novel account to the other six accounts on several crucial examples, revealing that this undermines all seven of their accounts.

light_analysis.overview: 证明Andreas和Günther的七种实际因果定义实为无差别区分，并指出其最新定义削弱了所有定义的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在因果关系理论中，Andreas和Günther提出了七种实际因果定义，分为事实差异制造、反事实差异制造和基于规律性三类。然而，这些分类之间的区分是否真实存在尚待验证，且不同定义在关键案例上的表现可能影响因果理论的统一性。明确这些定义的内在关系对于因果推理的理论基础至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过逻辑分析，证明Andreas和Günther的最新事实差异制造定义同时蕴含了反事实和规律性两种类型，从而表明三类划分是人为的。随后，将新定义与其他六个定义在多个关键案例上进行对比，揭示其内在矛盾，最终系统性地削弱了所有七个定义的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 作者成功证明了事实差异制造定义并非独立类型，而是混合体；在关键案例对比中，该定义与其他定义的一致性被打破，导致七个定义整体上缺乏自洽性。摘要未提供定量结果，但逻辑论证表明现有因果定义框架存在根本缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了Andreas和Günther因果分类系统的深层问题，表明事实差异制造、反事实差异制造和基于规律性三类实为无本质区别。这一结论对于因果推理的理论构建具有批判性意义，但未提出替代方案。未来需重新审视实际因果的定义基础。

title: GeoT2V-Bench: Benchmarking 3D Consistency in Text-to-Video Models via 3D Reconstruction
abstract: Camera-prompted text-to-video (T2V) models are increasingly used to synthesize virtual camera captures, such as orbiting objects or moving through static scenes. For these outputs, visual plausibility is insufficient: the generated frames should also provide coherent multi-view evidence for a single static 3D scene. We introduce GeoT2V-Bench, a reconstruction-based diagnostic benchmark for evaluating whether camera-prompted T2V clips can support explicit rigid 3D reconstruction. Our pipeline estimates per-frame camera intrinsics and poses with VGGT-style geometry estimation, fits DeformableGS, derives a static MedianGS proxy by temporal-median aggregation, and renders this proxy along the estimated camera path. Instead of producing a pass/fail label or a single scalar score, GeoT2V-Bench reports a continuous reconstruction profile covering apparent image motion, estimated trajectory behavior, MedianGS static rendering error, static-render flow agreement, and the gap between flexible and static fits. On a fair-format four-seed evaluation with 3,840 completed reconstructions from 12 open-weight model configurations and 80 GeCo-Eval static-scene prompts, we find that visible motion, static rendering error, flow agreement, and flexible-vs-static behavior often disagree. GeoT2V-Bench therefore captures complementary failure modes that emerge when generated videos are tested as global static-scene acquisitions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoT2V-Bench基准，通过显式3D重建评估相机提示文本生成视频的3D一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 相机提示的T2V模型虽能合成视觉合理的视频，但缺乏对生成帧是否支撑单一静态3D场景的评估。现有方法无法诊断3D一致性失败，GeoT2V-Bench填补了这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 采用VGGT估计每帧相机内参和位姿，拟合可变形高斯溅射（DeformableGS），通过时间中值聚合获得静态MedianGS代理，并沿估计相机路径渲染。输出连续重建剖面，涵盖图像运动、轨迹行为、静态渲染误差、流一致性和灵活与静态拟合差距。
light_analysis.result: 在12个开源模型、80个静态场景提示和四种子评估下完成3840次重建。发现可见运动、静态渲染误差、流一致性和灵活-静态行为常不一致，揭示了互补的失败模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoT2V-Bench有效捕捉生成视频作为全局静态场景采集时的失败模式，为提升T2V模型3D一致性提供诊断工具。未来可扩展至更多模型和动态场景。

title: Less is More: Quality-Aware Training Data Selection for Scientific Summarization
abstract: Scientific long-document summarization datasets commonly treat author-written abstracts as gold reference summaries, although their quality and alignment with the source article vary. At the same time, publicly available scientific summarization datasets remain limited in scale and structure for modern long-context models. In this work, we address both challenges by a) constructing and releasing one of the largest biomedical and life science datasets for long-document summarization, containing 1.88 million PMC articles, and b) analyzing the reference quality of author-written abstracts with source-grounded and model-based metrics. We show that author-written abstracts vary in their alignment with the full article and that these quality signals can guide training-data selection. Training on selected high-quality subsets outperforms random sampling at matched training sizes and can match or exceed larger random subsets on factuality-oriented metrics. Our findings suggest that reference quality is an important factor in scientific summarization and that quality-aware data selection can improve training efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 论文构建了包含188万PMC文章的生物医学长文档摘要数据集，并提出基于参考摘要质量感知的训练数据选择方法，验证了“少即是多”的效率提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有科学文献摘要数据集存在作者编写摘要质量不一、与原文对齐程度差异的问题，且公开数据集规模和结构有限，难以满足现代长上下文模型的需求。该研究旨在同时解决数据质量和规模两方面的挑战，通过构建大规模数据集并分析参考摘要质量，探索基于质量的数据选择以提升训练效率。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含188万篇PMC文章的生物医学和生命科学长文档摘要数据集，为目前最大规模之一。利用基于原文和模型的指标（如对齐度、事实性）评估作者编写摘要的质量，根据质量信号选择高质量子集进行训练。训练过程中比较了随机采样和质量感知采样的效果。
light_analysis.result: 在相同训练数据量下，使用高质量子集训练的模型性能优于随机采样子集；在事实性导向指标上，高质量子集可匹配甚至超越更大的随机子集。表明质量感知数据选择能够显著提升训练效率，验证了少而精数据的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 参考摘要质量是科学摘要任务的重要因素，质量感知的数据选择能有效提升训练效率。构建的大规模数据集为长上下文模型提供了宝贵资源。未来可进一步探索更精细的质量评估指标和选择策略。

title: L3Cube-MahaPOS: A Marathi Part-of-Speech Tagging Dataset and BERT Models
abstract: Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging is a foundational NLP task underpinning machine translation, information extraction, and syntactic parsing. Despite Marathi being spoken by over 83 million people and ranking among the top twenty most spoken languages worldwide, it remains severely under-resourced in annotated corpora and standardised evaluation benchmarks. Marathi presents unique challenges for computational modelling owing to its rich morphology, relatively free word order, lack of capitalisation conventions, and pervasive code-mixing with Hindi and English. We introduce L3Cube-MahaPOS, a gold-standard POS tagging dataset for Marathi comprising 32,354 manually annotated sentences drawn from news text. Annotation was performed entirely manually by a team of Marathi-proficient annotators following a 16-tag Universal Dependencies-aligned scheme. A structured preprocessing pipeline covering Unicode normalisation, Devanagari-aware tokenisation, and noise filtering ensures label consistency across all splits. We benchmark the dataset across six model families spanning HMM, CRF, BiLSTM, BiLSTM+CharCNN, MuRIL, and the Marathi-specific transformer MahaBERT-v2. The best system achieves 88.67\% token-level accuracy and a macro-F1 of 81.67% over 15 evaluated tag classes. We release the dataset, annotation guidelines, and trained model checkpoints to foster further research in Marathi NLP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个大规模马拉地语POS标注数据集L3Cube-MahaPOS，并基于MahaBERT-v2取得最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 马拉地语拥有8300万使用者，但严重缺乏标注语料库和标准化评估基准。现有NLP资源多集中于英语等主流语言，马拉地语因形态丰富、词序自由、缺少大写约定以及与印地语、英语的混合代码等特性，给计算建模带来独特挑战。构建高质量的POS标注数据集是推动该语言NLP研究的基础。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含32,354句手工标注新闻文本的L3Cube-MahaPOS数据集，采用16标签的Universal Dependencies对齐方案，由马拉地语熟练的标注员完全人工标注。设计了预处理流程，包括Unicode标准化、天城体感知分词和噪声过滤。在HMM、CRF、BiLSTM、BiLSTM+CharCNN、MuRIL以及马拉地语专用Transformer MahaBERT-v2等六类模型上进行基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型MahaBERT-v2在15个标签上达到88.67%的token级准确率和81.67%的宏F1分数。摘要未明确说明与其他基线模型的详细对比，但提及了六类模型家族的基准测试，表明Transformer模型显著优于传统方法。数据集和模型已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作填补了马拉地语POS标注资源的空白，为低资源语言NLP提供了高质量基准。数据集和模型开源有利于促进相关研究。未来可扩展至更多语言变体、领域或语法任务，并探索跨语言迁移等方向。

title: Solving Inverse Problems of Chaotic Systems with Bidirectional Conditional Flow Matching
abstract: Modeling chaotic systems is crucial yet challenging. Inverse problems in chaotic dynamics, namely inferring initial conditions from final states, remain largely unsolved because of ill-posedness, non-uniqueness, instability, and potentially chaotic time-reverse dynamics. We address this open problem with Bidirectional Conditional Flow Matching (Bi-CFM), which learns bidirectional mappings between distributions of initial and final states to capture the stochasticity of chaotic evolution and mitigate exponential error accumulation over time. Furthermore, for systems with conservation laws, we extend it to Conservation-constrained Bi-CFM (CBi-CFM). Across the classic Lorenz, Circuit, and high-dimensional Lorenz 96 systems, Bi-CFM improves five distribution-level metrics over baselines while achieving a speedup of more than two orders of magnitude. In the three-body planet-planet scattering problem in planetary dynamics, CBi-CFM better respects conservation laws, with conservation errors comparable to those of the ground truth. Finally, on real observations of globular clusters, collisional million-body systems shaped by $\sim 10^{10}$ years (10 Gyr) of evolution, our method represents an advance in accuracy, establishing a scalable route to solving inverse problems of long-timescale real-world chaotic dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双向条件流匹配（Bi-CFM）解决混沌系统逆问题，实现高效、高精度的初始状态推断。
light_analysis.motivation: 混沌系统的逆问题（从最终状态推断初始条件）因不适定性、非唯一性、不稳定性和时间反向动力学混沌而极具挑战。现有方法难以处理误差指数累积和守恒定律约束。该研究旨在解决这一开放问题，尤其针对长时间尺度的真实世界混沌动力学。
light_analysis.method: 提出双向条件流匹配（Bi-CFM），学习初始和最终状态分布间的双向映射，捕获混沌演化的随机性并缓解误差累积。对于具有守恒定律的系统，扩展为守恒约束Bi-CFM（CBi-CFM）。在Lorenz、Circuit和Lorenz 96系统上评估，使用分布级指标。
light_analysis.result: 在经典Lorenz、Circuit和高维Lorenz 96系统上，Bi-CFM在五项分布级指标上优于基线，并实现超过两个数量级的加速。在三体行星散射问题中，CBi-CFM的守恒误差与真实值相当。在真实球状星团观测上（~10^10年演化），方法在精度上取得进步。
light_analysis.conclusion: Bi-CFM和CBi-CFM为混沌系统逆问题提供了可行方案，显著提升效率和准确性，尤其适用于长时标真实世界动力学。该方法在行星动力学和天体物理等领域有重要应用潜力，但未明确讨论局限性。

title: SHERLOC: Structured Diagnostic Localization for Code Repair Agents
abstract: LLM agents solve repository-level coding tasks through multi-turn tool use, but utilize half their budget on locating faults before editing. Dedicated localization frameworks have emerged, yet are still evaluated as file retrieval rather than actionable diagnosis, producing locations without the diagnostic context a repair agent needs. We introduce SHERLOC (Structured Hypothesis-driven Exploration and Reasoning for Localization), a training-free framework pairing a reasoning LLM with compact repository tools and self-recovery, without fine-tuning or multi-agent orchestration. SHERLOC reaches state-of-the-art localization across model scales: 84.33% accuracy@1 on SWE-Bench Lite and 81.27% recall@1 on SWE-Bench Verified; at ~30B parameters, it matches or outperforms other agentic methods. Injecting our locations and diagnostic findings into repair agents yields, on average, +5.95 pp resolve rate on SWE-Bench Verified while cutting localization and total tokens by 36.7% and 23.1%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SHERLOC框架，通过结构化假设驱动推理实现代码修复中的诊断定位，无需训练即达最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理在仓库级代码修复中，约一半预算用于定位故障，但现有定位框架仅评估文件检索而非可操作诊断，缺乏修复代理所需的诊断上下文。因此亟需一种能提供完整诊断信息的高效定位方法，以提升修复效率。
light_analysis.method: SHERLOC是一种无需训练的框架，结合推理LLM与紧凑仓库工具及自我恢复机制。通过结构化假设驱动探索和推理（Structured Hypothesis-driven Exploration and Reasoning）进行定位，无需微调或多智能体协调。该方法在多个模型规模上均适用。
light_analysis.result: 在SWE-Bench Lite上达到84.33% accuracy@1，在SWE-Bench Verified上达到81.27% recall@1，约30B参数下匹配或超越其他代理方法。将定位结果及诊断发现注入修复代理后，修复率平均提升5.95个百分点，同时定位token减少36.7%，总token减少23.1%。
light_analysis.conclusion: SHERLOC提供了一种高效、可操作的诊断定位方法，显著提升代码修复率并降低计算成本。其无需训练的特性便于部署，有望应用于各类代码修复场景。未来可探索与更多模型及工具的结合。

title: High-Fidelity Synthetic Transmission Electron Microscopy Image Generation Using Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Data-Limited Semiconductor Metrology
abstract: Advanced semiconductor nodes drastically increased demand for Transmission Electron Microscopy (TEM), yet destructive sample preparation, slow imaging and high costs severely limit the availability of diverse datasets needed for downstream machine learning (ML). Synthetic data generation is becoming essential, but current generative models often miss TEM-specific noise, structural detail, and stochastic variability crucial for evaluation. We present a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) framework for synthetic TEM image generation under extreme data scarcity. A progressive patch-based training strategy scales from low-resolution patches to full images, enabling from-scratch training with only 15 samples. We integrate a custom TrivialAugment adaptation, cross-process domain transfer, classifier guidance, and RePaint-style inpainting, culminating in full-image generation that preserves global structural and spatial relationships in compliance with FAB metrology requirements. Beyond synthesis, we repurpose DDPM feature representations for segmentation, partitioning encoder feature maps to obtain coherent region masks. Our synthetic images achieve up to MS-SSIM > 0.98 and qualitative expert assessment consistent with structural similarity results, facilitating downstream ML training for defect detection, segmentation, and metrology while preserving statistical and physical realism.
comment: To be presented at the 2026 International Symposium ELMAR, published by IEEE in the conference proceedings

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于扩散概率模型的合成透射电镜图像生成框架，在数据极端稀缺条件下实现高保真合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 先进半导体节点对透射电镜（TEM）需求激增，但破坏性样品制备、慢速成像和高成本严重限制了多样化数据集的获取，阻碍下游机器学习应用。现有生成模型难以捕捉TEM特有的噪声、结构细节和随机变异性，无法满足计量学评估需求。
light_analysis.method: 采用去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM），提出渐进式基于块的训练策略，从低分辨率块逐步扩展到全图像，仅用15个样本即可从头训练。集成自适应TrivialAugment、跨过程域迁移、分类器引导和RePaint风格修复，生成符合制造计量要求的全图像。此外，利用DDPM特征表示进行分割，划分编码器特征图获取区域掩码。
light_analysis.result: 合成图像在多尺度结构相似性（MS-SSIM）上超过0.98，专家定性评估与结构相似性结果一致。生成图像支持缺陷检测、分割和计量学等下游机器学习训练，同时保持统计和物理真实性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了半导体计量中TEM数据稀缺问题，生成高保真合成图像，满足工业计量要求。方法可扩展至其他数据稀缺成像领域，未来可探索更高效的域自适应或结合物理模型进一步提升真实性。

title: DDStereo: Efficient Dual Decoder Transformers for Stereo 3D Road Anomaly Detection
abstract: Stereo-based 3D object detection still faces two critical safety challenges: real-time performance and open-set generalization. Existing stereo 3D methods typically achieve twice the accuracy of monocular methods but suffer from significantly lower inference speeds, making them unsuitable for real-time applications. Meanwhile, recent advances in open-world detection have introduced open-set and open-vocabulary algorithms in monocular 2D and 3D settings, yet stereo-based open-set detection remains largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose DDStereo, a novel Dual-Decoder Stereo Transformer for real-time open-set 3D object detection. DDStereo features two lightweight decoder branches: one for open-set foreground 2D detection and the other for 3D attribute regression. These decoders share object-level queries to achieve unified target-level alignment. To enhance inference efficiency, we designed a compact disparity feature extractor and a streamlined decoder architecture. Experiments on public stereo 3D benchmarks demonstrate that DDStereo achieves state-of-the-art accuracy under both closed-set and open-set protocols. Notably, our method surpasses existing stereo 3D detectors in inference speed and, for the first time, achieves real-time performance comparable to monocular approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DDStereo双解码器立体Transformer，首次实现实时开放集立体3D目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有立体3D检测方法虽精度优于单目，但推理速度慢，无法满足实时应用需求；单目开放集检测已有进展，但立体开放集检测尚未被探索。本研究旨在解决立体3D检测的实时性和开放集泛化两大安全挑战。
light_analysis.method: DDStereo采用双轻量级解码器分支：一个用于开放集前景2D检测，另一个用于3D属性回归，两者通过共享对象级查询实现统一目标级对齐。为提升推理效率，设计了紧凑的视差特征提取器和精简解码器架构。
light_analysis.result: 在公开立体3D基准上，DDStereo在闭集和开放集协议下均达到最先进精度，且推理速度超越现有立体检测器，首次实现与单目方法相当的实时性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: DDStereo填补了立体开放集检测的空白，实现了实时高性能检测，对自动驾驶等安全关键应用具有重要价值。未来可进一步优化轻量化设计以适配更多平台。

title: OrbitForge: Text-to-3D Scene Generation via Reconstruction-Anchored Video Synthesis
abstract: Generic text-to-video models can be used as rich open-world scene priors. Despite the high quality of today's generated videos, they do not directly yield reliable 3D assets: camera motion is difficult to control, view coverage is partial, and frames often contain inconsistencies across time. We introduce OrbitForge, an adapter built from frozen video priors and per-prompt Gaussian Splatting reconstruction optimization that converts a single text-generated video into a canonical closed-orbit 3D Gaussian Splatting scene. We use 3D reconstruction as an anchor to improve the 3D consistency of the generated video. We obtain a preliminary 3D reconstruction from a first generated video via Deformable Gaussian Splatting with a robust MedianGS proxy. We render views from a prescribed orbit to detect missing viewpoints. OrbitForge uses the text-to-video model to complete only the missing views, and reconstructs the completed orbit into a final Gaussian Splatting scene. This design requires no task-specific video or multiview fine-tuning, avoids per-prompt score-distillation optimization, and does not progressively generate views one step at a time. We further argue that this setting demands coverage-aware evaluation: local smoothness alone rewards methods that never attempt a full orbit. On a frozen 300-prompt T3Bench-derived audit, OrbitForge reconstruction attains a 359.0-degree measured median span, raises originally unsupported-bin Q10 ImageReward from 8.07 to 16.36 relative to MedianGS-only reconstruction, while remaining competitive with VideoMV on the coverage-quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OrbitForge，通过重建锚定的视频合成将文本生成视频转换为一致3D场景，无需任务微调或分数蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用文本到视频模型虽可作为开放世界场景先验，但生成的视频难以直接用于3D资产：相机运动难以控制、视图覆盖不全、帧间不一致。现有方法需要特定微调或渐进式生成，限制了实用性。OrbitForge旨在解决这些问题，通过重建锚定提升3D一致性。
light_analysis.method: OrbitForge利用冻结的视频先验和每提示的Gaussian Splatting重建优化。先从生成的视频通过可变形Gaussian Splatting和稳健的MedianGS代理获得初步3D重建，再从预设轨道渲染视图检测缺失视角，然后仅用文本到视频模型补全缺失视图，最终将完整轨道重建为Gaussian Splatting场景。避免了任务特定微调和分数蒸馏。
light_analysis.result: 在300提示的T3Bench测试中，OrbitForge重建实现了359.0度的测量中位跨度，将原本不支持bin的Q10 ImageReward从8.07提升到16.36（相比仅MedianGS重建），与VideoMV在覆盖质量上保持竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: OrbitForge提供了一种无需特定微调或分数蒸馏的方法，从单个文本生成视频中构建一致3D场景。其覆盖感知评估框架揭示了局部平滑性指标的不足。该方法在开放世界场景生成中具有应用价值，未来可探索更高效的补全策略。

title: EG-VQA: Benchmarking Verifiable Video Question Answering with Grounded Temporal Evidence
abstract: Recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have yielded promising performance on video question answering (VideoQA). Nevertheless, existing benchmarks are predominantly evaluated through answer correctness, while the grounding of predictions in relevant video evidence remains largely unexamined. This disconnect between answer generation and evidence understanding motivates the construction of the Evidence-Grounded Video Question Answering Benchmark (EG-VQA), an open-ended evaluation protocol in which each QA pair is explicitly annotated with supporting temporal evidence, thereby requiring joint reasoning and precise evidence localization. EG-VQA is comprised of 2,067 videos and 11,838 QA pairs with fine-grained evidence annotations. To evaluate predicted evidence, Evidence-Grounded F1 (EG-F1) is introduced as a unified metric in which temporal alignment and semantic consistency against ground-truth evidence are jointly measured. Experimental evaluation reveals that even strong proprietary models struggle to accurately ground their predictions, exposing a fundamental discrepancy between answer correctness and faithful evidence localization. To bridge this gap, EG-Reasoner, an evidence-grounded reasoning model trained with explicit supervision, is proposed. State-of-the-art performance is achieved among open-source models, with results competitive against proprietary systems, particularly pronounced gains are observed on reasoning-intensive tasks such as counterfactual questions. These findings demonstrate that scaling alone is insufficient for robust video understanding and that structured evidence supervision is essential for the development of more reliable and interpretable VideoQA systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EG-VQA基准和EG-F1指标，评估视频问答中预测证据的grounding，并提出EG-Reasoner模型以提升证据定位能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VideoQA评估仅关注答案正确性，忽略预测结果与视频证据的对应关系，导致答案生成与证据理解脱节。为解决此问题，构建EG-VQA基准，要求模型同时进行推理和精确证据定位，从而揭示答案正确性与忠实证据定位之间的本质差异。
light_analysis.method: EG-VQA包含2,067个视频和11,838个QA对，每个问题标注了细粒度的时间证据。提出EG-F1指标，联合衡量预测证据与真实证据的时间对齐和语义一致性。为提升证据定位能力，训练EG-Reasoner模型，通过显式监督学习将答案生成与证据定位耦合。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，即使强闭源模型在证据定位上也表现不佳，答案正确性与证据定位存在显著脱节。EG-Reasoner在开源模型中取得最优性能，与闭源系统竞争，尤其在反事实推理等推理密集型任务上提升显著，证明结构化证据监督的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证实，仅通过扩大模型规模不足以实现稳健的视频理解，结构化证据监督对开发可靠且可解释的VideoQA系统至关重要。EG-VQA和EG-Reasoner为未来工作提供了评估基准和训练范式，推动VideoQA向可验证方向发展。

title: Pocket-SLAM: Rendering-Area-Aware Pruning for Memory-Efficient 3DGS-SLAM
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has garnered significant attention in Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) due to its advances in capturing fine-grained geometry features and synthesizing novel views. For SLAM in large-scale scenes, such as autonomous driving, 3DGS-SLAM faces a critical limitation: memory consumption increases continuously over time as Gaussian points accumulate, leading to poor memory efficiency and limiting its applicability. In this work, we propose a rendering-area-aware pruning strategy that selectively removes Gaussians based on their contribution to the effective rendering area, rather than solely relying on Gaussian-level heuristics such as opacity or gradient magnitude. This perspective directly targets the sources of memory redundancy, effectively reducing the peak memory footprint of 3DGS-SLAM during runtime. Evaluations on the EuRoC and KITTI datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing pruning approaches in large-scale outdoor scenes, achieving over 60% memory reduction and more than 2 times FPS improvement while preserving localization and mapping accuracy. These results highlight rendering-area-aware pruning as a promising direction for scaling 3DGS-SLAM to real-world autonomous driving scenarios. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/UMN-ZhaoLab/Pocket-SLAM.git.
comment: 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation(ICRA)

light_analysis.overview: 提出渲染区域感知的剪枝策略，显著降低3DGS-SLAM内存占用并提升速度，同时保持定位与建图精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 3DGS-SLAM在大规模场景（如自动驾驶）中面临内存消耗随时间持续增长的问题，限制了其应用。现有剪枝方法仅基于高斯点属性（如不透明度或梯度幅值）启发式裁剪，未能有效针对内存冗余来源，导致内存效率低下。本文旨在通过考虑高斯点对有效渲染区域的贡献来选择性移除冗余点，以解决内存瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出渲染区域感知的剪枝策略，根据每个高斯点对最终渲染区域的贡献度进行选择性移除，而非依赖传统的高斯级启发式指标。该方法直接针对内存冗余来源，在运行时动态剪枝，降低峰值内存占用。在EuRoC和KITTI数据集上评估，与现有剪枝方法对比。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 在EuRoC和KITTI数据集上，该方法在大型户外场景中一致优于现有剪枝方法：实现超过60%的内存减少，帧率提升2倍以上，同时保持定位与建图精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 渲染区域感知剪枝为3DGS-SLAM扩展到真实自动驾驶场景提供了有效方向，兼顾内存效率与性能。未来可探索更精细的贡献度量或自适应剪枝策略。

title: Grad Detect: Gradient-Based Hallucination Detection in LLMs
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across diverse tasks, yet they remain prone to generating hallucinations. Detecting these hallucinations is critical for deploying LLMs reliably in high-stakes applications. We present Grad Detect, a gradient-based approach for predicting hallucinations by analyzing layer-wise gradient patterns from a single forward-backward pass during inference. Our method shows that the internal gradient structure of a model carries rich information about the correctness of its output. This information is not accessible through output-level signals alone. We evaluate Grad Detect on several Q&A benchmarks across both hallucination detection and model abstention prediction, where it consistently outperforms confidence-based and sampling-based baselines. Through comprehensive layer ablation studies across all eleven models from four architectural families, we find that the final five layers concentrate over 97% of the discriminative gradient signal, enabling efficient deployment with minimal performance loss. Grad Detect provides a unified framework for predicting multiple dimensions of LLM reliability, offering strong predictive performance alongside interpretable insights into where and how model failures originate.
comment: Accepted to the 2nd Workshop on Compositional Learning at ICML 2026, Seoul, South Korea. Copyright 2026 by the author(s)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于梯度的幻觉检测方法Grad Detect，通过分析单次前向-反向传播的层梯度模式预测LLM输出准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型虽能力卓越，但仍易生成幻觉。在高风险应用中，可靠检测幻觉至关重要。现有方法多依赖输出级信号（如置信度），忽略了模型内部丰富的梯度结构信息。本文旨在利用梯度信息提供更准确的幻觉检测。
light_analysis.method: Grad Detect在推理时进行一次前向-反向传播，提取各层梯度模式作为特征，用于预测输出是否正确。方法统一处理幻觉检测和模型放弃回答预测。通过消融实验发现，最后5层集中了97%以上的判别性梯度信号，可实现高效部署。
light_analysis.result: 在多个问答基准上，Grad Detect在幻觉检测和模型放弃回答预测任务中均优于基于置信度和基于采样的基线方法。跨4个架构家族11个模型的全面消融实验表明，仅使用最后5层即可保留大部分性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: Grad Detect为LLM可靠性预测提供了统一框架，不仅性能强，还能解释模型失败的位置和原因。未来可进一步优化梯度计算效率或扩展到其他可靠性维度。

title: Counting Trees from Satellite Imagery with Noisy Supervision
abstract: Counting individual trees is a fundamental task for environmental monitoring, yet remains largely unexplored with satellite imagery. At these resolutions, isolated trees may still be identifiable, but crown boundaries become ambiguous in dense forests, making the notion of an individual tree inherently ill-defined. Moreover, large-scale manual annotations of individual trees are prohibitively expensive. While scalable supervision can be derived from airborne LiDAR, the resulting annotations are noisy and difficult to exploit effectively.   We address these challenges by formulating tree counting as a spatial density matching problem supervised through Unbalanced Optimal Transport. This formulation naturally accommodates both precise localization of isolate trees and robust density estimation in dense forests. We further introduce a self-correction mechanism that leverages transport residuals to progressively refine noisy supervision during training.   We evaluate our approach on TinyTrees, a new benchmark spanning three continents and three satellite sensors, comprising over 215 million tree annotations (including 773K manually verified instances) across 23,000 sq.km. Our method consistently outperforms detection-based, regression-based, and transport-based distribution-matching baselines, demonstrating the effectiveness of unbalanced transport and reliability-aware supervision for large-scale tree counting from satellite imagery. Code, data and models are available at https://github.com/dgominski/treematch.

light_analysis.overview: 提出非平衡最优传输框架用于卫星图像树计数，并引入自校正机制处理噪声标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 卫星图像中孤立树可识别，但密林树冠边界模糊，个体定义不清。大规模人工标注昂贵，而LiDAR自动标注存在噪声。现有检测或回归方法难以同时处理准确定位和鲁棒密度估计。
light_analysis.method: 将树计数建模为空间密度匹配问题，使用非平衡最优传输（Unbalanced Optimal Transport）监督，允许标注与预测分布间质量不匹配。引入自校正机制，利用运输残差识别并修正噪声标注，逐步优化训练。在TinyTrees基准（覆盖三大洲、三个传感器，2.15亿注释含77.3万人工验证）上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在TinyTrees基准上，方法一致优于检测、回归和基于传输的分布匹配基线。具体性能指标摘要未明示，但强调非平衡传输和可靠性感知监督的有效性。代码、数据和模型开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了非平衡最优传输和自校正机制能有效处理卫星图像树计数中的噪声监督问题，实现大规模精确计数。为环境监测提供实用工具，未来可扩展至其他遥感计数任务。局限性包括对极端密度场景的适应能力待探索。

title: AerialFusionMapNet: Online HD Map Construction with Aerial-Onboard BEV Fusion
abstract: High-resolution aerial imagery has recently emerged as a complementary modality for automated driving perception and has shown potential to improve birds-eye-view (BEV) scene understanding when fused with onboard sensors. Prior work demonstrated performance gains for online high-definition (HD) map construction through aerial-onboard fusion; however, conventional end-to-end fusion does not fully exploit the structural information contained in aerial representations. In this work, we introduce AerialFusionMapNet, a fusion-based mapping framework with a structured two-stage training strategy that explicitly enhances the contribution of aerial features within a unified pipeline. The proposed training scheme enables more effective integration of structural aerial priors. On the nuScenes geographic split, AerialFusionMapNet achieves up to 54.7 mAP, improving over prior aerial-onboard fusion baselines from 48.8 mAP by +5.9 absolute and +12.1% relative. The results suggest that structured training design, rather than increased architectural complexity, plays a more decisive role in unlocking the full potential of aerial imagery for online HD map construction. Code and trained models are available at https://github.com/DriverlessMobility/AerialFusionMapNet.
comment: Accepted at the IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出AerialFusionMapNet，通过结构化两阶段训练策略融合空中与车载BEV特征，提升在线高清地图构建性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率航拍图像作为自动驾驶感知的补充模态，与车载传感器融合可提升鸟瞰场景理解。现有端到端融合方法未能充分利用空中表示的 structural 信息，导致性能受限。本文旨在通过结构化训练设计，更有效地整合空中先验，突破现有融合基线性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出AerialFusionMapNet融合框架，采用结构化两阶段训练策略：第一阶段独立训练空中和车载特征提取器，第二阶段联合微调并显式增强空中特征贡献。在统一pipeline中，利用航拍图像的几何结构信息，通过特定训练机制提升融合效果。基于nuScenes数据集的地理划分进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes地理分割上，AerialFusionMapNet达到54.7 mAP，较先前最优空中-车载融合基线（48.8 mAP）绝对提升5.9，相对提升12.1%。结果表明，结构化训练设计比增加架构复杂度更能发挥航拍图像潜力。代码和模型已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明结构化训练策略对于解锁航拍图像在在线HD地图构建中的潜力至关重要，而非单纯增加模型复杂度。该方法为多模态融合提供了新视角，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的训练策略或扩展至其他感知任务。局限性可能在于对地理分割的依赖性。

title: Paying to Know: Micro-Transaction Markets for Verified Product Information in Agentic E-Commerce
abstract: Commercial NLP treats the shopping chatbot as a recommender or a conversion tool: its job is to match a user to a catalogue entry and close a sale. We argue that the arrival of agent-native micro-payment rails (e.g., x402, AP2) changes what is scarce. When the buyer is an autonomous agent that can investigate exhaustively, the bottleneck is no longer matching products but acquiring trustworthy, decision-relevant information about them. We envision agentic e-commerce as a micro-transaction market for verified information: buyer agents spend fractions of a cent to progressively unlock seller- and reviewer-supplied data -- service histories, third-party test reports, bills of materials, audited sales and support metrics -- paid for a la carte under a freemium model, with reviewer trust scored reputationally. We sketch the architecture of such a market and argue that it rewards genuine product quality and yields truer competition than ranking-based storefronts. We then translate the vision into concrete NLP problems -- cost-optimal information acquisition, data pricing and negotiation, real-time entity resolution, grounded value exchange, and privacy-preserving persona modelling -- and argue that these, not chat fluency, deserve the field's attention.
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure. Vision paper, under review

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于微交易市场的验证信息获取框架，用于解决自主代理电商中可信产品信息稀缺的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有商业NLP将购物聊天机器人视为推荐或转化工具，主要解决用户与目录条目的匹配问题。但随着自主代理的出现，瓶颈从产品匹配转向获取关于产品的可信、决策相关信息。代理可以穷尽调查，但缺乏验证信息。因此，需要一种新型市场机制，让代理通过微交易逐步解锁卖家、评论者提供的验证数据（如服务历史、第三方测试报告等），以奖励真实产品质量，超越传统基于排名的商店。
light_analysis.method: 提出微交易市场架构：买家代理在免费模型下按需支付小额费用（如分美分）逐步解锁卖家/评论者提供的验证信息；评论者信任度通过声誉评分。该市场转化为具体NLP问题：成本最优信息获取、数据定价与协商、实时实体解析、基于价值的交易执行、隐私保护个人建模。强调这些而非聊天流畅性值得关注。未提及具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出实验效果或性能指标。论文主要从概念上论证了微交易市场能奖励产品质量并产生比排名型商店更真实的竞争。未提供与基线方法的量化对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出代理电商中验证信息获取的新范式，通过微交易市场解决信息稀缺问题，并转化为一系列NLP研究问题。学术价值在于重新定义电商NLP的研究方向，从对话流畅转向信息经济学；实际应用价值在于为自主代理交易提供可信信息基础设施。局限性在于未具体实现或评估，未来工作需探索数据定价、实体解析等技术细节。

title: Assessing Distribution Shift in Human Activity Recognition for Domain Generalization
abstract: While the field of Human Activity Recognition (HAR) continues to draw interest from researchers and advance in important ways, some key challenges remain. One of the most difficult aspects of building HAR models that show good performance in real-world settings is dealing with data diversity from device and sensor heterogeneity, and contextual changes that are intrinsic to real-world applications. While data diversity in HAR has been well-acknowledged in the literature, there remains a gap in understanding the effect of various types of distribution shifts on HAR models and the domain generalization problem that arises. Towards that end, this paper systematically evaluates 4 different types of distribution shifts, including variations in device type, sensor placement, sampling rate, and user behavior. Quantifying their effects, we illustrate that diversity shifts predominantly define all types of shifts, indicating the existence of unique features that are not shared across different domains. We then introduce a uniform HAR-based distribution shift benchmarks and conduct a comprehensive evaluation of up to 28 domain generalization methods. Our analysis exposes the limitations of current domain generalization algorithms in achieving model generalizability, marginally outperforming the empirical risk minimization baseline. This work represents the first systematic exploration of domain generalization and adaptation concerning specific distribution shifts in sensor-based HAR, offering an open-source benchmark platform and datasets to spur further research.

light_analysis.overview: 本文系统评估四种分布偏移对HAR域泛化的影响，构建统一基准，揭示现有域泛化方法的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类活动识别模型在实际应用中面临设备、传感器异构性和上下文变化引起的数据多样性，导致域泛化挑战。现有研究虽承认数据多样性，但缺乏对各种分布偏移类型及其对模型影响的系统理解和量化分析。本研究旨在填补这一空白，推动HAR模型的泛化能力提升。
light_analysis.method: 系统评估四种分布偏移：设备类型、传感器位置、采样率和用户行为。通过量化发现多样性偏移主导所有类型，表明存在跨域不共享的独特特征。构建统一的HAR分布偏移基准，评估28种域泛化方法，包括传统方法如Empirical Risk Minimization。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当前域泛化算法在实现模型泛化性方面存在显著局限性，仅略优于经验风险最小化基线。该工作是首次系统探索传感器HAR中特定分布偏移的域泛化与适应，为后续研究提供开源基准平台和数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于揭示了分布偏移对HAR域泛化的本质影响，并建立了标准化评估基准。该研究具有重要学术价值，可指导实际部署中模型鲁棒性的提升。未来方向包括开发更有效的域泛化算法以应对多样性偏移。

title: BluTrain: A C++/CUDA Framework for AI Systems
abstract: Progress in deep learning is, at scale, more a matter of systems engineering than of modelling: the behaviour of a model in training (its throughput, its memory footprint, and the numerical fidelity of the result) is determined less by the architecture itself than by how that architecture is expressed on the hardware. To achieve absolute control over this hardware expression while abstracting away systems complexity to make modelling seamless and eliminating the need for repetitive orchestration logic, BluTrain was architected from first principles as a robust, lightweight, and architecture-general training framework in standard C++ and the core CUDA programming model. Every layer is implemented natively: a typed tensor module with reverse-mode autograd, a linear-algebra library, a caching allocator, a multi-mode distributed-execution module, and an MLIR-based deep-learning compiler. In formal evaluations training a 124M-parameter GPT-2 baseline in FP32 on an 8-GPU 6000 Ada system, BluTrain outperforms industry-standard baselines in both throughput (sustaining an average of 407K tokens/s versus PyTorch's 395K tokens/s) and memory efficiency (achieving up to a 22% footprint reduction), while strictly preserving numerical fidelity and converging to a marginally lower final validation loss. With every layer explicitly open to native tuning, the performance ceiling is the framework's own to raise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于C++/CUDA的轻量级训练框架BluTrain，在保持数值精度的同时提升吞吐量和内存效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习大规模训练中，硬件表达对模型行为的影响超过架构本身。现有框架如PyTorch在内存效率和吞吐量上不足，且难以提供对硬件层的精细控制。因此需要新框架来抽象系统复杂性，同时保留底层优化能力。
light_analysis.method: BluTrain使用标准C++和CUDA原生实现每一层：类型化张量模块（反向自动微分）、线性代数库、缓存分配器、多模式分布式执行模块和基于MLIR的深度学习编译器。训练GPT-2 124M参数模型，在8-GPU 6000 Ada系统上进行FP32测试。
light_analysis.result: 与PyTorch相比，BluTrain吞吐量达到407K tokens/s（PyTorch为395K），内存占用减少22%，收敛到更低的最终验证损失，且严格保持数值精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: BluTrain展示了从头构建框架在性能优化上的优势，每一层均可原生调优，性能天花板由自身决定。适用于追求极致效率和控制的AI系统，未来可扩展至更多硬件和模型。

title: Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?
abstract: Memory for large language model (LLM) agents has rapidly evolved from simple retrieval-augmented mechanisms into a data management system that supports persistent information storage, retrieval, update, consolidation, and dynamic lifecycle governance throughout agent execution. Despite this evolution, existing evaluations still benchmark agent memory mainly through end-to-end task success metrics (e.g., F1, BLEU), while treating the underlying system as a monolithic black box. As a result, critical system-level concerns, including operational costs, architectural trade-offs across memory modules, and robustness under dynamic knowledge updates, remain insufficiently explored. In this paper, we present a systematic experimental study of agent memory from a data management perspective. We propose an analytical framework that decomposes agent memory into four core modules: memory representation and storage, extraction, retrieval and routing, and maintenance. Under this framework, we evaluate 12 representative memory systems and two reference baselines across five benchmark workloads spanning 11 datasets. Our extensive end-to-end evaluation shows that no single architecture dominates across all scenarios; instead, effectiveness depends heavily on how well the memory structure aligns with the workload bottleneck. Furthermore, through fine-grained ablation studies, we quantify their individual effects on representation fidelity, retrieval precision, update correctness, and long-horizon stability. Finally, we reveal cost-performance trade-offs under realistic workloads, showing localized maintenance is more cost-efficient than global reorganization. Based on these findings, we identify promising directions towards building truly agent-native memory systems. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/OpenDataBox/MemoryData.
comment: Paper list available at: https://github.com/OpenDataBox/awesome-agent-memory. Source code available at: https://github.com/OpenDataBox/MemoryData

light_analysis.overview: 从数据管理角度系统评估LLM代理内存系统，提出四模块分析框架并揭示架构-工作负载匹配关键性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM代理内存评估主要依赖端到端任务成功率指标，将底层内存系统视为黑盒，忽视了操作成本、模块间架构权衡及动态知识更新下的鲁棒性等系统级问题。这些不足阻碍了真正代理原生内存系统的设计。
light_analysis.method: 提出将代理内存分解为表示与存储、提取、检索与路由、维护四个核心模块的分析框架。在此框架下评估12个代表性内存系统和2个基线，覆盖5个基准工作负载（含11个数据集），进行端到端评价和细粒度消融研究。
light_analysis.result: 没有单一架构在所有场景中占优，有效性取决于内存结构与工作负载瓶颈的对齐。消融研究量化了各模块对表示保真度、检索精度、更新正确性和长期稳定性的影响。成本-性能权衡显示局部维护比全局重组更高效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 系统揭示了代理内存设计的核心挑战与权衡，为构建真正的代理原生内存系统指明了方向。提供了公开代码库，有助于后续研究在统一框架下进行对比和改进。

title: Revealing Training Data Exposure in Vision Language Large Models via Parameter Gradients
abstract: Vision-Language Large Models (VLLMs) trained on massive crawled corpora raise pressing copyright and data-provenance concerns. These concerns are particularly acute in healthcare, where patient medical images paired with clinical reports demand rigorous privacy safeguards. However, existing training data detection methods either fail in cross-modal scenarios or rely on superficial output signals with insufficient discriminative power. We introduce GradAudit, a gradient-based auditing framework that examines internal optimization dynamics rather than treating VLLMs as black boxes. Our approach builds on a key observation: model parameters converge to regions where gradients on training samples become stable and well-aligned, whereas gradients on non-training samples remain noisy and inconsistent. By analyzing these gradient signatures, GradAudit achieves strong separability and detects genuine image-text associations learned during training, not merely individual modality membership. Empirically, across both medical and general-domain datasets, GradAudit substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both pretraining and fine-tuning VLLMs. In a case study employing copyrighted content, we show that existing training data detection methods not only underestimate the extent of unauthorized data usage, but that this underestimation becomes more pronounced as models become more recent and more advanced.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GradAudit梯度审计框架，通过分析参数梯度检测视觉语言大模型中的训练数据暴露，有效区分训练与非训练样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言大模型在医疗等领域使用大规模抓取语料训练，引发版权和隐私担忧。现有训练数据检测方法在跨模态场景下失效，或依赖鉴别力不足的表面输出信号，无法有效识别训练数据中的图像-文本关联。GradAudit旨在通过内部优化动力学解决这一问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于观察：训练样本上模型参数梯度稳定且对齐，而非训练样本梯度噪声且不一致。通过分析梯度签名，GradAudit实现强分离性，直接检测模型学习到的真实图像-文本关联，而非单一模态成员身份。适用于预训练和微调VLLMs，无需黑盒访问。
light_analysis.result: 在医疗和通用域数据集上，GradAudit在预训练和微调VLLMs中均显著优于现有方法。案例研究表明，现有方法低估了未经授权数据使用，且低估程度随模型更新迭代加剧。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: GradAudit揭示了训练数据在VLLMs中的暴露程度，为版权保护和隐私审计提供有效工具。未来可探索降低梯度计算成本，并扩展至更多模态和架构。学术价值在于提升数据溯源能力，实际应用助力合规审查。

title: Posterior Refinement: Fast Language Generation via Any-Order Flow Maps
abstract: Non-autoregressive generation offers a powerful paradigm for iterative refinement, allowing models to recursively critique, erase and regenerate arbitrary subsets of tokens. However, existing non-autoregressive models fail to realize this potential. Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) suffer from factorization error, causing sample quality to collapse when generating multiple tokens simultaneously. Flow Map Language Models (FMLMs) circumvent this bottleneck via joint sequence transport for excellent few-step generation, but sacrifice the inference-time flexibility of MDMs. We introduce FMLM+, a framework that bridges this gap by equipping FMLM with masking-style noise schedules. While generating the full sequence in a single step, FMLM+ simultaneously scores the global consistency of each token a posteriori. We leverage this to introduce Posterior Refinement, a novel inference-time refinement strategy that enables the model to adaptively self-correct its outputs, matching the performance of discrete baselines with 32x fewer NFEs. Across diverse benchmarks, we demonstrate that FMLM+ with Posterior Refinement improves the speed--quality tradeoff over both MDM and FMLM families, providing a scalable foundation for high-fidelity language modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FMLM+框架，结合流映射与掩码噪声调度，通过后验精炼实现自适应纠错，以少步生成匹配离散基线性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有非自回归生成中，掩码扩散模型因分解误差导致多token生成质量下降；流映射语言模型虽可实现少步生成但牺牲推理灵活性。需一种方法兼顾生成质量与推理灵活性，解决速度-质量权衡问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出FMLM+，为流映射语言模型配备掩码式噪声调度，在单步生成完整序列的同时后验评分每个token的全局一致性。基于此引入后验精炼（Posterior Refinement），一种推理时自适应自我纠正策略，通过迭代修正提升输出质量。
light_analysis.result: 后验精炼以32倍更少的网络函数评估（NFE）匹配离散基线的性能。在多个基准上，FMLM+和后验精炼改进了速度-质量权衡，优于掩码扩散模型和流映射语言模型家族。
light_analysis.conclusion: FMLM+与后验精炼为非自回归生成提供了可扩展的高保真语言建模基础，兼具掩码扩散模型的灵活性和流映射的高效性，学术上推动了生成范式融合，实际应用中可用于快速高质量文本生成。

title: Compact Object-Level Representations with Open-Vocabulary Understanding for Indoor Visual Relocalization
abstract: Indoor visual relocalization plays a critical role in emerging spatial and embodied AI applications. However, prior research was predominantly devoted to low-level vision schemes, struggling to perceive scene semantics and compositions, which limits both interpretability and applicability. In this paper, we explore the issue of how to organize rich object information in a scene, including semantics, layout, and geometry, into a structured map representation, thereby utilizing object units exclusively to drive the camera relocalization task. To this end, we propose OpenReLoc, a camera relocalization system designed to provide scene understanding and accurate pose estimation capabilities. Leveraging recent foundation models, we first introduce a multi-modal mechanism to integrate open-vocabulary semantic knowledge for effective 2D-3D object matching. Additionally, we design object-oriented reference frames as position priors, paired with a reference frame selection strategy based on the Distance-IoU (DIOU), enabling extension to scalable scenes. Moreover, to ensure stable and accurate pose optimization, we also propose a dual-path 2D Iterative Closest Pixel loss guided by object shape. Experimental results demonstrate that OpenReLoc achieves superior relocalization recall and accuracy across various datasets. Our source code will be released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OpenReLoc系统，利用开放词汇语义理解组织对象级表示，实现室内视觉重定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 室内视觉重定位在空间AI中关键，但现有方法多依赖低级视觉，缺乏语义和场景理解，限制可解释性和应用。需组织对象信息（语义、布局、几何）为结构化地图，仅用对象单元驱动重定位，提升感知能力。
light_analysis.method: 利用基础模型，设计多模态机制整合开放词汇语义知识，实现2D-3D对象匹配；提出面向对象的参考帧作为位置先验，结合Distance-IoU策略选择参考帧，支持可缩放场景；提出双路径2D迭代最近点损失，由对象形状引导，实现稳定精确的位姿优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，OpenReLoc实现了优越的重定位召回率和精度，显著优于现有重定位方法。具体数值摘要未明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpenReLoc系统融合开放词汇理解与对象级表示，提升室内重定位的可解释性和准确性，适用于空间AI应用。代码将开源，未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

title: UniDrive: A Unified Vision-Language and Grounding Framework for Interpretable Risk Understanding in Autonomous Driving
abstract: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong potential for autonomous driving scene understanding, yet existing methods still face a fundamental trade-off between temporal reasoning and spatial precision. Models that rely on single-frame or low-resolution inputs often miss small, distant, or partially occluded hazards, while language-centric driving models frequently provide limited grounded evidence for their explanations. To address this gap, we propose UniDrive, a unified visual-language and grounding framework for interpretable risk understanding in autonomous driving. UniDrive combines a temporal reasoning branch that models scene dynamics from multi-frame visual input with a high-resolution perception branch that preserves fine-grained spatial details from the latest frame. The two branches are integrated through a gated cross-attention fusion module, enabling dynamic context to be aligned with precise spatial evidence. Based on the fused representation, UniDrive jointly generates natural-language risk descriptions and grounded bounding-box outputs for risk objects. Experiments on the DRAMA-Reasoning benchmark show that UniDrive outperforms representative image-based and video-based baselines in both captioning and risk-object grounding. In particular, UniDrive achieves the best overall performance on the validation split and demonstrates clear advantages in small-object localization, zero-shot generalization to NuScenes and BDD100K, and human-rated interpretability and trustworthiness. These results suggest that explicitly combining temporal semantics and high-resolution perception provides a stronger foundation for interpretable and safety-oriented autonomous driving systems. The code is available at https://github.com/pixeli99/unidrive-dev.

light_analysis.overview: UniDrive提出统一视觉-语言与定位框架，融合时间推理和高分辨率感知，实现可解释的自动驾驶风险理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动驾驶多模态大模型在时间推理和空间精度之间存在权衡：单帧或低分辨率输入易遗漏小、远或遮挡危险，而语言中心模型缺乏有依据的解释。该研究旨在解决这一矛盾，提升风险理解的准确性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: UniDrive包含时间推理分支（建模多帧动态）和高分辨率感知分支（保留最新帧细节），通过门控交叉注意力融合模块整合。基于融合特征联合生成自然语言风险描述和风险对象的边界框输出。在DRAMA-Reasoning基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在DRAMA-Reasoning上，UniDrive在字幕生成和风险对象定位上均优于图像和视频基线。在验证集上取得最佳整体性能，在小目标定位、零样本迁移到NuScenes和BDD100K以及人工评分的可解释性和可信度上表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniDrive通过显式结合时间语义和高分辨率感知，为可解释、安全导向的自动驾驶系统提供了更强基础。代码已开源。未来可进一步扩展至更复杂场景。

title: CANDLE: Character-level Arabic Noise Deduplication using Lightweight Encoder
abstract: Handling repeated characters in text can be tricky, since they can represent either the correct spelling of a word or informal character elongation often seen in social media posts. We present CANDLE, a lightweight system for character-level Arabic noise deduplication that addresses this challenge without relying on handcrafted rules, dictionaries, or morphological analyzers. At the heart of CANDLE is a novel application of Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) to this task, a formulation not previously explored for character deduplication, which frames normalization as a sequence alignment problem over a character-based encoder. Evaluated on three benchmarks spanning clean newspaper, manually curated ambiguous cases, and real-world social media text, the CTC model achieves a Sentence Error Rate (SER) as low as $5.37\%$ and consistently outperforms a classification-based baseline by a large margin. To reduce inference overhead, we distill the 6-layer CTC model into a 2-layer student, achieving a $3\times$ depth reduction with minimal performance degradation. Beyond deduplication accuracy, normalization yields a practical downstream benefit: a relative reduction in tokenizer fertility of up to $12.8\%$ across a diverse set of Arabic LLM tokenizers, directly lowering inference costs and improving context window utilization. We release all code and models publicly to support reproducibility and advance future research\footnote{https://github.com/abjadai/candle}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CANDLE，一种基于CTC的轻量级字符级阿拉伯语噪声去重系统，无需手工规则或词典。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿拉伯语文本中重复字符可能表示正确拼写或非正式字符延长（如社交媒体），现有方法依赖手工规则、词典或形态分析器，泛化能力有限。CANDLE旨在解决该问题，实现高效、无需资源支持的噪声去重。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是将Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC)应用于字符去重，将归一化视为序列对齐问题。基于字符级编码器，采用6层CTC模型训练，并通过知识蒸馏压缩为2层学生模型，实现3倍深度减少。评估使用干净新闻、人工标注模糊案例和真实社交媒体文本三个基准。
light_analysis.result: CTC模型在三个基准上取得最低5.37%的句子错误率（SER），显著优于分类基线。蒸馏后学生模型性能几乎无损失。去重使多种阿拉伯语LLM tokenizer的生育率（fertility）相对降低12.8%，降低推理成本并提升上下文窗口利用率。
light_analysis.conclusion: CANDLE提供了一种轻量、无需规则的阿拉伯语字符去重方案，有效处理重复字符歧义。实验证明其准确性和下游收益，代码与模型已开源，促进可重复研究和实际应用。未来可扩展至其他语言或噪声类型。

title: Adaptive Hebbian Memory Routing in Vision Transformers for Few-Shot Learning
abstract: Few-shot image recognition requires models to adapt to new classes from a small labeled support set. Hebbian fast-weight memory can provide temporary associative information during an episode, but fixed memory behavior may not be appropriate for every few-shot task. In this work, we propose Adaptive Hebbian Routing for few-shot Vision Transformers. The method uses a lightweight MLP router to control the contribution of Hebbian memory, the strength of memory updates, and the retention of previous memory from support-set features. We study Adaptive Placement, Adaptive Plasticity, and Fully Adaptive Hebbian Routing. Experiments use ViT-Small, DeiT-Small, and Swin-Tiny under 5-way 1-shot evaluation on Omniglot, CIFAR-FS, and cross-domain transfer from CIFAR-FS to Omniglot. In the direct Swin comparison, fixed and adaptive Hebbian variants use the same memory location. Adaptive Plasticity improves the fixed Hebbian result from 96.74\% to 96.92\%, while Fully Adaptive Routing achieves the best result at 96.94\%. The fully adaptive Swin model also reduces inference time from 16.51 ms to 14.05 ms relative to fixed Hebbian Swin. On CIFAR-FS, adaptive variants improve performance across all three backbones, and the multi-shot evaluation shows that these gains remain useful as the number of support examples increases. These results show that adaptive plasticity and adaptive memory activation can improve few-shot Transformer representations beyond fixed Hebbian behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应Hebbian路由机制，通过轻量MLP控制器动态调节记忆更新与激活，提升Vision Transformer的少样本学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 少样本图像识别要求模型从少量标注样本中快速适应新类别。Hebbian快速权重记忆可提供临时关联信息，但固定的记忆行为可能不适合所有少样本任务。现有方法缺乏对记忆更新强度、贡献比例和历史记忆保留的自适应调节，导致泛化能力受限。本文旨在通过自适应机制优化Hebbian记忆在Vision Transformer中的路由，以提升不同任务下的表现。
