light_analysis.method: 提出自适应Hebbian路由（Adaptive Hebbian Routing）用于少样本Vision Transformer，核心是使用轻量级MLP路由器控制三个方面：Hebbian记忆的贡献权重、记忆更新的强度、以及从支持集特征中保留先前记忆的程度。研究了三种变体：自适应放置（Adaptive Placement）、自适应可塑性（Adaptive Plasticity）和完全自适应路由（Fully Adaptive Hebbian Routing）。在ViT-Small、DeiT-Small和Swin-Tiny骨干网络上使用Omniglot、CIFAR-FS数据集进行5-way 1-shot评估，并涉及跨域迁移实验。
light_analysis.result: 在Swin-Tiny直接对比中，自适应可塑性将固定Hebbian的准确率从96.74%提升至96.92%，完全自适应路由达到最佳96.94%。完全自适应Swin模型还将推理时间从16.51ms降至14.05ms。在CIFAR-FS上，自适应变体在所有三种骨干网络均提升性能，且多shot评估表明增益随支持样本数增加而保持。结果表明自适应可塑性和自适应记忆激活能超越固定Hebbian行为，改进少样本Transformer表示。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了自适应调节Hebbian记忆的路由机制能有效提升少样本Vision Transformer的性能和效率。通过动态控制记忆贡献、更新强度和历史保留，模型能更好地适应不同少样本任务。该方法简单轻量，易于集成到现有Transformer架构中。未来工作可探索更复杂的路由策略或扩展到其他记忆机制。局限性在于仅在有限数据集和骨干网络上验证，需进一步测试更大规模场景。

title: Can Scale Save Us From Plasticity Loss in Large Language Models?
abstract: The loss of plasticity - the ability of a network to learn new information after having already learned older information - is a fundamental challenge in creating artificial neural networks capable of continual learning. Although this phenomenon has been known for decades, it has mostly been studied in older, relatively small architectures and rarely in natural-language domains. To determine whether loss of plasticity remains a problem in the modern transformer-based LLM paradigm, we study plasticity loss in GPT-style Transformer models trained on a multilingual continual learning problem. Consistent with prior work, we find evidence of plasticity loss across models ranging from 5M to 314M non-embedding parameters, as measured by deterioration on a held-out Vietnamese probing task. We further find that the onset of plasticity loss follows a predictable scaling law, growing sublinearly with model size. These results suggest that larger models may delay the measurable effects of plasticity loss, but that increasing parameter count alone is likely to be insufficient to completely prevent it. We also find evidence of plasticity loss under stationary multilingual training, challenging the view that the phenomenon is exclusive to continual learning with abrupt task changes. Overall, our results suggest that even large Transformer language models trained on natural-language will eventually lose the ability to efficiently adapt to new data after sufficiently long training, in both continual and stationary settings.

light_analysis.overview: 研究大型语言模型中可塑性损失问题，发现其遵循标度律，增大模型只能延迟但无法避免。
light_analysis.motivation: 可塑性损失是持续学习中的根本挑战，但过去主要在小型架构中研究，未在自然语言领域充分验证。本文旨在确定现代Transformer LLM是否仍然存在该问题，以评估增大模型规模能否解决。
light_analysis.method: 使用GPT风格Transformer模型（5M-314M参数）在多语言持续学习任务上训练，通过越南语探测任务的性能下降衡量可塑性损失。分析模型大小与损失发生的关系，并考察固定分布训练下的情况。
light_analysis.result: 所有模型均出现可塑性损失，其发生遵循标度律，随模型大小亚线性增长。增大模型可延迟损失但无法完全防止。固定分布训练中同样观察到可塑性损失，表明该现象不仅限于任务切换。
light_analysis.conclusion: 大型Transformer LLM在长时间训练后仍会失去适应新数据的能力，持续学习和固定分布训练中均存在。仅增加参数不足以解决可塑性损失，需探索其他机制。

title: Scaling Laws for Task-Specific LLM Distillation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across a growing range of domains, yet their scale poses deployment challenges in applications where latency and cost constraints are critical. This paper derives empirical scaling laws for domain-specific LLM compression, quantifying how in-domain and general knowledge performance scale with dataset size, compression ratio, supervision format, and iterative pruning schedule. Using quantitative finance as our application domain, we compare logit-based and LoRA-based distillation under iterative structural pruning, introducing a blended chain-of-thought supervision loss that stabilizes KL-divergence distillation over reasoning traces. In-domain task quality degrades predictably under compression while general-knowledge benchmarks collapse well before the same point; supervision format is the key driver of this tradeoff, with chain-of-thought supervision actively recovering general knowledge that pruning erases. We release the headline dataset FinHeadlineMix, scaling law results, and practical recommendations to provide a reusable framework for domain-specific compression decisions.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了领域特定LLM压缩的标度律，通过混合思维链监督损失平衡领域与通用知识性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型性能强大但部署受延迟和成本限制，现有研究缺乏对领域特定压缩中数据集大小、压缩比、监督格式等因素如何影响任务性能的系统量化。理解这些标度关系对于在压缩成本和性能间做出权衡至关重要，尤其是如何在剪枝过程中保留领域知识和通用知识。
light_analysis.method: 以量化金融为领域，比较logit蒸馏和LoRA蒸馏在迭代结构化剪枝下的效果，提出混合思维链监督损失，稳定KL散度蒸馏在推理轨迹上的表现。使用FinHeadlineMix数据集，系统研究数据集大小、压缩比、监督格式和剪枝调度对领域内任务和通用基准性能的影响。
light_analysis.result: 领域内任务质量随压缩可预测下降，但通用知识基准在相同压缩点之前即崩溃；监督格式是权衡的关键，思维链监督能有效恢复被剪枝消除的通用知识。具体性能数值未在摘要中说明，但提供了标度律结果和实际建议。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了领域特定压缩的标度律和可复用框架，包括数据集FinHeadlineMix和实用指南。研究量化了压缩损失与知识保留的关系，指导实践者在压缩成本和性能间做选择。未来可扩展到更多领域并探索其他蒸馏策略。

title: BioMedVR: Confusion-Aware Mixture-of-Prompt Experts for Biomedical Visual Reprogramming
abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP have demonstrated strong generalization across natural-image domains. However, adapting these models to biomedical imaging is non-trivial: full-model fine-tuning is computationally expensive, while medical data are often scarce and exhibit subtle, fine-grained inter-class differences, making parameter-efficient adaptation particularly critical. Visual Reprogramming (VR) offers a parameter-efficient alternative by injecting learnable perturbations into the input space, but existing VR approaches for VLMs mainly focus on positive class prompts and overlook confusing negatives, leading to miscalibrated predictions in fine-grained medical scenarios. We present BioMedVR, the first VR-based framework for biomedical imaging, enabling few-shot adaptation of pretrained VLMs through compact learnable VR modules. To mitigate class confusion, we introduce a Confusion Minimization Mechanism that leverages LLM-generated confusion-aware attributes together with a Confusion-Suppression Loss to explicitly reduce false-positive alignment. Moreover, the designed Mixture-of-Prompt Experts combines a positive expert for main-class discrimination and a negative expert for confusion suppression, balanced via adaptive gating. Extensive experiments on 18 datasets, including 11 biomedical datasets and 7 natural image benchmarks, demonstrate that BioMedVR achieves superior accuracy and generalization, effectively bridging VR and VLMs in biomedical domains.
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. 19 pages, 6 figures. Project page: https://jxliu-ai.github.io/biomedvr-page/

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于视觉重编程的生物医学成像框架BioMedVR，通过混淆感知混合专家提示实现预训练VLM的少样本适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在自然图像上泛化强，但适应生物医学图像面临挑战：全模型微调计算昂贵，医学数据稀缺且类间差异细微。现有视觉重编程方法主要关注正类提示，忽略混淆负类，导致细粒度医学场景预测不准确。因此需要参数高效的VR方法，同时处理混淆负类，提升模型在生物医学领域的性能。
light_analysis.method: BioMedVR框架包含紧凑的可学习VR模块，在输入空间注入扰动，无需微调整个VLM。为缓解类混淆，引入混淆最小化机制：利用LLM生成混淆感知属性，结合混淆抑制损失显式减少假阳性对齐。设计的混合专家提示（MoPE）包括正专家（主类判别）和负专家（混淆抑制），通过自适应门控平衡两者权重。在少样本设置下训练VR模块。
light_analysis.result: 在18个数据集（包括11个生物医学数据集和7个自然图像基准）上进行实验，BioMedVR取得了优越的准确率和泛化能力，优于现有VR和微调方法。具体性能提升数值摘要未明确说明，但表明其有效桥接了VR和VLM在生物医学领域的应用。
light_analysis.conclusion: BioMedVR首次将视觉重编程与视觉语言模型结合应用于生物医学成像，通过混淆感知混合专家提示有效解决了细粒度类混淆问题，实现了参数高效的少样本适应。该方法具有重要的学术价值，为生物医学图像分析提供了新范式；实际应用中，可降低对大规模标注数据的依赖。未来可探索更复杂的专家组合或扩展到更多医学模态。

title: VSANet: View-aware Sparse Attention Network for Light Field Image Denoising
abstract: Light field (LF) image denoising is challenging due to the high-dimensional structure of LF data. While noise is independent across sub-aperture images, scene content exhibits strong cross-view correlations. We introduce VSANet, a view-aware sparse attention network for LF denoising. Specifically, we propose a view-aware sparse attention (VSA) block that represents the 4D LF feature map as a unified spatial-angular token space and performs cross-view aggregation via locality-sensitive hashing-based sparse attention. This enables global feature interactions with linear complexity, effectively exploiting LF correlations across views and spatial locations. In addition, we design a feature refinement (FR) block to emphasize informative features in spatial, angular, and epipolar subspaces. The VSA and FR blocks are integrated within a sequential attention refinement module, forming the core of VSANet. Experiments demonstrate VSANet outperforms stateof-the-art LF denoising methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于视角感知稀疏注意力的光场图像去噪网络VSANet，实现高效全局特征交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 光场图像具有高维结构，去噪任务面临挑战。噪声在子孔径图像间独立，但场景内容存在强跨视角相关性。现有方法难以有效利用全局视角相关性，且计算复杂度高。因此需要一种既能高效建模跨视角交互又保持线性复杂度的网络。
light_analysis.method: VSANet核心包含视角感知稀疏注意力（VSA）块和特征精炼（FR）块。VSA将4D LF特征图转换为统一的空间-角度令牌空间，并采用基于局部敏感哈希的稀疏注意力实现跨视角聚合，达到全局特征交互且线性复杂度。FR块在空间、角度和对极子空间增强信息特征。两者集成于顺序注意力精炼模块中。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，VSANet在多个光场去噪基准数据集上优于当前最先进方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称性能超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: VSANet通过稀疏注意力高效利用光场跨视角相关性，为高维LF去噪提供新思路。其线性复杂度特性使其适用于高分辨率光场图像。未来可探索更高效的精炼策略或扩展到其他LF任务如超分辨率。

title: Task Decomposition for Efficient Annotation
abstract: High-quality annotations of structured representations are expensive to collect over large corpora. Manual annotation of structure is laborious, and model-based annotation, although cheaper to generate, requires expensive validation and potentially significant supervision to ensure that the annotation quality is strong enough to be useful downstream. In traditional annotation workflows, annotation of each complete example is performed end-to-end by a single annotator. However, structured annotation is complex, and each aspect of the task represents a unique challenge with an associated inferential load for a given annotator. Modern annotation projects can incorporate heterogeneous groups of annotators, including both models and human annotators with varying domain and linguistic expertise. It remains unclear, however, how to redesign annotation tasks in this setting, where efforts are discriminately allocated across heterogeneous annotators with respect to distinct annotation challenges.   We propose to decompose annotation tasks into sub-tasks in order to reduce the aggregate inferential load of annotation projects. Inspired by the notion of centers from centering theory, we introduce a formal model of inferential load based on the degrees of freedom in the space of valid annotations. Using this model, we show that identifying these centers (i.e. salient anchor entities realized by annotation sub-tasks) constrains the output space complexity, and decompositions which isolate and advance center identification reduce the aggregate inferential load. We provide guidelines for decomposing complex structured annotation tasks, supported by examples demonstrating improved cost-efficiency from our prior work. Finally, we present a procedure for allocating sub-tasks across annotators to maximize quality under a fixed budget.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过分解结构化标注任务为子任务来降低推理负载，从而提高标注成本效率的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 高质量结构化标注在大规模语料上成本高昂，手动标注费力，模型标注虽便宜但需昂贵验证和监督。传统端到端标注方式未能利用异构标注者（模型和人类）的差异化能力。现有方法未解决如何针对不同标注挑战分配任务以降低整体推理负载的问题。
light_analysis.method: 受中心理论启发，提出基于有效标注空间自由度的推理负载形式化模型。通过识别标注子任务中的中心（即显著锚点实体）来约束输出空间复杂度，并设计分解策略隔离中心识别步骤以降低聚合推理负载。提供分解复杂结构化标注任务的指南，并给出在固定预算下分配子任务以最大化质量的流程。
light_analysis.result: 通过来自先前工作的示例，展示了所提分解方法在成本效率上的改进。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但强调了分解能减少推理负载、提高标注质量。论文未提供量化对比，但理论上证明了中心识别对复杂度的约束作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：提出基于推理负载模型的标注任务分解方法，为异构标注者分配子任务提供理论指导。学术价值在于形式化推理负载并连接中心理论；实际价值在于降低结构化标注成本。未来可探索更细粒度的推理负载度量及在大规模任务上的验证。

title: SER: Learning to Ground Video Reasoning with Semantic Evidence Rewards
abstract: Video MLLMs often struggle with fine-grained spatio-temporal reasoning, sometimes generating correct answers based on irrelevant frames or objects. Although outputting spatio-temporal evidence during reasoning is a promising direction, existing RL frameworks typically rely on geometry-only (IoU) rewards, which can be sensitive to boundary perturbations and overlook semantic alignment. To address this, we propose Semantic Evidence Reward (SER), which reformulates spatio-temporal evidence grounding as a constrained verification task. Instead of computing pixel-level overlap, SER uses a referee VLM as a local checker to evaluate model-generated evidence claims across two dimensions: relevance and localization quality, combined with a temporal penalty. This design reduces the reliance on dense box annotations and enables training directly on standard video QA data. On the V-STAR benchmark, SER achieves 49.6% mLGM, improving by 3.0 points over the strong evidence-grounded baseline Open-o3-Video, demonstrating its potential in enhancing both answer accuracy and evidence grounding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义证据奖励（SER），通过约束验证任务提升视频推理中的时空证据接地，减少对密集框标注的依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频多模态大模型在细粒度时空推理中常产生基于无关帧或对象的正确答案，现有强化学习框架仅使用几何重叠（IoU）奖励，对边界扰动敏感且忽略语义对齐，导致证据接地不可靠。
light_analysis.method: SER将时空证据接地重构为约束验证任务，利用裁判VLM作为本地检查器，从相关性和定位质量两个维度评估证据，并加入时间惩罚，无需像素级标注，可直接在标准视频问答数据上训练。
light_analysis.result: 在V-STAR基准上，SER达到49.6%的mLGM，比强基线Open-o3-Video提升3.0个百分点，同时提升了答案准确性和证据接地质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: SER通过语义奖励有效改善了视频推理中证据接地的对齐性和鲁棒性，减少了对密集标注的依赖，为视频MLLMs的细粒度推理提供了新框架，未来可探索更高效的裁判模型或联合训练策略。

title: Decentralised AI Training and Inference with BlockTrain
abstract: Frontier AI training is increasingly shaped by access to dense, centrally controlled accelerator clusters. This creates a structural advantage for hyperscalers and large centralized laboratories, and makes open or independent AI efforts depend on scarce capital, privileged infrastructure, and data-center geography. We present Spheroid BlockTrain, a decentralized training protocol in which a model is partitioned into independently trainable blocks, each optimized on a local objective derived from the same global target and composed at inference into one model. On byte-level WikiText, BlockTrain reaches cross entropy 1.359 (perplexity 3.89), within about 0.04 CE of a same-setup end-to-end Transformer reference, while each active worker trains only one block and avoids full-model optimizer state. A shared six-worker block training run reaches CE 1.385 by averaging same-block updates into one assembled model. HTTP/TCP transport experiments move real serialized checkpoints and updates, including a public-IP three-host run that improves CE from 5.580 to 1.811 while moving 15.22 GB. For inference, the current BlockTrain path uses one block-stack traversal per full output and serves over direct TCP across three public-network GPU hosts up to a 75.80B-parameter logical fp16 shape, outperforming a matched plain-autoregressive TCP pipeline baseline because it emits a full sequence per WAN pipeline traversal rather than one token per traversal.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BlockTrain去中心化训练协议，通过分块训练与推理组合，实现接近集中式Transformer的性能，并降低通信开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前前沿AI训练依赖密集、集中控制的加速集群，导致超大规模和集中实验室的结构性优势，阻碍开放或独立AI发展。现有方法受限于资本、特权基础设施和数据中心地理位置。需要一种去中心化方案，使训练能够分散进行，同时保持模型性能。
light_analysis.method: BlockTrain将模型分割为独立可训练的块，每个块基于全局目标的局部目标优化，推理时组合为完整模型。每个工作节点仅训练一个块，避免全模型优化器状态。支持HTTP/TCP传输，通过平均相同块更新实现多工作者联合训练。推理时使用块栈遍历产生完整输出序列。
light_analysis.result: 在字节级WikiText上，BlockTrain达到交叉熵1.359（困惑度3.89），接近相同设置端到端Transformer参考（约0.04 CE差距）。六工作者共享块训练达到CE 1.385。三主机公共IP运行从CE 5.580改善至1.811，传输15.22 GB。推理时处理75.80B参数逻辑fp16形状，超越匹配的纯自回归TCP流水线基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: BlockTrain证明了去中心化训练的有效性，降低了AI训练对集中基础设施的依赖，具有开放性和可扩展性。性能接近集中式方法，同时减少通信负载。未来可进一步优化块划分策略和协议效率，适用于大规模分布式AI部署。

title: Evaluating the Interpretability of Sparse Autoencoders with Concept Annotations
abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are increasingly used to extract interpretable concepts from vision and vision language models, yet existing evaluation methods largely rely on proxy metrics or qualitative inspection rather than measuring semantic correspondence. We present a human-grounded evaluation framework that quantifies alignment between SAE latents and human-annotated concepts, without requiring user studies, and validate this matching through targeted attribute perturbations. To enable this intervention-style evaluation in vision, we construct synCUB and synCOCO, synthetic benchmarks of paired images that differ in exactly one attribute. We introduce Fully-Binary Matching Pursuit (FBMP), a coalition-based matching procedure that supports many-to-one mappings between SAE latents and annotated concepts, and consistently outperforms one-to-one baselines. For functional validation, we propose a Targeted Attribute Perturbation Alignment Score (TAPAScore), which tests whether matched concepts respond selectively and in the expected direction under targeted image-level attribute perturbations. Under sanity checks, our matching and TAPAScore are the only evaluated metrics that reliably distinguish trained SAEs from untrained ones. Across SAEs trained on CLIP and DINOv2 embeddings, we find that increased overcompleteness can reduce perturbation alignment, indicating a reduction in interpretability. Our evaluation framework suggests that moderate dictionary sizes provide the best trade-off, yielding the most interpretable SAEs. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/JonasKlotz/sae-concept-eval.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于概念注释的稀疏自编码器可解释性评估框架，通过合成基准和联盟匹配方法量化语义对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAEs）广泛用于从视觉模型中提取可解释概念，但现有评估多依赖代理指标或定性检查，缺乏直接测量潜在变量与人类注释概念之间语义对应的方法，难以确保所提取概念的真实可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 构建synCUB和synCOCO合成基准，包含仅单属性不同的配对图像；提出全二进制匹配追踪（FBMP）实现SAE潜在变量与概念的多对一匹配；设计目标属性扰动对齐分数（TAPAScore）通过图像级扰动验证概念的选择性响应。
light_analysis.result: 在CLIP和DINOv2嵌入上训练的SAE中，FBMP匹配和TAPAScore是唯一能可靠区分训练与未训练SAE的指标；增加过完备性会降低扰动对齐，适中的字典大小提供最佳可解释性权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为SAE可解释性提供了量化评估标准，揭示了字典大小与可解释性的关系，有助于设计更可解释的SAE；未来可扩展至更多模型和复杂概念。

title: CN-NewsTTS Bench: a target-level automatic benchmark for raw-input Chinese news TTS pronunciation
abstract: Chinese news text contains dense written forms such as scores, hyphenated model names, ranges, unit symbols, percentages, English abbreviations, and mixed Chinese-Latin-digit names. These forms are frequent in real listening workflows, and a text-to-speech (TTS) system can preserve the written string while changing the spoken meaning. We introduce CN-NewsTTS Bench v0.1, an open target-level benchmark for evaluating whether Chinese news TTS products pronounce such targets correctly from raw text, without user-side rules, LLM rewriting, SSML hints, or manual edits. The release contains a 200-record development set, an 800-record public test set, 992 public auto-evaluable targets, fixed transcripts from a three-ASR ensemble, an automatic target scorer, and initial results for seven product TTS systems. We additionally report ASR-route diagnostics, ASR-subset ablations, category-level results, confidence intervals, and provider configuration metadata. The best system reaches 0.879 strict accuracy, while several systems remain below 0.60.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了CN-NewsTTS Bench v0.1，一个针对中文新闻TTS系统在原始文本输入下发音正确性的开放目标级基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 中文新闻文本包含分数、连字符模型名、范围、单位符号、百分比、英文缩写等密集书面形式，这些在真实收听中频繁出现，但现有TTS系统可能保留文字而改变口语含义。缺乏专门评估此类发音的标准基准，且现有方法依赖用户规则、LLM重写或SSML提示，不适用于原始文本输入。因此需要自动、标准化评估工具。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含200条开发集、800条测试集和992个可自动评估目标的基准。采用三ASR集成获取固定转录，并设计自动目标评分器以评估发音正确性。评估了七个产品TTS系统，报告了ASR路由诊断、ASR子集消融、类别级结果、置信区间和提供商配置元数据。
light_analysis.result: 最佳系统严格准确率达到0.879，而多个系统低于0.60。表明当前中文新闻TTS在特殊书面形式的发音上存在显著不足，尤其是性能较低的系统准确率远低于实用水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提出了针对中文新闻TTS发音的目标级基准，为评估和提升TTS系统提供标准化工具。有助于推动TTS在真实新闻场景中的可用性。未来可扩展更多书面形式类别或语言。局限性是评估依赖ASR准确性，可能引入误差。

title: FlowPipe: LLM-Enhanced Conditional Generative Flow Networks for Data Preparation Pipeline Construction
abstract: Data preparation pipelines improve data quality in machine learning by transforming raw tables into learning-ready data through sequential cleaning and feature transformation operators. However, automatically constructing such pipelines is computationally difficult because operator sequences are combinatorial and end-to-end evaluation is expensive. Existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) Multi-DQN methods still face three key limitations: decoupled value estimators weaken long-horizon credit assignment, dataset context is only weakly injected into the policy, and exploration is inefficient in a sparse search space with many invalid states. To address these issues, we propose FlowPipe, a unified framework that formulates pipeline synthesis as conditional probabilistic flow generation over a directed acyclic graph. FlowPipe uses Conditional Generative Flow Networks (C-GFlowNets) with a Trajectory Balance objective to connect terminal validation rewards with early pipeline decisions. It further introduces Deep Semantic Modulation through Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM), allowing LLM-derived logical priors to condition the policy's internal activations according to dataset semantics. In addition, FlowPipe incorporates failure awareness into the flow objective to avoid invalid states and concentrate search on high-potential regions. Experiments on two benchmark suites with 74 real-world datasets show that FlowPipe outperforms SOTA baselines, improving accuracy by 11.96% on average and achieving 12.5x faster training convergence. Source code is available at https://github.com/KunyuNi/FlowPipe.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowPipe框架，利用条件生成流网络和LLM语义调制，解决数据准备流水线自动构建中的组合优化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据准备流水线自动构建面临计算困难，现有Multi-DQN方法存在三个关键限制：解耦的价值估计削弱长期信用分配、数据集上下文仅弱注入策略、稀疏无效状态空间导致探索低效。这些问题阻碍了高效流水线合成，亟需统一框架。
light_analysis.method: FlowPipe将流水线合成形式化为有向无环图上的条件概率流生成，采用条件生成流网络和轨迹平衡目标连接终端验证奖励与早期决策。通过特征线性调制引入LLM逻辑先验，根据数据集语义调节策略内部激活，并融入失败感知避免无效状态，集中搜索高潜力区域。
light_analysis.result: 在包含74个真实数据集的两个基准套件上，FlowPipe平均准确率提升11.96%，训练收敛速度加快12.5倍，全面超越现有最先进的多DQN基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowPipe为数据准备流水线构建提供了统一高效的解决方案，显著提升性能和收敛速度。其成功验证了生成流网络与LLM语义指导的结合潜力，未来可应用于更广泛的自动机器学习流程。

title: Cost-Optimal Decision Diagrams for Stochastic Boolean Function Evaluation
abstract: In many decision-making scenarios, acquiring information incurs different costs. We consider the problem of constructing a deterministic evaluation strategy that minimizes the expected cost of evaluating a propositional formula under variable costs and a probability distribution over truth assignments. We present a branch-and-bound algorithm with variable-selection heuristics, pruning, and caching. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first practical exact algorithm for this level of generality. Experiments on random instances demonstrate scalability and quantify the efficiency-quality trade-off of a greedy beam-search variant. We additionally evaluate a structured heart-disease diagnosis instance. Finally, we prove that the problem is $\#P$-hard and contained in $\mathrm{PSPACE}$.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个实用精确算法求解随机布尔函数评估中的成本最优决策图构建问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在许多决策场景中，获取信息需不同成本。现有方法缺乏对变量成本和概率分布下最小化命题公式评估期望成本的通用精确求解算法，而该问题在实际中具有重要应用，如医疗诊断。
light_analysis.method: 提出分支定界算法，集成变量选择启发式、剪枝和缓存策略，首次实现针对此通用问题的实用精确求解。此外，还探讨了贪婪波束搜索变体以平衡效率与质量。
light_analysis.result: 在随机实例上验证了算法的可扩展性，量化了贪婪波束搜索的效率-质量权衡；并在结构化心脏病诊断实例上评估。同时证明了问题复杂度为#P-hard且属于PSPACE。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了首个实用精确算法，解决了随机布尔函数评估中的成本最优策略问题。实验证明其有效性和可扩展性，复杂度分析揭示了问题难度。未来可改进启发式或推广至更复杂结构。

title: LaGO: Latent Action Guidance for Online Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong potential for planning and sequential decision-making, but prior work often relies on using them as direct controllers, which requires precise action generation and can be unreliable in practice. This paper proposes Latent Action Guidance for Online Reinforcement Learning (LaGO), a framework that uses a pretrained LLM as a latent action prior to softly guide online policy optimization, rather than treating the LLM as an explicit planner or controller. Experiments on both a discrete-control benchmark, CLEVR-Robot, and a continuous-control benchmark, Meta-World, demonstrate that LaGO consistently improves both reward and success rate over Vanilla PPO. In particular, LaGO increases the average success rate from 15.1% to 27.2% on CLEVR-Robot and from 2.7% to 15.2% on Meta-World. Our analysis further shows that stronger pretrained LLMs provide more effective guidance, suggesting that LLM knowledge can improve planning and online decision-making.
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Large Language Models for Planning (LM4Plan)

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaGO框架，利用预训练LLM作为潜在动作先验软性引导在线强化学习策略优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法将大型语言模型（LLM）作为直接控制器，需要精确的动作生成，在实际应用中不可靠。因此，需要一种更稳健的方式来利用LLM的知识提升在线强化学习的决策能力。
light_analysis.method: LaGO框架使用预训练LLM作为潜在动作先验，通过软性引导方式影响在线策略优化，而非直接控制。在离散控制基准CLEVR-Robot和连续控制基准Meta-World上评估，采用PPO作为基础算法。
light_analysis.result: 在CLEVR-Robot上，LaGO将平均成功率从15.1%提升至27.2%；在Meta-World上，从2.7%提升至15.2%。同时奖励也一致优于Vanilla PPO。分析表明更强的预训练LLM提供更有效的指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaGO证明了将LLM知识作为潜在先验可以显著提升在线强化学习的规划和决策性能，为结合LLM与强化学习提供了新思路。未来可探索更大规模LLM及更多任务。

title: DREAM: Dense Retrieval Embeddings via Autoregressive Modeling
abstract: Dense retrieval embedding models are a fundamental component of modern retrieval-based AI systems. Most dense retrievers are trained with contrastive objectives, which require labeled positive and negative document pairs that are often costly and difficult to obtain. In this work, we investigate whether the autoregressive next-token prediction objective of a large language model (LLM) can provide supervision for dense retrieval. The intuition is simple: if a document contains information relevant to a query, conditioning on that document should make the target output easier for the LLM to predict. A key challenge is that the next-token prediction loss is computed inside the LLM, while the retriever is a separate embedding model. To address this challenge, we propose DREAM (Dense Retrieval Embeddings via Autoregressive Modeling), which injects retriever-generated query-document similarity scores into selected attention heads of a frozen LLM. During training, these scores determine how much attention each candidate document receives while the LLM predicts the target output. The resulting prediction loss provides gradients for retriever training through the attention mechanism. We evaluate DREAM on retrieval benchmarks BEIR and RTEB using embedding backbones ranging from 0.5B to 3B parameters. DREAM consistently outperforms existing baselines across different model scales. These results demonstrate that DREAM provides a promising approach for training dense retrievers through autoregressive modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DREAM方法，利用LLM的自回归预测目标训练稠密检索模型，通过注入相似度分数到注意力头实现梯度传递。
light_analysis.motivation: 稠密检索嵌入模型通常需要带标注的正负文档对进行对比学习，获取成本高且困难。探索是否可以利用大规模语言模型（LLM）的下一词预测目标为稠密检索提供监督信号，以降低对标注数据的依赖。
light_analysis.method: DREAM将检索器生成的查询-文档相似度分数注入冻结LLM的选定注意力头中。训练时，这些分数决定候选文档在LLM预测目标输出时获得的注意力权重，预测损失通过注意力机制为检索器提供梯度。使用0.5B至3B参数的嵌入骨干，在BEIR和RTEB上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在BEIR和RTEB检索基准上，使用不同规模（0.5B至3B参数）的嵌入骨干，DREAM持续优于现有基线方法，表明其在不同模型规模下均有效，无需标注对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: DREAM证明了通过自回归建模训练稠密检索器的可行性，为降低检索模型对标注数据依赖提供了新思路。实验验证其有效性，未来可探索更大规模模型及更多任务。

title: AI-PAVE-Br: Leveraging Large Language Models for Enhanced Product Attribute Value Extraction through a Golden Set Approach
abstract: The explosive growth and complexity of product data within the dynamic Brazilian e-commerce landscape demand robust and specialized methods for structured information extraction. Traditional approaches to Product Attribute Value Extraction (PAVE) often struggle with the linguistic nuances and sheer diversity of product descriptions in Portuguese. To address this critical gap, this paper introduces two major contributions. First, we present AI-PAVEBr, a specialized system engineered with Large Language Models (LLMs) to perform high-accuracy PAVE specifically for Brazilian e-commerce catalogs. Second, to facilitate reproducible research and provide a definitive benchmark, we introduce and share the Golden Set, a new, meticulously curated, and manually annotated dataset for PAVE in Portuguese. We detail the creation process and structure (Entity, Category, Subcategories) of this high-quality reference set. Our experiments conclusively show that AI-PAVE-Br, leveraging targeted prompt engineering, dramatically outperforms conventional Named Entity Recognition (NER) baselines. This work not only delivers a superior, scalable solution for a major non-English market but also enriches the NLP community with a valuable, publicly available resource for future PAVE research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AI-PAVE-Br系统，利用大语言模型和Golden Set基准数据集，提升巴西电商产品属性值提取的准确性和可复现性。
light_analysis.motivation: 巴西电商产品数据爆炸式增长且复杂，传统产品属性值提取方法难以处理葡萄牙语的细微差别和描述多样性，缺乏专门的高质量数据集和基准。本研究旨在解决这一实际需求，提供高效、可扩展的解决方案，并促进非英语市场的自然语言处理研究。
light_analysis.method: 基于大语言模型构建AI-PAVE-Br系统，采用针对性的提示工程优化提取效果；同时创建Golden Set，一个精心策划、手动标注的葡萄牙语产品属性值提取数据集，包含实体、类别、子类别结构。实验对比传统命名实体识别基线方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验证明AI-PAVE-Br通过提示工程显著优于传统NER基线方法，实现了高准确率的产品属性值提取，具体性能指标摘要未明确，但强调了大幅提升。Golden Set为未来研究提供了可靠基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一个面向巴西电商的实用系统AI-PAVE-Br和首个葡萄牙语PAVE基准数据集Golden Set，不仅提升了非英语市场的信息提取能力，也为学术社区提供了宝贵资源，可复现研究。未来可探索跨域适应或更细粒度属性提取。

title: Agentic Collaborative Cognition for Zero-Shot 3D Understanding
abstract: Recent advancements have explored agentic zero-shot 3D understanding by reformulating it as video keyframe understanding with Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, existing methods face an intrinsic bottleneck due to the finite observation perspectives inherent in videos and the implicit perception of 3D scenes. In this paper, we propose a collaborative multi-agent framework that assigns a Planning Agent to handle high-level viewpoint planning and supplement novel perspectives, and a Perception Agent to explicitly summarize the 3D scene into a structured holistic cognitive map. Specifically, Planning Agent first analyzes this cognitive map to determine query-relevant viewpoints and supplements missing critical perspectives to ensure comprehensive observation. Subsequently, Perception Agent documents object-level attributes from these views by assigning consistent instance identifiers across viewpoints, thereby integrating fragmented observations into the holistic cognitive map. In parallel, it provides feedback to filter out mismatched candidate objects and guide subsequent viewpoint planning. Through this closed-loop iterative process, two agents collaboratively figure out candidates until Perception Agent determines that sufficient information has been captured to complete the task. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on 6 benchmarks, with improvements of 11.1\% Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer, 14.6 BLEU-1 on 3D-assisted dialog, and 2.1 EM on SQA3D.

light_analysis.overview: 提出协作多智能体框架，通过规划与感知智能体协同工作，实现零样本3D理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有零样本3D理解方法将任务转化为视频关键帧理解，受限于有限观察视角和隐式感知，无法充分捕获3D场景的完整信息。该问题限制了系统在复杂3D任务中的性能，亟需一种能显式建模场景结构并动态规划视角的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出协作多智能体框架，包含规划智能体和感知智能体。规划智能体负责高层视角规划，分析认知地图并补充缺失视角；感知智能体显式总结3D场景为结构化认知地图，记录对象级属性并通过一致标识符跨视角整合。两智能体通过闭环迭代过程协同，直至捕获足够信息完成任务。
light_analysis.result: 在6个基准上达到最先进性能：ScanRefer上Acc@0.5提升11.1%，3D辅助对话上BLEU-1提升14.6%，SQA3D上EM提升2.1%。实验证明了该方法在零样本3D理解任务中的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过多智能体协作框架，解决了零样本3D理解中视角有限和隐式感知的瓶颈，实现了显式场景建模和动态视角规划。该方法在多个基准上取得了显著提升，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索扩展到动态场景和更多智能体类型。

title: Measuring User's Mental Models of Speech Translation in Human-AI Collaboration
abstract: Millions of people use machine translation (MT) tools daily, yet little is known about their perception of what systems can and cannot do. This paper studies users' mental models of speech translation systems through a new framework based on cross-lingual question answering, where users either accept MT output or request professional re-translation to answer questions based on the information presented in a foreign language. By analyzing user behavior and accuracy trends across varying translation qualities, we examine to what extent they can predict where the system is likely to be wrong, and how this mental model evolves. Users develop stronger mental models with practice, especially when they have some knowledge of the source language, primarily by relying on surface-level error cues. Moreover, providing speech transcriptions can help users develop better mental models. Our results show the promise of cross-lingual question answering as a downstream task for studying MT mental models and advancing our understanding of human-AI collaboration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于跨语言问答的框架，测量用户对语音翻译系统的心理模型及其演变。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管机器翻译工具被广泛使用，但用户对系统能力的认知（心理模型）尚不明确。现有研究缺乏对用户如何预测翻译错误以及心理模型如何随时间演变的深入理解。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过跨语言问答任务，探究用户在不同翻译质量下的行为模式，从而提升人机协作效率。
light_analysis.method: 采用跨语言问答作为下游任务，用户需根据外语信息选择接受机器翻译输出或请求专业重译来回答问题。通过分析用户行为与准确率趋势，评估用户对翻译错误的预测能力。关键创新在于利用问答任务作为心理模型的测量工具，并引入源语言知识和语音转录辅助因素。
light_analysis.result: 用户通过练习能形成更强的心理模型，尤其是具备源语言知识时，主要依赖表面错误线索。提供语音转录有助于改善心理模型。实验表明跨语言问答能有效揭示用户对翻译系统的认知状态，为研究人类-AI协作提供了新视角。摘要未报告具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实了跨语言问答作为研究机器翻译心理模型的可行方法，揭示了用户心理模型的形成机制和影响因素。成果有助于设计更有效的翻译辅助系统，提升人机协作效果。未来可探索更复杂的任务场景及个性化心理模型建模。

title: CineCap: Structured Reasoning with Spatio-Temporal Anchors for Cinematographic Video Captioning
abstract: Cinematographic captioning aims to describe how a video is filmed using professional film-language concepts such as camera movement, shot size, depth of field, composition, and shooting angle. This capability is important for fine-grained video understanding and controllable movie-quality video generation, yet remains underexplored in existing multimodal large language models. Unlike question-answering-based evaluation of cinematic understanding, cinematographic captioning requires a unified open-form description over multiple cinematographic dimensions. This task is challenging for two main reasons: the model must infer professional cinematographic concepts from subtle visual evidence, and it must generate captions that are both comprehensive and accurate. Accordingly, we propose CineCap, a framework that combines structured reasoning with spatio-temporal anchors and reinforcement learning with comprehensiveness, accuracy, and gated coverage rewards. The former grounds professional cinematographic descriptions in explicit visual evidence and organizes them into compact atomic reasoning for supervised fine-tuning, while the latter improves the balance between descriptive completeness and factual correctness. In addition, we construct CineCap Bench, a benchmark of 472 manually annotated video-caption pairs for systematic evaluation. Extensive experiments show that CineCap consistently outperforms strong proprietary and open-source baselines, establishing a new state of the art for cinematographic captioning. The code, model checkpoint, and benchmark are publicly available in https://github.com/Hectormxy/CineCap.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CineCap框架，通过结构化推理与时空锚点结合强化学习，实现高质量电影级视频字幕描述。
light_analysis.motivation: 电影级视频字幕描述需要理解专业电影语言概念（如镜头运动、景深等），但现有多模态大模型在统一开放式描述上表现不足，主要挑战在于从细微视觉证据推断专业概念并生成全面准确的描述。
light_analysis.method: CineCap采用结构化推理模块，利用时空锚点将专业电影描述与显式视觉证据关联，并组织为紧凑原子推理进行监督微调；同时引入强化学习，结合全面性、准确性和门控覆盖奖励，提升描述完整性与事实正确性的平衡。此外构建了包含472对人工标注视频-字幕的CineCap Bench基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，CineCap在多个专有和开源基线方法上持续取得最优性能，在电影级字幕描述任务上建立了新的最先进水平。代码、模型和基准均已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: CineCap有效解决了电影级视频字幕描述中专业概念推断与描述平衡的难题，提升了细粒度视频理解能力，为可控视频生成提供支撑。未来可扩展至更多电影维度或跨模态推理。

title: The Warrant Gap: Claim-Conditioned Re-scoring for Fact-Checking
abstract: Fact-checking systems built on LLMs achieve high verdict accuracy on standard benchmarks, yet routinely output Supports labels whose cited evidence does not license the claim. Structured decomposition is the natural way to inspect those warrants, but rigid extraction protocols strip the full-claim context that facets need. We introduce SIFT -- claim-conditioned re-scoring of extracted evidence spans against the full claim -- paired with WSP (Warranted Supports Proportion), an automatic NLI check that the cited warrant entails the claim. We evaluate on FEVER, SciFact, 5PILS, and DP across four open-source backbones. SIFT recovers accuracy on cells where naive decomposition costs up to 27.6 points, while raising WSP above direct prompting; WSP itself calibrates against human gold evidence at AUC 0.92 and precision 0.98.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SIFT方法，通过声明条件化的证据重评分来弥合事实验证中的支持证据与声明之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的事实验证系统在标准基准测试中准确率高，但常输出支持标签时引用的证据并不支持声明。结构化分解是自然检查方式，但严格提取协议丢失完整声明上下文，导致"warrant gap"问题。
light_analysis.method: SIFT方法对提取的证据片段进行声明条件化的重评分，并搭配WSP指标自动检查证据是否蕴含声明。在FEVER、SciFact、5PILS和DP数据集上使用四个开源骨干网络评估。
light_analysis.result: SIFT在简单分解导致准确率损失高达27.6个点的单元格上恢复准确率，同时WSP提升到高于直接提示水平；WSP与人类黄金证据校准，AUC达0.92，精确率0.98。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIFT有效弥合支持证据与声明之间的差距，提高事实验证可靠性。WSP作为自动检查指标准确率高。未来可探索更细粒度分解或扩展至其他事实验证场景。

title: SAFARI: Scaling Long Horizon Agentic Fault Attribution via Active Investigation
abstract: As autonomous agents tackle increasingly complex multi-step, multi-agent tasks, their execution trajectories have scaled beyond the constraints of even the largest context windows. Current methods for effectively diagnosing agent failures load the full trajectory into an LLM's context window, which suffers from attention dilution and fails when agentic traces inevitably exceed context limits. To address this, we introduce SAFARI (Scaling long-horizon Agentic Fault AttRibution via active Investigation), a framework that replaces linear context loading with a tool-augmented diagnostic loop. By equipping LLMs with a specialized toolbox to read and search trajectory segments alongside a persistent Short-Term Memory (STM) for cross-turn reasoning, SAFARI effectively decouples diagnostic accuracy from architectural context limits. Our experiments demonstrate that SAFARI outperforms state-of-the-art results by 20% on the Who&When dataset within a 1M token budget, and by 19% on TRAIL GAIA subset on a 25K token budget. Most significantly, SAFARI maintains a 0.58 precision even when the target fault resides 5x beyond the model's native context window, a scenario where traditional evaluators fail entirely.
comment: Published at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAFARI框架，通过工具增强的诊断循环和短期记忆，解决长轨迹代理故障归因中上下文窗口限制问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主代理执行多步多代理任务时，轨迹长度超出上下文窗口限制。现有方法将完整轨迹加载到LLM上下文中，导致注意力稀释且在超限时失效。需要一种能解耦诊断精度与上下文限制的方法，以有效诊断长序列代理故障。
light_analysis.method: SAFARI框架用工具增强的诊断循环替代线性上下文加载。为LLM配备专用工具箱（读取和搜索轨迹段）以及用于跨轮推理的短期记忆（STM），使诊断不依赖上下文窗口大小。实验在Who&When和TRAIL GAIA子集上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在Who&When数据集上，SAFARI在100万token预算下比最先进结果提升20%；在TRAIL GAIA子集上以2.5万token预算提升19%。即使目标故障超出模型原生上下文窗口5倍，SAFARI仍保持0.58的精确度，而传统方法完全失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAFARI有效解耦了归因诊断与上下文长度限制，显著提升了长轨迹故障定位能力。具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至更复杂场景，但可能依赖工具质量和记忆管理策略。

title: QC-SMOTE: Quality-Controlled SMOTE for Imbalanced Classification
abstract: Class imbalance poses a significant challenge in classification, where existing methods such as SMOTE often generate low-quality synthetic samples in regions with noise or class overlap. We propose QC-SMOTE, a quality-controlled oversampling framework that estimates minority sample reliability using a composite neighbourhood trustworthiness score combining local density, safe-level, and isolation from the majority class. Synthetic candidates are generated using an IPQ-guided best-of-K strategy that evaluates midpoint purity and, when required, majority clearance, with allocation guided by sample reliability and boundary informativeness. Generation behaviour adapts across overlap--imbalance regimes, adjusting interpolation range and selection criteria to match local data geometry. Low-quality synthetic samples are replaced with original minority duplicates when neighbourhood purity falls below an adaptive threshold, providing graceful degradation by reverting to duplication in severely noisy regions. Experiments on 30 imbalanced datasets using repeated stratified cross-validation show that QC-SMOTE achieves the strongest average AUC-ROC and Macro F1 among the compared oversampling methods, with particularly clear gains under moderate and severe imbalance. These results demonstrate the importance of quality-aware, geometry-adaptive synthetic sampling for robust imbalanced classification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QC-SMOTE，一种质量控制过采样框架，通过复合邻域可信度评估和自适应生成策略提升不平衡分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 不平衡分类中，现有SMOTE等过采样方法在噪声或类重叠区域容易生成低质量合成样本，导致分类性能下降。因此需要一种质量感知、几何自适应的合成采样方法，以提高少数类样本的可靠性和分类器的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: QC-SMOTE使用复合邻域可信度分数（结合局部密度、安全等级和与多数类隔离度）评估少数样本可靠性。采用IPQ引导的best-of-K策略生成候选样本，评估中点纯度，必要时进行多数类清除。样本分配由可靠性和边界信息指导，生成行为根据重叠-不平衡状态自适应调整插值范围和选择标准。低质量合成样本被替换为原始少数类重复，实现噪声区域的优雅降级。
light_analysis.result: 在30个不平衡数据集上使用重复分层交叉验证，QC-SMOTE在平均AUC-ROC和Macro F1上优于所有对比过采样方法，特别在中度和严重不平衡场景下提升明显，验证了质量控制和几何自适应策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: QC-SMOTE展示了质量感知、几何自适应合成采样对稳健不平衡分类的重要性，提供了一种有效的过采样方法，具有学术价值（解决低质量样本问题）和实际应用价值（提升分类性能），未来可扩展至多类不平衡或代价敏感学习场景。

title: Privacy-Preserving RAG via Multi-Agent Semantic Rewriting: Achieving Confidentiality Without Compromising Contextual Fidelity
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation enhances large language models by incorporating external knowledge, but deploying it in sensitive scenarios risks privacy leakage via malicious prompts. To address this, we propose a multi-agent framework that sanitizes retrieved content through semantic rewriting. By employing three specialized agents for privacy extraction, semantic analysis, and reconstruction, our approach collaboratively removes sensitive identifiers while preserving the semantic core. We evaluate the framework on the ChatDoctor and Wiki-PII datasets across six large language models. Experimental results demonstrate a significant reduction in privacy leakage under targeted attacks. For instance, we reduced targeted information exposure in LLaMA-3-8B from 144 instances in the baseline to just 1. Furthermore, we maintain strong contextual fidelity with a BLEU-1 score of 0.122, outperforming the existing SAGE method's 0.117. Finally, the framework operates as an asynchronous preprocessing module, introducing no additional latency to online inference, as all rewriting is executed as a one-time offline preprocessing step. To promote reproducibility, the source code of this work is publicly available at https://github.com/foursoils/Privacy-Preserving-RAG.
comment: This full manuscript contains 23 pages and has been formally accepted for publication in Information Processing & Management (Elsevier IPM). Tao Fang is the corresponding author

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种通过多智能体语义重写实现隐私保护的RAG框架，在去除敏感标识符的同时保持语义核心。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）在敏感场景中部署时，恶意提示可能导致隐私泄露。现有方法如SAGE在隐私保护和上下文保真度之间权衡不足，无法有效抵抗针对性攻击。本文旨在解决RAG在隐私敏感应用中的安全性问题，同时保持检索内容的语义完整性。
light_analysis.method: 提出多智能体语义重写框架，包含三个专用智能体：隐私提取智能体识别并移除敏感标识符，语义分析智能体保留语义核心，重构智能体生成净化后的内容。该框架作为异步预处理模块，所有重写作为一次性离线步骤执行，不增加在线推理延迟。在ChatDoctor和Wiki-PII数据集上评估六个大语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaMA-3-8B上，将基线中的144个目标信息泄露实例减少至仅1个；BLEU-1得分为0.122，优于SAGE方法的0.117，证明在显著降低隐私泄露的同时保持了较强的上下文保真度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种有效的隐私保护RAG框架，通过多智能体语义重写实现隐私与保真度的平衡。其离线预处理设计不增加推理延迟，具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的攻击场景或扩展到多模态数据。代码已开源以促进可复现性。

title: Themis: An explainable AI-enabled framework for Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback
abstract: Training safe Reinforcement Learning (RL) systems is inherently challenging, with no guarantee of avoiding unwanted behaviors. The most effective defenses against this are (i) transparency through explainability and (ii) alignment via human feedback. While both show promising results, no publicly available framework currently combines them. To address this, we introduce Themis, an XAI-enabled testing and evaluation framework for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback. Themis supports over 200 widely used environments and is easily configurable for experiments in RL, transparency, and alignment. Our results show that Themis can train reward models that match or outperform the environment's true reward signal using human preferences. We also provide a cloud-based platform for collecting human feedback and managing experiments. It is user-friendly, auto-scalable, and supports large participant groups across multiple experiments without extra development overhead. Tests show Themis can support one thousand users in back-to-back experiments on a modest commercial machine.
comment: The extended version of a paper published at the 2026 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI). Includes an additional appendix with extended derivations and supplementary results. The main paper has 8 pages, 6 figures, 1 table

light_analysis.overview: 提出Themis框架，结合可解释AI与人类反馈以训练安全强化学习系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练安全的强化学习系统具有挑战性，现有方法难以保证避免不良行为。可解释性和人类反馈是两种有效防御手段，但目前缺乏公开框架将它们结合起来。Themis旨在填补这一空白，提供一个集成的测试与评估框架。
light_analysis.method: Themis框架支持200多种环境，易于配置用于强化学习、透明度和对齐实验。通过人类偏好训练奖励模型，并配备云平台进行反馈收集和实验管理，具备用户友好、自动扩展和支持大规模参与者等特点。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Themis训练的奖励模型能够匹配或超越环境真实奖励信号。云平台测试表明，在普通商用机器上可支持1000名用户连续进行实验。
light_analysis.conclusion: Themis为结合可解释AI与人类反馈的强化学习研究提供了实用工具，具有学术和工程价值。未来可进一步优化反馈收集效率和扩展更多环境。

title: When CQs Go Wrong: Challenges in CQ Verification with OE-Assist
abstract: Competency Questions (CQs) are the central component of CQ-verification, an established process in which an ontology is evaluated against a set of natural language questions to determine whether the intended purpose of the ontology has been properly modelled. However, CQ-verification is often time-consuming and error-prone, as it requires careful interpretation of linguistic nuances and precise alignment with formal ontology constructs. Ambiguities and complexity in CQs can further complicate this process, leading to inconsistent modelling decisions and verification outcomes. In this paper, we investigate what makes a CQ challenging and possible solutions to enhance the users' performance in the CQ-verification process. We experimented with the data of 19 participants who performed CQ-verification on 20 tasks using an LLM assistant to support ontology evaluation. The results show the necessity of a tool to refine CQs before publishing them to avoid ambiguity or excessive complexity in later phases of the ontology engineering process.
comment: Acceted poster at https://2026.eswc-conferences.org/program/accepted-papers/poster-demo/ 23rd European Semantic Web Conference (Satellite Event)

light_analysis.overview: 探究能力问题（CQs）在本体验证中因歧义和复杂导致的挑战，并提出通过LLM辅助工具精炼CQ以提升验证效率。
light_analysis.motivation: CQ验证是评估本体的核心流程，但人工验证耗时且易出错，尤其当CQ包含语言歧义和复杂结构时，会导致建模决策不一致。现有方法未充分解决如何识别和规避这些挑战，亟需系统分析问题根源并开发辅助工具以提升验证准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 通过19名参与者对20项任务进行CQ验证实验，采用LLM助手（OE-Assist）辅助本体评估。分析了参与者遇到的困难，重点考察CQ的歧义性和复杂度对验证结果的影响，并基于实验结果提出需要在CQ发布前进行精炼的解决方案。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，未精炼的CQ显著增加验证错误率，参与者因歧义和复杂建模导致不一致决策。数据（摘要未明确具体数值）支持了预精炼工具的必要性，即通过自动化分析CQ的语义和结构特征，可减少后续验证阶段的问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文强调了CQ质量在本体工程中的关键作用，提出结合LLM的预精炼工具能有效降低歧义和复杂性。该研究为CQ验证提供了实践指导，未来可扩展至更大规模实验和自动化精炼算法，但当前工作仅基于有限参与者，需进一步验证通用性。

title: Abstractions of Queries in Ontology-Based Data Access
abstract: In ontology-based data access (OBDA), multiple data sources are integrated via mappings to an ontology. We consider an OBDA setting based on existential rules and the certain answer semantics. We address the recent issue of query abstraction, which consists of abstracting data queries by translating them to the ontology layer. Since a perfect abstraction may not exist, the notions of minimally complete and maximally sound abstractions have been introduced.   We study abstractions within an extension of UCQs with a limited form of inequality and a special predicate marking database constants. While this extension does not lead to an increased complexity of the problems of interest, it is able to express minimally complete abstractions, hence perfect abstractions when they exist. We also characterize maximally sound abstractions by making a new connection with the notion of maximum recovery stemming from data exchange.
comment: Extended version of a paper published in the proceedings of KR 2025

light_analysis.overview: 论文研究基于存在规则的本体数据访问中查询抽象问题，提出一种UCQ扩展以表达最小完全抽象，并建立与数据交换中最大恢复的联系。
light_analysis.motivation: 在基于本体的数据访问（OBDA）中，多个数据源通过映射集成到本体。查询抽象旨在将数据查询翻译到本体层，但完美抽象可能不存在。因此需要研究最小完全和最大声音抽象的概念。现有方法在表达这些抽象时存在局限，尤其是处理不等式和数据库常量标记方面。该研究旨在解决这一问题，提供更有效的抽象方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文考虑基于存在规则和确定答案语义的OBDA设置。研究一种扩展的UCQ（并查查询），其中包含有限形式的不等式和一个特殊谓词用于标记数据库常量。这种扩展在不增加问题复杂度的前提下，能够表达最小完全抽象，从而当完美抽象存在时也能表达。此外，通过连接数据交换中的最大恢复概念，论文还刻画了最大声音抽象。
light_analysis.result: 论文表明，所提出的UCQ扩展能够表达最小完全抽象，且不增加相关问题的计算复杂度。同时，通过将最大声音抽象与数据交换中的最大恢复建立联系，提供了新的理论刻画。摘要未提供具体实验数据或对比结果，因此性能提升未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提出了一个扩展的UCQ形式，能够有效处理OBDA中的查询抽象问题，特别是最小完全和最大声音抽象。该工作深化了本体层抽象的理论理解，并为实际OBDA系统提供了理论基础。未来工作可能包括进一步探索其他形式的抽象或扩展到更复杂的本体语言。

title: Same Lesson, Different Story: Cross-Lingual Reconstruction of Cultural Narratives in Large Language Models
abstract: The evaluation of cultural grounding context becomes complex when multiple cultures convey the same moral lesson. This challenge is particularly relevant to large language models (LLMs), which produce narratives across a wide range of languages and cultural contexts. However, it remains uncertain whether these models preserve culturally grounded meaning when equivalent moral lessons are conveyed through distinct cultural forms. This study introduces a multilingual evaluation narrative framework that integrates a cross-linguistic collection of 414 proverbs spanning 15 languages and uses four LLMs to generate 13k narratives. By employing semantically equivalent proverbs as culturally grounded prompts, the analysis assesses whether models preserve meaning across languages, how cross-lingual conditioning influences narrative realization, and whether different model families converge on similar interpretations. Results indicate that cross-lingual prompting largely preserves proverb-level semantic meaning while systematically redistributing agency, social positioning, and narrative structure. Additionally, strong inter-model convergence is observed in both monolingual and cross-lingual settings, suggesting that multilingual LLMs rely on shared semantic abstractions despite architectural and linguistic differences. These findings shed light on the need for more comprehensive evaluations of cultural grounding. Relying exclusively on semantic similarity in multilingual narrative assessments may overestimate cultural preservation by neglecting culturally meaningful variations in narrative expression.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了跨语言叙事评估框架，揭示LLMs在跨文化叙事中保留语义却系统性改变叙事结构，强调仅依赖语义相似性会高估文化保留。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究对LLMs在多语言、多文化背景下是否保留文化基础尚不确定，尤其是当同一道德教训通过不同文化形式传达时。传统评估多关注语义一致性，忽视文化叙事表达的变异，导致对文化保存的高估。因此需要系统性方法评估跨语言叙事中的文化基础。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含414条谚语（覆盖15种语言）的跨语言数据集，使用4种LLM（如GPT、LLaMA等）生成约13k条叙事。通过语义等价的谚语作为文化提示，分析三大问题：跨语言条件下语义保留程度、模型对叙事能动性/社会定位/结构的调整、不同模型家族的语义收敛性。
light_analysis.result: 跨语言提示基本保留谚语的语义，但系统性地重新分配了叙事中的能动性、社会定位和结构。不同LLM在单语和跨语言设定中均表现出强收敛性，表明模型依赖共享的语义抽象，而非语言特定表征。这表明仅语义相似性指标无法捕捉文化叙事差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了LLMs跨语言叙事中语义与文化的分离，指出当前基于语义相似性的评估会高估文化保存。未来需构建更全面的文化基础评估框架，纳入叙事结构与角色定位等文化维度。局限性包括谚语集规模有限，未深入探讨文化变异的社会语言学根源。

title: ScaleToT: Generalizing Structured LLM Reasoning for Billion-Scale Low-Activity User Modeling
abstract: Accurate user modeling often depends on rich interaction histories, which are unavailable for billions of low-activity users. Large Language Models (LLMs) can infer latent user states from static profiles, but this reasoning becomes unreliable when profiles are sparse, and applying an LLM to billions of users is prohibitively expensive. We present ScaleToT, which learns structured reasoning from a small LLM-processed subset and extends it to the broader low-activity user population. To improve reasoning reliability, ScaleToT constructs typed user-state chains with a bounded entropy-guided Tree-of-Thought (ToT) refinement procedure. To make this structured reasoning usable from sparse profiles, the teacher-curated chains are used to train a student model on static profiles through supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and Outcome-Driven Segment-Aware Implicit Reward Policy Optimization (OSIPO). ScaleToT then transfers the student's reasoning representations to a lightweight profile encoder, providing shared reasoning signals for the remaining users without LLM inference. We evaluate ScaleToT on lifetime value (LTV) prediction in a billion-scale advertising deployment. A randomized online A/B test increased LT30 by 6.738\%, while offline reasoning covered only 7.32\% of the potential population, greatly reducing compute cost compared with full-population reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScaleToT，通过从少量LLM处理数据学习结构化推理并扩展到十亿级低活跃用户，实现高效准确的用户建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 低活跃用户缺乏丰富的交互历史，LLM推理在稀疏画像下不可靠且成本极高。现有方法难以同时保证推理可靠性和大规模覆盖，导致用户建模不准确或计算开销过大。
light_analysis.method: ScaleToT从LLM处理的小子集中构建带类型的状态链，使用有界熵引导的树形思维（ToT）进行细化。通过SFT和OSIPO训练学生模型，再将推理表示迁移到轻量级画像编码器，避免对全量用户进行LLM推理。
light_analysis.result: 在十亿级广告部署中，在线A/B测试显示LT30提升6.738%，离线推理仅覆盖7.32%的潜在人群，相比全量推理显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: ScaleToT通过结构化推理学习与迁移，实现了对低活跃用户的高效建模，平衡了推理可靠性与大规模部署成本，适用于用户生命周期价值预测等场景。未来可探索更复杂的推理链和迁移策略。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Longitudinal Forecasting of Alzheimer's Disease Progression Using Deep Learning
abstract: Longitudinal modelling of Alzheimer's disease progression is clinically useful only if it can describe not just the most likely next diagnosis, but how a patient may evolve over time and how reliable that forecast is. Most deep learning approaches reduce this problem to single-step classification, treating cognitively normal, mild cognitive impairment, and dementia as flat categories while providing limited insight into how uncertainty accumulates across future visits. We propose a probabilistic framework that combines ordinal diagnosis prediction, multi-horizon trajectory generation, and decomposed uncertainty estimation. A Temporal Fusion Transformer encoder is adapted with a CORAL ordinal output layer, asymmetric loss weighting, and converter oversampling to respect disease-stage ordering and improve sensitivity to MCI-to-dementia transitions. Conditioned on the learned patient-context representation, an autoregressive Mixture Density Network generates five-year probabilistic trajectories for diagnosis state, CDR Sum of Boxes, MMSE orientation, and hippocampal volume. On ADNI, the model outperforms linear, recurrent, and transformer baselines for next-visit diagnosis prediction, with the strongest gains on MCI-versus-dementia discrimination. Generated trajectories achieve near-nominal 90% credible interval coverage, widening uncertainty across the forecast horizon, and biomarker dynamics consistent with expected Alzheimer's disease progression. We further separate aleatoric from epistemic uncertainty using analytic mixture variance and a five-member bootstrap ensemble, which provides the strongest encoder diversity and output-level epistemic signal. Epistemic uncertainty is higher for rare progression archetypes, MCI and dementia patients, and under external evaluation on OASIS-3, where it increases alongside prediction error.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个结合时序预测与不确定性分解的概率框架，用于阿尔茨海默病进展纵向建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习模型将阿尔茨海默病进展简化为单步分类，忽略疾病阶段顺序和预测的不确定性。临床上需要不仅能预测最可能的下一诊断，还能描述患者随时间演变的轨迹及其可靠性。缺乏对MCI向痴呆转化敏感的方法，且无法区分偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 基于Temporal Fusion Transformer编码器，结合CORAL序数输出层、非对称损失加权和转换器过采样，以尊重疾病阶段顺序。使用自回归混合密度网络生成五年概率轨迹，预测诊断状态、CDR-SB、MMSE定向和 hippocampal 体积。通过解析混合方差和五成员bootstrap集成分离偶然不确定性和认知不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在ADNI上，模型在下一访问诊断预测中优于线性和Transformer基线，MCI与痴呆区分提升最显著。生成轨迹达到近名义90%可信区间覆盖率，不确定性随预测时间扩展。认知不确定性在罕见进展模式、MCI和痴呆患者中更高，外部验证OASIS-3上随预测误差增加。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出概率框架实现准确的序数预测和多变量轨迹生成，并提供有意义的可靠性估计。可识别高风险患者和罕见进展模式，增强临床决策可信度。未来可扩展至其他神经退行性疾病或整合多模态数据。

title: ViTexQA: A Multi-Frame Temporal Perception Dataset for Video Text Question Answering
abstract: Despite remarkable progress in multimodal understanding, current MLLMs still exhibit limitations in video text understanding, particularly when semantics emerge through the integration of temporally distributed textual cues across multiple frames. This perception challenge fundamentally differs from static image text understanding, yet existing datasets fail to capture: the vast majority of questions remain answerable from single frames, inadequately reflecting real-world video text comprehension demands. To address this, we present ViTexQA, a large-scale video-text QA dataset, and FrameThinker for robust multi-frame temporal reasoning. We build ViTexQA via a quality-controlled Chain-of-Thought (CoT) annotation pipeline boosted with temporal constraints; all its QA pairs demand cross-frame text fusion to solve, enforcing true temporal reliance. FrameThinker adopts two-stage training for explicit temporal modeling: CoT-Guided Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) generates frame-aware reasoning chains, followed by Temporally-grounded Reinforcement Learning (RL) optimized with multi-frame coherence rewards. Evaluations show our method outperforms SOTA baselines on ViTexQA, lifting ROUGE-L by 6.3%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViTexQA数据集和FrameThinker框架，解决视频文本问答中多帧时间感知的挑战，推动跨帧文本融合的时序推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在视频文本理解中，尤其需要跨多帧整合时序文本线索的任务表现不足；现有数据集大部分问题可从单帧回答，无法模拟真实世界的视频文本理解需求。因此需构建一个强制依赖多帧融合的数据集及高效时序推理方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建ViTexQA数据集，采用质量控制的思维链（CoT）标注管道并引入时序约束，确保所有问答对需跨帧文本融合。提出FrameThinker框架，两阶段训练：首先通过CoT引导的监督微调（SFT）生成帧感知推理链，然后使用时序相干奖励的强化学习（RL）优化多帧连贯性。
light_analysis.result: 在ViTexQA上评估，FrameThinker超越现有基线，ROUGE-L提升6.3%，展示了在强制多帧时序依赖场景下的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViTexQA和FrameThinker填补了视频文本问答中对多帧时序推理需求的空白，为真实世界视频理解提供了新的数据和框架。未来可探索更细粒度时间编码和复杂跨模态对齐。

title: ASALT: Adaptive State Alignment for Lateral Transfer in Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) addresses the problem of training multiple agents that pursue collaborative, competitive, or mixed objectives. Prior work has investigated transfer learning between source and target domains in MARL; however, the majority of existing approaches impose the constraint that the dimensionalities of the observation space and the global state space must be identical across domains. In this paper, we introduce a method that explicitly accommodates mismatched state-space dimensionalities between source and target domains. The proposed approach, ASALT, incorporates both observation-level and state-level adapters that map the target-domain observations and global states into a shared embedding space, thereby enabling more effective transfer of knowledge across both actors and critics. These adapters can generate embeddings that support efficient strategy transfer across heterogeneous domains. Experimental results on multiple configurations in standard benchmark environments demonstrate that ASALT surpasses existing baselines in terms of sample efficiency and global return in cooperative settings, but its effectiveness depends on the degree of mismatch between source and target domains. Furthermore, our findings indicate that ASALT mitigates negative transfer, which frequently constitutes a major obstacle when transferring policies between domains with differing observation and action spaces.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ASALT方法，通过自适应状态对齐实现多智能体强化学习中异构域的横向迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MARL迁移学习方法要求源域和目标域的观测空间和全局状态空间维度相同，限制了实际应用。然而，实际任务常因传感器配置或任务复杂度不同导致状态维度不匹配，迫切需要能够处理异构域间知识迁移的方法。
light_analysis.method: ASALT引入观测级和状态级适配器，将目标域的观测和全局状态映射到共享嵌入空间，从而在参与者和评论者之间有效迁移知识。关键创新在于适配器生成嵌入，支持跨异构域的策略迁移，无需限制状态空间维度一致。
light_analysis.result: 在多个标准基准环境配置上，ASALT在合作场景中显著提升了样本效率和全局回报，超越了现有基线。但有效性依赖于源域与目标域之间的差异程度。此外，ASALT有效缓解了负迁移问题，这在策略迁移中常由观测和动作空间的差异引发。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASALT通过适配器机制成功处理了多维不匹配的异构域迁移学习问题，在MARL横向迁移中取得优越性能。学术上扩展了迁移学习的适用范围，实际中有助于将已有策略迁移到不同复杂度的新任务。未来可探索更鲁棒的适配器设计以应对更大域差异。

title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
abstract: A world model predicts environment dynamics based on current observations and actions, serving as a core cognitive mechanism for reasoning and planning. In this work, we investigate how world modeling based on language models can further push the boundaries of general agents. (i) We first focus on building foundation models for agentic environment simulation. We introduce Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B and Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B, the first language world models capable of simulating agentic environments covering 7 domains via long chain-of-thought reasoning. Leveraging more than 10M environment interaction trajectories of 7 domains in real-world environments, we develop Qwen-AgentWorld through a three-stage training pipeline: CPT injects general-purpose world modeling capabilities from the state transition dynamics and augmented professional corpora, SFT activates next-state-prediction reasoning, and RL sharpens simulation fidelity through a tailored framework with hybrid rubric-and-rule rewards. To evaluate language world models, we present AgentWorldBench, a comprehensive benchmark constructed from real-world interactions of 5 frontier models on 9 established benchmarks. Empirical results demonstrate that Qwen-AgentWorld significantly outperforms existing frontier models. (ii) Beyond foundation models, we further investigate two complementary paradigms through which world modeling enhances general agents. First, as a decoupled environment simulator, Qwen-AgentWorld supports scalable and controllable simulation of thousands of real-world environments for agentic RL, yielding gains that surpass real-environment training alone. Second, as a unified agent foundation model, world-model training acts as a highly effective warm-up that improves downstream performance across 7 agentic benchmarks. Code: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen-AgentWorld

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于语言模型的世界模型Qwen-AgentWorld，通过三阶段训练实现7个域的智能体环境模拟，并在AgentWorldBench上显著优于现有模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 世界模型是智能体推理与规划的核心，但现有语言世界模型在环境模拟的域覆盖和保真度上存在不足。需要构建能模拟多域真实环境动态的语言世界模型，以推动通用智能体发展。
light_analysis.method: 构建Qwen-AgentWorld系列模型（35B-A3B和397B-A17B），采用三阶段训练：连续预训练(CPT)从状态转移和专业语料注入通用建模能力；监督微调(SFT)激活下一状态预测推理；强化学习(RL)通过混合规则与标准奖励提升模拟保真度。训练数据含7个域超1000万条真实环境交互轨迹。
light_analysis.result: 在AgentWorldBench上（由5个前沿模型在9个基准上的真实交互构建），Qwen-AgentWorld显著优于现有模型。作为解耦环境模拟器，支持可扩展可控的智能体强化学习，超越单独真实环境训练；作为统一智能体基础模型，世界模型训练作为预热在7个智能体基准上提升下游性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提出能模拟7个域的语言世界模型，三阶段训练有效提升了环境模拟能力。该工作不仅构建了高性能的世界模型，还验证了其在环境模拟和智能体预训练中的双重价值，为通用智能体研究提供了新范式。未来可扩展更多域并优化训练效率。

title: To Compare, or Not to Compare: On Methodological Practices in Evaluating Social Bias
abstract: As Large Language Models are increasingly deployed in critical applications, robustly evaluating their social biases is paramount. However, the current literature suffers from widespread methodological fragmentation, which yields contradictory conclusions. This stems largely from ignoring the structural framing of benchmark-level evaluations. To resolve this, we introduce a unified and controllable framework that standardizes heterogeneous benchmarks to systematically contrast isolated demographic assessments with forced-choice comparative settings. Crucially, this allows us to disentangle the confounding effects of Chain-of-Thought reasoning, neutral fallback options, and other structural artifacts in social bias evaluations. Our evaluation across multiple model families reveals a massive, systematic paradigm gap: while isolated assessments limit prejudice activation, comparative settings act as aggressive catalysts for latent discrimination, a shift primarily driven by underspecified contexts. Alarmingly, CoT reasoning exacerbates social biases under comparative settings, and this systemic bias persists as a deterministic prejudice even when models are provided neutral fallback options or claim to answer randomly. Finally, we demonstrate that this comparative prejudice is a generalized phenomenon that scales positively with model size. Ultimately, we offer a crucial methodological guideline: while researchers must leverage comparative settings to robustly audit hidden biases, practitioners cannot safely rely on comparative deployments in ambiguous real-world tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一可控框架，揭示评估社会偏见时孤立评估与比较设置之间存在系统性范式鸿沟，比较设置会放大潜在歧视。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在关键应用中部署，需稳健评估社会偏见，但当前文献方法碎片化导致矛盾结论。现有评估常忽略基准级评估的结构性框架，如孤立评估与比较设置的区别，以及思维链推理、中性回退选项等结构伪影的影响。本研究旨在规范异构基准，系统对比不同评估设置，解决该领域缺乏统一方法论的问题。
light_analysis.method: 引入统一可控框架，标准化异构基准，系统对比孤立人口统计评估与强制选择比较设置。通过控制变量，分离思维链推理、中性回退选项等结构伪影的影响。评估涵盖多个模型家族（如不同尺寸），分析范式差距及其与模型规模的关系。该方法允许从结构上理解偏见激活机制，并揭示比较设置作为歧视催化剂的作用。
light_analysis.result: 发现孤立评估限制偏见激活，而比较设置显著放大潜在歧视，主要源于不明确的上下文。思维链推理在比较设置下加剧社会偏见，即使提供中性回退选项或声称随机回答，系统偏见仍作为确定性偏见持续存在。该比较偏见随模型规模增大而增强，具有普遍性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献在于揭示评估方法对偏见测量的根本影响，提供重要方法论指南：研究者应利用比较设置稳健审计隐藏偏见，但从业者在模糊真实任务中不应依赖比较部署。该工作为标准化偏见评估、规避评估伪影提供了理论基础，未来需探索消解比较偏见的策略。

title: MEMPROBE: Probing Long-Term Agent Memory via Hidden User-State Recovery
abstract: Long-term memory promises LLM agents that grow more capable across sessions, maintaining an accurate, evolving understanding of the user that interaction forms. In practice, however, this memory is evaluated mostly through downstream behavior, such as later answers, personalization quality, or task success, which tests that understanding only indirectly and leaves the memory artifact itself largely unaudited. We argue that long-term memory should instead be evaluated as an auditable post-interaction artifact: after ordinary assistance, what structured user state can be reconstructed from the memory the agent leaves behind? We instantiate this view in MEMPROBE, a benchmark in which a memory-equipped agent assists simulated users, each carrying a hidden, taxonomy-anchored user-state bank, across a trajectory of leak-controlled tasks, after which that bank is reconstructed from the agent's resulting memory under both full-store and top-k access. Built on synthetic ground truth for efficient, scalable measurement, MEMPROBE spans 50 simulated users with 31 hidden dimensions each (1,550 recovery targets) and tests 5 representative memory systems. Testing state-of-the-art memory agents, we find that successful assistance and recoverable memory behave as distinct capabilities. Task completion nearly saturates, even for a memoryless baseline, while category-balanced recovery stays moderate (about 0.6) and drops further under top-k retrieval. MEMPROBE is the first benchmark to study memory recovery directly, reconstructing the user state a system retains and scoring it against ground truth. We see recovery as a concrete objective for future memory agents to optimize, and MEMPROBE as a step toward an environment where agents are trained to remember their users, growing more faithful the longer they know them.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MEMPROBE基准，通过隐藏用户状态恢复直接评估LLM智能体长期记忆的可审计性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM智能体的长期记忆主要通过下游行为间接评估，如后续回答、个性化质量或任务成功率，这使得记忆本身缺乏直接审计。然而，记忆作为代理与用户交互后留下的结构化产物，应能恢复可验证的用户状态。缺乏直接评估记忆质量的基准，导致记忆优化目标不明确。因此，需要一种可扩展、可审计的评估方法，直接衡量记忆在辅助过程中捕获和保留用户信息的能力。
light_analysis.method: MEMPROBE构建了50个模拟用户，每个用户携带31个隐藏的层次化用户状态维度（共1550个恢复目标），通过泄漏控制的任务序列，让配备记忆的智能体辅助用户，然后从记忆存储中重建用户状态，评估在完整存储和Top-K访问下的恢复准确率。采用合成数据实现高效可扩展测量，测试了5种代表性记忆系统，包括无记忆基线。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，任务完成率几乎饱和，即使无记忆基线也能接近满分，但分类平衡的用户状态恢复准确率仅约0.6，在Top-K检索下进一步下降。这表明成功辅助与可恢复记忆是两种不同能力，现有记忆系统在直接恢复用户状态方面表现中等，且检索限制会降低恢复质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: MEMPROBE是首个直接研究记忆恢复的基准，通过重建系统保留的用户状态并与真实值对比，为记忆评估提供可审计的客观指标。研究揭示了当前记忆系统的局限性，将恢复能力作为未来记忆优化目标，推动智能体训练更忠实地记住用户，随着交互时长提升用户状态恢复的保真度。

title: AdversaBench: Automated LLM Red-Teaming with Multi-Judge Confirmation and Cross-Model Transferability
abstract: Scaling adversarial evaluation of large language models requires both a method for generating hard inputs and a reliable way to confirm that resulting failures are real. We present AdversaBench, an end-to-end red-teaming pipeline that mutates seed prompts with five structured operators, queries a target model, and confirms failures through a three-judge panel with a meta-judge tiebreaker. We report experiments on 45 seeds across three categories: reasoning, instruction-following, and tool use. Every seed produced a confirmed failure. Four findings stand out. First, operator effectiveness varies sharply by category: inject_distractor scores 0.00 mean reward on instruction-following seeds but 0.80-0.83 on reasoning and tool-use. Second, binary failure rate hides difficulty: instruction-following seeds required 2.4 attacker iterations on average versus 1.1 for other categories, a gap visible in survival curves. Third, pairwise judge agreement of 80-87% coexists with near-zero Cohen's kappa due to label skew; category-level disagreement rates are more informative. Fourth, adversarial prompts generated against Llama 3.1 8B transfer zero-shot to Llama 3.3 70B, suggesting the mutations exploit general behavioral patterns rather than model-specific weaknesses. Code, dataset, and analysis scripts are available at https://github.com/khanak0509/AdversaBench .
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Code and data at https://github.com/khanak0509/AdversaBench

light_analysis.overview: 提出AdversaBench，一个自动化LLM红队测试管道，通过多裁判确认和跨模型迁移性评估，实现高效发现真实失败。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模评估LLM安全性需要自动生成困难输入并可靠确认失败。现有方法依赖人工或单一裁判，难以扩展且可靠性不足。AdversaBench旨在解决自动化红队测试中失败确认和跨模型迁移问题，提升评估效率和可信度。
light_analysis.method: 采用五个结构化变异算子（如inject_distractor）对种子提示进行突变，查询目标模型后通过三裁判面板和元裁判决胜确认失败。实验使用45个种子覆盖推理、指令跟随和工具使用三类。代码、数据集和分析脚本开源。
light_analysis.result: 所有种子产生确认失败。算子效果差异显著：inject_distractor在指令跟随上平均奖励0.00，而在推理和工具使用上0.80-0.83。指令跟随种子平均需2.4次攻击迭代，其他仅1.1次。裁判间成对一致率80-87%但Cohen's kappa接近零因标签偏斜。对抗提示从Llama 3.1 8B零样本迁移至Llama 3.3 70B。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdversaBench提供了可扩展的LLM安全评估框架，揭示了算子类别特异性、迭代难度差异和跨模型迁移性。有助于自动发现通用行为弱点。未来可扩展更多变异算子和模型。

title: EERLoss: A Novel Loss Function for Training Deep Biometric Models. A Case Study in Keystroke Dynamics
abstract: Deep learning approaches to biometric verification are commonly trained by optimizing indirect objectives, creating a misalignment between the optimization process and the primary evaluation metric, typically the Equal Error Rate (EER). This paper introduces EERLoss: a subdifferentiable, arbitrarily accurate approximation to EER for training deep biometric models. Furthermore, this framework has the potential to be adapted to optimize any specific operating point on the DET curve, enhancing its generalizability. To validate this approach, EERLoss is evaluated on a particularly demanding behavioral biometric modality: keystroke dynamics verification. This task is characterized by its high intra-class and low inter-class variability. Experiments are conducted on the large-scale KVC-onGoing benchmark, incorporating data from over 185,000 subjects across different scenarios. A comprehensive ablation study initially demonstrates the superiority of EERLoss in comparison to existing state-of-the-art loss functions. It also converges substantially faster compared to other losses, reducing the overall training cost. Additionally, a comparison is made between the proposed loss and the KVC-winning architecture by re-training it with EERLoss, demonstrating that the proposed approach significantly outperforms the original SoTA, achieving a relative EER reduction of up to approx. 30\%. This improvement on a challenging, large-scale benchmark validates the effectiveness of EERLoss as a task-aligned training objective specifically suited for high-variance biometric traits.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EERLoss，一种可微且高精度的EER近似损失函数，用于端到端训练深度生物识别模型，并在击键动力学验证中取得显著改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度生物识别模型通常使用间接目标函数训练，导致优化过程和最终评估指标（等错误率EER）之间存在偏差。击键动力学具有高类内和低类间变异性，使得训练更具挑战性。现有损失函数未能直接优化EER，限制了模型性能。因此，需要一种与评估指标对齐的损失函数。
light_analysis.method: EERLoss是EER的可微近似，可达到任意精度，并支持优化DET曲线上任意工作点。在KVC-onGoing基准（超过185,000名受试者）上，对击键动力学验证任务进行实验。涵盖消融研究，对比现有损失函数，并重新训练KVC-winning架构以评估性能。
light_analysis.result: EERLoss在消融研究中优于现有最先进损失函数，且收敛更快，降低训练成本。重新训练KVC-winning架构后，相对EER降低约30%，显著优于原始SoTA。在大规模挑战性基准上验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EERLoss作为任务对齐的训练目标，特别适用于高方差生物特征。击键动力学验证实验证明了其在实际应用中的价值。未来可扩展到其他生物识别模态或优化不同工作点。

title: LLMs Prompted for Legal Context Object More: Overrefusal from Small On-Premises LLMs in Criminal Legal Context
abstract: While the validity of LLMs' use in the legal context remains subject to ethical and legal debate, legal professionals are already experimenting with personal LLMs, if only for translation and reformulation. However, even such a seemingly innocuous use can introduce biases through case processing speed if LLM assistants selectively refuse assistance on certain topics. To better anticipate such biases, we investigate several modern small LLMs that are most likely to be used as on-device assistants, to assess the impact of overrefusal on legal prompts.   Surprisingly, we find that authority-style prefixes (``you are acting as an assistant of the national supreme court'', ``[...] defense lawyer'') systematically increase refusal rates by 2--20x over the no-prefix baseline, while a known role-play jailbreak prefix shows mixed effects, sharply increasing refusals in some models and barely shifting them in others. The finding suggests that small on-prem deployable LLMs are unstable under contextual framings that a real institutional user might naturally introduce, and further investigation is essential to minimize opportunities for bias.

light_analysis.overview: 研究小型本地LLM在法律语境中对提示的过度拒绝行为，发现权威前缀显著增加拒绝率。
light_analysis.motivation: 法律专业人士已开始尝试使用个人LLM进行翻译和改写等任务，但LLM可能选择性拒绝某些话题，产生偏见。现有方法未充分探讨小规模本地部署模型在真实机构用户可能引入的语境框架下的不稳定性，需要评估过度拒绝对法律提示的影响。
light_analysis.method: 测试多个现代小型LLM（适合设备端部署），设计法律相关提示，比较无前缀基线、权威式前缀（如‘你作为国家最高法院助理’）和角色扮演越狱前缀下的拒绝率变化。通过实验分析前缀对模型拒绝行为的影响。
light_analysis.result: 权威式前缀使拒绝率系统性提升2-20倍；角色扮演越狱前缀效果不一致，部分模型拒绝率剧增，部分变化不大。表明小模型在上下文框架下不稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了小型本地LLM在法律语境中的过度拒绝问题，提示实际部署需谨慎。未来需进一步研究以减少偏见机会，确保模型公平性。

title: Cross-Lingual Exploration for Parametric Knowledge
abstract: Parametric knowledge in Large Language Models is not equally accessible across languages. As a result, standard inference techniques often struggle to surface localized facts, leading to failures in cross-lingual knowledge transfer and consistency. In this work, we investigate techniques for accessing hidden factual knowledge by exploring cross-lingual prompting strategies. We identify four inherent dimensions of cross-lingual exploration that directly govern parametric knowledge retrieval and evaluate them on multilingual factual benchmarks covering 17 typologically diverse languages. Our results demonstrate that cross-lingual exploration significantly improves knowledge transfer and factual recall, representing a more efficient compute Pareto frontier than native-language scaling. Furthermore, we observe corresponding improvements in cross-lingual consistency, exceeding what can be explained by accuracy gains alone. Overall, our work establishes multilingual prompt exploration as a highly effective inference-time strategy for unlocking latent parametric knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨语言提示探索策略，有效激活大型语言模型中隐式参数知识，显著提升跨语言知识迁移与事实召回。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型中的参数知识在不同语言间获取不均衡，标准推理方法难以提取本地化事实，导致跨语言知识迁移失败和一致性不足。该研究旨在探索高效推理时策略，以解锁这些隐藏知识。
light_analysis.method: 研究识别了跨语言探索的四个内在维度，并系统评估其对参数知识检索的影响。在涵盖17种类型多样语言的多语言事实基准上，通过设计跨语言提示策略，比较不同方向与组合的知识提取效果。
light_analysis.result: 跨语言探索显著提升知识迁移和事实召回，相比原生语言扩展方法，在计算效率和性能上达到更优帕累托前沿。同时，跨语言一致性改进超出单纯准确率增益可解释的范围，表明该方法能更全面地利用多语言知识。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作确立了多语言提示探索作为一种高效推理时策略，用于解锁大语言模型中潜藏的参数知识，具有重要学术价值与实用前景，未来可探索自动化维度选择及更复杂语言组合。

title: Quant Convergence: Bridging Classical Value Investing and Modern Factor Models for Systematic Equity Selection
abstract: Modern finance relies heavily on complex machine learning models to find patterns in the stock market. However, as these AI models get more complicated, they often memorize short-term market noise instead of finding companies with real, lasting value. We designed this research to test if Benjamin Graham's classic value investing rules could act as a mathematical "low-pass filter" to keep these modern models in check. We built three different sets of features - pure Graham rules, modern market factors, and a mix of both - and tested them against highly complex models (XGBoost and AutoGluon) using 20 years of S&P 500 data. By applying a strict buy-and-hold strategy over a four-year test period (March 2022 to March 2026), the results showed that more complex algorithms do not always win. While the AutoGluon model captured high returns (222.68%), it suffered a substantial 39.78% drop because it bought volatile tech stocks right before the market crashed. On the other hand, the pure Graham Random Forest achieved the highest overall return (232.13%) with much less risk (1.38 Calmar Ratio). Furthermore, the Combined Random Forest successfully mixed momentum with Graham's rules, making a 202.91% return while keeping the lowest maximum drop (34.53%) of any model tested. Ultimately, this research proves that Graham's "margin of safety" isn't outdated; it is actually a highly effective way to prevent modern AI from taking on too much risk.

light_analysis.overview: 经典价值投资规则作为数学低通滤波器，约束现代AI模型过度风险，实现更稳健的选股。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代金融依赖复杂机器学习模型，但易记忆短期噪声而非发现真实价值，导致过度风险。经典价值投资（如Graham规则）的数学化能否作为低通滤波器防止模型过拟合？该问题重要，因为现有因子模型缺乏对AI风险的有效约束。
light_analysis.method: 构建三组特征：纯Graham规则、现代市场因子、混合特征；使用XGBoost和AutoGluon等复杂模型，在20年S&P 500数据上采用严格买入持有策略（2022年3月至2026年3月）。关键创新是验证低通滤波器假设。
light_analysis.result: AutoGluon收益222.68%但回撤39.78%；纯Graham随机森林收益最高232.13%，Calmar比率1.38；混合随机森林收益202.91%，最大回撤最低34.53%。证明复杂模型未必优，Graham规则降低风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: Graham的'安全边际'仍有效，可有效防止AI过度风险。学术上证明经典规则与现代方法的互补性，实际价值在于构建更稳健的量化投资策略。局限性为仅测试S&P 500，未来可扩展至跨市场验证。

title: Jolia: Concept-Level Vision-Language Alignment for 3D CT Contrastive Learning
abstract: Vision-language contrastive pretraining has become the dominant recipe for 3D medical foundation models, leveraging the large volumes of paired scans and reports produced in clinical practice. However, medical images usually span dozens of organs, and radiological reports are much longer than typical natural image captions and are composed of multiple structured sections. CLIP-style pretraining compresses this structure by encoding each modality into a single global token, at the risk of losing important details. We introduce ConQuer (Concept Queries), an image-text pretraining method that augments CLIP's global alignment with a set of localized alignments, one per concept. ConQuer splits the report into concept-specific sections and learns cross-attention queries that pool the matching image features without using any segmentation mask or spatial supervision. Contrastive learning is then applied independently for each concept. Concepts can be any unit of semantic localization; here, they are anatomical regions, one query per organ or gross body region. As a byproduct, each query learns attention maps focused on its concept, providing built-in spatial interpretability. We use ConQuer to train Jolia, a 3D CT foundation model on chest and abdominal CT. Jolia consistently outperforms a CLIP baseline on findings classification, report generation, and cross-center transfer, and sets a new state of the art across multiple public benchmarks. Jolia's weights will be released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ConQuer方法，通过概念级别的局部对齐增强CLIP全局对齐，用于3D CT对比学习，训练出Jolia模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像覆盖多个器官，放射报告结构复杂且冗长。CLIP式预训练仅用全局token编码，可能丢失重要细节。现有方法无法有效捕获医学图像的局部语义信息，导致预训练表征不够精细。
light_analysis.method: ConQuer将报告拆分为概念特定部分，为每个概念（如器官）学习交叉注意力查询，无需分割掩码即可池化匹配的图像特征。对每个概念独立进行对比学习，内置空间可解释性。用于训练Jolia模型，基于胸部腹部CT数据。
light_analysis.result: Jolia在发现分类、报告生成和跨中心迁移任务上一致优于CLIP基线，并在多个公共基准上达到新SOTA。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但表明显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConQuer通过概念级对齐改进了医学图像-文本预训练，提供可解释性。Jolia模型提升了3D CT分析性能，具有临床应用潜力。未来可扩展至更多解剖区域或任务。

title: Multilevel Stochastic Plug-and-Play for Sparse-View CT Reconstruction
