abstract: Sparse-view computed tomography (SVCT) reduces radiation exposure and acquisition time, but the limited number of projection views makes the reconstruction problem severely ill-posed and leads to streak artifacts when analytical methods are used. Plug-and-Play (PnP) methods provide an effective way to combine data fidelity with learned image priors, while stochastic PnP methods further improve robustness by matching the denoiser input distribution through re-noising. However, these methods often require many iterations to converge, which limits their practical efficiency. In this work, we propose a multilevel (ML) stochastic PnP method for SVCT that accelerates stochastic PnP reconstruction. We highlight that, in the stochastic setting, directly enforcing prior coherence across levels would require accurately estimating fine-level prior gradients through multiple denoiser function evaluations, which substantially increases the computational cost. Motivated by this observation, we perform the multilevel steps in multiresolution analysis (MRA) approximation spaces. This choice is supported by the structure of the wavelet decomposition, which causes the prior-coherence correction to vanish in expectation, thereby avoiding costly estimation of fine-level stochastic prior gradients for the coarse-level corrections. Experiments on SVCT reconstruction show that our method, called Multilevel Stochastic Plug-and-Play (ML-SPnP), achieves reconstruction quality comparable to state-of-the-art methods while substantially reducing runtime.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多级随机即插即用方法加速稀疏CT重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏CT减少辐射但重建病态，产生条状伪影。PnP方法结合数据保真与学习先验，随机PnP通过重噪提高鲁棒性，但收敛慢，限制实际效率。现有多级方法中直接施加先验一致性需估计细级先验梯度，计算成本高。
light_analysis.method: 提出多级随机PnP方法（ML-SPnP），在多分辨率分析近似空间中执行多级步骤，利用小波分解结构使先验一致性校正期望为零，避免细级随机先验梯度的昂贵估计。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ML-SPnP在SVCT重建中达到与最先进方法相当的重建质量，同时显著减少运行时间。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过多级框架加速随机PnP，在保持重建质量的同时降低计算成本，具有临床实用价值。未来可探索更优的多分辨率空间选择或应用于其他逆问题。

title: PatternGSL: A Structured Specification Language for Template-Free and Simulation-Ready 3D Garments
abstract: Reconstructing realistic, physically plausible garments from a single image remains a fundamental challenge. Template-free methods capture surface geometry but lack explicit sewing structure for simulation; while programmatic systems are simulation-ready but constrained by predefined templates. This reveals a fundamental representation gap between geometric reconstruction and structured garment construction. We present PatternGSL, a structured garment representation in the form of a template-free and learnable specification language that encodes complete sewing patterns, including panel boundaries, parameterized seams, and explicit stitch topology, in a compact and standardized form. PatternGSL preserves the physical rigor of pattern-based models while removing template dependence, elevating sewing structure as a first-class target for generative modeling. We further propose a vision-language framework that predicts PatternGSL specifications directly from a single image and decodes them into garments using lightweight deterministic validity handling, without optimization-based refinement or manual cleanup. In addition, we introduce PatternGSLData, the first large-scale image-to-GSL paired dataset comprising 300K samples with complete sewing pattern annotations, enabling supervised VLM training for structured garment reconstruction. Experiments demonstrate improved pattern accuracy over prior baselines, explicit sewing-structure recovery, reliable cloth simulation, and pattern-level editing through the same deterministic decoding pipeline. Code and data-processing scripts will be released at https://github.com/PatternGSL/PatternGSL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PatternGSL语言填补几何重建与结构化服装间的表示鸿沟，实现单图到可模拟服装的端到端预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 从单张图像重建真实且物理可仿真的服装是基础挑战。现有方法中，无模板方法捕捉表面几何但缺乏缝制结构无法仿真；程序化系统可仿真但受限于预定义模板。这揭示了几何重建与结构化服装构造之间的表示鸿沟，亟需一种既保留物理严谨性又无需模板依赖的表示方法。
light_analysis.method: PatternGSL是一种无模板可学习的规范语言，编码完整缝制图案：面板边界、参数化接缝和显式缝线拓扑。提出视觉语言框架，从单张图像直接预测PatternGSL规范，通过轻量确定性有效性处理解码为服装，无需优化或手动清理。构建PatternGSLData数据集（30万样本带完整缝制注释），用于监督训练视觉语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PatternGSL在图案准确率上超越先前基线，能恢复显式缝制结构，实现可靠的布料仿真，并通过相同确定性解码管线支持图案级编辑。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了模板无关和可仿真优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: PatternGSL弥合了几何重建与结构化服装构造间的鸿沟，将缝制结构作为生成建模的一等目标。其模板无关性和确定性解码使其适用于单图重建、仿真和编辑。未来可扩展至更复杂服装类型。潜在局限性可能在于对训练数据质量的依赖。

title: Quantum CT via Dynamic Interval Encoding and Prior-Balanced QUBO Reconstruction
abstract: Quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO)-based quantum computed tomography (CT) casts reconstruction as a binary quadratic problem for quantum annealing and hybrid quantum--classical solvers. For grayscale CT, however, image encoding is constrained by the binary-variable budget: fixed global bit-plane encodings increase QUBO size and coupling complexity as gray-level precision improves, whereas low-bit encodings introduce quantization error. We propose a QUBO-based grayscale CT reconstruction framework that combines dynamic interval encoding with prior-balanced optimization. Each refinement round encodes active pixels only within local gray-level intervals around the current estimate, and a boundary-hit-guided update rule adaptively switches between search expansion and local refinement. To improve optimization stability, the method balances projection-domain data consistency and an edge-preserving quadratic prior before forming the final QUBO. Sparse-view and limited-angle fan-beam CT experiments show that the proposed method recovers structures and gray-level distributions more faithfully than the evaluated analytic, iterative, variational, and representation-based baselines. Expressivity analysis and ablation studies further indicate that the improvement mainly arises from effective gray-level representation through dynamic local encoding and more stable data-fidelity--prior coupling. Experiments on the D-Wave hybrid binary quadratic model (BQM) solver further demonstrate that the formulation is executable on a hardware-backed hybrid quantum--classical backend.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合动态区间编码和先验平衡优化的QUBO灰度CT重建框架，在有限变量预算下实现高精度灰度表示和稳定重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于QUBO的量子CT重建受限于二元变量预算，固定全局位平面编码随灰度精度增加导致QUBO规模和耦合复杂度剧增，而低位编码引入量化误差。需要一种高效的灰度编码方法以在有限变量下提升重建质量。
light_analysis.method: 每个细化轮仅对当前估计局部灰度区间内的活动像素编码，通过边界命中指导规则自适应切换搜索扩展与局部细化。同时平衡投影域数据一致性和边缘保持二次先验，形成最终QUBO问题，利用量子退火或混合求解器优化。
light_analysis.result: 在稀疏视图和有限角扇束CT实验中，该方法在结构和灰度分布重建上优于解析、迭代、变分及表示法基线。消融研究表明改进源于动态局部编码和更稳定的数据-先验耦合。在D-Wave混合BQM求解器上验证了硬件可执行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了量子CT中灰度编码的变量预算限制，提升了重建保真度，并可在当前混合量子-经典后端运行。未来可扩展至更高精度或更复杂先验，推动量子CT实用化。

title: Heterogeneous Knowledge Distillation via Geometry Decoupling and Momentum-Aware Gradient Regulation
abstract: Heterogeneous Knowledge Distillation (HKD) aims to transfer knowledge across varying architectures (e.g., from Transformer to CNN) but inherently suffers from severe training instability. We reveal that this instability stems from two highly coupled challenges: massive feature norm discrepancies that cause optimization drag, and severe gradient conflicts between the primary and distillation objectives arising from distinct inductive biases. To achieve stable distillation, we propose SPOFA, a framework built upon a novel Feature and Gradient Dual Stabilization mechanism. Specifically, at the feature level, we introduce a LayerNorm-based decoupling projector that explicitly decouples feature magnitude from direction, creating a bounded and stable space for semantic alignment. At the gradient level, we propose a momentum-driven Exponential Moving Average (MEMA) dynamic scaler. By establishing a robust historical baseline of the optimization trajectory, MEMA actively evaluates instantaneous gradient conflicts and adaptively penalizes harmful distillation signals, guaranteeing stable convergence. Importantly, SPOFA achieves this dual stabilization with an extremely lightweight parameter footprint. Extensive experiments on two mainstream benchmarks demonstrate that SPOFA achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, significantly outperforming computationally expensive methods while introducing only minimal computational overhead compared to standard baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出特征与梯度双重稳定机制SPOFA，解决异构知识蒸馏中的训练不稳定问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 异构知识蒸馏在不同架构间传递知识时面临严重训练不稳定，源于特征范数差异导致优化拖拽，以及主任务和蒸馏目标间的梯度冲突。现有方法未能有效解耦这些挑战，亟需轻量级稳定方案。
light_analysis.method: SPOFA框架包括特征级LayerNorm解耦投影器，显式分离特征幅度与方向以创建稳定语义对齐空间；梯度级动量驱动EMA动态缩放器，通过历史基线评估梯度冲突并自适应惩罚有害信号，保证收敛稳定性。整体参数开销极低。
light_analysis.result: 在两个主流基准上，SPOFA取得最优准确率，显著优于计算密集型方法，且相比标准基线仅引入极小额外计算开销，验证了其高效性和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPOFA有效缓解异构蒸馏中的特征和梯度不稳定性，以轻量级方式实现优越性能，为跨架构知识迁移提供实用方案。未来可探索更复杂架构或任务场景的泛化能力。

title: Are Text-to-Image Models Inductivist Turkeys? A Counterfactual Benchmark for Causal Reasoning
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) generation models have achieved remarkable progress in producing visually realistic images from natural language prompts. Yet it remains unclear whether their success reflects genuine causal understanding or sophisticated pattern matching over visual-textual correlations. Inspired by Russell's inductivist turkey, we introduce Counterfactual-World (CF-World), a counterfactual benchmark designed to investigate whether text-to-image models can generate images under rules that systematically contradict real-world priors. CF-World organizes each scenario into three progressive levels: factual generation under ordinary world knowledge, explicit counterfactual generation with direct visual instructions, and implicit counterfactual generation requiring causal deduction from altered rules. We evaluate both open-source and closed-source T2I models using a Vision Language Model (VLM)-based evaluator (CF-Eval). Furthermore, we introduce two metrics: Prior Resistance Rate (PRR), which measures a model's ability to overcome entrenched real-world priors, and Reasoning Retention Rate (RRR), which assesses whether models can maintain reasoning-dependent counterfactual generation without explicit visual cues. Experiments show that all models exhibit sharp degradation from factual to counterfactual settings. Further analyses suggest that these failures arise because current T2I models encode world knowledge and visual appearances as tightly coupled patterns. Consequently, their heavy reliance on frequent visual co-occurrences within the training data forces them to default to familiar commonsense priors when tasked with rendering counterfactual worlds.

light_analysis.overview: 提出反事实基准CF-World评估文本到图像模型的因果推理能力，发现模型依赖模式匹配而非因果理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像生成模型在视觉真实感上取得进展，但其成功是否源于真正的因果理解仍不明确。现有方法可能仅依赖视觉-文本相关性的模式匹配，缺乏对反事实场景的生成能力。受罗素归纳火鸡启发，研究旨在通过系统性地违背现实先验的规则，检验模型能否进行因果推理。
light_analysis.method: 引入CF-World基准，将每个场景分为三个渐进级别：基于常识的事实生成、直接视觉指令的显式反事实生成、需从改变规则进行因果推断的隐式反事实生成。使用基于视觉语言模型的评估器CF-Eval，并设计两个指标：先验抵抗率衡量模型克服固有先验的能力，推理保持率评估无显式视觉线索时维持反事实生成的能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所有模型从事实设置到反事实设置性能急剧下降。进一步分析发现，失败源于当前T2I模型将世界知识与视觉外观编码为紧密耦合的模式，过度依赖训练数据中的频繁视觉共现，因此在生成反事实世界时默认回到熟悉的常识先验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了文本到图像模型缺乏因果推理能力，实质是高级模式匹配。CF-World为评估因果理解提供了有效基准。研究价值在于推动模型学习解耦知识表示。未来可扩展反事实场景的多样性和复杂度，并探索增强因果推理的训练方法。

title: Reasoning as Attractor Dynamics: Latent Memory Retrieval via Gibbs-Weighted Energy Minimization
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are traditionally viewed as autoregressive generators. However, from the perspective of collective computation, they function as high-dimensional Dense Associative Memories that store complex reasoning patterns as latent attractors. In this work, we investigate the energy landscape of mathematical reasoning. We posit that correct reasoning chains correspond to deep, wide attractor basins ("flat minima") in the model's output distribution, whereas hallucinations manifest as sharp, unstable local minima. To exploit this geometry, we introduce a retrieval mechanism based on a Gibbs measure of the trajectory's spectral entropy. By sampling multiple reasoning paths and weighting them by their inverse energy ($P \propto e^{-βE}$), we approximate the equilibrium distribution of the associative memory, effectively ``relaxing'' the system into a robust solution. Empirically, this physics-inspired mechanism improves Microsoft Phi-3.5 performance on GSM8K by 5.38\% (84.7\% $\to$ 90.1\%), demonstrating that inference is better modeled as a dynamic settling process into an attractor basin rather than greedy next-token prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 将LLM视为高维联想记忆，引入基于吉布斯测度的能量最小化检索机制，通过加权采样近似吸引子平衡分布。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统上LLM被视为自回归生成器，但集体计算视角下它们作为高维稠密联想记忆存储复杂推理模式。现有方法忽视推理过程中的能量景观几何，正确推理对应深宽吸引子盆地，而幻觉为尖锐不稳定局部极小。因此，需要利用这种几何结构来引导推理，将推理建模为动态沉降过程而非贪婪预测。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出基于吉布斯测度的检索机制：采样多条推理路径，根据每条路径的逆能量加权（P ∝ e^{-βE}），其中能量由轨迹的谱熵定义。通过近似联想记忆的平衡分布，系统“松弛”到鲁棒解。该方法物理启发，利用能量最小化动态选择稳定吸引子。
light_analysis.result: 在GSM8K数学推理任务上，该机制将Microsoft Phi-3.5的准确率从84.7%提升至90.1%，提升5.38%。实验表明，推理作为动态沉降过程优于贪婪下一个词预测，验证了能量景观假设。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将LLM推理重新定义为高维吸引子动力学的物理过程，通过能量最小化实现稳健的潜在记忆检索。提供了理论联系（联想记忆）和实用改进（5.38%提升）。未来可探索更高效的能量计算或应用于其他任务。

title: PointVG-R: Internalizing Geometric Reasoning in MLLMs for Precise Pointing Localization via Visual Chain of Thought
abstract: Pointing-based visual grounding requires models to precisely locate target objects by deciphering complex spatial relationships between the visual scene and pointing gestures. Traditional methods typically encode input images into static feature representations and perform reasoning primarily within the linguistic domain, often overlooking the rich perceptual cues and explicit spatial geometry inherent in images. In this study, we aim to mitigate the cognitive vulnerability of models in interpreting gestural spatial relations by proposing PointVG-R, a reasoning-guided Multi-modal Large Language Model (MLLM). PointVG-R introduces geometric-aware reasoning for pointing-based grounding, enabling the model to think with images through the strategic integration of Reinforcement Learning (RL) and cold-start data. Specifically, we design a novel geometric reasoning pipeline that simulates the iterative cognitive process humans employ when interpreting pointing gestures. Furthermore, we construct EgoPoint-CoT, a high-quality visual Chain-of-Thought (CoT) dataset featuring detailed reasoning trajectories to guide the model via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and RL. To address the varying quality of learning signals encountered during training, we further propose an Adaptive Importance Weighting strategy based on Group Variance, which dynamically adjusts reward signals to optimize the learning process. Experimental results demonstrate that PointVG-R achieves SOTA performance, outperforming the baseline by $\textbf{15.86}$ points in mIoU. Extensive ablation studies further validate the efficacy of our proposed modules. Code: https://github.com/lingli1724/PointVG-R.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PointVG-R，通过视觉思维链和强化学习在多模态大模型中内化几何推理，实现精确指向定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指向性视觉定位方法通常将图像编码为静态特征并在语言域进行推理，忽视了图像中的丰富感知线索和显式空间几何，导致模型在解释手势空间关系时存在认知脆弱性。因此需要提升模型对几何推理的感知能力，以更准确地理解复杂的指向手势。
light_analysis.method: 提出PointVG-R，一个推理引导的多模态大模型。设计了几何推理管道，模拟人类解释指向手势的迭代认知过程；构建EgoPoint-CoT数据集，包含详细推理轨迹，通过监督微调和强化学习引导模型；提出基于组方差的自适应重要性加权策略，动态调整奖励信号以优化学习过程。
light_analysis.result: PointVG-R在指向性视觉定位任务上取得SOTA性能，在mIoU上超越基线15.86个百分点。广泛的消融实验验证了所提出模块的有效性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过融合几何推理和视觉思维链，PointVG-R显著提升了指向性定位的准确性，展示了强化学习与高质量数据结合提升多模态模型空间理解能力的潜力。未来可探索更复杂的几何推理场景及应用。

title: ForensicsTok: Forensics-Guided Tokenized Modeling for Image Tampering Localization
abstract: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offer powerful reasoning for forensic tasks, yet existing approaches utilizing exogenous segmentation decoders often suffer from suboptimal localization. The reliance on stitched pipelines introduces information bottlenecks during backpropagation, which dilutes spatial signals and is limited by semantic priors of the segmentor. To address these limitations, we propose ForensicsTok, which reformulates image manipulation localization as an autoregressive sequence generation task. ForensicsTok directly generates spatially grounded token sequences, enabling precise mask prediction without intermediary supervision. Specifically, we introduce a Token Splatting Decoder (TSD) to map tokens to binary masks via codebook-aware code smoothing, which mitigates sharp gradients from deterministic detokenizers. Furthermore, to capture diverse tampering clues, we propose a Hierarchical Expert Fusion (HEF) module that injects multi-scale features from a forensic expert model. This unified architecture effectively compensates for the lack of forensic priors in standard MLLMs. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks show that ForensicsTok substantially improves over existing MLLM-based baselines and slightly improves over strong forensic expert baselines, while exhibiting stronger robustness to perturbations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ForensicsTok，将图像篡改定位重构为自回归序列生成任务，实现无需中间监督的精确掩码预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的取证方法依赖外部分割解码器，形成拼接流水线，导致反向传播中信息瓶颈，空间信号被稀释，且受分割器语义先验限制，定位效果欠佳。为解决这些问题，需要一种端到端的统一架构。
light_analysis.method: ForensicsTok将篡改定位视为自回归序列生成任务，直接生成空间对齐的令牌序列。提出令牌飞溅解码器（TSD），通过码本感知的码平滑将令牌映射为二值掩码，缓解确定性解码器的梯度尖锐问题。设计分层专家融合（HEF）模块，从取证专家模型注入多尺度特征，弥补标准MLLM缺乏取证先验的不足。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准数据集上，ForensicsTok显著优于现有基于MLLM的基线方法，并略优于强取证专家基线，同时展现出更强的对扰动（如噪声、压缩）的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 重构了图像篡改定位的任务范式，通过直接序列生成消除信息瓶颈，统一了推理与定位。TSD和HEF模块有效提升了定位精度和鲁棒性，为MLLM在细粒度视觉取证任务中的应用提供了新思路。未来可探索更高效的令牌生成策略。

title: Governed Shared Memory for Multi-Agent LLM Systems
abstract: Multi-agent LLM environments require robust mechanisms for shared knowledge management. This paper formalizes the fleet-memory problem and identifies four foundational failure modes: unauthorized leakage, stale propagation, contradiction persistence, and provenance collapse. To address these, we define explicit systems-level primitives: scoped retrieval, temporal supersession, provenance tracking, and policy-governed memory propagation. These primitives are implemented in MemClaw, a production multi-tenant memory service, and evaluated via ArgusFleet, a reproducible harness testing four governance dimensions. Rather than a baseline comparison, this study measures a live production service, emphasizing real-world architectural insights and negative results. Key Evaluation Results Provenance: Successfully reconstructed 100% of depth-four derivation chains with correct writer identity at sub-second per-hop latency. Propagation: Demonstrated high intra-fleet visibility with zero cross-fleet leakage. Under strong write mode, write-to-visible latency was optimized to a single search round-trip. Production Architectural Issues Discovered Asymmetric Scope Enforcement: Tenant isolation held, but sub-tenant scope was initially bypassed on direct GET-by-id requests for agent-scoped credentials (disclosed and remediated during the study). Pipeline Ordering Conflict: While contradiction supersession works for admitted writes, a synchronous near-duplicate gate can prematurely reject contradictory writes before the asynchronous contradiction detector can evaluate them. Conclusion: Long-context retrieval alone is insufficient for production multi-agent memory. Governed shared memory demands explicit systems-level abstractions, and live evaluation is vital to expose enforcement and pipeline-ordering failures missed by design-only treatments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemClaw，一个基于显式治理原语的多智能体LLM共享内存系统，形式化fleet-memory问题并解决四种故障模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体LLM环境需要健壮的共享知识管理，但现有方法面临未授权泄漏、过时传播、矛盾持久化和溯源崩溃四种故障模式。这些问题在真实生产中未得到充分解决，需要显式的系统级抽象而非仅依赖长上下文检索。
light_analysis.method: 定义四个系统级原语：范围检索、时间取代、溯源追踪和策略治理内存传播。在MemClaw中实现为生产级多租户内存服务，并通过ArgusFleet测试框架评估四个治理维度。采用真实生产服务评估而非基线对比，强调架构洞察和负面结果。
light_analysis.result: 溯源成功重建100%深度四的派生链，每跳亚秒级延迟且身份正确。传播实现场内高可见性、零跨场泄漏；强写模式下写可见延迟优化至单次搜索往返。发现生产架构问题：子租户范围在直接GET-by-id请求中被绕过（已修复），以及同步近重复门控与异步矛盾检测器的流水线排序冲突。
light_analysis.conclusion: 长上下文检索不足以为生产多智能体内存提供支持，显式系统级抽象至关重要。真实环境评估能暴露设计遗漏的强制和排序故障。MemClaw为生产级多智能体内存管理提供了可行方案，未来可探索更细粒度的策略编排和矛盾解决。

title: NatureBench: Can Coding Agents Match the Published SOTA of Nature-Family Papers?
abstract: We introduce NatureBench, a cross-discipline benchmark of 90 tasks distilled from peer-reviewed Nature-family publications, designed to evaluate whether AI coding agents can move beyond reproduction toward discovery on real scientific problems. NatureBench is built on NatureGym, an automated pipeline that constructs a standardized, per-task containerized environment from a source paper, addressing the environment-fragmentation problem that has limited the credibility of prior agent-on-research benchmarks. Evaluating ten frontier agent configurations under a strict web-search-disabled protocol, we find that the strongest model surpasses SOTA on only 17.8% of tasks under the g>0.1 criterion. Analysis of method pathways reveals that agents succeed primarily through methodological translation, converting scientific tasks into familiar supervised prediction problems, rather than through genuine scientific invention. Failures are dominated by wrong method choice and insufficient compute budget, not by task misunderstanding. We release the benchmark, the NatureGym pipeline, and a public leaderboard with maintainer-side reproduction. Code: https://github.com/FrontisAI/NatureBench

light_analysis.overview: 提出NatureBench基准，评估AI编码代理在科学发现任务上的能力，发现代理仅通过方法翻译取得有限成功。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI编码代理基准多关注代码生成或复现，缺乏评估代理能否做出真正科学发现的跨学科基准。同时，环境碎片化问题限制了基准的可信度。因此，需要构建一个标准化、可复现的基准来严格评估代理在真实科学问题上的表现。
light_analysis.method: 从Nature家族论文中提炼90个跨学科任务，构建NatureBench基准。利用NatureGym自动化管道将源论文转化为标准化容器环境，解决环境碎片化问题。在严格无网络搜索协议下，评估10种前沿代理配置，以g>0.1准则判断是否超越SOTA。
light_analysis.result: 最强模型仅在17.8%的任务上超越SOTA。代理主要通过方法翻译（将科学任务转化为监督预测问题）成功，而非科学发明。失败主要源于方法选择错误和计算预算不足，而非任务理解错误。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前编码代理在科学发现上能力有限，主要依赖方法翻译。NatureBench提供了可靠评估平台，有助于推动代理从复现走向发现。未来可能优化方法选择策略和计算资源分配。

title: AGORA: An Archive-Grounded Benchmark for Agentic Workplace Document Reasoning
abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as agents that reason over documents rather than answer from parametric knowledge. We study archive-grounded reasoning: locating sparse evidence across a large, messy collection of workplace files, reconciling inconsistent terminology, units, and time conventions, and computing an answer. Existing benchmarks address only parts of this setting and none jointly stresses archive-groundedness, agentic exploration, and cross-domain coverage. We introduce Agora, a benchmark pairing 362 questions with eight domain collections of 9,664 authentic documents and 372M tokens, far exceeding any model's context window, so agents must explore deliberately rather than scan exhaustively. Agora is built by an agentic pipeline combining cross-document task synthesis, leakage-preventing obfuscation, and difficulty filtering. Evaluating eight models, we find the task far from solved: even the strongest reaches only 59.4% accuracy, with notable variation across domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了Agora基准，用于评估大语言模型在档案化工作文档推理中的代理能力，覆盖多领域且远超模型上下文窗口。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型日益作为代理基于文档推理而非参数知识，但现有基准只处理部分问题，无法同时强调档案基础、代理探索和跨领域覆盖。需要新的基准来全面评估这种推理能力。
light_analysis.method: Agora包含362个问题、8个领域9664个真实文档（372M tokens），远超模型上下文窗口。通过代理流水线构建：跨文档任务合成、防泄露混淆和难度过滤。
light_analysis.result: 评估8个模型，最强模型仅达59.4%准确率，领域间差异显著，表明任务远未解决。
light_analysis.conclusion: Agora提供了具有挑战性的基准，暴露当前模型在代理文档推理中的局限，推动未来研究。

title: VisCritic: Visual State Comparison as Process Reward for GUI Agents
abstract: GUI agents powered by vision-language models show strong potential for automating digital tasks, yet frequently fail in long-horizon scenarios due to the absence of step-level verification. Existing process reward models verify actions through textual reasoning alone, missing the visual nature of GUI state changes. We introduce VisCritic, a visual process reward framework that verifies agent actions by directly comparing pre-action and post-action screenshots in visual feature space. VisCritic employs a Siamese vision transformer to extract change-aware representations, coupled with an Action-Aware Critic Head that jointly evaluates action success, task progress, and error type. A critic-training data construction pipeline generates weakly supervised samples from existing trajectories without additional human labels for critic training. Experiments and offline analyses across five benchmarks demonstrate that VisCritic serves as a plug-and-play enhancement for diverse GUI agents, generally improving benchmark metrics while providing visual diagnostic cues.
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures; ECCV 2026 submission; supplementary material uploaded as ancillary file

light_analysis.overview: 提出VisCritic视觉过程奖励框架，通过比较操作前后截图验证GUI代理动作，提升长程任务成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GUI代理在长程任务中频繁失败，因缺乏步骤级验证。现有过程奖励模型仅通过文本推理验证动作，忽略了GUI状态变化的视觉本质。VisCritic旨在利用视觉特征空间直接比较截图，提供更准确的步骤级奖励。
light_analysis.method: VisCritic使用孪生视觉Transformer提取操作前后截图的变化感知表示，并设计动作感知评论头联合评估动作成功、任务进度和错误类型。通过弱监督数据构建管道从现有轨迹自动生成训练样本，无需额外人工标注。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准测试上，VisCritic作为即插即用模块显著提升了多种GUI代理的性能指标，同时提供视觉诊断线索。离线分析验证了其有效性，但摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: VisCritic通过视觉状态比较实现过程奖励，弥补了现有方法的视觉缺失。其弱监督训练和即插即用特性增强了实用性和泛化能力。未来可探索更细粒度的视觉变化建模或集成到更多代理架构中。

title: Poster: Exploring the Limits of Audio-Based Detection of Turkish Phone Call Scams
abstract: Scam phone calls exploit vulnerable communities worldwide, yet research on detection has focused almost exclusively on English and other high-resource languages. In low-resource settings such as Turkish, detection is especially difficult, as annotated data is scarce and technological defenses remain limited. This research investigates how large language models (LLMs) can support scam detection in Turkish by introducing the first public multi-modal dataset of 100 aligned audio-transcript pairs of scam and benign conversations. We evaluate seven LLMs spanning three model families: Gemini 2.5 (Flash, Flash-Lite, Pro), GPT-4o, and Qwen (Max, Plus, Turbo), under three input conditions: raw audio, automatic speech-to-text transcripts, and transcripts refined by a native speaker. Our results suggest that transcript-based inputs consistently outperform direct audio processing, while human-corrected and uncorrected transcripts perform comparably. By centering a low-resource language and real world threat, this work highlights the urgent need for culturally and linguistically inclusive AI safety research and more robust multi-modal systems for fraud prevention.
comment: Poster paper accepted at 47th IEEE Security & Privacy 2026

light_analysis.overview: 首个土耳其语电话诈骗检测数据集及多模态LLM评估，发现转录输入优于直接音频。
light_analysis.motivation: 电话诈骗是全球问题，但检测研究集中于英语等高资源语言。土耳其语等低资源语言因标注数据稀缺和技术防御不足，检测尤为困难。现有方法缺乏针对特定语言和文化背景的研究，无法有效保护弱势群体。本文旨在探索LLM在低资源语言诈骗检测中的潜力。
light_analysis.method: 构建首个公开的土耳其语电话诈骗多模态数据集，包含100对齐的音频-文本对（诈骗与良性对话）。评估七种LLM（Gemini 2.5、GPT-4o、Qwen系列）在三种输入条件：原始音频、ASR自动转录、人工校正转录。通过对比不同输入模态和模型性能，分析基于音频和文本的检测效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，基于转录（ASR或人工校正）的输入在所有测试模型中均优于直接音频处理，准确率更高。人工校正转录与未校正ASR转录性能相近，说明自动转录已足够有效。尽管具体数值未给出，但趋势清晰：文本模态对低资源语言诈骗检测更可靠。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次聚焦土耳其语电话诈骗检测，证实LLM通过转录输入可有效识别诈骗，且无需昂贵的人工校正。强调多模态系统需适应低资源语言环境，呼吁更包容的AI安全研究。未来可扩展数据集规模并探索更轻量级模型。

title: What Do Flow-Based Inverse Solvers Approximate? A Posterior-Transport View
abstract: A growing family of training-free solvers -- FlowDPS, FLOWER, PnP-Flow and their diffusion ancestors (DPS, DAPS) -- repurpose a pretrained flow-matching prior to solve imaging inverse problems by adding a measurement-guidance term to the deterministic probability-flow ODE. Despite strong empirical results, what these per-step corrections actually approximate -- and how far the resulting samples are from the true posterior $p(x\mid y)$ -- has not been characterized. We give a posterior-transport account of flow-based inverse problem solving. Our starting point is a simple but consequential fact: for a \emph{deterministic} flow prior, Bayesian conditioning is realized entirely by a \emph{reweighting of the source distribution}, not by a drift correction; pushing the reweighted source through the \emph{unmodified} velocity field yields exact posterior samples. From this we show that trajectory-guidance solvers can be read as the minimum-kinetic-energy \emph{correction} field needed to morph the unconditional source into the posterior, and that FlowDPS / FLOWER / PnP-Flow correspond to distinct zeroth-order / Gaussian / proximal approximations of this single object; we bound the resulting posterior bias in Wasserstein distance. A controlled $2$D study with a closed-form posterior confirms the theory decisively: source reweighting matches the true posterior to the Monte-Carlo floor on every metric, whereas trajectory guidance incurs $200$--$800\times$ larger error and collapses posterior modes, \emph{regardless of guidance strength}. Guided by the analysis we propose a cheap, principled velocity-correction solver that is competitive across two in-domain priors (AFHQ, CelebA) and two out-of-distribution settings while, unlike point-estimate source-space optimizers, producing diverse posterior samples with uncertainty that correlates with reconstruction error.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了基于流的逆求解器实为后验传输的近似，并提出一种廉价、有原则的速度校正求解器。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有训练自由的流基逆求解器（如FlowDPS等）通过添加测量引导项修改概率流ODE，虽取得强经验结果，但缺乏理论理解：每步校正究竟近似什么？样本与真实后验的偏差多大？论文旨在填补这一空白，提供后验传输视角。
light_analysis.method: 论文从后验传输视角分析：对于确定性流先验，贝叶斯条件化完全由源分布重新加权实现，而非漂移校正；将重加权源通过未修改速度场即可得到精确后验样本。轨迹引导求解器可视为最小动能校正场，而FlowDPS等对应不同近似（零阶/高斯/近端），并给出Wasserstein距离下的后验偏界限。基于此提出一种新的速度校正求解器。
light_analysis.result: 在二维可控实验中，源重新加权在各项指标上匹配真实后验（达到蒙特卡洛精度），而轨迹引导误差大200–800倍，且坍塌后验模式（与引导强度无关）。新提出的速度校正求解器在两个域内先验（AFHQ, CelebA）和两个域外设置中均具竞争力，产生多样后验样本，其不确定性可与重建误差相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为流基逆问题求解提供理论基础，揭示现有方法的近似本质，并提出改进方案。该工作有助于理解贝叶斯逆问题求解机制，提升实际应用中的采样多样性和不确定性量化。未来可研究更高效的近似或扩展至其他先验。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Computer-Use Agents with Autonomous Evaluation
abstract: Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) execute high-level user goals by perceiving and acting directly within graphical user interfaces. However, reinforcement learning for CUAs remains difficult because open-ended desktop environments rarely provide scalable, machine-readable reward signals: task success is often visually grounded and hard to specify with handcrafted reward functions or dense manual labels.   We propose an RL fine-tuning framework that uses autonomous vision-language evaluation as a scalable supervision signal for GUI agents. Given a final screenshot and the original instruction, a Vision-Language Model judges task completion and provides terminal feedback without task-specific heuristics or manual labels during policy optimization.   Because autonomous evaluators are imperfect, we model their feedback as a noisy binary reward channel and derive a noise-corrected reward estimator for Proximal Policy Optimization. Experiments across macOSWorld, Windows Agent Arena, and OSWorld show that corrected evaluator rewards outperform both zero-shot baselines and raw evaluator rewards, improving success rates by an average of 12.6 percentage points over zero-shot performance and 5.1 points over raw evaluator fine-tuning. These results suggest that autonomous evaluation can serve as a practical reward signal for RL in GUI environments when evaluator noise is explicitly modeled and corrected.
comment: Accepted to the 4th International Workshop on Generalizing from Limited Resources in the Open World (GLOW @ IJCAI 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出RL微调框架，利用自主视觉语言评估作为GUI智能体的可扩展监督信号，并引入噪声修正的奖励估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习在Computer-Use Agent（CUA）训练中面临奖励信号难以获取的挑战，因为开放桌面环境缺乏可扩展的机器可读奖励信号，任务成功往往依赖于视觉判断，难以通过手工设计或密集标注实现。现有方法要么依赖人工标注，要么使用启发式奖励函数，均不适用于复杂GUI场景。因此，需要一种自动化的、无需人工干预的奖励生成方法，以支持CUA的强化学习训练。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种RL微调框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）作为自主评估器，根据最终截图和原始指令判断任务完成度并提供终端反馈。将VLM评估建模为带噪声的二元奖励通道，推导出噪声修正的奖励估计器用于PPO优化。该方法无需任务特定启发式或人工标注，在策略优化过程中仅依赖VLM的自动评估。实验在macOSWorld、Windows Agent Arena和OSWorld等基准上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在多个GUI基准上，使用噪声修正评估者奖励的RL微调相比零样本基线平均提升12.6个百分点，相比原始评估者奖励微调提升5.1个百分点。具体成功率提升显著，验证了噪声修正的有效性。与零样本方法对比，修正后的奖励使智能体更有效地学习任务完成策略；与未修正的评估者奖励相比，减轻了VLM评估偏差，提高了训练稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实自主视觉语言评估可作为GUI环境中RL的实际奖励信号，关键在于显式建模和修正评估噪声。学术上提出了一种可扩展的奖励生成框架，降低了强化学习在复杂视觉任务中的应用门槛。实际应用方面，可用于训练通用GUI智能体，如桌面自动化和软件测试。未来工作可探索更精细的噪声模型或结合人类反馈进一步提升评估准确性。

title: A specialized reasoning large language model for accelerating rare disease diagnosis: a randomized AI physician assistance trial
abstract: Rare diseases affect millions of individuals worldwide, yet timely diagnosis remains a major public health challenge due to scarcity of specialized clinical expertise. While large language models (LLMs) show promise to support rare disease diagnosis, current models are constrained by insufficient clinical deployability, limited clinically grounded evidence, and scarcity of training data. Here we present RaDaR (Rare Disease navigatoR), an open-source, compact reasoning LLM (32B parameters) for rare disease diagnosis. RaDaR was trained with 49,170 publicly available free-text cases and 104,666 synthetic cases with reasoning-enhanced training. RaDaR showed the strongest performance among evaluated open-source models, including the 671B DeepSeek-R1, across public benchmarks and four external validation centers. In a retrospective cohort, RaDaR prioritized the final diagnosis before documented clinical suspicion in 61.06 percent of cases, corresponding to a potential lead time of 1.87 months and 50.18 percent of the within-center interval. In a randomized physician-assistance trial, RaDaR assistance improved physicians' rare-disease diagnostic accuracy by 21.44 percentage points compared with internet search alone. Synthetic-data ablations suggested that phenotype-anchored narratives provide useful training signal for long-tail rare diseases, with a monotonic scaling trend within the tested data range. Together, RaDaR and its development and validation framework provide a deployable rare-disease reasoning model and a reproducible development framework for diagnostic AI under data scarcity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出开源紧凑型推理大模型RaDaR，用于加速罕见病诊断，在随机医生辅助试验中显著提升诊断准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 罕见病影响全球数百万人，但专业临床知识稀缺导致及时诊断困难。现有大语言模型在临床部署性、临床证据基础和训练数据稀缺方面存在局限，亟需一种可部署且高效的罕见病诊断模型。
light_analysis.method: RaDaR是一个32B参数的开源推理LLM，使用49170个公开免费文本病例和104666个合成病例进行推理增强训练。关键创新包括利用表型锚定叙事生成合成数据，并采用单调缩放趋势训练策略，以应对长尾罕见病数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.result: 在公共基准和四个外部验证中心中，RaDaR性能优于包括671B DeepSeek-R1在内的开源模型。回顾性队列中，61.06%的病例在临床怀疑前优先确诊，潜在提前1.87个月。随机医生辅助试验中，RaDaR辅助将罕见病诊断准确率提升21.44个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: RaDaR提供了一个可部署的罕见病推理模型，其开发框架可复用于数据稀缺下的诊断AI。研究展示了合成数据在长尾疾病训练中的价值，但未提及模型在真实临床环境中的泛化性和计算成本等局限。

title: A Fair Evaluation of Graph Foundation Models for Node Property Prediction
abstract: Due to the wide use of graph-structured data in different fields of industry and science, the development of Graph Foundation Models (GFMs) has recently attracted a lot of attention. While many different types of models are called GFMs, particular interest has been paid to GFMs designed for node property prediction tasks, which is one of the most popular settings in Graph ML with lots of real-world applications from fraud detection in financial and social networks to recommendation systems for e-commerce and user-generated content platforms. While a number of GFMs for this task have been recently proposed, the field has not converged to a unified evaluation setting, and different works evaluate their models in widely different ways, preventing reliable comparison of GFMs with each other and with other types of models. In this work, we conduct a fair and rigorous reevaluation of 9 recent GFMs for node property prediction, comparing them to strong Graph Neural Network (GNN) baselines. We find that, among these GFMs, only the most recent ones based on the Prior-data Fitted Networks paradigm outperform well-tuned GNNs in predictive performance, although at a higher inference cost.
comment: Accepted at The Workshop on Graph Foundation Models at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 对9种图基础模型进行公平评估，发现仅基于Prior-data Fitted Networks的模型在节点属性预测上优于调优GNN，但推理成本更高。
light_analysis.motivation: 图基础模型在节点属性预测任务中广泛应用，但领域缺乏统一的评估设置，不同工作采用差异化的评估方式，导致无法可靠比较各模型性能。因此需要公平严格的重新评估，以明确GFM的真实能力并指导未来研究。
light_analysis.method: 选取9种近期提出的图基础模型，与强图神经网络基线进行对比。采用统一的评估设置，确保数据集、任务和指标一致，通过系统性的重评估框架衡量预测性能和推理成本。关键创新在于标准化比较流程，排除评估偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在9种GFM中，仅基于Prior-data Fitted Networks的最新模型在预测性能上超过调优的GNN，但推理成本显著更高。其余GFM均未优于GNN基线，表明多数GFM在节点属性预测任务上缺乏优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前多数图基础模型在节点属性预测中并不优于调优的图神经网络，只有特定新型模型（Prior-data Fitted Networks）带来性能提升但以推理成本为代价。研究强调了统一评估框架的重要性，为未来GFM设计提供基准，并指出需关注效率。

title: On the Smallness of the Large Language Models Scaling Exponents
abstract: We discuss reasons why the scaling exponents of current Large Language Models (LLMs) applications are indicating an unsustainable regime in terms of energy resources. We further show that attributing the smallness of such exponents to a numerical bias due to the neglect of a non-zero value of the loss function in the limit of infinite data (``pedestal effect") does not remove the unsustainability issue. Finally, the effects of the smoothness (roughness) of the data on the scaling exponents is commented upon based on an analogy with phenomenological models of fluid turbulence.

light_analysis.overview: 分析大语言模型缩放指数小导致的能源不可持续问题，并探讨相关因素。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型规模扩展时，缩放指数较小意味着性能提升需要指数级增加计算资源，导致能源消耗不可持续。现有方法往往忽略无限数据下损失函数非零的“pedestal effect”，但即使考虑此效应，仍无法解决不可持续问题。此外，数据平滑性也可能影响缩放指数，需要深入理解。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过理论分析探讨大语言模型缩放指数小的原因，包括“pedestal effect”和数据平滑性。采用流体湍流现象学模型进行类比，分析数据粗糙度对缩放指数的影响。未提及具体数据集或模型架构，侧重于数学和物理类比的理论推导。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现，即使考虑无限数据下的损失函数非零值（pedestal），缩放指数小的现象依然存在，能源不可持续问题未解决。数据平滑性（粗糙度）对缩放指数有显著影响，类比流体湍流模型有助于理解该现象。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了当前大语言模型缩放指数小的根本原因并非简单的数值偏差，而是与数据特性和计算资源效率相关。指出能源不可持续性是一个严峻挑战，未来需要探索更高效的扩展方式或替代方案。局限性在于未提出具体解决方案。

title: UOL@IDEM at BEA 2026 Shared Task 1: Neural Fusion and Feature-Rich Modeling for L1-Aware Vocabulary Difficulty Prediction
abstract: This paper describes UOL@IDEM's closed-track submission to the BEA 2026 shared task on L1-aware vocabulary difficulty prediction. We model the task as regression and train separate systems for Spanish, German, and Mandarin Chinese\footnote{Below we use \emph{Chinese} for brevity.}. Our system combines multilingual contextual representations with engineered features capturing frequency, surface form, retrieval evidence, semantic alignment, cognate similarity, and masked-language-model predictability. Development results show consistent gains over the official closed-track baselines, with sentence-embedding encoders such as BGE-M3, multilingual E5, and LaBSE performing best. Official submissions achieve RMSE scores of 1.132, 1.037, and 0.891 for Spanish, German, and Chinese, respectively. Feature analysis identifies frequency as the most stable predictor, while contextual predictability, form similarity, retrieval, and semantic features provide complementary L1-sensitive signals. Error analysis shows strong ranking performance but weaker calibration for the easiest items, which are often overpredicted. See https://github.com/Nouran-Khallaf/UoL-IDEM-BEA2026-Vocabulary-Difficulty-Prediction
comment: Published at BEA2026, 21st Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications, at ACL, July 2026, San Diego

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经融合与特征丰富建模方法，用于L1感知的词汇难度预测，在三种语言上优于基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 词汇难度预测在语言学习中有重要应用，但现有方法未充分考虑学习者的母语（L1）背景。该任务针对西班牙语、德语和汉语三种语言，需要利用多语言上下文表示和工程特征，以提供L1敏感的预测，弥补传统方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 将任务建模为回归问题，为每种语言训练独立系统。结合多语言上下文表示（如BGE-M3、mE5、LaBSE）与工程特征，包括频率、表面形式、检索证据、语义对齐、同源相似性和掩码语言模型可预测性。使用句子嵌入编码器获得最佳性能。
light_analysis.result: 开发集结果持续优于官方封闭赛道基线。正式提交的RMSE分数：西班牙语1.132，德语1.037，汉语0.891。频率是最稳定的预测因子，上下文可预测性、形式相似性、检索和语义特征提供了互补的L1敏感信号。错误分析显示排序性能强，但最简单项校准较弱，常被高估。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了神经融合与特征丰富建模在L1感知词汇难度预测中的有效性，实验覆盖三种语言，特征分析揭示了不同L1敏感信号的互补作用。未来可改进校准，尤其针对简单项。该工作为多语言词汇难度预测提供了实用框架。

title: GeoIMO: Geometry-Driven Independent Motion Classification for Event Cameras
abstract: Existing automotive event datasets rely on appearance-based annotations from frame pipelines, making them poorly suited for motion-aware event perception. We present a geometry-driven, annotation-free framework that classifies detected objects as static or independently moving by exploiting ego-motion structure directly from the event stream. A Focus of Expansion model with yaw compensation estimates global background motion, while objects are labeled as moving when local motion deviates from this prediction, as quantified by a scale-invariant residual. Temporal stabilization improves robustness across consecutive event windows. The method requires no learning, no manual motion labels, and works with any input bounding boxes. Experiments on MVSEC and the Prophesee 1 Megapixel Automotive Detection dataset demonstrate consistent performance across diverse driving scenarios, with yaw compensation improving results during turns and a simple translational local model offering a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无学习、几何驱动的框架，直接利用事件流中自运动结构进行独立运动分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有汽车事件数据集依赖基于外观的帧管线标注，不适用于运动感知事件感知。需要一种无需人工标注、直接利用事件流中自运动几何结构的方法来区分静态和独立运动物体，以提升无人驾驶场景下运动感知的鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出GeoIMO框架，使用带偏航补偿的焦点扩张模型估计全局背景运动，通过尺度不变残差量化局部运动与预测的偏差来标记运动物体，并采用时间稳定机制提升跨事件窗口的鲁棒性。无需学习、无需手动运动标签，可与任意输入边界框配合。
light_analysis.result: 在MVSEC和Prophesee 1 Megapixel Automotive Detection数据集上的实验表明，该方法在多种驾驶场景下性能一致。偏航补偿在转弯时改善结果，简单的平移局部模型在准确性与效率之间取得良好平衡。摘要未明确具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoIMO提供了一种有效的无监督运动分类方案，克服了传统依赖外观标注的局限，具有实时性和泛化性。未来可探索更复杂的局部运动模型或结合学习策略以进一步提升分类精度。

title: VistaRef: Boosting Visual Spatial Orientation Awareness for Pointing-to-Object Detection
abstract: Grounding deictic gestures in natural images is fundamental to AR and human-robot collaboration, providing a basis for seamless spatial interaction. While Transformer-based visual models have achieved significant progress in general object detection, their global attention mechanisms often neglect micro-geometric relationships, degrading orientation accuracy. In pointing tasks, this deficiency manifests as an inability to accurately capture the pointing ray implied by finger poses, which results in pointing drift and localization ambiguity when dealing with distant or densely packed objects. To address this, we propose VistaRef, a framework designed to explicitly enhance spatial orientation awareness. First, we develop the Local Hand Entity Modeling (LHEM) module, which incorporates hand-pose embeddings to strengthen the model's capability to capture subtle finger deviations. Second, drawing inspiration from multi-view geometry, we construct the Geometric Ray Modeling (GRM) module to transform implicit orientation information into explicit spatial geometric features, guiding feature aggregation and deep fusion via attention mechanisms. Furthermore, we introduce a novel Orientation-Consistent Alignment Loss (OCAL) to synergistically supervise hand presence and pointing consistency, ensuring that all architectural improvements collectively serve the core objective of spatial localization. Experimental results demonstrate that VistaRef significantly outperforms the baseline, achieving a 14-point absolute gain in grounding accuracy. Qualitative analysis further confirms that VistaRef effectively models the geometric correlation from hand to target, bridging the spatial perception gap inherent in traditional Transformers for complex scenarios. Code: https://github.com/lingli1724/VistaRef.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VistaRef框架，通过显式增强空间方位感知能力，提升指向性目标检测的准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在增强现实和人机协作中，指向手势的精准定位至关重要。现有Transformer模型在目标检测中虽表现优异，但其全局注意力机制忽略了微几何关系，导致指向任务中难以准确捕捉手指姿态隐含的指向射线，尤其在远处或密集目标场景下出现指向漂移和定位模糊。
light_analysis.method: VistaRef框架包含三个核心模块：局部手部实体建模（LHEM）模块引入手部姿态嵌入，增强对细微手指偏差的捕捉能力；几何射线建模（GRM）模块将隐式方向信息转化为显式空间几何特征，通过注意力机制引导特征聚合与深度融合；方向一致性对齐损失（OCAL）协同监督手部存在与指向一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在指向性目标检测任务上，VistaRef相比基线方法在定位精度上获得14个百分点的绝对提升。定性分析验证了模型能有效建模从手部到目标的几何关联，弥补传统Transformer在复杂场景中的空间感知缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: VistaRef通过显式建模空间方位关系，显著提高了指向性目标检测的准确性，为AR和人机协作中的空间交互提供了有效方案。未来可探索更复杂的手部姿态建模和实时性优化。

title: RetiSEM: Generalising Causal Models for Fragmented Biomedical Data
abstract: Learning causal models from fragmented biomedical data is challenging because clinical, molecular, and imaging variables are often incomplete or not jointly observed. We propose RetiSEM, a domain-constrained structural equation modelling (SEM) framework for causal graph recovery and mediation analysis under limited multimodal resources. This proposed work organises variables into biologically informed blocks, applies forbidden-edge constraints, and decomposes pathway-level effects into TE, NDE, and NIE components. We evaluate RetiSEM across ten synthetic benchmark scenarios that vary in dimensionality, nonlinearity, causal depth, and pathway structure, together with a fragmented real-world setting that combines NHANES clinical variables with externally derived retinal representations. This approach achieves lower structural error and higher causal accuracy than unconstrained baselines across the synthetic benchmarks. In the real-data analysis, retinal variables behave mainly as downstream biomarker-like indicators, with smaller but detectable indirect effects. These findings support our strategy as an interpretable framework for testing structured causal hypotheses in limited-resource biomedical AI. The code and resources for this work are publicly available at: https://github.com/Inamullah-Colab/ReitSEM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RetiSEM框架，通过领域约束的结构方程模型从碎片化生物医学数据中学习因果结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物医学数据中临床、分子和影像变量常不完整或非联合观测，现有因果模型难以从碎片化多模态数据中恢复因果图。该问题在资源有限场景下尤为突出，限制了病因推断和中介分析。
light_analysis.method: RetiSEM采用领域约束结构方程建模，将变量组织为生物学信息块，应用禁止边约束，并将路径效应分解为总效应、自然直接效应和自然间接效应。在十种合成基准（不同维度、非线性、因果深度）和真实碎片化数据（NHANES临床变量+外部视网膜表征）上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在合成基准上，RetiSEM相比无约束基线实现了更低的图结构错误和更高的因果准确性。真实数据分析中，视网膜变量主要作为下游生物标志物指示器，具有较小但可检测的间接效应。
light_analysis.conclusion: RetiSEM为有限资源生物医学AI中测试结构化因果假设提供了可解释框架，代码已开源。未来可探索更复杂的非线性因果模型和更大规模的真实数据应用。

title: Advancing WordArt-Oriented Scene Text Recognition: Datasets and Methods
abstract: WordArt (artistic text) features highly customized fonts, textures, and layouts, making WordArt-oriented scene TExt Recognition (WATER) substantially more challenging than general Scene Text Recognition (STR). Existing STR datasets and methods, typically built around regular scene text and fixed-template inputs, struggle to scale to WATER. Thus, we aim to advance this task from both data and model perspectives. On the data side, we construct a 2M synthetic dataset, WATER-S, with the scale improved by hundreds of times compared to existing artistic text data. WATER-S consists of two complementary subsets. One rendered by an upgraded rendering pipeline (SynthWordArt), which provides highly accurate and controllable synthetic WordArt data. The other is generated by combining Qwen3-VL for prompt mining and Z-Image for image synthesis, which improves the coverage of realistic and diverse data. On the model side, we propose WATERec. It adopts an visual encoder supporting arbitrary-shaped inputs and an autoregressive decoder to model complex layouts, structurally breaking the bottleneck of fixed-template STR on WordArt. Experiments show that this architecture outperforms prior STR methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance on irregular texts such as WordArt. Together with WATER-R, carefully reorganized from existing real STR data, our strong baseline with the new synthetic data and model design reaches 90.40% accuracy on WordArt-Bench, surpassing both general-purpose and OCR-specialized vision-language models by a large margin. Code and data are available at https://github.com/YesianRohn/WATER.

light_analysis.overview: 提出大规模合成数据集WATER-S和模型WATERec，突破固定模板限制，实现艺术字场景文本识别SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 艺术字体具有高度定制化的字体、纹理和布局，导致艺术字场景文本识别（WATER）远难于常规场景文本识别（STR）。现有STR数据集和模型主要针对常规文本和固定模板输入，难以扩展到WATER任务。因此，需要从数据和模型两个角度提升WATER性能，以应对复杂多样的艺术字。
light_analysis.method: 数据方面，构建了2M规模的合成数据集WATER-S，包含两个互补子集：一是通过升级的渲染管线SynthWordArt生成高精度可控数据；二是结合Qwen3-VL进行提示挖掘和Z-Image进行图像合成，提升真实性和多样性。模型方面，提出WATERec，采用支持任意形状输入的视觉编码器和自回归解码器，结构上打破固定模板STR在艺术字上的瓶颈。
light_analysis.result: WATERec在WordArt-Bench上达到90.40%的准确率，显著超越先前STR方法以及通用和OCR专用视觉语言模型。实验表明该架构在处理不规则文本（如艺术字）上取得SOTA性能，验证了新合成数据和模型设计的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从数据和模型两方面推进艺术字场景文本识别，构建大规模合成数据集WATER-S并设计WATERec模型，打破了固定模板限制。该工作为艺术字识别提供了强基线，具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可进一步探索真实数据与合成数据的融合以及更高效的模型架构。

title: MambaRaw: Selective State Space Modeling for Efficient 4K Raw Image Reconstruction
abstract: In-camera JPEG previews are ubiquitous in raw image formats and provide an sRGB reference at negligible storage cost. Although existing metadata-based reconstruction frameworks can exploit this side information when recovering raw images, their context models often become computationally expensive especially at high resolution, eg, 4K raw image, given that attention mechanisms scale quadratically with feature maps, hindering its practical application. To address these limitations, we propose MambaRaw, a JPEG-conditioned metadata-based raw image reconstruction framework that uses State Space Models (SSMs) to estimate entropy parameters efficiently. Our key contribution comprises a Spatial-Energy Coupled Context Modeling mechanism with two lightweight modules: (1) TileMambaBlock, which performs Mamba-style selective scanning only on information-dense tiles to improve the efficiency; and (2) Energy-Aware Refinement (EAR), an identity-initialized residual module that enhance feature representation to match the long-tail energy distribution of raw signals. Extensive experiments on three camera datasets (Sony, Olympus, Samsung) show consistent improvements over strong metadata-based baselines and set a new state of the art for JPEG-guided raw reconstruction with great efficiency. Notably, at low metadata bitrates, MambaRaw increases PSNR by 1.2--1.4 dB and reduces end-to-end coding latency by about 9%. Code is released at https://github.com/Peizeli1/MambaRaw.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MambaRaw，一种基于状态空间模型的JPEG引导原始图像重建框架，实现4K分辨率下的高效重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于元数据的原始图像重建方法在高分辨率（如4K）下计算成本高，因为注意力机制与特征图尺寸成二次方关系，限制了实际应用。需要更高效的上下文模型以处理高分辨率图像。
light_analysis.method: MambaRaw使用状态空间模型(SSMs)高效估计熵参数。核心是空间-能量耦合上下文建模机制，包含两个轻量模块：TileMambaBlock仅对信息密集的块进行选择性扫描；Energy-Aware Refinement (EAR)通过恒等初始化的残差模块增强特征表示，匹配原始信号的长尾能量分布。
light_analysis.result: 在Sony、Olympus、Samsung三个相机数据集上，MambaRaw优于强元数据基线，达到新SOTA。低元数据比特率下，PSNR提升1.2-1.4 dB，端到端编码延迟降低约9%。
light_analysis.conclusion: MambaRaw解决了高分辨率原始图像重建中的效率问题，具有实际应用价值。代码已开源。未来可进一步优化或将SSM应用于其他图像重建任务。

title: video-SALMONN-R$^3$: Learning to ReWatch, ReAsk, and ReAnswer for Efficient Video Understanding
abstract: Video large language models (LLMs) are often constrained by computation and memory budgets, leading them to use reduced frame rates and spatial resolutions, which may cause them to miss critical information for question answering (QA). A practical and efficient solution is a two-stage paradigm: first perform coarse video understanding to localize relevant segments, and then re-watch these segments at higher temporal or spatial fidelity. In this paper, we present video-SALMONN-R$^3$, the first end-to-end video-LLM that enables re-watch through reinforcement learning without relying on chain-of-thought (CoT) cold-start. This design removes the need for costly CoT data annotations and avoids CoT-based supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which can otherwise degrade the pretrained video understanding abilities. To address the mismatch between the reasoning-first behavior induced by re-watch and the answer-first tendency of pretrained video-LLMs, we propose a re-answer strategy, in which the model first produces a direct answer in the first watch and then refines it after re-watching. Finally, to improve question adherence during re-watching, we propose a re-ask mechanism that re-injects the query when revisiting localized segments. Experimental results show that video-SALMONN-R$^3$ consistently outperforms both the base model and the QA-SFT baseline, while surpassing prior re-watch-based approaches with significantly lower computational cost. Code, models, and data will be publicly released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个通过强化学习实现重看机制的视频大语言模型，无需链式思维冷启动，结合重看、重问、重答策略提升视频理解效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频大语言模型受限于计算和内存，只能以低帧率和低分辨率处理视频，容易遗漏关键信息。现有两阶段方法依赖链式思维冷启动和昂贵的数据标注，且监督微调会损害预训练的视频理解能力。因此需要一种无需冷启动、保持预训练能力的重看范式以提高视频问答效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出video-SALMONN-R³，采用强化学习实现端到端重看，避免链式思维冷启动和其监督微调。设计重回答策略：先给出直接答案，重看后精炼，解决推理优先与回答优先的不匹配；重问机制在重看时重新注入问题以增强问题遵循。模型先粗看定位相关片段，再以高保真重看细节。
light_analysis.result: 在视频问答任务上，video-SALMONN-R³持续优于基线和QA-SFT基线，并超越先前基于重看的方法，同时计算成本显著降低。具体数值未明确给出，但实验证明其高效性。代码、模型和数据将在接收后公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出高效视频理解框架，通过强化学习实现重看机制，无需链式思维冷启动和昂贵标注，避免了预训练能力退化。具有实际应用价值，可提升视频问答的准确性和效率。未来可探索更多重看策略和更广泛的视频任务。开源资源将促进后续研究。

title: The Latent Bridge: A Continuous Slow-Fast Channel for Real-Time Game Agents
abstract: A real-time agent for general computer use - with games as the most demanding case - must act within tens of milliseconds while still planning over seconds. These two regimes sit at opposite ends of the latency-quality tradeoff. A reasoning VLM (Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking) deliberates effectively but requires ~1.5 s per response - far too slow for a 15 Hz control loop. In contrast, a reactive VLM (MiniCPM-o 4.5) acts in milliseconds but underperforms on planning-heavy tasks. We couple two frozen models of matched scale (9B reactive, 8B reasoning), leaving the communication channel as the sole trainable component. The standard coupling is a Text Bridge (T): the slow model writes a suffix the fast model reads. We introduce a learned continuous Latent Bridge (L) that projects the slow model's residuals into the fast model's input-embedding space in a LLaVA-style manner, avoiding any text round-trip; both are compared against Fast-Only (F). On 7 Atari games and a driving domain (MetaDrive), tuning the action decoder per channel on held-out seeds, the Latent Bridge matches or beats the Text Bridge in every domain: it significantly improves two games (MsPacman +57%, RoadRunner +28%) and is a safe drop-in elsewhere. Combining both channels interferes destructively (RoadRunner -96%), so only one should be used. The benefit is highly predictable: the bridge helps if and only if slow reasoning already beats fast reaction (T > F) - the Latent and Text gains over Fast-Only move together at r=0.93. MetaDrive is the controlled negative, where the Latent Bridge is demonstrably inert because the Text Bridge adds no value. We release replay recordings and reproducible pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Latent Bridge，通过连续潜空间桥接慢速推理VLM和快速反应VLM，实现实时游戏控制，避免文本往返瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时游戏智能体需在毫秒级响应和秒级规划间权衡。推理VLM（Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking）需约1.5秒，太慢；反应VLM（MiniCPM-o 4.5）快但规划弱。现有耦合方法（文本桥）有延迟，且组合可能干扰，亟需高效桥接方案。
light_analysis.method: 固定两个冻结模型（9B反应、8B推理），仅训练通信通道。标准文本桥（Text Bridge）让慢模型写后缀供快模型读。Latent Bridge（L）将慢模型残差投影到快模型输入嵌入空间（LLaVA风格），避免文本往返。在7个Atari游戏和MetaDrive驾驶域上，针对每个通道调优动作解码器进行评估。
light_analysis.result: Latent Bridge在每项任务上匹配或超越Text Bridge，显著提升MsPacman（+57%）和RoadRunner（+28%），其他域安全替代。组合两通道导致干扰（RoadRunner -96%）。收益高度可预测：当慢推理优于快反应时桥接有效，增益相关系数r=0.93。MetaDrive中Text Bridge无增益，Latent Bridge也无效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: Latent Bridge提供一种高效、可预测的桥接方法，无需文本交互即能结合慢速推理与快速反应，适合实时游戏控制。其增益与慢推理优势正相关。局限性：仅单一通道有效，且依赖推理模型优势。未来可探索更复杂桥接或动态通道选择。

title: CompressKV: Semantic-Retrieval-Guided KV-Cache Compression for Resource-Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference
abstract: Long-context large language model (LLM) inference is increasingly constrained by the memory footprint and decoding cost of key-value (KV) caches, limiting sustainable deployment on resource-constrained hardware. Existing KV cache eviction methods typically apply heuristic token scoring over all heads in GQA-based LLMs. These methods ignore the different functionalities of attention heads, leading to the eviction of critical tokens and thus degrading the performance of LLMs. To address this issue, we propose CompressKV, a resource-efficient KV-cache compression framework for GQA-based LLMs. Instead of aggregating attention scores from all heads, CompressKV identifies Semantic Retrieval Heads (SRHs) that capture both the initial and final tokens of a prompt and semantically important mid-context evidence, and uses them to select tokens whose KV pairs should be retained. Furthermore, CompressKV allocates cache budgets across layers according to offline estimates of layer-wise eviction error. Experiments on LongBench and Needle-in-a-Haystack show that CompressKV consistently outperforms existing KV-cache eviction methods across memory budgets. Notably, it preserves over 97\% of full-cache performance using only 3\% of the KV cache on LongBench question-answering tasks and achieves 90\% accuracy with just 0.7\% KV storage on Needle-in-a-Haystack. These results demonstrate an improved resource--performance trade-off for long-context LLM inference. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/TUDa-HWAI/CompressKV
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2508.02401

light_analysis.overview: 提出CompressKV，一种基于语义检索头（SRH）的KV缓存压缩框架，用于长上下文LLM推理，显著提升资源效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文大语言模型推理受限于KV缓存的内存占用和解码成本，现有驱逐方法忽略不同注意力头的功能差异，导致关键token被驱逐，性能下降。因此需要一种能识别语义关键token并跨层分配预算的高效压缩方法。
light_analysis.method: CompressKV针对GQA-based LLMs，首先识别语义检索头（SRH），这些头能捕获提示的初始和最终token及语义重要的中间证据，然后利用它们选择保留token的KV对。此外，根据离线估计的逐层驱逐误差跨层分配缓存预算。
light_analysis.result: 在LongBench和Needle-in-a-Haystack任务上，CompressKV在各种内存预算下持续优于现有方法：仅用3% KV缓存即保留97%以上全缓存性能（LongBench问答），仅用0.7% KV存储即达90%准确率（Needle-in-a-Haystack）。
light_analysis.conclusion: CompressKV通过语义检索引导的KV缓存压缩，实现了长上下文推理中资源与性能的更好权衡。该工作为资源受限硬件上的LLM部署提供了有效方案，代码已开源。未来可探索更细粒度的语义头识别。

title: Boosting Text-Driven Video Segmentation via Geometry-Aware Distillation
abstract: Text-driven Referring Video Object Segmentation (RVOS) aims to locate and segment target objects in videos given natural language. However, existing models are typically trained on 2D image or video datasets with naive segmentation losses, which overlooks the geometric consistency across frames and leads to weak spatial understanding. In this paper, we propose Geometry-enhanced Language-guided Video segmentation (GeoLaV), a two-stage framework that distills 3D geometric knowledge from images to enhance text-driven video segmentation. In the first stage, we perform monocular geometry pretraining with monocular novel-view synthesis, enabling the model to acquire geometry-consistent visual representations via spatial alignment on large-scale single-image datasets. In the second stage, we introduce geometry-aware distillation and fine-tune the model on video segmentation datasets, transferring 3D structural knowledge from a general 3D prior model. This process reinforces 3D awareness and improves both spatiotemporal coherence and language grounding in segmentation. Extensive experiments show that our method using only image segmentation data already provides notable zero-shot generalization in RVOS. When combined with geometry-aware distillation for fine-tuning on videos, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple RVOS benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/Tony1882880/GeoLaV.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoLaV框架，通过几何感知蒸馏将3D几何知识从图像迁移到视频，提升文本驱动视频分割的时空一致性和语言对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本驱动视频分割模型通常基于2D图像/视频数据训练，使用简单的分割损失，忽略了帧间几何一致性，导致空间理解薄弱。因此需要增强模型的3D几何感知能力，以改善跨帧的时空连贯性和语言定位精度。
light_analysis.method: GeoLaV是一个两阶段框架。第一阶段通过单目新视角合成进行几何预训练，在大规模单图像数据集上通过空间对齐学习几何一致的视觉表征。第二阶段引入几何感知蒸馏，将通用3D先验模型的结构知识迁移到视频分割微调中，增强模型的3D意识，提升时空一致性和语言基础。
light_analysis.result: 仅使用图像分割数据即实现零样本泛化，在多个RVOS基准上达到领先性能。具体数据摘要未明确，但明确声称state-of-the-art。与现有方法相比，几何感知蒸馏显著提升了分割准确性和时空连贯性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoLaV通过几何感知蒸馏有效将3D几何知识注入视频分割模型，显著提升了文本驱动视频分割的性能。该方法在零样本和微调场景均表现出色，代码已开源。未来可探索更高效的几何蒸馏策略或扩展到其他视频理解任务。

title: The African Language Tax: Quantifying the Cost, Latency, and Context Penalty of Tokenizing African Languages in Frontier LLMs
abstract: Commercial large language models bill, scale latency, and budget context per token. Yet tokenizers assign more subword tokens to the same meaning in some languages than in others, so speakers of languages with high token-fertility pay a structural penalty before a model is ever invoked. This penalty is documented for multilingual settings in general, but it has not been measured systematically for African languages at the level of enterprise deployment economics and cognitive context capacity. We measure it across 20 African languages spanning five language families and three scripts (Latin, Ge'ez/Ethiopic, N'Ko; 19 appear in the primary FLORES-200+ corpus, with Nigerian Pidgin measured via MAFAND-MT only), using parallel corpora so that the language effect is isolated from content. Across 11 frontier and open tokenizers on FLORES-200+, every African language carries a tokenization premium above English (median 1.88x on GPT-5 / o200k_base, up to 8.92x for N'Ko); the penalty is largest for Ethiopic and N'Ko scripts (reaching 7-9x) and is near-invariant across corpora (FLORES vs SIB-200 Pearson r = 0.9998). Translated into deployment terms, this results in up to 8.9x inference cost and an equivalent generation-latency multiplier (N'Ko vs English on GPT-5; 7.4x for Amharic), and as little as 11% of English's effective context window. The best currently available tokenizer for African languages, Gemma 4, reduces the mean premium from 3.31x (cl100k_base) to 2.38x, but no tokenizer eliminates the penalty. We release an open measurement tool (afri-fertility), a public leaderboard, a results dataset, and mitigation guidance for African builders. The penalty falls hardest on the languages whose speakers can least afford it, a digital divide encoded directly into the subword vocabulary.

light_analysis.overview: 量化了前沿大语言模型对非洲语言分词时的成本、延迟和上下文窗口惩罚，揭示结构性数字鸿沟。
light_analysis.motivation: 商业大模型按token计费、延迟和上下文预算，但分词器对不同语言分配不同数量的子词token，导致某些语言存在结构性惩罚。之前研究未系统测量非洲语言在企业部署经济学和认知上下文容量层面的惩罚。
light_analysis.method: 使用20种非洲语言（涵盖5个语系和3种文字），基于平行语料FLORES-200+和MAFAND-MT，测量11个前沿和开放分词器的token化倍数。开发测量工具afri-fertility并发布排行榜和数据集。
light_analysis.result: 所有非洲语言token数均高于英语（中位数1.88x，最高N'Ko 8.92x），导致最高8.9x推理成本和延迟，有效上下文窗口仅为英语的11%。最佳分词器Gemma 4将平均倍数从3.31x降至2.38x，但未消除惩罚。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了直接编码在子词词汇表中的数字鸿沟，惩罚最重的是最无力承受的语言。提供了开源工具、排行榜和缓解指南，但根本问题需进一步研究。

title: An LLM-based Two-Stage Transformer Framework for Cross-Domain Bearing Fault Diagnosis with Limited Data
abstract: Bearing fault diagnosis faces critical challenges when dataset heterogeneity, operating condition variations, and limited labeled data occur simultaneously in industrial environments. Existing approaches address these issues in isolation and rely on implicit feature alignment, limiting effectiveness under concurrent challenges. This paper proposes a knowledge-guided two-stage transfer learning framework that employs a lightweight GPT-2-style Transformer with causal self-attention for hierarchical feature extraction from vibration signals, establishing explicit pathways where pre-trained encoder weights and fault prototype embeddings serve as knowledge carriers from multi-source pre-training to target adaptation. The framework addresses the dual-shift challenge through multi-source learning for generalizable representations, prototype-based knowledge modulation for target adaptation, and taxonomy-adaptive classification for seamless transfer across heterogeneous fault categories. Experimental validation on four real-world datasets demonstrates 92.61% average accuracy with only 10% labeled target data, outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 17.24 percentage points, establishing a practical pathway toward cost-effective predictive maintenance in Industry 4.0 applications.
comment: Accepted as a conference article of AIM 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于LLM引导的两阶段Transformer框架，实现跨域轴承故障诊断，在有限数据下显著提升准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业环境中数据集异质性、工况变化和有限标记数据常同时出现，现有方法孤立处理这些问题并依赖隐式特征对齐，效果受限。实际故障诊断需要有效应对这些并发挑战，实现跨域泛化。
light_analysis.method: 采用轻量级GPT-2风格Transformer，使用因果自注意力从振动信号中提取层次特征；两阶段迁移学习框架通过多源学习获得通用表征，原型知识调制适应目标域，分类适应处理异构故障类别。知识载体包括预训练编码器权重和故障原型嵌入。
light_analysis.result: 在四个真实轴承数据集上，仅使用10%标注目标数据达到92.61%平均准确率，相比现有最优方法提升17.24个百分点，验证了框架在少样本跨域诊断中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 所提框架为数据有限的跨域故障诊断提供了高效解决方案，具有低成本、高准确率的优势，适用于工业4.0预测性维护场景。未来可探索更多LLM架构或扩展至其他机械设备诊断。

title: Lite Any Stereo V2: Faster and Stronger Efficient Zero-Shot Stereo Matching
abstract: Recent advances in stereo matching have achieved remarkable accuracy, but often rely on large models, heavy computation, or additional foundation-model priors, making them difficult to deploy on resource-constrained platforms. In contrast, efficient stereo models offer faster inference but are commonly considered less capable of strong zero-shot generalization. In this paper, we challenge this assumption by introducing Lite Any Stereo V2 (LAS2), an ultra-fast model series designed for efficient zero-shot stereo matching. LAS2 is developed from both architecture and training perspectives. Architecturally, we revisit efficient stereo design under practical deployment settings and propose a 2D-only cost aggregation framework, optimized for real inference latency rather than theoretical MACs alone. For training, we develop a three-stage strategy that combines synthetic supervision, self-distillation, and real-world knowledge distillation. To improve the reliability of real-world pseudo supervision, we further introduce pseudo-label filtering and an error-clamping operation, enabling smoother synthetic-to-real transfer. We instantiate LAS2 as a family of models, including feed-forward variants for different efficiency budgets and an iterative variant for higher accuracy. Extensive experiments show that LAS2 achieves state-of-the-art accuracy among efficient stereo methods while maintaining significantly lower latency. Specifically, LAS2-H achieves stronger overall zero-shot performance than the iterative method Fast-FoundationStereo, with 1.8x and 2.7x faster inference on H200 and Orin, respectively. The project page, demos, and code are available at https://tomtomtommi.github.io/LiteAnyStereoV2/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Lite Any Stereo V2超快模型系列，通过2D-only成本聚合框架和三阶段训练策略，实现高效零样本立体匹配，兼顾精度与速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有立体匹配方法依赖大模型或额外先验，计算量大，难以部署在资源受限平台；高效方法虽推理快但零样本泛化能力弱。本文旨在打破这一权衡，设计兼顾高效推理与强零样本泛化的立体匹配模型。
light_analysis.method: 架构上，提出2D-only成本聚合框架，针对实际推理延迟而非理论MACs优化。训练上，采用三阶段策略：合成监督、自蒸馏、真实知识蒸馏，并引入伪标签过滤和误差钳制操作，提升真实域伪监督可靠性。模型系列包括前馈变体（不同效率预算）和迭代变体（更高精度）。
light_analysis.result: LAS2在高效立体方法中达到SOTA零样本精度，同时延迟显著更低。LAS2-H比迭代方法Fast-FoundationStereo推理快1.8倍（H200）和2.7倍（Orin），且整体零样本性能更强。
light_analysis.conclusion: LAS2证明高效模型也能实现强零样本泛化，为资源受限平台的立体匹配部署提供新方案。其2D-only架构和训练策略可推广至其他视觉任务。

title: Bayesian control for coding agents
abstract: Modern coding agents pair LLM generators with various tools, including cheap diagnostics and expensive verifiers. The tool-use decisions are typically governed by orchestrators that often use fixed rules and ignore uncertainty. We formulate orchestration as cost-sensitive sequential hypothesis testing: a Bayesian controller maintains a belief over candidate correctness and dynamically decides whether to gather more evidence, refine the candidate, verify it, or stop. Across six generators and nine coding benchmarks, Bayesian control proves to be most valuable when verification is costly and critics are informative but imperfect. Beyond control, the belief state yields an interpretable correctness score that outperforms token-probability and raw tool-success baselines for uncertainty quantification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出贝叶斯控制方法，将编码代理中工具使用决策建模为成本敏感的序列假设检验，动态优化验证与停止时机。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代编码代理常结合LLM生成器与多种工具（如廉价诊断、昂贵验证器），但现有的编排器多采用固定规则，忽略决策中的不确定性，导致成本与效率不佳。该研究旨在通过引入贝叶斯控制，实现动态、成本敏感的工具使用决策，提升在验证成本高且批评信息不完全时的表现。
light_analysis.method: 将编排问题形式化为成本敏感的序列假设检验：贝叶斯控制器维护对候选答案正确性的信念（后验概率），并基于当前信念动态决策——收集更多证据、改进候选、验证或停止。该方法利用贝叶斯更新整合工具反馈，无需预设固定阈值，适应不同成本和信息质量。实验涵盖六个生成器和九个编码基准。
light_analysis.result: 在六个生成器和九个编码基准上，贝叶斯控制在验证成本高且批评者信息丰富但不完美时表现最佳，显著优于固定规则编排器。此外，信念状态导出的正确性得分在不确定性量化上超越基于token概率和原始工具成功的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种基于贝叶斯控制的编码代理编排框架，能够动态平衡工具使用成本与准确性。其信念状态不仅用于决策，还提供了可解释的不确定性度量，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂的工具组合与动态成本场景。

title: SENTRY: SAM2-Enhanced Neighbor-Aware and Temporally Reasoned Memory for Visual Tracking
abstract: We revisit the memory update mechanism in SAM2-based visual object tracking and identify confidence-only mask selection as the dominant cause of drift under occlusion, rapid motion, and distractors. We introduce SENTRY, a training-free, plug-and-play, refine-before-write module that validates each memory update for short-horizon temporal consistency before committing it. SENTRY aggregates diverse segmentation hypotheses per frame, backtracks them into short tracklets, and uses neighbor-aware cycle-consistent matching against recent trajectories to favor temporally and geometrically consistent masks. It leaves the base architecture untouched, replacing confidence-driven writes with consistency-validated ones. For fair evaluation, we re-evaluate major open-source SAM2-based trackers across all available scales and datasets, filling gaps in prior reports. Integrated into five strong baselines, SENTRY delivers consistent gains across nine benchmarks, achieving new zero-shot SOTA on LaSOT, LaSOT_ext, GOT-10k, VOT20, VOT22, and DiDi. Despite these checks, the SAM2-L version runs at 32.8 FPS on an A100, and across compatible hosts adds only about 0.4--0.6 GB VRAM. Our results provide the first unified all-scale evaluation of SAM2-based trackers and show that enforcing temporal validity at write time stabilizes memory-augmented tracking without retraining.
comment: Accepted for publication at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出SENTRY模块，通过验证记忆更新的时间一致性来提升SAM2跟踪器性能，实现零样本SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: SAM2跟踪器在遮挡、快速运动和干扰下易漂移，因为其仅依赖置信度选择掩码，缺乏对记忆更新一致性的验证。该问题导致跟踪失败，影响鲁棒性，现有方法未有效解决。
light_analysis.method: SENTRY是无需训练的即插即用模块，在写入记忆前验证短期时间一致性。它聚合每帧多样分割假设，回溯成短轨迹，通过邻域感知的循环一致性匹配与近期轨迹对比，选择时间和几何一致的掩码，替换置信度驱动写入。
light_analysis.result: 集成到五个强基线中，在九个基准上一致提升，在LaSOT、LaSOT_ext、GOT-10k、VOT20、VOT22和DiDi上取得新零样本SOTA。SAM2-L在A100上达32.8 FPS，额外VRAM仅0.4-0.6 GB，首次提供统一全尺度评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: SENTRY通过写入时强制执行时间有效性稳定记忆增强跟踪，无需重训练。学术上揭示了记忆更新一致性的价值，实际应用即插即用提升性能。潜在局限性包括依赖分割假设生成，但未明确未来方向。

title: P-MTP: Efficient Document Parsing via Multi-Token Prediction with Progressive Depth Scaling
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have revolutionized document parsing by enabling end-to-end mapping from images to structured text, imposing a significant latency bottleneck, particularly for token-dense documents. While Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has emerged as a promising approach for accelerating inference, its potential is constrained by optimization instability when scaling to deeper look-ahead depth. In this paper, we propose \textbf{P-MTP}, a framework that leverages \textbf{Progressive Multi-Token Prediction} with a lightweight MTP module to scale the look-ahead depth for high-throughput document parsing. Specifically, we introduce Progressive Curriculum Loss that adaptively re-weights different look-ahead depths using cumulative path reliability and retrospective target consistency. By effectively suppressing gradient noise in long-range predictions, P-MTP, facilitates an automated easy-to-hard optimization transition, enabling the model to master increasingly distant look-ahead depths. Furthermore, we propose Confidence-Gated Dynamic Drafting to maximize the effective look-ahead depth and acceptance rate by adaptively calibrating speculative length during inference, thereby minimizing computational waste and further pushing the boundaries of inference speedup. Experimental results across multiple benchmarks and architectures demonstrate that P-MTP, achieves up to a $5\times$ speedup with negligible loss in accuracy, providing the first successful validation of extensive look-ahead MTP in the document parsing domain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出P-MTP框架，通过渐进式多令牌预测和置信门控动态草稿，实现文档解析的高吞吐量加速，达到5倍速度提升且精度几乎无损。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在文档解析中虽实现了端到端映射，但处理令牌密集型文档时存在严重的延迟瓶颈。多令牌预测（MTP）虽能加速推理，但随预测深度增加，优化不稳定性限制了其潜力。现有方法难以在深层次预测中保持稳定训练和高效推理，亟需一种能自适应扩展预测深度并减少计算浪费的方案。
light_analysis.method: P-MTP框架包含两个创新组件：渐进式课程损失（Progressive Curriculum Loss），通过累积路径可靠性和回顾目标一致性自适应重加权不同预测深度的损失，抑制长距离预测的梯度噪声，实现由易到难的优化过渡；置信门控动态草稿（Confidence-Gated Dynamic Drafting），在推理时自适应校准推测长度，最大化有效预测深度和接受率，减少计算浪费。采用轻量级MTP模块，兼容多种模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试和架构上，P-MTP实现了高达5倍的推理加速，同时仅有可忽略的精度损失。这是首次在文档解析领域验证了深度多令牌预测的有效性。与基线方法相比，在速度提升显著的情况下保持了输出质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次成功将深度多令牌预测应用于文档解析，通过渐进式训练和动态推理策略解决了优化不稳定和计算低效问题。该框架显著提高了高吞吐量文档处理的效率，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更广泛的视觉语言任务，但摘要未提及具体局限性。

title: S1-Omni-Image: A Unified Model for Scientific Image Understanding, Generation, and Editing
abstract: We present S1-Omni-Image, an open-weight unified multimodal model for scientific image understanding, generation, and editing. Unlike general-purpose image generation models, scientific image tasks require not only high-fidelity synthesis, but also robust understanding of scientific semantics, structural relations, domain knowledge, and task intent. To this end, S1-Omni-Image builds on the scientific multimodal reasoning backbone S1-VL-32B and couples its understanding capability with an image generation module under a unified think-before-generate paradigm. Given a user instruction, the model first produces a task-oriented reasoning trace, a textual answer, and a task special token; their hidden states are then injected into the generation module to condition image generation or editing. S1-Omni-Image supports scientific image understanding, generation, and editing in a unified framework. For generation, it focuses on scientific illustrations and text rendering, including logical diagrams, relational comparisons, data charts, and realistic scientific visualizations. For editing, it casts segmentation and other domain-specific vision tasks as native image editing problems, enabling multi-turn illustration editing, medical and geographic image segmentation, medical image translation, and scientific image super-resolution. We construct SciGenEdit, a 314K-sample training dataset, and release the model weights, inference code, and SciGenEdit-10K. Experiments show that S1-Omni-Image substantially improves scientific image generation and editing while preserving the scientific image understanding capability inherited from S1-VL-32B. It outperforms open-source models on GenExam and TechImage-Bench, achieves state-of-the-art results on four editing benchmarks including MSD, cigRockSEM, SynthRAD2025, and IXI, and maintains stable performance on scientific image understanding evaluations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出S1-Omni-Image，一个统一的多模态模型，用于科学图像的理解、生成与编辑，采用思考-再生成范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 通用图像生成模型难以处理科学图像任务，需要高保真合成以及对科学语义、结构关系、领域知识和任务意图的鲁棒理解。现有方法缺乏统一框架，无法同时支持理解、生成和编辑。
light_analysis.method: 基于科学多模态推理主干S1-VL-32B，耦合图像生成模块，采用‘思考-再生成’范式。用户指令先产生推理轨迹、文本答案和任务特殊token，其隐藏状态注入生成模块以条件化图像生成或编辑。支持科学插图生成、文本渲染（逻辑图、比较图、数据图表等）以及编辑任务（分割、医疗地理图像分割、医学图像翻译、超分辨率等）。构建了314K样本训练数据集SciGenEdit。
light_analysis.result: 在GenExam和TechImage-Bench上优于开源模型；在MSD、cigRockSEM、SynthRAD2025和IXI四个编辑基准上达到最先进水平；同时保持科学图像理解性能稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: S1-Omni-Image显著提升了科学图像生成与编辑能力，同时保留了对科学图像的理解能力。开源了模型权重、推理代码和SciGenEdit-10K数据集。未来可扩展至更多科学领域任务。

title: ReM-MoA: Reasoning Memory Sustains Mixture-of-Agents Scaling
abstract: Mixture-of-Agents (MoA) architectures improve inference-time scaling by organizing multiple LLM agents into layered reasoning pipelines. However, existing MoA variants fail to sustain gains as depth increases, exhibiting degradation, early plateauing, or saturation. We propose ReM-MoA, a memory-augmented MoA framework that sustains scaling through two mechanisms: (1) a Ranked Reasoning Memory that persistently stores and ranks reasoning traces from all layers using a comparative Reviewer Agent, and (2) a Curated Diversified Memory Routing scheme that exposes different agents to distinct combinations of successful and failed traces, preserving exploration diversity while propagating high-quality reasoning. We further introduce an optional multi-domain Reviewer distillation pipeline that improves ranking quality through frontier-model supervision. Across five reasoning benchmarks spanning math, formal logic, code, knowledge, and commonsense, ReM-MoA consistently outperforms prior MoA variants across both depth and width scaling, and its advantage widens with depth, establishing structured cross-layer reasoning memory as a key missing mechanism for scalable multi-agent inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReM-MoA，通过排名推理记忆和策划多样化记忆路由机制，使混合智能体架构在深度扩展时持续提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Mixture-of-Agents（MoA）架构在增加深度时会出现性能退化、早期平台期或饱和，无法持续提升推理能力。这限制了多智能体推理的可扩展性，亟需一种能保持深度扩展增益的机制。
light_analysis.method: ReM-MoA包含两个核心机制：(1) Ranked Reasoning Memory，通过比较审阅者代理持久存储并排名所有层的推理轨迹；(2) Curated Diversified Memory Routing，向不同智能体展示成功与失败轨迹的不同组合，保持探索多样性并传播高质量推理。还引入可选的多领域审阅者蒸馏流程，利用前沿模型提升排名质量。
light_analysis.result: 在数学、形式逻辑、代码、知识和常识五个推理基准上，ReM-MoA在深度和宽度扩展上均一致优于现有MoA变体，且优势随深度增加而扩大，证明了结构化跨层推理记忆的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReM-MoA建立了结构化跨层推理记忆作为可扩展多智能体推理的关键机制，弥补了现有MoA的不足，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的记忆路由策略。

title: MedPCFM: Improving Medical Point Cloud Completion by Integrating Point Transformers and Flow Matching
abstract: Medical point cloud completion is important for anatomical reconstruction and downstream clinical workflows, yet generative modeling in this setting remains insufficiently studied. We investigate completion through continuous-time generative modeling and introduce PCFM, a PTv3-backed flow matching approach for medical point cloud completion. We evaluate on SkullFix and SkullBreak, and additionally on the more recent Mandibular Defect dataset. We build strong baselines by adapting PTv3 to a deterministic encoder-decoder completion model and by instantiating diffusion completion (PCDiff) with both PVCNN and PTv3 denoisers. PCFM with PTv3 is competitive with the deterministic PTv3 baseline and achieves state-of-the-art generative performance across datasets, while requiring substantially fewer sampling steps than diffusion. At the best operating points, PTv3 also yields clear throughput gains, providing up to a 7$\times$ speed-up for PCFM compared to a PVCNN backbone. Finally, we study empirical scaling trends by varying model size and point cardinality, showing consistent gains with higher point resolution and informative trade-offs across model scales.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于点变换器和流匹配的医学点云补全方法PCFM，实现高效生成式补全。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学点云补全对解剖重建和临床工作流重要，但生成式建模研究不足。现有方法如扩散模型需要大量采样步骤，效率低。该方法引入连续时间生成建模，旨在提升生成质量和效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出PCFM方法，采用PTv3（Point Transformer v3）作为骨干网络，结合流匹配进行点云生成式补全。构建了确定性编码器-解码器基线以及基于PVCNN和PTv3去噪器的扩散补全（PCDiff）基线。在SkullFix、SkullBreak和Mandibular Defect数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: PCFM与确定性PTv3基线相当，实现了跨数据集的生成性能最先进，所需采样步骤远少于扩散。最优操作点下，PTv3相比PVCNN骨干实现高达7倍加速。缩放实验显示更高点分辨率带来一致增益，模型尺度间存在信息量权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了流匹配在医学点云补全中的有效性，特别是结合PTv3实现高效生成。学术上推动点云生成建模，实际应用有望加速解剖重建。未来可能探索更大模型和更多任务。

title: Transformation Behavior of Images in Latent Space
abstract: Training of neural networks for histopathology classification tasks typically relies on data encoding into latent space, which reduces complexity and improves performance.
