There are several encoder networks available, either pretrained on general image datasets such as ImageNET, or specifically on histopathological images. Training of encoder networks should be adapted to downstream tasks, allowing encoding of biologic/diagnostic content while rendering networks invariant to label-irrelevant transformations.   This paper investigates the effect of classical image transformation on the latent space, using networks provided by Lunit Inc. and Bioptimus, both focusing on pathological images, and by Meta Research Team. We assess variance of embeddings resulting from standard data transformations by comparing original and transformed image embeddings and by contrasting them with random, unrelated embeddings, using image tiles from hematoxylin/eosin-stained sections available in a colorectal tissue dataset and the publicly accessible TCGA dataset.   Our findings show that embeddings of original and transformed images are closer to each other than to random embeddings, indicating robustness to transformations. However, they are not fully invariant, revealing that the encoder networks do not completely neutralize transformation effects in latent space, explaining why transformation-mediated augmentation of datasets can improve performance. Significant differences were observed between general and histopathology-specific encoder networks.

light_analysis.overview: 研究病理图像编码器在潜在空间中对经典图像变换的鲁棒性，发现变换后嵌入虽接近但非完全不变。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练神经网络进行组织病理学分类通常依赖潜在空间编码，现有编码器需适应下游任务，编码生物/诊断内容并对抗标签无关变换。然而，变换对潜在空间的具体影响尚不明确，理解这一行为有助于改进编码器设计和数据增强策略。
light_analysis.method: 使用Lunit Inc.、Bioptimus（病理专用）和Meta Research（通用）的编码器，对H&E染色图像施加标准数据变换（如旋转、缩放等），通过比较原始与变换后嵌入的欧氏距离，并与随机无关嵌入对比，评估嵌入方差。数据集包括结直肠组织数据集和TCGA公共数据集。
light_analysis.result: 原始和变换图像的嵌入距离显著小于随机嵌入，表明编码器对变换具有鲁棒性，但并非完全不变。变换后嵌入的差异解释了为何数据增强能提升模型性能。通用编码器（如Meta）与病理专用编码器在变换鲁棒性上存在显著差异，专用编码器对变换更敏感。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了潜在空间中图像变换的行为，证明当前编码器未完全中和变换效应，为数据增强的有效性提供了理论解释。研究强调了编码器选择对下游任务的重要性，未来可针对特定变换优化编码器以实现完全不变性。

title: Escaping the Self-Confirmation Trap: An Execute-Distill-Verify Paradigm for Agentic Experience Learning
abstract: Experience-driven self-evolution is critical for large language model (LLM) agents to improve through open-world interaction. However, existing experience learning methods mostly rely on single-agent loops, where the same agent executes tasks, summarizes outcomes, and determines memory content. This setup makes agents vulnerable to the Self-Confirmation Trap: wrong-but-self-consistent trajectories are misidentified as successful experience, leading to cumulative errors during retrieval and reuse. To address this issue, we propose EDV, an Execute-Distill-Verify framework for reliable experience learning. In the Execute stage, multiple heterogeneous agents explore the same task space in parallel to generate diverse candidate trajectories. In the Distill stage, a dedicated third-party agent comparatively analyzes these trajectories to produce candidate experiences, reducing executor-centric summarization bias. In the Verify stage, the execution group validates candidates via a consensus mechanism, and only approved experiences are written into shared or private memory. By decoupling the three stages, EDV transforms experience learning from isolated self-reflection into collaborative construction, filtering erroneous and noisy content before memory insertion. We evaluate EDV on three challenging long-horizon benchmarks: tau2-bench, Mind2Web and MMTB. Results show EDV consistently outperforms strong baselines, validating that reliable experience construction is essential for robust agent self-evolution. Our code is available at https://github.com/shidingz/EDV.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EDV框架，通过执行-蒸馏-验证三步范式解决LLM代理经验学习中的自我确认陷阱问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有经验学习方法多依赖单代理循环，同一代理执行、总结和决定记忆内容，导致代理易陷入“自我确认陷阱”：错误但自洽的轨迹被误认为成功经验，在检索和复用中累积错误。这阻碍了LLM代理通过开放世界交互进行鲁棒的自我进化，亟需更可靠的协作式经验学习机制。
light_analysis.method: EDV框架包含三个阶段：执行阶段，多个异构代理并行探索同一任务空间生成多样轨迹；蒸馏阶段，专用第三方代理比较分析这些轨迹产生候选经验，减少以执行为中心的总结偏差；验证阶段，执行组通过共识机制验证候选，仅批准的经验写入共享或私有记忆。通过解耦三阶段，EDV将经验学习从孤立自我反思转变为协作构建，在记忆插入前过滤错误和噪声内容。
light_analysis.result: 在三个长程基准（tau2-bench、Mind2Web、MMTB）上评估，EDV一致优于强基线方法。结果验证了可靠经验构建对鲁棒代理自我进化至关重要，有效缓解了自我确认陷阱带来的累积误差，提升了任务成功率。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: EDV通过多代理协作和验证机制，解决了单代理自我确认陷阱问题，实现了更可靠的经验学习。该工作具有重要学术价值，为LLM代理自我进化提供了新范式；实际应用中可提升智能体在复杂开放环境中的适应性和稳定性。未来可探索更高效的共识机制或动态代理编排。

title: EgoSAT: A Comprehensive Benchmark of Egocentric Streaming Interaction Understanding
abstract: We introduce EgoSAT, the first comprehensive benchmark for egocentric video reasoning in streaming settings, designed to evaluate the capabilities of modern vision-language models (VLMs). The benchmark targets streaming interaction understanding, where video frames arrive sequentially and models must continuously interpret evolving visual context. EgoSAT unifies several previously distinct tasks within a single streaming framework. In this formulation, queries about completed events correspond to retrospective reasoning, queries about ongoing activities require online understanding, and queries about future actions involve prospective anticipation. This unified setting requires models to reason about the past, present, and future while operating under the constraint that only previously observed frames are available. EgoSAT contains 1,997 unique videos spanning 165 hours of egocentric footage and around 4,800 high-quality question-answer pairs, carefully designed to probe reasoning across varying temporal contexts. Using this benchmark, we evaluate a diverse set of both open-weight and closed-weight VLMs, providing a systematic assessment of their ability for streaming interaction understanding. By distinguishing answerability and conducting diagnostics on confidence of models, we find existing models not only struggle with prospective and retrospective modeling, but also exhibit severe mis-calibration: confidence often fails to track inherent answerability, leading to dangerous "confidently wrong" behaviors. Project page: https://leiyj23.github.io/EgoSAT/
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://leiyj23.github.io/EgoSAT/

light_analysis.overview: 首个面向流式第一人称视频推理的综合基准，评估视觉语言模型在连续帧下的过去、现在和未来推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频推理基准多假设一次性获取全部帧，无法评估模型在流式场景中的在线推理能力。实际应用如机器人导航、AR/VR需模型随帧到达实时理解动态上下文。缺乏统一框架同时评估回顾、在线和前瞻推理。EgoSAT填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: EgoSAT包含1997个视频和4800个QA对，统一了回顾、在线和前瞻三种推理任务。视频帧按流式到达，模型仅可访问历史帧。评估多种开源和闭源视觉语言模型，区分答案性并分析置信度校准。
light_analysis.result: 现有模型在前瞻和回顾推理上表现不佳，且置信度严重失准：高置信度预测常对应错误答案，导致“自信错误”行为。答案性诊断显示模型难以区分可回答与不可回答问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: EgoSAT揭示了流式视频理解的挑战，特别是时间推理和校准问题。为未来研究提供了标准评估平台，推动视觉语言模型朝着更可靠、实时交互的方向发展。

title: Can Aggregate Invariants Accelerate Continuous Subgraph Matching? Limits, Laws, and a Dynamic Spectral Index
abstract: Spectral filtering recently delivered substantial pruning for \emph{static} subgraph matching: Laplacian interlacing rejects candidates whose neighborhoods cannot host the query. We study whether such aggregate structural tests can accelerate \emph{continuous} subgraph matching (CSM) over dynamic graphs, and answer in three parts. First, lazily maintained spectral bounds are infeasible exactly where spectral pruning has value: we characterize the tightest safe rule over a formalized perturbation relaxation and show that even it loses essentially all pruning power within four touching updates. Second, exact maintenance is affordable when selective: pruning utility and recomputation cost are anti-correlated across vertices -- hubs provably never prune -- so recomputing small-neighborhood spectra on touch sustains exact local spectra at microseconds per update, complete by construction. Third, integrated into a decoupled CSM benchmark against an identical-minus-spectra control, the tests remove up to $51\%$ of candidates or safely skip up to $47\%$ of update enumerations, yet enumeration intermediates remain unchanged -- beyond the gates' skipped first-level bindings, typically zero -- across two engines, four real graphs, two stream types, and $77$ solved queries; a constructed radius-stratified workload confirms the instrument detects the exception when one exists ($-99.9\%$ intermediates, $748\times$ faster). Aggregate tests accelerate what scales with candidate sets -- construction, list scans -- never adjacency-guided exploration. We distill an intermediate-invariance methodology for evaluating CSM filters and release a reusable dynamic local-spectra index.

light_analysis.overview: 谱滤波可加速连续子图匹配中候选集相关操作，但中间体枚举基本不变，提出动态局部谱索引。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续子图匹配（CSM）在动态图中面临大量候选和更新枚举，现有谱滤波在静态子图匹配中有效，但在动态场景下惰性维护不可行，精确维护成本高。研究需明确谱滤波在CSM中的修剪能力及其适用边界，以指导加速策略设计。
light_analysis.method: 首先理论分析惰性维护的极限，发现其剪枝能力在四次更新后几乎丧失。然后提出精确维护策略：利用剪枝效用与重算成本的反相关性（枢纽点永不剪枝），仅重算小邻域谱，实现微秒级更新。将谱滤波集成到解耦CSM基准中，通过去除谱滤波的对照实验评估效果，并构建半径分层工作负载以检测异常情况。
light_analysis.result: 谱滤波最多移除51%的候选或安全跳过47%的更新枚举，但枚举中间体在几乎所有测试中保持不变（仅跳过第一层绑定）。在极端异常情况下，中间体减少99.9%，加速748倍。实验覆盖两组引擎、四个真实图、两种流类型和77个查询，证明结果一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 谱滤波仅加速与候选集规模相关的操作（如构建、列表扫描），不影响邻域引导的枚举。提出了中间体不变性方法论用于评估CSM滤波器，并发布了可复用的动态局部谱索引。该工作为动态图上的谱方法提供了理论界限和实用工具，但未改变枚举主导的复杂度。

title: Beyond Logprobs: A Multi-Signal Confidence Engine for LLM-Based Document Field Extraction
abstract: In high-stakes document processing pipelines, including financial reconciliation, compliance verification, and procurement automation, an LLM extraction that is silently wrong is more dangerous than one that is visibly absent. The central challenge is not extraction accuracy alone but reliable confidence estimation: knowing, field by field, whether an extraction can be trusted for automation or deferred to human review. Token-level log-probabilities, verbalized confidence, and multi-sample self-consistency all collapse toward all-positive behaviour at practical thresholds, offering no reliable separation between trustworthy and untrustworthy extractions.   We present ExtractConf, a cross-domain, field-agnostic confidence engine that grounds confidence estimation in two structurally different readings of the same document. A field-guided Hunter call extracts each field under schema-slot completion pressure; a document-guided Mapper call scans holistically and surfaces values grounded in document content. This asymmetry yields different failure modes: Hunter hallucinates values for absent fields, while Mapper misses visually non-salient ones. Their disagreement is independently informative. ExtractConf fuses cross-call disagreement, LLM-internal uncertainty, OCR, image quality, and spatial layout into a classifier requiring no domain-specific rules or retraining. On DocILE (55-field invoices, 26% failure rate), it achieves 0.928 ROC AUC and reduces selective prediction risk by 70% over logprob-mean. At 80% coverage, accuracy reaches 99.1%, enabling a practical human-in-the-loop workflow. Zero-shot transfer to CORD receipts achieves 0.858 AUC; lightweight Lasso recalibration reduces ECE by 89% and Brier by 43%, confirming the signals generalise across document domains.
comment: Extended version of a paper accepted (Oral) at the RobustifAI Workshop, IJCAI-ECAI 2026, Bremen, Germany. 9 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多信号融合的置信度引擎ExtractConf，用于LLM文档字段提取的可靠置信估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高风险文档处理中，LLM提取的静默错误比明显缺失更危险。现有方法如token级log概率、口头置信度、多样本自一致性等在实际阈值下都呈现全阳性行为，无法可靠区分可信与不可信提取，亟需一种跨域、不受字段限制的置信估计方案。
light_analysis.method: ExtractConf采用两种结构不同的读取方式：字段引导的Hunter调用（在模式槽完成压力下提取）和文档引导的Mapper调用（整体扫描并基于文档内容提取）。两者的不对称性导致不同失败模式（Hunter为缺失字段产生幻觉，Mapper遗漏视觉非显著值），其分歧具有信息量。融合跨调用分歧、LLM内部不确定性、OCR、图像质量和空间布局，无需领域规则或重新训练。
light_analysis.result: 在DocILE数据集（55字段发票，26%失败率）上，AUC达0.928，选择性预测风险较logprob均值降低70%。80%覆盖率下准确率达99.1%。零样本迁移到CORD收据AUC为0.858；轻量Lasso重新校准使ECE降低89%，Brier降低43%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种跨域、与字段无关的置信度引擎，通过不对称双阅读策略实现可靠置信估计，显著提升文档字段提取的选择性预测性能，支持实际人类-在环工作流。摘要未明确说明局限性，但可能依赖OCR与图像质量。

title: Data Augmentation: A Fourier Analysis Perspective
abstract: Data augmentation is a simple and model-agnostic approach for exploiting known invariances in learning problems. Given a group acting on the input space, one augments the training set with transformed copies of each sample. Because it exploits symmetries without modifying the underlying learning algorithm, data augmentation can be applied broadly across learning methods. However, this universality comes at a computational cost: when the group is large, full group-sized augmentation quickly becomes computationally infeasible. This raises a fundamental question: Can partial data augmentation achieve the same statistical benefits as full augmentation in terms of generalization and sample complexity? We develop a general framework for investigating this question using Fourier analysis and the representation theory of finite groups. We show that, for a broad class of classical learning problems, partial data augmentation based on a randomly sampled subset of group elements achieves the same minimax rates as full augmentation, up to an approximation error that vanishes as the subset size increases. Our results provide a theoretical explanation for why partial augmentation can retain the statistical benefits of full augmentation despite enforcing symmetry only approximately, and shed light on a recently raised question in learning with symmetries: whether statistically optimal learning under general group invariances can be achieved using computationally scalable methods. Moreover, we prove a complementary impossibility result: enforcing exact invariance via data augmentation requires averaging over the entire group, and cannot be achieved by any strict subset when the hypothesis space is sufficiently expressive. Together, these results provide a unified perspective on full and partial data augmentation, as well as exact and approximate symmetry enforcement.

light_analysis.overview: 利用傅里叶分析证明部分数据增强在统计上可等价于完全增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据增强通过利用对称性提升学习性能，但完全增强计算成本高。核心问题是：部分增强能否达到与完全增强相同的泛化能力和样本复杂度？现有方法缺乏理论解释，本研究旨在从傅里叶分析角度提供统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 基于傅里叶分析和有限群表示论，构建部分增强的统计理论框架。考虑输入空间上的群作用，随机采样子集进行增强。证明对于经典学习问题，部分增强的极小化最大速率与完全增强一致，近似误差随子集大小增大而消失。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明：部分增强在统计上可达到与完全增强相同的极小化最大速率，且近似误差可忽略。同时证明：精确对称性必须通过完全群平均实现，无法由严格子集达成。为部分增强的有效性提供理论支持，并解释近似对称性为何可行。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究统一了完全与部分数据增强、精确与近似对称性的理论。揭示了部分增强在计算高效下的统计最优性，为实际应用中的对称性利用提供指导。未来可扩展至非紧群或深度学习场景。

title: Agentic AI for Bilevel Long-Term Optimization of Policy-Driven Physical Layer Systems
abstract: Network operators' changing policies, service requirements, and stringent real-time constraints render existing methods designed with fixed objectives and constraints ineffective. This paper presents Agentic long-term performance optimization (Agentic-LTPO), a nested bilevel optimization framework that can be applied to adaptive physical layer problem configuration. The key idea is to employ agentic AI to generate upper-level configurations in a bilevel optimization structure, where evolving operator policies, environment summaries, and historical experiences are translated into structured lower-level optimization problem configurations. The lower level solves the problems with updated configurations for real-time physical-layer decisions. Considering cell-free MIMO beamforming as a use case, we embody Agentic-LTPO by designing a new multi-agent decision process with retrieval-augmented experience-based verification in the upper level, together with a closed-form beamformer in the lower level. Experiments demonstrate that Agentic-LTPO exhibits strong adaptability to dynamic operator policies and effectively enhances the system's long-term performance by 57.2% compared to traditional methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于智能体AI的嵌套双层优化框架(Agentic-LTPO)，用于策略驱动的物理层系统的长期性能优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 网络运营商不断变化的策略、服务需求和严格的实时约束使得现有针对固定目标和约束设计的方法失效。传统方法难以适应动态策略变化，缺乏长期优化能力，因此需要一种能够自适应调整配置并优化长期性能的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出Agentic-LTPO框架，采用嵌套双层优化结构：上层使用多智能体决策过程，结合检索增强的经验验证来生成配置；下层采用闭式波束成形器解决更新后的低层优化问题。以无小区MIMO波束成形为用例，智能体将运营商策略、环境摘要和历史经验转化为结构化的低层优化问题配置。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Agentic-LTPO对动态运营商策略表现出强适应性，与传统方法相比，系统长期性能提升57.2%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文贡献了一种新颖的智能体AI驱动的双层优化框架，有效解决了策略驱动物理层系统的长期优化问题。学术上展示了AI在通信系统优化中的应用潜力，实际中可提升网络运营的灵活性和性能。未来可探索更复杂的策略和扩展至其他物理层问题。

title: Cycle-Consistent Neural Explanation of Formal Verification Certificates
abstract: Formal verification produces machine-checkable certificates that attest to the satisfaction or violation of temporal properties, yet these certificates remain opaque to non-specialist stakeholders. We propose a cycle-consistent neural architecture that generates faithful natural language explanations of verification certificates. A forward network NN1 maps certificates to explanations, and an inverse network NN2 reconstructs certificates from explanations; a symbolic verifier closes the loop, providing a differentiable faithfulness proxy. A pointer-generator mechanism ensures lexical grounding by copying state names directly from the certificate. We evaluate on 420 test certificates spanning six verification methods (bounded proof, k-induction, inductive invariant, lasso, reachability, witness pair) in both YES and NO verdict variants, drawn from a financial compliance domain with 207 named states. Our trained architecture, combined with a hybrid inference-time routing strategy, achieves 90.0% cycle-verified soundness, surpassing a multi- LLM few-shot baseline (76.1% for the best of 16 LLM combinations across four frontier models) by 13.9 percentage points. The neural model wins on 10 of 12 verdict/kind categories, with three categories reaching 100% soundness. The architecture offers 860x faster inference (185 ms vs. 160 s per certificate for the full multi-LLM baseline), offline operation, deterministic outputs, and zero per-inference cost. These results demonstrate that trained specialization outperforms general-purpose LLM prompting for structured certificate explanation, while eliminating the deployment constraints of cloud-based inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出循环一致性神经架构，结合符号验证器，生成忠实的形式验证证书自然语言解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 形式验证生成机器可检查的证书，但对非专家利益相关者不透明。现有方法缺乏忠实度或效率低下，需可解释性强的自动化解释方法。
light_analysis.method: 前向网络NN1将证书映射为解释，逆向网络NN2从解释重建证书，符号验证器提供可微忠实度代理。采用指针生成机制拷贝状态名，确保词汇基础。在金融合规领域207个状态、6种验证方法上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在420个测试证书上，周期验证可靠性达90.0%，优于多LLM少样本基线（最佳76.1%）13.9个百分点。12个类别中赢10个（3类100%），推理速度860倍（185 ms vs 160 s），离线、确定性、零推理成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 训练的专业化优于通用LLM提示进行结构化证书解释，消除云端推理部署限制。展示循环一致架构在形式验证解释中的有效性和高效性。

title: Natural Identifiers for Privacy and Data Audits in Large Language Models
abstract: Assessing the privacy of large language models (LLMs) presents significant challenges. In particular, most existing methods for auditing differential privacy require the insertion of specially crafted canary data during training, making them impractical for auditing already-trained models without costly retraining. Additionally, dataset inference, which audits whether a suspect dataset was used to train a model, is infeasible without access to a private non-member held-out dataset. Yet, such held-out datasets are often unavailable or difficult to construct for real-world cases since they have to be from the same distribution (IID) as the suspect data. These limitations severely hinder the ability to conduct scalable, post-hoc audits. To enable such audits, this work introduces natural identifiers (NIDs) as a novel solution to the above-mentioned challenges. NIDs are structured random strings, such as cryptographic hashes and shortened URLs, naturally occurring in common LLM training datasets. Their format enables the generation of unlimited additional random strings from the same distribution, which can act as alternative canaries for audits and as same-distribution held-out data for dataset inference. Our evaluation highlights that indeed, using NIDs, we can facilitate post-hoc differential privacy auditing without any retraining and enable dataset inference for any suspect dataset containing NIDs without the need for a private non-member held-out dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自然标识符(NIDs)实现大型语言模型的事后隐私审计和数据集推断，无需重新训练或私有保留数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有隐私审计方法需要训练时插入特殊设计的canary数据或访问同分布的私有非成员数据集，这使得对已训练模型进行事后审计成本高昂且不切实际。同时，数据集推断也需要私有保留数据集，而现实场景中难以获得同分布数据。这些局限性严重阻碍了可扩展的、事后隐私审计的实施。
light_analysis.method: 本文引入自然标识符(NIDs)，即自然出现在常见LLM训练数据集中的结构化随机字符串，如加密哈希和缩短URL。利用其格式可生成无限同分布随机字符串，作为替代canary用于差分隐私审计，以及作为同分布保留数据用于数据集推断，从而避免了重新训练和私有数据集的需求。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估表明，使用NIDs可以成功进行事后差分隐私审计，无需任何重新训练。同时，对于任何包含NIDs的嫌疑数据集，无需私有非成员保留数据集即可完成数据集推断，验证了该方法在隐私审计和数据集推断中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的自然标识符(NIDs)方法解决了现有隐私审计和数据集推断中的可扩展性瓶颈，使得对已训练模型进行隐私评估成为可能，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用意义。未来工作可探索其他类型的自然标识符，并进一步分析其在不同模型和数据集上的鲁棒性。

title: Modality-Aware Out-of-Distribution Detection for Multi-Modal Action Recognition
abstract: The incorporation of additional modalities into action recognition models increases their performance across a wide range of settings. However, how this additional information can contribute to making the models more robust remains underexplored, particularly for the case of multi-modal out-of-distribution (OOD) detection. While methods exist that regularize the multi-modal training process with OOD detection in mind, they still apply off-the-shelf OOD detectors designed for the uni-modal case during inference, discarding important information. Based on an interesting relationship we find between the multi-modal and uni-modal predictions, we propose to use this signal to build a post-hoc detector explicitly designed for the multi-modal scenario. We combine this new source of information with a feature-space score, which detects off-manifold samples in the multi-modal space, and normalize them by the multi-modal logits. In doing so, the proposed hybrid detector is compatible with existing training-time approaches and consistently improves performance. Experiments on a wide range of established datasets from the MultiOOD benchmark show that, on average, our approach outperforms the state of the art. Our results show the importance of explicitly considering the different modalities at inference time for multi-modal OOD detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种面向多模态动作识别的模态感知分布外检测方法，通过结合模态间预测关系与特征空间分数，实现事后检测并持续提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法虽然在多模态训练时考虑了OOD检测，但在推理阶段仍使用针对单模态设计的现成OOD检测器，忽略了多模态间的重要交互信息。多模态信息如何提升模型鲁棒性（特别是OOD检测）尚待探索。本文旨在利用多模态与单模态预测之间的有趣关系，设计一种专门针对多模态场景的事后检测器，以弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一种混合检测器，主要利用多模态与单模态预测之间的关系作为一个新的信号源。同时，结合特征空间分数来检测多模态空间中的离流形样本，并通过多模态logits进行归一化。该方法与现有的训练时方法兼容，无需重新训练模型，仅作为事后模块。实验在MultiOOD基准的多个数据集上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在MultiOOD基准的多个数据集上，所提方法平均性能优于现有最先进方法。具体而言，通过显式考虑推理时的不同模态信息，该方法在OOD检测的AUC、FPR等指标上均取得提升。与基线方法相比，该混合检测器持续改进性能，表明其有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了在多模态OOD检测中，推理时显式考虑模态信息的重要性。提出的混合检测器结合了模态间预测关系与特征空间分数，是简单有效的事后方法。该工作为多模态鲁棒性研究提供了新思路，但未提及局限性或未来方向。

title: Parallel Manifold Steering: Efficient Adaptation of Large Associative Memories via Residual Energy Shaping
abstract: Large Transformer models function as Dense Associative Memories (DAMs), retrieving knowledge via high-dimensional attractor dynamics driven by the self-attention mechanism \citep{ramsauer2020hopfield, wu2024attention}. However, adapting these frozen memory systems to new tasks presents a fundamental ``Plasticity-Stability'' dilemma. Current methods either risk catastrophic interference by modifying synaptic weights directly (e.g., LoRA) \citep{hu2021lora} or degrade associative capacity by clogging the retrieval buffer with static prompt tokens (e.g., VPT) \citep{jia2022vpt}. In this work, we propose \textbf{H-Res} (Hierarchical Residual Steering), a mechanism that modulates the effective energy landscape of the Transformer without altering its global equilibrium or expanding its sequence length. By formulating adaptation as a control problem on the activation manifold \citep{chen2018neuralode}, H-Res learns a state-dependent vector field that steers token trajectories into task-specific basins of attraction. We formally prove that H-Res preserves the attention entropy of the foundation model and facilitates Neural Collapse \citep{papyan2020prevalence}. Empirically, Manifold Steering outperforms global weight modification by 26\% on associative retrieval tasks and eliminates the computational overhead of prompt-based methods, scaling effectively to structured domains \citep{zha2023vtab}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出H-Res方法，通过残差能量塑形在不改变Transformer全局平衡或扩展序列长度的情况下，高效适应大型关联记忆。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型Transformer作为密集关联记忆，通过自注意力的高维吸引子动态检索知识。然而，将这些冻结的记忆系统适应新任务面临可塑性-稳定性困境。现有方法如直接修改权重（LoRA）存在灾难性干扰风险，而静态提示令牌（VPT）会降低关联容量。因此需要一种既能保持原始记忆稳定性又能高效适应新任务的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出层次残差塑形（H-Res），将适应问题建模为激活流形上的控制问题。通过学习一个状态依赖的向量场，将令牌轨迹引导至任务特定的吸引子盆地，从而调节Transformer的有效能量景观。理论上证明H-Res保持基础模型的注意力熵，并促进神经崩溃现象。方法无需修改权重或扩展序列长度。
light_analysis.result: 在关联检索任务上，Manifold Steering相比全局权重修改方法性能提升26%，并消除了基于提示方法的计算开销。在结构化领域也展现出良好的扩展性。实验验证了方法的有效性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: H-Res为大型关联记忆的适应提供了一种原则性方法，在不影响原始记忆能力的前提下实现高效迁移。具有重要的学术价值，可应用于需要快速适应新任务的场景，如持续学习和微调。未来可探索更复杂的流形控制策略和理论分析。

title: ATRIA: Adaptive Traceable ECG Reporting with Iterative Agents
abstract: Existing ECG report generation is tightly coupled -- interpretation and reporting fused end-to-end, so errors propagate without stage-level recourse -- while agent-based systems decouple tasks but remain single-pass, never revisiting earlier outputs. Clinical ECG reporting instead unfolds iteratively, requiring progressive context integration and bidirectional editing. We present \textsc{ATRIA}, a multi-agent ECG reporting system that mirrors the clinician's iterative workflow: it binds every report claim to its supporting evidence, flags statements unsupported by that evidence, incorporates additional context mid-session, and lets clinicians verify and revise individual findings rather than accept one opaque output. Because its agents use ECG analysis models already in clinical use, the underlying findings are clinically trustworthy; and as a cloud-based web service, \textsc{ATRIA} is ready for immediate deployment. We demonstrate \textsc{ATRIA} through four interaction cases, with a live demo and video available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ATRIA，一种多智能体ECG报告系统，通过迭代式证据绑定与交互编辑，模拟临床医生的迭代工作流。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有ECG报告生成方法存在端到端耦合问题，错误会逐级传播而无法在阶段层面纠正；虽然基于智能体的系统解耦了任务，但仍是单次通过，不会回顾之前的输出。临床ECG报告实际上需要迭代式上下文整合和双向编辑，现有方法不能满足这一需求。
light_analysis.method: ATRIA采用多智能体架构，将每个报告声明绑定到支持证据，标记缺乏证据支持的语句，允许在会话中融入额外上下文，并使临床医生能够验证和修改单个发现，而非接受单一不透明输出。系统使用的ECG分析模型已在临床实践中部署，确保了底层发现的可信度；作为基于云的Web服务，可立即部署。
light_analysis.result: 通过四个交互案例展示了ATRIA的功能，并提供了现场演示和视频。摘要未明确报告定量性能指标，但强调了系统的临床可信度和部署就绪性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ATRIA通过迭代式、可追踪的多智能体设计，有效模仿了临床工作流程，提高了ECG报告的可解释性和可靠性。其临床实用性和即时部署能力表明该研究具有重要的实际应用价值；未来可探索更广泛的心电图分析场景及与其他医疗记录的集成。

title: Age of LLM: A Strategic 1v1 Benchmark for Reasoning, Diplomacy and Reliability of Large Language Models under Fog of War
abstract: We introduce Age of LLM, a turn-based 1v1 benchmark in which two LLMs face off on a 13x7 grid to destroy the enemy base. Three stressors are deliberate: fog of war, full diplomacy (messages, ceasefires, ultimatums; uranium kept secret), and a reliability dimension where every turn must follow a strict JSON schema and an illegal action is silently discarded. The engine is private and each match uses a fresh random map seed and opponent, mitigating the data contamination that affects public benchmarks. Models receive a (near) rule-only prompt with no build-order advice (two tactical seed phrases were present during data collection; see Section 2.7). We benchmark 15 reasoning models across 54 matches and 5,258 actions. Findings: (1) the nuclear rush dominates (78% on the rules-coherent v0.11+ sub-corpus; 85% corpus-wide) with a sole-launcher signature that is largely mechanical under secret-simultaneous launch rules, not a cognitive deterrence failure; (2) military conquest is rare but faster (12.3 vs 18.9 turns); (3) diplomacy is prolific yet almost never consummated; (4) ~58% of illegal actions are fog/state errors, making the illegal-action rate a measure of belief-tracking; (5) -- the least established, and the only one we label exploratory -- a weak link associates reliability with winning. The corpus is small, unbalanced and not side-swapped, so the ranking is a preliminary descriptive view, not a contribution. Beyond ranking, the turn-by-turn traces of actions and messages make the corpus a lens on how LLMs reason under adversarial uncertainty -- their belief-tracking, spontaneous deception, and per-model cognitive "personas" -- which we frame as a future research direction. We release the replay format, an isometric viewer and all replays; engine source on request.
comment: 25 pages including appendices, 8 figures, 4 tables; appendices include verbatim system prompt and engine resolution pseudocode. All correlations reported with p-values, 95% bootstrap confidence intervals and Spearman's rho; includes a Steiger test and Bradley-Terry fit

light_analysis.overview: 提出Age of LLM基准，在战争迷雾下通过1v1策略游戏评估LLM的推理、外交和可靠性，发现核rush主导、外交无效、可靠性弱相关获胜等结论。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM基准多依赖静态数据集，易受数据污染，且缺乏对推理、外交和可靠性在动态对抗环境下的综合评估。战争迷雾、完全外交和严格JSON格式的可靠性维度模拟了真实不确定性，现有方法无法有效测试LLM在这些压力下的表现。该研究旨在填补这一空白，提供更贴近实际应用的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 设计13x7网格的回合制1v1策略游戏，两名LLM对战，目标摧毁敌方基地。引入三个压力源：战争迷雾、完全外交（消息、停火、最后通牒，铀保密）、可靠性（每回合必须符合严格JSON模式，非法动作静默丢弃）。引擎私密，每局使用随机地图和对手，缓解数据污染。模型仅接收规则提示，无建造建议。对15个推理模型进行54局比赛和5258个动作分析。
light_analysis.result: 核rush策略主导（规则一致子语料库78%，全语料库85%），其单发射器特征主要源于机械规则而非认知失败；军事征服罕见但更快（12.3回合 vs 18.9回合）；外交频繁但几乎从不达成；约58%的非法动作是战争迷雾/状态错误，因此非法动作率可作为信念追踪度量；发现可靠性弱关联获胜（探索性发现）。语料库小、不平衡且未交换阵营，排名仅为初步描述。
light_analysis.conclusion: Age of LLM基准揭示了LLM在对抗不确定性下的推理、信念追踪、自发欺骗及认知人格差异。它提供了逐回合动作和消息轨迹，作为研究LLM在对抗环境中行为的透镜。未来方向包括扩展语料库、交换阵营、探索可靠性与获胜的因果联系。基准发布回放格式、等距查看器和所有回放，引擎源代码可申请。

title: PHANTOM: A Large-Scale Dataset of Multimodal Adversarial Attacks for Vision-Language Models
abstract: We introduce a large-scale, open-source dataset of pre-generated adversarial attacks for vision-language models (VLMs). The dataset is designed to be diverse, representative, and practical, extending existing benchmarks by covering 10 high-level categories and 55 subcategories of harmful intents. Our primary goal is to make adversarial data accessible to the research community, given the computational cost and complexity of generating large numbers of attacks. The dataset comprises 47 524 adversarial samples, generated using state-of-the-art attack strategies from recent literature. Our work complements existing efforts by consolidating and extending prior benchmarks from multiple established sources, resulting in 7 826 intents, and introduce an additional category to broaden coverage. This provides realistic evaluation resources for studying model robustness and alignment. Our dataset intends to enable researchers and practitioners to systematically evaluate the robustness and safety of VLMs, fine-tune attack-generation models, and develop or stress-test defensive guardrails under diverse adversarial conditions. By releasing this resource, we aim to lower the barrier to adversarial research and foster more reproducible, comprehensive, and comparable evaluations of VLM safety.
comment: The dataset has been released at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/it4lia/PHANTOM

light_analysis.overview: 本文发布了PHANTOM，一个大规模开源的多模态对抗攻击数据集，用于系统评估视觉语言模型的安全性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型容易受到多模态对抗攻击，但现有基准数据集覆盖不足且生成攻击计算成本高。研究者需要多样化、可复现的对抗样本以评估模型鲁棒性和对齐安全性，但缺乏统一的开源资源。本文旨在通过提供包含47,524个样本、覆盖10大类55子类有害意图的数据集，降低研究门槛，促进标准化和可比较的评估。
light_analysis.method: 数据集包含47,524个对抗样本，基于最新攻击策略生成，覆盖10个高级类别和55个子类的有害意图。通过整合和扩展多个现有基准，得到7,826种意图，并引入新类别以扩大覆盖范围。该数据集兼顾多样性和实用性，支持VLM鲁棒性评估、攻击模型微调和防御机制测试。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体性能指标，但强调数据集规模大（47,524样本）、类别覆盖广（10大类55子类）。通过整合现有基准并扩展，得到7,826种意图，为研究模型鲁棒性和对齐提供了现实评估资源。该数据集有望推动更全面、可重复的VLM安全研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: PHANTOM填补了多模态对抗攻击数据集的空白，通过开源降低研究门槛，促进VLM安全评估的标准化和可重复性。该数据集可用于模型鲁棒性基准测试、攻击生成模型微调及防御机制压力测试，具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可进一步扩展覆盖更多攻击类型和场景。

title: AutoSpecNER: A Fine-Grained Named Entity Recognition Dataset for Vehicle Specification Extraction
abstract: Vehicle advertisements contain rich specification information, but automotive NER resources remain limited. We introduce AutoSpecNER, an expert-annotated dataset for fine-grained entity recognition in vehicle listings. The dataset includes 659 advertisements from a popular car-selling website, with over 10,000 entities annotated across 15 categories, including MODEL, ENGINE_SPEC, and BATTERY_CAPACITY. Annotation quality was validated through inter-annotator agreement, achieving an average score of 91.5%. We benchmark rule-based extraction, fine-tuned transformer encoders, and large language models. DeBERTa achieves the best performance with a 90% micro-F1 score, outperforming the rule-based baseline (43%) and the strongest large language model (77.8%).

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个面向车辆规格提取的细粒度命名实体识别数据集AutoSpecNER，并评估多种方法，DeBERTa达到最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 车辆广告包含丰富的规格信息，但现有的汽车领域命名实体识别资源非常有限。传统方法依赖规则或粗粒度标注，无法满足细粒度实体（如型号、发动机规格、电池容量等）的提取需求。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过构建高质量数据集推动该领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 从流行汽车销售网站收集659条广告，由专家标注超过10,000个实体，涵盖15个细粒度类别（如MODEL、ENGINE_SPEC、BATTERY_CAPACITY）。通过计算标注者间一致性（平均91.5%）验证质量。基准测试包括基于规则的方法、微调Transformer编码器（如DeBERTa）和大语言模型（如GPT等）。
light_analysis.result: DeBERTa取得最佳性能，微F1分数为90%，远超基于规则的基线（43%）和最强的大语言模型（77.8%）。数据集标注质量高（一致性91.5%），为汽车规格提取提供了有效的评估基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoSpecNER数据集填补了汽车领域细粒度NER资源的空白，验证了DeBERTa在此任务上的优越性。该数据集可支持车辆信息自动提取、广告分析等应用。未来可扩展更多车辆类别或结合多模态信息。

title: On the Stability of Prompt Ranking in Large Language Model Evaluation
abstract: Prompt-based interaction has become a dominant paradigm for using large language models (LLMs), where multiple candidate prompts are evaluated and the top-ranked one is selected for downstream use. This workflow implicitly assumes that prompt rankings are stable under minor variations in evaluation conditions. In this paper, we systematically study prompt ranking stability under common sources of variability, including random seeds and limited evaluation subsets. Across three open-weight LLMs and two benchmark tasks, we find that while overall rank correlations are often moderate to high, the identity of the top-performing prompt frequently changes, leading to unreliable selection decisions. To address this issue, we propose a simple stability-aware selection strategy based on a lower confidence bound, which accounts for both performance and variance. Our results show that this approach improves robustness in unstable settings while remaining competitive in more stable regimes. These findings highlight the importance of accounting for evaluation uncertainty in prompt selection and LLM benchmarking.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究LLM评估中提示排名不稳定问题，提出基于置信下界的稳定感知选择策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前使用LLM时，通过评估多个候选提示并选择排名第一的进行下游应用，该流程隐含假设提示排名在评估条件微小变化下保持稳定。然而，实际中这种稳定性未得到验证。本论文研究常见可变因素（如随机种子、有限评估子集）对提示排名稳定性的影响，发现虽然整体排名相关性中等至高，但最佳提示的选取经常变化，导致选择决策不可靠。
light_analysis.method: 论文选取三个开源权重LLM和两个基准任务，系统分析随机种子和评估子集变化对提示排名的影响。发现排名不稳定问题后，提出一种基于置信下界的稳定感知选择策略，同时考虑性能表现和方差，以平衡稳定性和竞争力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，尽管整体排名相关性通常中等至高，但最佳提示的选取频繁变动，影响选择可靠性。提出的稳定感知策略在不稳定设置中提升了鲁棒性，在稳定设置中仍保持竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究强调了在提示选择和LLM基准测试中考虑评估不确定性的重要性。提出的稳定感知策略有效缓解了排名不稳定问题，为可靠部署LLM提供了实用方法。未来可扩展至更多模型和任务。

title: MATCH: Flow Matching for Multi-View Anomaly Detection
abstract: Detecting anomalies in industrial objects is an important topic for increasing production efficiency. More complex objects often require the analysis of several view points, which has led to the field of multi-view anomaly detection. We present MATCH, the first multi-view anomaly detection method based on Flow Matching (FM). With the ODE formulation of Flow Matching, we can estimate likelihoods and thereby derive an anomaly score to detect anomalies in multi-view image data at object, image, and pixel-level. The architectural flexibility of FM models allows us to efficiently transform features of different spatial sizes to the normal distribution. We evaluate thoroughly on the already established Real-IAD data set and are also the first to provide a comprehensive evaluation of popular anomaly detection methods for the MANTA-Tiny data set. MATCH achieves state-of-the-art performance in both anomaly detection and segmentation, all while running on consumer-level hardware. By omitting the costly divergence term needed for likelihood estimation, we ensure that MATCH is usable in real-time production scenarios. Lastly, several ablation studies are conducted to validate the methodological choices.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于Flow Matching的多视角异常检测方法MATCH，实现对象级、图像级和像素级异常检测，达到SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业生产中复杂对象的异常检测需要分析多个视角，现有方法在多视角异常检测方面性能有限。Flow Matching具有灵活的特征变换和似然估计能力，适合处理多视角数据的多样化特征尺寸，但尚未应用于该领域。
light_analysis.method: MATCH利用Flow Matching的ODE公式估计似然，推导异常分数。其架构可高效转换不同空间尺寸的特征到正态分布，无需计算昂贵的散度项，适用于实时场景。在Real-IAD和MANTA-Tiny数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Real-IAD和MANTA-Tiny数据集上，MATCH在异常检测和分割任务中均达到SOTA性能，且可在消费级硬件上实时运行。消融实验验证了方法选择的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MATCH是首个基于Flow Matching的多视角异常检测方法，兼顾性能与效率，适合生产场景。未来可探索更高效的特征变换或扩展到其他数据类型。

title: Structural Kolmogorov-Arnold Convolutions: Learnable Function on the Values or the Filter Shape as Parameter-Efficient Alternative to Per-Edge Convolutional KANs
abstract: Convolutional Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (KANs) replace the fixed weights of a convolutional kernel with learnable univariate functions. The dominant formulation attaches one such function to every kernel entry and lets it act on pixel values, expressive but parameter-heavy and prone to overfitting. We argue that the learnable functions are better placed in the \emph{structure} of the convolution than on each edge, and we organise the design space along a single axis: whether the function acts on the pixel \emph{values} or on the filter \emph{shape}. We study three realisations. SV-KAN applies one shared univariate function to the values and leaves the spatial filter free and static, aa classical convolution with a single learnable shared activation. AG-KAN keeps the shared value function but supplies the spatial structure through a content-adaptive Gaussian gate. RF-KAN instead moves the learnable functions onto the filter shape, building each filter from oriented ridge profiles expanded in a localised oscillatory (Morlet) wavelet basis with content-adaptive amplitudes. Under a matched four-layer protocol with in-run references and three seeds, RF-KAN and SV-KAN reach $88.47\pm0.10\%$ and $88.20\pm0.31\%$ on CIFAR-10 and $64.40\pm0.19\%$ and $64.57\pm0.30\%$ on CIFAR-100, at about $0.4$M parameters. At this matched scale the shape model and the simplest value model meet at the top, both above a plain convolution and every per-edge KAN we tested, including the official Gram variant, at roughly a fifth of the parameters. A controlled study attributes the RF-KAN gain to an intrinsically localised oscillatory basis and to content adaptivity, and an ablation that removes the learned shape entirely, leaving only the shared value function, collapses accuracy by over forty points, identifying the learned shape as the load-bearing ingredient at this scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将可学习函数置于卷积结构而非每个边上的新范式，实现参数高效且性能优于逐边卷积KAN。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有卷积KAN为每个核条目附加可学习函数，虽然表达能力强但参数多、易过拟合。本文认为可学习函数更适合放在卷积的结构中而非每个边上，旨在减少参数同时保持或提升性能，解决现有方法参数效率低和过拟合问题。
light_analysis.method: 沿单一轴组织设计空间：函数作用于像素值或滤波器形状。提出三种实现：SV-KAN（共享值函数+固定滤波器）、AG-KAN（共享值函数+内容自适应高斯门）、RF-KAN（可学习滤波器形状，基于定向脊轮廓和局部振荡Morlet小波基）。在CIFAR-10/100上进行四层协议实验，参数约0.4M。
light_analysis.result: RF-KAN和SV-KAN在CIFAR-10达88.47%和88.20%，CIFAR-100达64.40%和64.57%，参数约0.4M。两者均优于普通卷积和所有逐边KAN（包括官方Gram变体），参数仅为后者的约五分之一。消融实验表明，移除学习形状后准确率下降超40点，证明学习形状是主要贡献因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了将可学习函数置于卷积结构中的有效性，特别是基于形状的RF-KAN在参数效率上显著优于逐边KAN。学术价值在于重新思考卷积KAN的设计空间，实际应用提供了轻量高效替代。局限性：实验仅在CIFAR数据集，未来可扩展到更大规模任务。

title: When Helpfulness Overrides Causal Caution: Context-Dependent Suppression and Recovery in LLMs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into decision-support roles in business and policy contexts. While prior benchmark studies have primarily evaluated LLMs' causal reasoning capabilities, a more fundamental epistemic dimension has been overlooked: Causal Caution, defined as the propensity to refrain from causal judgment when empirical evidence is insufficient. This study examines the systematic suppression of Causal Caution that occurs when LLMs shift from academic to practical advisory contexts. Using an evaluation rubric inspired by Pearl's Causal Hierarchy (the PCH score), we conducted experiments on four high-performance LLMs -- Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Opus 4.7, GPT 5.5, and Gemini 3.1 Pro -- across 480 trials. Causal Caution maintenance rates were 91.7--100.0% in academic contexts but dropped to 6.7--18.3% in practical advisory contexts (Fisher's exact test, p < .001 across all models). Furthermore, when restricted to practical prompts requesting concrete recommendations or explanatory rationales, only 1 of 200 responses (0.5%) maintained Causal Caution. A brief self-correction prompt -- "Please reconsider this judgment from the perspective of causal relationships" -- restored the expression of Causal Caution to maintenance rates of 71.4--100.0% (McNemar's test, p < .001 across all models). These results suggest that helpfulness-oriented response patterns may suppress the expression of Causal Caution in practical advisory contexts, with important implications for organizational governance. The findings indicate that this suppression reflects context-dependent variation in expression rather than an underlying capability limitation, suggesting that multi-agent architectures that separate proposal generation from causal auditing may offer a promising governance design.
comment: 43 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. SSRN Abstract ID: 6965680

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLMs在实践咨询语境中因帮助导向而抑制因果谨慎，但可通过自我纠正提示恢复，提出多智能体架构的治理设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM评估关注因果推理能力，但忽视了更基础的认知维度——因果谨慎，即在证据不足时避免因果判断的倾向。随着LLMs被广泛应用于商业和政策决策支持，缺乏对因果谨慎的系统性研究。本文旨在探究LLMs在不同语境下因果谨慎表现的变化及其机制。
light_analysis.method: 基于Pearl因果层级（PCH）评分设计评估框架，对Claude Sonnet 4.6、Claude Opus 4.7、GPT 5.5和Gemini 3.1 Pro四个模型进行480次试验。比较学术语境与实践咨询语境下的因果谨慎保持率，并测试自我纠正提示（“请从因果关系角度重新考虑”）的恢复效果。
light_analysis.result: 学术语境中因果谨慎保持率为91.7-100%，实践语境骤降至6.7-18.3%（Fisher精确检验，p<.001）。当要求具体建议时，仅0.5%（1/200）保持因果谨慎。自我纠正提示恢复至71.4-100%（McNemar检验，p<.001）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 因果谨慎的抑制反映语境依赖的表达变化，而非能力缺失，这为组织治理提供了新视角。多智能体架构（分离提议生成与因果审计）可能有效缓解该问题。未来需探索更鲁棒的干预措施及实际部署中的影响。

title: Accelerating Disaggregated RL for Visual Generative LLMs with Diffusion-Based Parallelism and Trainer-Assisted Generation
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a dominant post-training paradigm, driving the emergence of high-performance RL systems such as veRL for autoregressive large language models (LLMs). In parallel, diffusion-oriented RL algorithms, e.g., DanceGRPO and FlowGRPO, have rapidly expanded the scope of RL from language reasoning to diffusion-based visual and flow-based generation. However, efficient RL systems for diffusion generative LLMs remain underexplored. Existing implementations, e.g., veRL-Omni, still rely on colocated execution, which simplifies synchronization but couples rollout and training resources, limits heterogeneous deployment, and constrains independent scaling.   To this end, we introduce DigenRL, a disaggregated RL framework for diffusion-based generative LLMs that supports flexible resource allocation, accommodates heterogeneous GPUs, and facilitates efficient task scheduling. To maximally reduce the execution bubbles in the disaggregated architecture, we propose: 1) a generation-axis pipeline (GAP) and time-step parallelism (TSP) in the diffusion architecture to enable finer-grained pipelining between rollout and training; 2) an elastic trainer-assisted generation (TAG) approach to enable the trainer GPU resources to dynamically assist in executing rollout generations; and 3) a tightly one-step constrained asynchronous strategy to further utilize the tail bubble in the pipeline. Extensive experiments are conducted on three hardware testbeds with 16-32 GPUs using HunyuanVideo-13B, Wan2.1-14B, FLUX.1-12B, and QwenImage-20B generative models. Experimental results show that DigenRL achieves 1.56-2.10x throughput improvements over state-of-the-art diffusion RL systems, veRL-Omni and GenRL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DigenRL，一种解耦的强化学习框架，用于扩散生成式大语言模型，通过生成轴流水线和时间步并行实现高效资源调度。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习已成为后训练主流范式，但扩散生成式大语言模型的强化学习系统研究不足。现有实现如veRL-Omni依赖共置执行，将生成和训练资源耦合，限制了异构部署和独立扩展。为支持灵活资源分配和异构GPU，亟需解耦架构。
light_analysis.method: 提出DigenRL解耦框架，包含三项创新：1）生成轴流水线（GAP）和时间步并行（TSP），实现细粒度流水线；2）弹性训练器辅助生成（TAG），动态复用训练GPU资源执行生成；3）紧一步约束异步策略，利用流水线尾气泡。在HunyuanVideo-13B等模型上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在16-32 GPU的三个硬件测试平台上，使用四种扩散生成模型（HunyuanVideo-13B等），DigenRL相比最先进的扩散强化学习系统veRL-Omni和GenRL，吞吐量提升1.56-2.10倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: DigenRL有效解决了扩散生成式大语言模型强化学习系统的资源耦合问题，实现了1.56-2.10倍的吞吐量提升，支持灵活部署和异构GPU。未来可探索更优的调度策略以进一步减少气泡。

title: MorfFlex: Handling Rich Morphology
abstract: We present MorfFlex, a morphological dictionary architecture suitable for languages with extensive regularity in both inflection and derivation. As the primary example of MorfFlex in use we introduce MorfFlex CZ, a morphological dictionary of Czech. It is distributed as a simple, unstructured list of <wordform, lemma, tag> triplets, however, its manually maintained, unpublished source files and conversion scripts encode a sophisticated system of inflectional and derivational patterns. These patterns dramatically reduce the otherwise enormous size of the dictionary, which currently contains over 100 million wordforms and more than 1 million lemmas. The MorfFlex CZ dictionary serves as an essential resource for ensuring the consistency of manual morphological annotation in the Prague Dependency Treebanks and underpins state-of-the-art automatic tools such as MorphoDiTa. In this paper, we focus on: (i) presenting an effective method for managing the rich morphological system within the dictionary, and (ii) demonstrating the utility of such a language resource for maintaining annotation consistency in corpora and supporting the development of advanced NLP applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MorfFlex形态词典架构，通过编码派生和屈折模式大幅压缩词典规模，支持超过1亿词形和100万词条。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有形态词典难以兼顾丰富的形态变化和紧凑的存储需求，尤其是屈折和派生规律复杂的语言。传统方法要么规模庞大难以维护，要么灵活性不足。MorfFlex旨在通过编码形态模式来显著减小词典体积，同时保持高覆盖率，确保人工标注一致性和支撑高级NLP工具。
light_analysis.method: MorfFlex采用无结构的三元组列表（词形、词元、标签）作为分发格式，但源文件和转换脚本手工编码了复杂的屈折和派生模式。这些模式将规律性形态变化抽象为规则，从而将词典规模从原始体积压缩至可管理大小。以捷克语词典MorfFlex CZ为例，其模式编码支持超过1000万词形和100万词条。
light_analysis.result: MorfFlex CZ当前包含超过1亿词形和100多万词条，但通过模式编码的源文件显著小于原始体积。该词典成功用于保证Prague Dependency Treebanks中手工形态标注的一致性，并支撑了最先进的自动工具MorphoDiTa。摘要未提供具体性能对比数据，但强调了其在真实语料库和NLP应用中的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MorfFlex为处理丰富形态的语言提供了一种有效的词典管理方法，通过模式编码平衡了规模与表达力。它确保了标注一致性并促进了高级NLP应用的发展。未来可能扩展到其他形态丰富的语言，并进一步优化模式编码的自动化程度。

title: SignNet-1M: Large-Scale Multilingual Sign Language Video Dataset with Downstream Benchmarks
abstract: Sign language models are typically trained on datasets captured under constrained conditions, with limited viewpoint, background, and signer-identity diversity, leading to poor robustness under real-world distribution shifts. We introduce SignNet-1M, a large-scale augmented dataset spanning ASL, CSL, and German Sign Language (DGS). SignNet-1M synthesizes realistic variations along three axes: (i) novel-view rendering (rotation and zoom) via 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), (ii) scene/identity editing via diffusion models for background replacement and signer substitution while preserving sign motion and linguistic content, and (iii) post-rendering augmentations that emulate capture and compression artifacts (e.g., pose/temporal perturbations and video-level corruptions) to better match in-the-wild recordings. Beyond data release, we provide a unified benchmark suite across downstream tasks (e.g., translation and recognition) and ablations that isolate each augmentation component. Experiments across backbones show that training with SignNet-1M consistently improves generalization under cross-view, cross-background, cross-identity, and post-rendering shifts, while maintaining strong in-distribution performance. The dataset, full augmentation pipeline, and benchmark are available at https://signnet.chatsign.ai/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出大规模多语言手语视频数据集SignNet-1M，通过三维高斯泼溅、扩散模型和后处理增强合成多样化数据，提升模型在真实场景下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有手语数据集多在受限条件下采集，视角、背景和签名者身份多样性有限，导致模型在真实分布偏移下鲁棒性差。构建大规模多样化训练数据对提升实际应用性能至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 采用三种数据增强方式：1）基于3D高斯泼溅的新颖视角渲染（旋转和缩放）；2）扩散模型进行背景替换和签名者替换，保留手语运动与语言内容；3）后渲染增强模拟采集与压缩伪影。覆盖美国手语（ASL）、中国手语（CSL）和德国手语（DGS）。
light_analysis.result: 在多种骨干网络上，使用SignNet-1M训练一致提升了跨视角、跨背景、跨身份和后渲染偏移下的泛化性能，同时保持强内分布性能。具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了大规模多语言手语数据集及完整增强流水线和基准套件，有助于推动手语模型在真实世界场景中的鲁棒性研究。未来可探索更多语言和更复杂的增强方式。

title: Automatic Part-of-Speech Tagging of Arabic-English Dictionary Senses through WordNet
abstract: This paper proposed an algorithm for part-of-speech (POS) tagging senses of a bilingual dictionary. The algorithm is applied on the Al-Mawrid Arabic-English dictionary. The tagging task is accomplished by transferring the POS tags of the English translation equivalences (TEs) to the dictionary senses after dis-ambiguities process. The English POS tags of senses are acquired from the Princeton WordNet. POS tagging of bilingual dictionary senses is prerequisite to link a bilingual dictionary to WordNet and/or standardizing that dictionary into WordNet-LMF format where the synset (set of synonyms), not word, is the basic brick. The registered accuracy is high though the cost is little. Building NLP/HLT tools needs linguistic experts, large investments, and long time. For statistical approach, we need large annotated corpora and for rule-based approach, we need large lexicon that contains rich linguistic and world knowledge. That motivates the appearance of what are called resource-light approaches to develop natural language processing (NLP) tools for poor-resource languages.
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables, Published in Proceedings of the 15th Conference on Language Engineering, Egyptian Society of Language Engineering (ESOLE'15), Dec., 2015

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级算法，通过WordNet传递英文词性标签，实现双语词典阿拉伯语义项的词性自动标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 构建NLP工具需要语言专家、大量投资和长时间，统计方法依赖大规模标注语料，规则方法依赖丰富词典知识。对于阿拉伯语等资源匮乏语言，这些条件难以满足，需要资源轻量方法。该研究旨在以低成本实现双语词典的词性标注，为词典标准化和连接WordNet奠定基础。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于翻译等价物词性传递的算法。利用Princeton WordNet获取英文翻译等价物的词性标签，经消歧后将其赋给Al-Mawrid阿拉伯语-英语词典的义项。算法不依赖大规模标注语料或复杂规则，仅需双语词典和WordNet，属于资源轻量方法。
light_analysis.result: 在Al-Mawrid词典上应用该算法，注册准确率高，成本低。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调准确率虽高而代价很小。与需要大规模语料或专家知识的传统方法相比，该方法显著降低了资源需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该算法成功实现了双语词典义项的词性自动标注，准确率高且成本低，有助于将双语词典链接到WordNet或标准化为WordNet-LMF格式。对于资源匮乏语言，该资源轻量方法具有重要实用价值，但摘要未讨论局限性或未来工作。

title: Open-Vocabulary BEV Segmentation with 3D-Aware Geometric Constraints
abstract: Bird's-eye view (BEV) perception fuses multi-camera images into a unified top-down representation for autonomous driving. Despite recent progress, state-of-the-art methods remain confined to closed-set scenarios, making them vulnerable to unpredictable real-world environments. In this work, we introduce open-vocabulary BEV segmentation (OVBS), which leverages vision-language models (VLMs) to recognize categories beyond the training set while maintaining precise BEV perception and real-time efficiency. A key challenge in OVBS lies in the 3D geometric inconsistency inherent in the ill-posed lifting of 2D VLM semantics into BEV. To address this, we propose OVBEVSeg, a geometry-aware OVBS framework that enhances efficient Gaussian splatting (GS)-based unprojection by leveraging robust 3D geometric constraints across three progressive stages: (1) 2D-to-BEV pseudo-labeling via reliable 3D projection for OV generalization; (2) joint 2D-BEV per-scene optimization with BEV structural constraints for 3D geometric consistency; and (3) 3D geometric distillation for online efficiency. On the nuScenes dataset, OVBEVSeg achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming closed-set methods by 15.3 mIoU on unseen categories. Remarkably, even with no novel-class ground-truth labels, it remains competitive with self- and semi-supervised baselines trained with up to 40% of ground-truth annotations. Furthermore, it achieves 2.5x faster inference with only 0.22x the memory consumption of projection-based methods. Project page: https://hchoi256.github.io/projects/ovbevseg/.
comment: This paper has been accepted by ECCV 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出开放词汇BEV分割框架OVBEVSeg，通过3D几何约束实现实时高效且可识别未知类别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有BEV感知方法局限于封闭集场景，无法处理真实世界中的未知类别，且将2D视觉语言模型语义提升到BEV时存在3D几何不一致问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于高斯泼溅（GS）的可逆投影，通过三阶段几何约束：2D到BEV伪标签投影、联合2D-BEV场景优化、3D几何蒸馏，在nuScenes数据集上实现开放词汇分割。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes上，对未见类别mIoU比封闭集方法提高15.3；无需真实标签即与使用40%标注的半监督方法相当；推理速度比投影方法快2.5倍，内存仅0.22倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次实现开放词汇BEV分割，兼顾精度与效率，为自动驾驶感知提供新范式，但未提及对动态场景的鲁棒性。

title: MVG-KAN: Multi-View Geo-Wind Guided KAN for PM$_{2.5}$ Forecasting
abstract: Accurate short-term PM$_{2.5}$ forecasting is important for public health protection, air-quality early warning, and urban environmental management. However, PM$_{2.5}$ variation is driven by multiple coupled factors, including stable periodic changes induced by human activities and meteorological regularity, station-specific short-term concentration evolution, and meteorology-driven pollutant dispersion among monitoring stations. Existing spatio-temporal forecasting methods may capture station relationships to some extent, but distance-only, correlation-based, or purely adaptive graphs are often insufficient to comprehensively represent these heterogeneous factors, especially wind-direction-dependent pollutant transport. To address this problem, we propose a Multi-View Geo-Wind Guided KAN model for PM$_{2.5}$ forecasting, named \textbf{MVG-KAN}, which models station-level PM$_{2.5}$ evolution from three complementary views: local periodic regularity, station-wise residual temporal dynamics, and meteorological-environment-guided spatial dispersion. Specifically, the periodic-residual forecasting backbone first separates stable daily and weekly patterns from non-periodic residual variations. A Geo-Wind Graph is constructed by combining geographic distance decay with wind-direction- and wind-speed-aware transport, providing a lightweight physically motivated directed spatial prior for residual propagation among stations. In addition, a temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold network (TKAN) residual head is then introduced to learn station-wise nonlinear autoregressive correction from de-periodized PM$_{2.5}$ residuals and historical multi-pollutant sequences, thereby enhancing the modeling of local residual inertia and pollutant co-variation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种多视角地理-风场引导的KAN模型(MVG-KAN)，通过结合周期性规律、残差动态和气象引导的空间传播，提升PM2.5预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: PM2.5预测对公共健康和环境保护至关重要，但其变化受多种耦合因素驱动，包括人类活动和气象的周期性、站点特异性短期演化以及风驱动污染物迁移。现有时空方法基于距离、相关性或纯自适应图，难以全面表征这些异质因素，特别是风向依赖的污染物传输。需要一种能同时建模周期性、残差动态和气象引导空间扩散的模型。
light_analysis.method: MVG-KAN从三个视角建模：局部周期规律、站点残差时序动态和气象环境引导的空间扩散。首先，周期性-残差预测骨干分离稳定日和周模式与非周期残差。其次，地理-风图结合地理距离衰减和风向/风速感知传输，提供轻量级有向空间先验用于残差传播。最后，时间KAN残差头学习站点非线性自回归校正，增强残差惯性和多污染物协同建模。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标和对比结果，但模型通过多视图融合和物理引导图设计，预期能更准确捕捉PM2.5的时空演化，尤其是在风驱动传输下。实际效果需参考论文实验部分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的MVG-KAN通过多视图建模和物理引导图，有效综合了PM2.5预测中的周期、残差和空间传播因素，为空气质量预警提供新方法。未来可探索更复杂的气象耦合或多尺度图构建。

title: Managing Task Execution for Unknown Workloads in Batteryless IoT: A Hardware-Agnostic Evaluation
abstract: In recent years, the Internet of Things (IoT) paradigm has been shifting toward batteryless, energy-harvesting architectures. Sustaining reliable operation in these systems requires intelligent management of highly volatile stored energy. As edge applications grow in complexity, traditional energy-aware schedulers struggle with unpredictable workloads due to their reliance on static execution thresholds or pre-measured, hardware-specific task profiles. To overcome this, we propose two novel, hardware-agnostic dynamic scheduling strategies treating applications as a "black box," requiring no prior energy information: a model-free Reinforcement Learning (RL) agent and an on-the-fly Approximated Prediction (AP) method. We evaluate these methods against an adaptive task rate approach (AsTAR) and optimized static thresholds using a custom-built, physically accurate simulation framework driven by real-world solar data and dynamic LoRa transmission profiles. Rather than claiming universal superiority, our analysis exposes the distinct operational trade-offs of each method: the AP approach delivers lightweight, near-oracle task throughput; the RL agent provides tunable survival-execution balancing; and AsTAR excels at execution pacing across long energy gaps. Finally, we demonstrate that while these advanced strategies provide critical resilience for severely constrained systems with small capacitors, devices with larger energy buffers can efficiently rely on simpler, less computationally expensive static policies.
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Sustainable Computing

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种硬件无关的动态调度策略（RL和AP），用于电池less IoT系统中未知工作负载的任务管理。
light_analysis.motivation: 电池less IoT系统依赖能量采集，需管理易变能量。传统调度器依赖静态阈值或硬件特定任务剖面，难以应对未知工作负载，因此需要硬件无关的鲁棒调度方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出模型无关的强化学习（RL）智能体和在线近似预测（AP）方法，将应用视为黑盒，无需先验能量信息。使用基于真实太阳能数据和动态LoRa传输剖面的物理精确仿真框架，与自适应任务率方法AsTAR和优化静态阈值进行对比评估。
light_analysis.result: AP方法提供轻量级、近最优的任务吞吐量；RL代理可调生存-执行平衡；AsTAR在长能量间隙中执行节奏出色。高级策略对小电容系统提供关键弹性，大能量缓冲设备可依赖简单静态策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了不同调度策略的独特操作权衡，为电池less IoT任务管理提供指导。强调硬件无关方法的优势，并指出能量缓冲大小影响策略选择。未来可探索混合方法。

title: Meet UD_Czech-PDTC: A Large and Genre-Rich Treebank in Universal Dependencies
abstract: Czech has been part of Universal Dependencies since its first release in 2015. It has also been one of the best represented languages, with the Prague Dependency Treebank being order of magnitude larger than most other UD treebanks. More recently, three other datasets from the Prague family were added and the annotations thoroughly revisited, forming the "Prague Dependency Treebank-Consolidated" (PDT-C). In comparison to the original PDT, PDT-C is more than twice as large, but it is also much more diverse in terms of genres and domains. In this paper, we describe the conversion of the new resource to Universal Dependencies. While the two annotation schemes are relatively similar at the first sight, there are numerous small differences in topology of the dependency structures and in granularity of the POS and relation type inventories. We demonstrate a selection of such differences on examples, discuss the diverging motivations, as well as ways to overcome the differences during conversion. We argue that while PDT is less "universal" and more tightly bound to one language, its multi-layer annotation is rich and provides all information needed for basic UD trees, and much more.

light_analysis.overview: 将大型、多样化的捷克语树库PDT-C转换为Universal Dependencies格式，解决两种注释方案之间的差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 捷克语在Universal Dependencies中表现良好，但原有Prague Dependency Treebank规模有限且领域单一。新资源PDT-C规模扩大两倍以上，涵盖更多体裁和领域，但需要转换为UD标准以便跨语言研究。转换过程中发现两种注释方案在依赖结构拓扑、词性及关系类型粒度上存在差异，需要系统分析和解决。本研究旨在将这一丰富资源转化为UD格式，促进资源复用和多语言对比分析。
light_analysis.method: 论文详细描述了从PDT-C到UD的转换过程，重点分析PDT与UD在依赖结构拓扑（如功能词附着方式）、词性标签和关系类型粒度上的差异。通过具体示例展示差异，并讨论克服这些差异的策略，如映射规则和结构调整。利用PDT的多层注释信息（如形态句法标签）来生成基本的UD树，同时保留额外信息。转换基于UD v2标准，确保兼容性。
light_analysis.result: 成功构建UD_Czech-PDTC树库，规模是原始PDT的两倍以上，包含更多样化的体裁和领域。论文通过对比示例展示了转换中处理的典型差异，证明PDT的多层注释足以生成符合UD标准的树结构，并保留了丰富语义信息。未提供定量评估，但强调了资源的高质量和多样性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将大规模、多体裁的捷克语资源引入UD框架，丰富了语言覆盖范围。尽管两种注释方案存在细节差异，但通过精心设计的转换可以克服。PDT-C的多层注释为UD树提供了坚实基础，同时保持了额外信息，可用于更深入的语言分析。此树库将支持跨语言研究，并为未来UD标准的完善提供参考。

title: TIGER: Taming Identity, Geometry, and Generative Priors for High-Quality Face Video Restoration
abstract: Face Video Restoration (FVR) aims to recover high-fidelity facial videos from degraded input while preserving identity and semantic consistency across frames. Existing methods often struggle to simultaneously address three key challenges: identity shift, viewpoint-entangled guidance, and perceptual realism. To tackle these issues, we propose TIGER, a structured tri-prior fusion framework that Tames Identity, Geometry, and gEnerative pRiors for high-quality FVR. Specifically, an Identity Prior is first established by injecting subject-discriminative embeddings into the latent space, effectively anchoring the subject's identity against severe degradations. Then, to provide temporally consistent structural guidance for dynamic videos, TIGER constructs a Geometry Prior by lifting 2D reference cues into a disentangled 3D parameter space, creating a geometric anchor through cross-source parameter fusion. Moreover, to achieve maximum efficiency without compromising realism, we harness the video generation model's Generative Prior through a one-step rectified flow. We further design a progressive three-stage training optimization strategy that refines structural fidelity, textural reconstruction, and distribution-level realism to ensure robust optimization. We also construct a large-scale FVR dataset to facilitate robust training and standardized evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TIGER achieves state-of-the-art performance in both identity fidelity and temporal stability, delivering a high-quality, efficient and identity-consistent FVR. Project page: https://yzhoulv.github.io/Tiger/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TIGER三先验融合框架，通过身份、几何和生成先验实现高质量人脸视频恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 人脸视频恢复面临身份偏移、视点纠缠指导和感知真实性的挑战，现有方法难以同时解决。该问题在视频编辑、数字人等领域有重要应用，现有方法往往在身份保持或时间一致性上存在不足。
light_analysis.method: TIGER框架包含三个先验：身份先验将主体判别嵌入注入潜空间，锚定身份；几何先验通过解耦3D参数空间提供时域一致的结构引导；生成先验利用视频生成模型实现单步整流流。设计渐进三阶段训练策略优化结构、纹理和分布，并构建大规模数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明TIGER在身份保真度和时间稳定性上达到最优性能，实现高质量、高效且身份一致的人脸视频恢复。与现有方法相比，显著减少了身份偏移和视觉伪影，在多个基准上表现领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过融合身份、几何和生成先验，为视频级人脸恢复提供了统一框架。在视频会议、娱乐制作等场景有实用价值，未来可扩展到更复杂的退化类型或实时应用。

title: Ill-Posed by Design: Probing Evidence Use in VLMs
abstract: Counterfactual analysis is widely used to study evidence use in vision-language models, but its diagnostic value is limited on well-posed tasks: when several cues independently support the same answer, removing one may not change the prediction. We propose monocular metric object-size estimation as an ill-posed diagnostic setting for evidence selection: because physical size cannot be determined from a single uncalibrated image, models must rely on imperfect cues category priors, target appearance, local context, apparent image size, and scene geometry. We assemble Metric VQA ($10{,}813$ dimension queries from Objectron and $331$ tape-measured in-the-wild scenes) and evaluate $12$ open-weight VLMs ($3$--$397$\,B parameters) with counterfactual analysis decomposing six visual and language evidence channels. Even the largest VLMs tested (Qwen3-VL-235B, Qwen3.5-397B, InternVL3.5-241B) trail a text-only frontier LLM on the in-the-wild split. The diagnostic analysis shows: target identity is the most load-bearing cue, target pixels and local context help only some models, apparent size shifts predictions without a directional readout, and global scene geometry is largely unused. We analyze LoRA fine-tuning as an actionable intervention specific to metric estimation: while the task is learnable, the models do not learn to leverage scene geometry.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将单眼度量物体尺寸估计作为病态诊断场景，通过反事实分析揭示视觉语言模型在证据选择上的缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有反事实分析在适定任务上诊断价值有限，因为多个线索可独立支持同一答案。为了探测模型对证据的真实依赖，需要病态场景，其中正确答案无法从单一线索确定，迫使模型依赖不完美线索。单眼度量物体尺寸估计是理想的病态场景，因为物理尺寸无法从单张未标定图像确定。
light_analysis.method: 构建Metric VQA数据集（10,813个维度查询和331个野外场景），评估12个开源VLM（3-397B参数）。通过反事实分析分解六个证据通道：类别先验、目标外观、局部上下文、图像大小、场景几何和语言线索。针对度量估计任务，使用LoRA微调作为可操作干预。
light_analysis.result: 最大VLM（如Qwen3-VL-235B、Qwen3.5-397B、InternVL3.5-241B）在野外分割上落后于纯文本LLM。目标身份是最关键的线索，目标像素和局部上下文仅部分模型有用，图像大小影响预测但缺乏方向性解读，场景几何基本未被利用。LoRA微调可提升任务性能，但模型仍不学习利用场景几何。
light_analysis.conclusion: 现有VLM在证据整合上存在局限，尤其是忽视全局场景几何。该诊断框架揭示了模型对易得线索（如目标身份）的过度依赖，而未能有效利用复杂视觉信息。未来工作可探索强制模型利用场景几何的机制，以提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: UniTranslator: A Unified Multi-modal Framework for End-to-end In-Image Machine Translation
abstract: In-Image Machine Translation (IIMT) aims to translate scene text in an image and render the translated text back into the original regions while preserving the overall visual appearance. Recent unified multimodal models provide a promising solution by combining visual-text understanding and image generation within a single framework. However, directly adapting such models to IIMT remains challenging. In particular, they often suffer from understanding-generation conflicts, where the translation inferred during understanding is inconsistent with the text supervision used in generation, and spatial position misalignment, where the rendered text does not accurately match the target text regions. To address these issues, we present UniTranslator, a unified multimodal framework for IIMT that tightly couples translation understanding and text editing. Specifically, we introduce an Understand-Generation Alignment Module (UGAM) to bridge the representation gap between understanding and generation, encouraging semantic consistency between translated content prediction and text rendering. We further propose a Spatial Mask Decoder (SMD) with pixel-level supervision over text regions to improve spatial grounding, geometric alignment, and layout controllability during generation. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that UniTranslator achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse language directions and complex real-world layouts. Moreover, our results reveal a strong mutual reinforcement effect between translation understanding and image generation, highlighting the advantage of unified translation multimodal learning. Code is available at https://github.com/SeerRay-Lab/Unitranslator.

light_analysis.overview: UniTranslator提出了一种统一的多模态框架，通过理解-生成对齐和空间掩码解码器解决了图像内机器翻译中的理解-生成冲突和位置错位问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像内机器翻译（IIMT）旨在翻译图像中的场景文本并将其渲染回原区域，同时保持视觉外观。现有统一多模态模型面临两大挑战：理解-生成冲突（翻译结果与生成文本监督不一致）和空间位置错位（渲染文本未准确匹配目标区域）。这些问题阻碍了模型在IIMT任务中的应用。
light_analysis.method: UniTranslator框架引入理解-生成对齐模块（UGAM），通过桥接理解与生成之间的表示差距，促进翻译内容预测与文本渲染的语义一致性。同时提出空间掩码解码器（SMD），在文本区域上施加像素级监督，以改善空间定位、几何对齐和布局可控性。在多个基准数据集上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上，UniTranslator在不同语言方向和复杂真实布局下均取得了最先进的性能。结果还揭示了翻译理解与图像生成之间存在强烈的相互增强效应，验证了统一翻译多模态学习的优势。具体性能指标如准确率提升等，摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniTranslator通过UGAM和SMD有效解决了IIMT中的关键挑战，实现了端到端的统一框架。该方法不仅提升了翻译和渲染的精度，还证明了理解和生成任务可以相互促进。未来工作可探索更复杂的场景和语言对扩展。代码已开源。

title: Transformer-Based Language Models Across Domain Verticals: Architectures, Applications and Critical Assessment
abstract: Transformer-based language models have become the default substrate for natural language processing and the pace of new releases has made it hard for practitioners to separate durable ideas from the noise of incremental announcements. This review works at two levels. At the level of mechanism, we organise the main transformer families into a working taxonomy, covering encoder-only, decoder-only, encoder-decoder, long-context, permutation-based, and generator-discriminator variants. We then extend the discussion to post-2023 developments that changed the picture in practice: instruction tuning, reinforcement learning from human feedback, direct preference optimisation, mixture-of-experts scaling, retrieval augmentation and the current flagship model families from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Mistral and DeepSeek. At the level of use, we survey deployments across healthcare, finance, legal, education, customer service, creative writing and scientific work. Based on this we link each to the specific capabilities that make a transformer the appropriate tool. The contribution of this paper is a critical assessment that is based on the survey. We compare architectures on four axes that matter to deployment decisions, we quantify the trade-off between parameter count and energy cost. We also discuss how alignment methods, data provenance and benchmark saturation change what it means to call a model "state of the art". The final section lists the research questions that we think deserve more attention.

light_analysis.overview: 系统分类Transformer架构并评估其在垂直领域的应用，提出部署决策的关键维度。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer模型已成为NLP主流，但新模型层出不穷，从业者难以区分重要进展与噪声。现有综述缺乏对架构机制和实际应用的全面连接，尤其缺少对2023年后发展的系统梳理。本文旨在提供分类法并评估模型在医疗、金融等领域的适用性，以及参数效率与能源成本的权衡。
light_analysis.method: 构建工作分类法，涵盖六类变体（编码器-仅、解码器-仅、编码器-解码器、长上下文、置换基、生成器-判别器）。扩展讨论2023年后进展（指令微调、RLHF、DPO、MoE、RAG等）。从四个部署轴比较架构，量化参数与能耗权衡。涵盖7个应用领域并链接具体能力。
light_analysis.result: 提出了跨架构的系统分类法；在四个关键轴上对比了架构特性；量化了参数数量与能源成本之间的权衡；指出对齐方法、数据溯源和基准饱和影响“最先进”的定义；列出了有待进一步研究的问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本综述通过机制与应用的双层分析，为Transformer选型提供了实用指南。学术上建立了架构分类体系，应用上链接了领域需求与模型能力。未来需关注对齐方法标准化、数据质量评估等方向。

title: REDI-Match: Rotation-Equivariant Distillation for Efficient and Robust Dense Matching
abstract: Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) have significantly advanced dense feature matching, yet severe in-plane rotation remains a critical challenge. Existing solutions face a fundamental dilemma: data-driven methods require inefficient parameter scaling to implicitly learn rotations, whereas strictly equivariant networks lack the semantic capacity of modern VFMs. Consequently, current frameworks typically freeze VFMs and shift the entire burden of rotation generalization to the downstream decoder. To break this architectural bottleneck, we propose REDI-Match, an efficient framework driven by a novel Rotation-Equivariant Distillation (REDI) paradigm. Instead of relying on rotation data augmentation to establish rotational correspondences, REDI distills the non-equivariant semantic representations of a VFM into a lightweight, strictly rotation-equivariant encoder, leveraging an equivariant geometric architecture to constrain robust high-dimensional semantics. To fully exploit these features, we equip the decoder with an entropy-driven spatial alignment module. By evaluating discrete rotation hypotheses, this mechanism explicitly locks onto the canonical coordinate system, eliminating global ambiguity before continuous refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that REDI-Match establishes a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) across multiple benchmarks. Notably, it achieves a 13.89% absolute pose accuracy improvement on the highly challenging SatAst dataset while operating 1.9x faster than the current SOTA (RoMa v2), enabling real-time inference (~41 FPS) on a single RTX 4090 GPU. Code: https://github.com/YinjiGe/REDI-Match.

light_analysis.overview: 提出旋转等变蒸馏框架REDI-Match，实现高效鲁棒的稠密特征匹配，缓解平面内旋转挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉基础模型在稠密匹配中受平面内旋转严重影响。现有数据驱动方法需大量参数学习旋转，而严格等变网络缺乏语义能力，导致框架常冻结VFM并将旋转泛化负担全推给解码器，形成架构瓶颈。因此需要一种高效且鲁棒的旋转等变蒸馏方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出旋转等变蒸馏范式REDI，将VFM的非等变语义表示蒸馏到轻量级严格旋转等变编码器中，利用等变几何架构约束高维语义。解码器配备熵驱动空间对齐模块，通过评估离散旋转假设锁定规范坐标系，消除全局歧义后连续细化，无需数据增强。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上达到新SOTA。在极具挑战的SatAst数据集上绝对姿态精度提升13.89%，推理速度比RoMa v2快1.9倍，单RTX 4090 GPU实现约41 FPS的实时推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: REDI-Match通过旋转等变蒸馏和熵驱动对齐，有效解决了稠密匹配的旋转鲁棒性与效率矛盾，为实时应用提供了可行方案。未来可探索扩展到其他几何变换或更轻量级架构。

title: Prague Dependency Treebank -- Consolidated 2.0: Enriching a Complex Annotation Scheme
abstract: The Prague Dependency Treebank framework is unique in its attempt to systematically include and link different layers of language, including a meaning representation with several types of inter-sentential phenomena, especially coreference and discourse relations. We present its second consolidated version (PDT-C 2.0), which concludes almost 30-years long project of sustained development of the resource to a uniformly and coherently annotated, genre-diversified, almost 4 million token language resource of Czech language, with accompanying fully compatible lexicons. In addition to continuous linguistic research, the richly linguistically annotated corpus is also widely used in international comparisons of the development of traditional and novel NLP tools as well as in conversions into other formalisms. The corpus and the trained parsers are available under the CC BY-NC-SA licence.

light_analysis.overview: 发布PDT-C 2.0，整合多层级语言标注，包含语义表示、共指和篇章关系，成为捷克语的丰富语言资源。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的树库在语言层级整合、跨句现象标注和资源一致性上存在不足。本工作旨在通过30年持续开发，提供一个统一、一致、多样体裁、近400万词符的捷克语树库，并配有兼容词典，以支持语言学研究和NLP工具开发与国际比较。
light_analysis.method: 延续Prague Dependency Treebank框架，系统包含并链接语言的不同层面（形态、句法、语义），语义层覆盖共指和篇章关系。资源通过持续注解、整合多源数据（包括体裁多样化）构建，并训练兼容的解析器，提供CC BY-NC-SA许可下的公开访问。
light_analysis.result: 最终语料含近400万词符，体裁多样化，注释一致。附带的解析器在传统与新型NLP工具对比中表现良好，且已成功转换为其他形式体系，验证了资源的广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PDT-C 2.0解决了多层级语言标注的复杂问题，提供了高质量捷克语资源，推动了依存语法、跨句现象研究以及NLP工具的比较与转换。未来可继续扩展语料或链接更多语言层。

title: Prob-BBDM: a Probabilistic Brownian Bridge Diffusion Model for MRI sequence image-to-image translation
abstract: AI-driven image-to-image synthesis is rapidly advancing, with growing applications in medical imaging. Multi-modal image analysis plays a crucial role in optimizing examination quality, yet acquiring multiple imaging modalities in clinical settings remains resource-intensive and time-consuming, especially for 3D imaging. To address this challenge, we propose a novel image-to-image translation model based on Brownian Bridge Diffusion Models (BBDM), which synthesizes magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) sequences from 2D axial slices. Our approach integrates a variational encoder-guided diffusion mechanism, leveraging probabilistic image distributions to enhance synthesis quality. Evaluated on the BraTS 2021 dataset, our Probabilistic-BBDM (Prob-BBDM) achieves superior performance across multiple translation tasks, reaching up to 88.46% SSIM and 26.09 dB PSNR, with consistent improvements over baselines. Notably, our diffusion process requires only 4 steps, making it computationally efficient while maintaining high-quality synthesis. To further validate generalizability, we test Prob-BBDM on an external third-party dataset, demonstrating consistent performance across domains. Additionally, we assess the clinical utility of the synthesized slices by using them as input to a pre-trained segmentation model. Tumor segmentation yields a Dice score of 88.71% and an HD95 of 3.49 mm, confirming that the synthesized slices preserve critical diagnostic information. These results highlight the potential of Prob-BBDM for high-quality, efficient, and generalizable MRI synthesis, offering a promising step toward improved medical image translation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出概率布朗桥扩散模型（Prob-BBDM），仅需4步扩散即可高效合成MRI序列，在BraTS 2021上达到88.46% SSIM和26.09 dB PSNR。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态MRI图像对临床诊断至关重要，但获取多种模态耗时且资源密集，尤其是3D成像。现有图像转换方法在质量和效率之间难以平衡，亟需一种既能保持高合成质量又具有计算效率的方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于布朗桥扩散模型（BBDM），引入变分编码器引导的扩散机制，利用概率图像分布增强合成质量。从2D轴向切片出发，通过仅4步的扩散过程生成MRI序列，在BraTS 2021数据集上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个翻译任务中，SSIM最高达88.46%，PSNR达26.09 dB，优于基线方法。外部数据集测试证明泛化能力。合成图像用于肿瘤分割，Dice为88.71%，HD95为3.49 mm，表明关键诊断信息得以保留。
light_analysis.conclusion: Prob-BBDM实现了高质量、高效且可泛化的MRI合成，为临床多模态成像提供低成本方案。未来可扩展至更多模态或进一步优化扩散步数，但当前仅在2D切片层面验证，3D合成有待探索。

title: LemonHarness Technical Report
abstract: As large language model (LLM) agents are applied to longer tasks, they increasingly modify workspace state across multiple rounds of iteration. However, agents typically observe only tool outputs and log fragments, while the actual state changes occur in the file system. Without explicit workspace boundaries, state-changing operations such as file writes and temporary artifact generation may scatter changes across paths. Over time, these weakly constrained changes accumulate, making states such as modified files difficult to track. This paper presents LemonHarness, an integrated execution framework for long-horizon agents. LemonHarness establishes an explicit execution boundary by constraining state-changing operations within a clearly defined workspace and bringing model invocation, tool execution, and rule knowledge within a single controlled boundary. State-changing operations, including file writes, dependency installation, and temporary artifact creation, are executed through structured tool interfaces, with execution feedback recorded as observations available to subsequent model decisions. The system also introduces a reusable rule knowledge base, which turns recurring execution rules and acceptance criteria into runtime knowledge. LemonHarness further adds a time-aware execution mechanism that exposes elapsed and remaining budget to the model, so it can rebalance exploration, implementation, and validation effort as time pressure shifts and avoid timeouts from long waits or excessive verification. On Terminal-Bench 2.0, LemonHarness_GPT-5.3-CodeX reached 84.49% accuracy over 445 trials; pairing the same framework with the stronger GPT-5.5 backbone raised the average accuracy to 86.52% across five jobs. The results suggest that a unified runtime boundary, callable rule knowledge, and time-aware execution can improve the stability of long-horizon agent execution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LemonHarness框架，通过显式执行边界、可复用规则知识库和时间感知执行机制提升长时域LLM agent的稳定性和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM agents在长任务中需多轮迭代修改工作区状态，但仅能观察工具输出和日志片段，实际文件系统状态变更难以追踪。现有方法缺乏显式工作区边界，导致状态变更散乱，影响长时域任务的执行稳定性。LemonHarness旨在解决此问题。
light_analysis.method: LemonHarness建立显式执行边界，将状态变更操作约束在明确工作区内，并整合模型调用、工具执行和规则知识。通过结构化工具接口执行文件写、依赖安装等操作，执行反馈作为观察记录。引入可复用规则知识库将重复规则和验收标准转化为运行时知识。加入时间感知执行机制，暴露已用和剩余预算，帮助模型平衡探索、实现和验证，避免超时。
light_analysis.result: 在Terminal-Bench 2.0上，LemonHarness_GPT-5.3-CodeX在445次试验中达到84.49%准确率；使用更强的GPT-5.5骨干，平均准确率提升至86.52%（5个任务）。结果表明统一运行时边界、可调用规则知识和时间感知执行能提高长时域agent的稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LemonHarness通过显式边界、规则知识库和时间感知机制有效提升了长时域agent的状态跟踪和执行稳定性，具有学术与实际应用价值。未来可扩展到更多任务场景或模型，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: TrOCR for Medieval HTR: A Systematic Ablation Study with Cross-Dataset Validation
abstract: Fine-tuning transformer-based handwritten text recognition (HTR) models on medieval manuscripts is challenging because these models are pre-trained on modern text and must adapt to a very different visual domain. This paper studies how three controllable fine-tuning choices (contrast normalization, data augmentation, and layer freezing) affect recognition accuracy when adapting TrOCR to small historical datasets. We run controlled experiments on a 13th-century Italian manuscript (I-CT 91 "Cortonese") and replicate the same experimental grid on the public READ-16 benchmark as robustness evidence. On Cortonese, our best configuration achieves 8.03% character error rate (CER). Statistical comparisons across 13 configurations show that freezing up to three encoder layers or six decoder layers does not significantly harm accuracy, while deeper freezing becomes progressively detrimental. Removing contrast normalization (CLAHE) yields 7.84% CER, comparable to a domain-specialized baseline, suggesting strong optimization can reduce reliance on image preprocessing. Cross-dataset validation on READ-16 shows that decoder freezing thresholds transfer more robustly than encoder thresholds, and combined freezing strategies require dataset-specific re-validation. Finally, we use Grad-CAM gradient attributions and decoder cross-attention maps to diagnose error patterns and failure modes revealed by the ablations. Source code is available at https://github.com/LaudareProject/TrOCR-analysis
comment: Accepted at Document Analysis Systems Workshop 2026 (ICDAR Satellite event)

light_analysis.overview: 通过系统消融研究，评估TrOCR模型在历史手稿手写文本识别中的微调策略，实现8.03%字符错误率。
