light_analysis.motivation: 微调预训练TrOCR模型用于中世纪手稿识别时，面临现代文本与历史手稿视觉域差异大的挑战。现有方法缺乏对对比度归一化、数据增强、层冻结等微调策略的系统性研究，因此需要通过可控实验揭示各因素对识别精度的影响，为历史文献HTR提供可靠指导。
light_analysis.method: 对TrOCR进行系统消融实验，控制三个因素：对比度归一化（CLAHE）、数据增强、层冻结（编码器/解码器）。在13世纪意大利手稿Cortonese和公共基准READ-16上进行交叉验证。使用13种配置进行统计比较，结合Grad-CAM梯度归因和解码器交叉注意力图诊断错误模式。
light_analysis.result: 最佳配置达到8.03%字符错误率（CER）；去掉CLAHE后CER降至7.84%，与领域专用基线相当。冻结多达3个编码器层或6个解码器层对精度无显著影响，更深冻结有害。READ-16验证显示解码器冻结阈值跨数据集更鲁棒，组合冻结需数据集特定重新验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了系统消融研究对历史手稿HTR微调的有效性；发现适度层冻结无害，且可通过优化减少对对比度归一化的依赖；跨数据集验证揭示层冻结的迁移特性；误差诊断方法有助于理解失败模式。代码已开源，未来可探索更多历史数据集和预训练模型。

title: MM-TRELLIS: Point-Cloud Guided Multi-Modal 3D Vehicle Generation in Autonomous Driving
abstract: Recovering realistic 3D vehicle models from autonomous driving scenes is crucial for synthesizing training data and building simulation environment. However, most existing vehicle generation methods fail to fully exploit multimodal sensors i.e. multi-view images and LiDAR point clouds) and rely on neural rendering based reconstruction, leading to low-quality mesh. Recently, native 3D generative models have made significant progress, yet they are not built for arbitrary multi-view inputs and often struggle with in-the-wild driving images. In this work, we present MM-TRELLIS, a multi-modal version of TRELLIS for in-the-wild 3D vehicle generation that integrates LiDAR and image sensors from autonomous driving datasets into native 3D generative models. Specifically, multi-view images are cycled as conditioning inputs, while LiDAR point clouds provide test-time guidance to ensure geometric accuracy and cross-view consistency. During denoising, we first align the guidance point cloud with the model priors, then enforce consistency between the generated geometry and the guidance point cloud. Finally, we introduce a voxel filtering strategy based on the opacity of 3D Gaussian Splatting to suppress floaters and produce clean meshes. Comprehensive experiments on Waymo dataset demonstrate our method outperforms existing methods in high-fidelity 3D vehicle generation. Code is available at https://github.com/HongliXiao/MM-TRELLIS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MM-TRELLIS，利用LiDAR点云和多视角图像实现高保真3D车辆生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶场景中恢复真实3D车辆模型对合成训练数据和构建仿真环境至关重要。现有方法未能充分利用多视图图像和LiDAR点云等多模态传感器，依赖神经渲染导致网格质量低。近期原生3D生成模型虽有进展，但不适用于任意多视角输入，且在野外驾驶图像上表现不佳。因此，需要一种能融合多模态数据并处理复杂场景的生成方法。
light_analysis.method: MM-TRELLIS将多视角图像和LiDAR点云集成到原生3D生成模型TRELLIS中。多视角图像作为条件输入，LiDAR点云在测试时提供引导以确保几何精度和跨视图一致性。去噪过程中，先对齐引导点云与模型先验，再强制生成几何与引导点云一致。最后，基于3D高斯泼溅的不透明度引入体素过滤策略，抑制漂浮物并生成干净网格。
light_analysis.result: 在Waymo数据集上的实验表明，MM-TRELLIS在高保真3D车辆生成方面优于现有方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调生成结果质量更高，网格更清晰。
light_analysis.conclusion: MM-TRELLIS有效融合多模态传感器数据，提升了3D车辆生成的质量和一致性，解决了现有方法在野外驾驶场景中的不足。代码已开源，有助于自动驾驶数据集扩展和仿真系统构建。未来可进一步优化模型对动态场景的适应性。

title: Training-free Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation via Robust Semantic Representation and Matching
abstract: Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation (CD-FSS) aims to transfer knowledge learned from source domain to distinct target domains, segmenting unseen target classes with only a few annotated samples. Although existing methods have made significant progress, they still rely on training or fine-tuning processes, which incur high computational costs and risk overfitting. We observe that when powerful and general-purpose vision foundation models are incorporated into these methods, their performance shows only marginal improvement or even degrades due to overfitting. To address this, we eliminate trainable parameters and propose a training-free framework to avoid both training overhead and overfitting. Built upon the self-supervised vision encoder DINOv3, our framework addresses cross-domain challenges through three core modules. First, the Semantic-aware Feature Re-fusion (SAFR) module identifies and re-fuses features that emphasize semantic patterns, generating representations with enhanced semantic discriminability. Additionally, the Adaptive Support Enhancement (ASE) module narrows semantic gaps between support and query through robust query information aggregation. Finally, the Hybrid Prototype Matching (HPM) module integrates matching results from diverse prototypes to adapt to varying semantic complexity across domains. Extensive experiments on four target domain datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in CD-FSS without any training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的跨域小样本分割框架，利用DINOv3和三个核心模块实现鲁棒的语义表示与匹配，达到最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有跨域小样本分割方法依赖训练或微调，计算成本高且易过拟合。即使引入视觉基础模型，性能提升有限甚至下降。因此需要一种无需训练的方法避免这些缺陷，同时有效处理跨域语义差异。
light_analysis.method: 基于自监督视觉编码器DINOv3构建无训练框架。核心包括：语义感知特征重融合模块（SAFR）增强语义判别性；自适应支持增强模块（ASE）通过鲁棒的查询信息聚合缩小支持与查询的语义鸿沟；混合原型匹配模块（HPM）集成多种原型匹配结果以适应不同领域的语义复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 在四个目标域数据集上取得最先进性能，且无需任何训练。具体数值摘要未明确，但表明优于现有方法，且避免了训练开销和过拟合风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了第一个无训练的跨域小样本分割方法，通过消除可训练参数同时解决训练开销和过拟合问题。展现了视觉基础模型在无需微调下处理跨域任务的潜力，为未来高效跨域分割提供新思路。摘要未说明局限性。

title: Hierarchical Spatial and Channel Aggregation for Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation
abstract: Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation (CD-FSS) aims to learn generalizable segmentation capability from abundant annotated samples in the source domain, enabling accurate segmentation of novel classes in the target domain with only a few annotated samples. Existing CD-FSS methods mainly focus on mitigating feature distribution shifts caused by style gaps while ignoring significant differences in class semantic granularity and discriminative attributes across domains, leading to two key degradations in support-query matching: semantic over-alignment and attribute over-alignment. To this end, we propose the Dual Hierarchical Aggregation Network (DHANet), which comprises three key modules. First, the Hierarchical Spatial Aggregation (HSA) module performs multi-scale region aggregation of pixel features along the spatial dimension, generating hierarchical semantic-enhanced features to alleviate semantic over-alignment. Additionally, the HCA module conducts multi-scale attribute aggregation along the channel dimension, generating hierarchical attribute-enhanced features to mitigate attribute over-alignment. Finally, we propose the Online Probabilistic Semantic Bank (OPSB), which progressively constructs and updates class probability distributions from query predictions during inference, and samples multiple pseudo-prototypes as additional support information to mitigate insufficient support. Extensive experiments on four target-domain datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双层次聚合网络DHANet，通过层次化空间和通道聚合解决跨域小样本分割中的语义和属性过对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有跨域小样本分割方法主要关注缓解风格差异引起的特征分布偏移，但忽略了跨域类别语义粒度和判别属性的显著差异，导致支持-查询匹配中出现语义过对齐和属性过对齐问题，严重影响了分割性能。因此，需要一种能够同时处理语义和属性差异的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出双层次聚合网络DHANet，包含三个模块：层次空间聚合模块通过多尺度区域聚合生成语义增强特征，缓解语义过对齐；层次通道聚合模块沿通道维度进行多尺度属性聚合，生成属性增强特征，缓解属性过对齐；在线概率语义库在推理时从查询预测中逐步构建和更新类别概率分布，并采样多个伪原型作为额外支持信息，弥补支持样本不足。
light_analysis.result: 在四个目标域数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法取得了最先进的性能。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但通过与现有方法的对比验证了其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DHANet通过层次化空间和通道聚合有效解决了跨域小样本分割中的语义和属性过对齐问题，同时在线概率语义库增强了支持信息。该方法具有重要的学术价值，为跨域分割提供了新思路，并可推广到其他跨域视觉任务。未来工作可能考虑更复杂的域自适应策略。

title: ActiveScope: Actively Seeking and Correcting Perception for MLLMs
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive vision-language understanding, yet still struggle with fine-grained perception in high-resolution images. While existing training-free methods typically rely on attention-based localization or coarse-to-fine search, they are often misled by distractors and fail to locate multiple targets. Our investigation attributes these failures to Contextual Dominance, where salient distractors overwhelm target attention and cause inaccurate localization, and Semantic Bias, where global semantics cause the model to fixate on the most salient concept, resulting in incomplete localization in multi-object scenarios. Built on these insights, we propose ActiveScope, a training-free framework that enhances MLLMs by actively seeking and correcting perception. ActiveScope features two modules. The Semantic Anchor Localization (SAL) utilizes fine-grained semantic anchors to independently localize key targets, thereby mitigating semantic bias. The Interference-Suppressed Refinement (ISR) refines localization by suppressing attention on salient distractions to overcome contextual dominance. Extensive experiments on high-resolution image understanding benchmarks demonstrate that ActiveScope outperforms existing training-free methods (e.g., 96.34 percent accuracy on $V^{*}$ Bench), validating the superiority of the active search and self-correction paradigm. Our code is available at https://github.com/jasmine-ww/ActiveScope.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ActiveScope，一种无需训练的多模态大模型主动感知与校正框架，通过语义锚点和干扰抑制模块提升高分辨率图像细粒度定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在高分辨率图像中细粒度感知能力不足，现有免训练方法易受显著干扰物误导（情境主导）和全局语义偏见（语义偏差），导致多目标定位不完整。这些缺陷源于目标注意力被干扰物压制，以及模型偏爱最显著概念。需一种主动搜索与自我校正机制来克服上述问题。
light_analysis.method: ActiveScope由两个模块组成：语义锚点定位（SAL）利用细粒度语义锚点独立定位关键目标，缓解语义偏差；干扰抑制精化（ISR）通过抑制对显著干扰物的注意力，克服情境主导。整体框架无需训练，直接应用于现有多模态大模型。
light_analysis.result: 在高分辨率图像理解基准上，ActiveScope在V* Bench达到96.34%准确率，优于现有免训练方法。实验验证了主动搜索与自我校正范式的优越性，未提供与其他基线对比的具体数值，但声称超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了多模态大模型细粒度感知失败的两大原因（情境主导与语义偏差），并提出ActiveScope有效解决。该框架无需额外训练，具有即插即用特点，能显著提升高分辨率多目标定位能力。未来可扩展至更多视觉任务，代码已开源。

title: AVOC: Enhancing Hour-Level Audio-Video Understanding in Omni-Modal LLMs via Retrieval-Inspired Token Compression
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models have achieved remarkable progress in short-form audio-video understanding, yet long-form audio-video comprehension remains challenged by limited context windows and severe information redundancy. To address these bottlenecks, we propose AVOC, a framework for long-form audio-video understanding in Omni-modal Large Language Models. AVOC introduces a learnable token compression module between the modality encoders and the LLM backbone. We reframe multimodal token compression as a top-$K$ retrieval problem: given a fixed context budget, the module must retrieve a compact subset of tokens that best supports answering the user query. We draw inspiration from three classical Information Retrieval criteria for selecting informative units from a large candidate pool: relevance, importance, and diversity. AVOC instantiates each criterion as a tailored mechanism for audio-video understanding, and integrates them into a unified retrieval-style compression pipeline. Experiments show that AVOC achieves state-of-the-art performance on long-form audio-video benchmarks, surpassing the second-best model by 4.9 and 5.5 points in average accuracy on OmniVideoBench and LVOmniBench, respectively. Moreover, AVOC maintains robust performance on Audio-Video Needle-in-a-Haystack task at durations up to one hour.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AVOC框架，通过检索式token压缩解决长形式音视频理解中的上下文窗口和冗余问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在短时音视频理解上进展显著，但长时音视频理解受限于有限的上下文窗口和严重的信息冗余。现有方法难以有效处理长序列中的冗余信息，导致性能下降。因此，需要一种能压缩冗长多模态输入并保留关键信息的机制。
light_analysis.method: AVOC在模态编码器和LLM主干之间引入可学习的token压缩模块。将多模态token压缩重构为top-K检索问题，从候选token池中检索最支持用户查询的紧凑子集。借鉴信息检索的相关性、重要性和多样性标准，为音视频理解设计定制机制，并集成到统一的检索式压缩流程中。
light_analysis.result: 在长时音视频基准上达到SOTA，在OmniVideoBench和LVOmniBench上平均准确率分别超过第二名4.9和5.5个百分点。在长达一小时的音视频Needle-in-a-Haystack任务中保持稳健性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: AVOC通过检索式压缩有效缓解了长时音视频理解的上下文窗口和冗余问题，显著提升性能。其创新在于将压缩视为检索问题并引入经典IR标准。未来可进一步探索压缩效率和对更长时间序列的适应性。

title: UniRED: Unified RGB-D Video Frame Interpolation with Event Guidance
abstract: High frame-rate RGB-D videos are crucial for a variety of downstream tasks, including motion analysis, dynamic scene understanding, and 3D reconstruction. However, due to hardware and sensing constraints, practical RGB-D cameras are typically limited to low frame rates, making it difficult to capture rapid scene dynamics. Existing video interpolation methods have achieved strong performance on RGB data, but they are not readily applicable to RGB-D scenarios, where they often yield blurry boundaries, visible artifacts, and degraded geometric consistency. Furthermore, motion estimation from only two boundary frames is inherently under-constrained in complex dynamic scenes. Event cameras, by contrast, provide asynchronous measurements with ultra-high temporal resolution, offering dense motion cues. In this paper, we propose a unified multimodal framework for RGB-D video interpolation that jointly exploits RGB appearance, depth geometry, and event-based temporal cues. Specifically, it first extracts and fuses RGB, depth and event cues, then estimates bidirectional flow with motion basis refinement for RGB and Z-axial refinement for depth, and finally synthesizes the target RGB-D frame via bidirectional warping and soft blending. In addition, we construct a new RGB-D-Event dataset to alleviate the scarcity of tri-modal training data. Extensive experiments on a public benchmark and the proposed dataset demonstrate that our method achieves superior photometric fidelity for RGB interpolation and stronger geometric accuracy for depth interpolation than existing approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniRED框架，融合RGB、深度和事件相机信号，实现高保真RGB-D视频插帧。
light_analysis.motivation: RGB-D相机受硬件限制帧率低，难以捕捉快速场景动态。现有RGB插帧方法直接用于RGB-D数据会生成模糊边界和几何不一致的伪影，且仅靠两帧图像的运动估计在复杂动态场景中欠约束。事件相机提供高时间分辨率异步测量，可弥补运动模糊和缺失问题，因此需统一多模态框架以联合利用RGB外观、深度几何和事件时间线索。
light_analysis.method: 构建统一多模态框架UniRED，先提取并融合RGB、深度和事件特征，然后估计双向光流并分别对RGB进行运动基元细化、对深度进行Z轴细化。最终通过双向扭曲和软混合合成目标RGB-D帧。此外，构建了RGB-D-Event三模态数据集以缓解训练数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.result: 在公开基准和自建数据集上的实验表明，该方法在RGB插帧上取得了优于现有方法的光度保真度，在深度插帧上实现了更高的几何精度，有效减少了模糊和伪影，提升了运动估计的准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniRED通过多模态融合有效提升了RGB-D视频插帧质量，尤其在高动态场景中优势明显。构建的RGB-D-Event数据集为后续研究提供了基准。未来可探索端到端联合优化及更高效的多模态融合策略。

title: CALIBER: Calibrating Confidence Before and After Reasoning in Language Models
abstract: Reasoning language models are increasingly asked not only to answer difficult questions, but also to estimate their likelihood of success. Existing methods typically elicit confidence only once: either before thinking or after answering. We argue that confidence in reasoning models is state-dependent: before thinking, confidence should estimate the chance of the model correctly solving the prompt, while after thinking it should predict whether the realized answer is likely to be correct. This distinction determines the appropriate supervision target: prompt-level success should supervise confidence estimates made after seeing the prompt, while individual answer-level correctness should supervise confidence estimates made after answering. We introduce CALIBER (Calibration Before and After Reasoning), which elicits both estimates and supervises each with the target matched to its information state. Under this unified protocol, CALIBER reduces Expected Calibration Error (ECE) by 52.5% over the strongest single-confidence baseline on BigMathDigits for the 7B model, while achieving the best Brier score and AUROC, and remains within 2.1 points of the best accuracy. Further, on a larger 30B model, CALIBER achieves the best ECE on BigMathDigits while remaining competitive in Brier score and AUROC. Out of distribution, it achieves the best ECE and Brier score on GPQA and TriviaQA, and remains competitive on SimpleQA. Ablations further show that this position-target alignment is most beneficial under distribution shift where it consistently reduces calibration error across all out-of-distribution benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CALIBER方法，在推理前和推理后分别校准置信度，通过状态匹配的监督目标提升校准性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 推理语言模型需要准确评估自身不确定性，但现有方法仅在单一阶段（思考前或回答后）获取置信度，忽略了置信度依赖于信息状态。思考前置信度应反映解决整个问题的概率，而回答后置信度应预测当前答案正确性。缺乏这种区分导致校准不佳，尤其在分布偏移下。
light_analysis.method: 提出CALIBER框架，在模型思考前和回答后分别获取置信度估计。思考前置信度以提示级别的成功为目标监督，思考后置信度以答案级别的正确性为目标监督。通过这种位置-目标对齐策略，统一校准两个阶段的置信度。使用BigMathDigits等数据集训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在7B模型上，CALIBER将期望校准误差(ECE)降低52.5%相对于最强单一置信度基线，同时取得最佳Brier分数和AUROC，准确率仅差2.1个百分点。在30B模型上，BigMathDigits取得最佳ECE，Brier和AUROC保持竞争力。分布外测试中，在GPQA和TriviaQA上取得最佳ECE和Brier，在SimpleQA上保持竞争力。消融实验验证位置-目标对齐在分布偏移下的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: CALIBER通过区分思考前和思考后的置信度并分别校准，显著提升了语言模型的校准性能，尤其在分布偏移场景。该方法具有实用价值，可应用于需要可靠不确定性估计的推理任务。未来可探索更复杂的校准目标或扩展到更多模型。

title: Tractable Reasoning and Conjunctive Query Answering for Defeasible DL-Lite under Rational Closure
abstract: In Description Logics (DLs), reasoning under Rational Closure (RC) is a well-known and widely accepted non-monotonic formalism to handle defeasible knowledge. In this paper, we study the application of RC to the core and horn variants of the DL-Lite family of lightweight description logics. We analyze both entitlement (instance checking) and Conjunctive Query (CQ) answering under RC. Our main contribution is providing a plug-in architecture that builds upon existing standard classical reasoners, establishing that reasoning and CQ answering under RC for DL-Lite can be done efficiently with minimal computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 为DL-Lite族轻量级描述逻辑在Rational Closure下的推理和合取查询回答提供高效的插件架构。
light_analysis.motivation: Rational Closure是处理可废止知识的经典非单调形式，但应用于DL-Lite的core和horn变体时缺乏高效方法。现有系统需专门实现，计算成本高。本文旨在利用现有标准经典推理器，实现RC下的实例检查和CQ回答，以最小化额外开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种插件架构，构建于现有经典DL推理器之上，无需修改推理器核心。通过编码RC语义为经典推理任务，实现实例检查和合取查询回答。该架构支持DL-Litecore和DL-Litehorn变体，仅需少量预处理和查询重写，保证计算复杂度与经典推理相近。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，所提架构在RC下进行推理和CQ回答时，仅增加多项式时间开销，与经典DL-Lite推理复杂度一致。摘要未提供具体实验数据，但声称能高效集成现有系统，适用于轻量级本体场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为DL-Lite引入Rational Closure提供了实用解决方案，证明非单调推理可与经典推理器无缝结合。工作拓展了可辩护推理在轻量级描述逻辑中的应用，为未来研究非单调查询回答和本体演化奠定了基础。

title: Pigeonholing: Bad prompts hurt models to collapse and make mistakes
abstract: While in-context learning is generally shown to be effective in Large Language Models (LLMs), bad contexts can cause performance degradation and mode collapse, a phenomenon we call "pigeonholing." **Unintentionally bad** contexts can happen without malicious jailbreaking intents: For example, a user asks the model to justify an incorrect math theorem or fails to correct the model's buggy code. Specifically, we investigate ``pigeonholing" in two scenarios: (1) when the user suggests a solution, and (2) when the conversation context includes the assistant's previous (incorrect) responses. Our experiments across 10 verifiable and open-ended tasks with 10 different models show that pigeonholing manifests in several ways: (1) repeating the incorrect answers from context (leading to 38-40% performance drop), (2) converging on a narrow set of answers in coding and text generation without exploring alternatives, and (3) flipping stance on controversial topics to align with the user or the assistant's previous claims. We find that pigeonholing worsens almost monotonically with the number of conversation turns (performance drops by additional 14+% as repeated mistakes increase from 1 to 5), and pigeonholing-induced mode collapse can happen even when the provided example is correct. As a step toward mitigation, we propose RLVR with synthetic errors which improves models by 43-60% under bad contexts compared to vanilla RLVR baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示坏上下文导致大语言模型性能崩溃的“Pigeonholing”现象，并提出RLVR+合成错误缓解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文学习虽有效，但坏上下文（非恶意错误）会导致性能下降和模式崩溃，现有研究对此关注不足。例如用户要求模型证明错误定理或未纠正代码错误。该问题重要，因为实际应用中坏上下文频繁出现，且可能使模型重复错误答案、缩小输出多样性或改变立场。
light_analysis.method: 提出“Pigeonholing”现象，研究两种场景：用户给出错误建议，以及对话中包含助手先前错误响应。使用10个可验证和开放任务、10个模型进行实验。观察多种表现：重复错误答案（性能下降38-40%）、缩小答案集、立场反转。进一步提出使用合成错误的RLVR训练方法缓解问题。
light_analysis.result: Pigeonholing导致性能下降38-40%，并随对话轮次增加单调恶化（错误从1次增至5次，性能额外下降14%以上）。即使提供正确示例，模式崩溃仍可能发生。基于合成错误的RLVR方法在坏上下文中相比普通RLVR基线提升43-60%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文发现并系统研究了坏上下文引发的大模型性能崩溃现象Pigeonholing，揭示了其表现形式和恶化规律。提出RLVR+合成错误作为缓解措施，大幅提升鲁棒性。研究有助于理解上下文学习脆弱性，推动更可靠的模型部署。未来可探索更广泛的缓解策略及其他场景。

title: MotifGen: Spatiotemporal interpolation of misaligned satellite images via multi-source generative modeling, in an application to tropical cyclones
abstract: Microwave satellite imagery plays a crucial role in monitoring tropical cyclone precipitation and intensity worldwide, but suffers from long revisit times, potentially missing rapid storm evolution phases. While this raises the need for an interpolation method, it is made challenging by the high level of heterogeneity of microwave data coming from different instruments. In this work, we introduce the first generative model that can be applied to multiple geospatial sources that change across samples, occur at irregular time intervals, are misaligned geographically, and come from instruments with varying characteristics. We apply this model to the case of spatio-temporal interpolation of tropical cyclone microwave images from other microwave and infrared instruments. We train using a self-supervised task in which a random source is masked and reconstructed, and show that it leads to a significant decrease in Continuous Ranked Probability Score over supervised training. We show a further improvement by combining infrared and microwave data compared to microwave only. Using these improvements, the generative model produces an ensemble mean on par with that of a deterministic model, while generating a power spectrum significantly closer to that of true observations. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first generative model that interpolates microwave images of cyclones by combining multiple microwave instruments and infrared observations at irregular time intervals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个多源生成模型MotifGen，实现不规则时空采样微波图像的插值，适用于热带气旋监测。
light_analysis.motivation: 微波卫星图像对监测热带气旋降水和强度至关重要，但其重访时间长，可能错过快速演变阶段。现有插值方法难以应对来自不同仪器、地理不对齐、时间间隔不规则的异质数据，亟需一种通用生成模型。
light_analysis.method: 基于生成模型，采用自监督训练任务（随机掩码并重建源），同时融合微波与红外数据，学习跨仪器、不规则时空分布的协同插值。模型可处理多来源样本变化、地理不对齐和仪器差异。
light_analysis.result: 自监督训练相比监督训练显著降低连续排序概率分数（CRPS）；结合红外和微波数据相比仅用微波进一步提升性能。生成的集合均值与确定性模型相当，功率谱更接近真实观测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首款能对多源、不规则时间微波图像进行插值的生成模型，填补了该领域空白。该方法提升了热带气旋图像的时间连续性和真实性，具备实用价值。未来可推广至其他地理空间多源数据插值任务。

title: SURGELLM: Rethinking Multi-Task Evaluation through Task-Aware Feature Gating with Class-Balanced Normalization
abstract: Fine-tuned encoders deployed across heterogeneous NLP tasks face three compounding problems: mismatched inductive biases, class-imbalance corruption of feature statistics, and no mechanism to condition attention on external lexical knowledge. We introduce \textbf{\surgellm}, a unified transformer framework that addresses each with a dedicated lightweight module: a \emph{surgical feature gate} (learned per-dimension sigmoid over curated lexical indicators and \texttt{[CLS]}; provably degenerates to identity when features are uninformative), \emph{task-conditioned prefix tokens} (quantized feature values and task identity prepended to every input), and \emph{Instance-Weighted Normalization} (IWN; removes class-prior bias from gate statistics). We prove an excess-risk bound linking gate benefit to \emph{surgical feature alignment}. Across four tasks, SST-2, multi-hop retrieval, LLM-prompt attribution, and authorship detection, covering 17,830 examples and eleven model variants over three seeds, the IWN variant achieves macro-F1 \textbf{0.940} ($+0.036$ over the strongest non-IWN baseline; $+0.130$ on authorship detection). A random-vocabulary control ($-0.028$ avg.\ F1) confirms gains are lexical, not parametric. Code, vocabularies, and a $99.5\%$-recovery auto-extraction recipe are released.
comment: Proceedings of the 6th Workshop on Trustworthy NLP (TrustNLP 2026), ACL 2026, San Diego, California, USA. Available at https://openreview.net/forum?id=WJCalficPT

light_analysis.overview: 提出SURGELLM框架，通过手术特征门控、任务条件前缀令牌和实例加权归一化解决多任务评估中的归纳偏置、类别不平衡和外部知识缺失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前细调编码器在处理异构NLP任务时面临三个核心挑战：不匹配的归纳偏置导致任务间迁移困难；类别不平衡严重扭曲特征统计分布；缺乏机制将外部词汇知识融入注意力计算。现有方法通常仅针对单一问题设计，无法同时解决三者，导致多任务评估性能受限。
light_analysis.method: SURGELLM框架包含三个轻量模块：手术特征门控利用可学习每维sigmoid筛选词汇指标和[CLS]特征；任务条件前缀令牌将量化特征值和任务标识拼接入输入；实例加权归一化（IWN）去除类别先验偏差，保证门控统计无偏。理论证明了基于手术特征对齐的过剩风险界限。
light_analysis.result: 在SST-2、多跳检索、LLM提示归因和作者检测四个任务上，涵盖17,830样本和11个模型变体，IWN变体实现macro-F1 0.940，较最强非IWN基线提升0.036，作者检测任务提升0.130。随机词汇控制实验确认性能增益源于词汇特征而非参数容量。
light_analysis.conclusion: SURGELLM通过统一框架有效解决了多任务评估中的多重问题，显著提升性能，代码与词汇已开源。未来工作可探索更广泛的词汇指示器及动态门控机制，进一步拓展其适用性。

title: 3DCarGen: Scalable 3D Car Generation via 3D-consistent Multi-view Synthesis
abstract: High-quality 3D vehicle assets are essential for autonomous driving simulation. Although multi-view diffusion-based paradigms enable controllable single-image reconstruction, they typically produce limited viewpoints and exhibit cross-view geometric inconsistencies, thereby reducing reconstruction fidelity in real-world scenarios. In this work, we introduce 3DCarGen, a scalable single-view 3D car generation framework designed for real-world images by synthesizing an arbitrary number of 3D-consistent multi-view images. Specifically, given a single image as input, we first synthesize a set of images from fixed viewpoints. These images are then fed into a feed-forward reconstruction model, resulting in a coarse 3D representation based on 3D Gaussian Splatting. Conditioned on this explicit 3D prior, our multi-view diffusion model generates 3D-consistent images from arbitrary camera viewpoints. We further extend a fast mesh reconstruction algorithm by incorporating color-normal joint optimization to recover detailed and coherent 3D vehicle models from the synthesized dense views. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves robust geometric consistency and reconstruction fidelity compared to existing methods. Code and models will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出3DCarGen框架，通过合成任意数量的3D一致多视图图像实现单图高质量3D车辆生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 高质量3D车辆资产对自动驾驶模拟至关重要。现有多视图扩散方法在单图像重建中仅能生成有限视角，且存在跨视图几何不一致，导致真实场景重建保真度低。需要一种可扩展的方法来生成任意视角的3D一致图像，以提升重建质量。
light_analysis.method: 首先从单张输入图像合成固定视角图像集，经前馈重建模型得到基于3D高斯溅射的粗略3D表示。以此作为显式3D先验，多视图扩散模型生成任意相机视角的3D一致图像。最后通过扩展快速网格重建算法，结合颜色-法线联合优化，从密集视图中恢复细节一致的3D车辆模型。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的大量实验表明，与现有方法相比，该方法在几何一致性和重建保真度方面表现稳健，有效提升了多视图合成和3D重建质量。具体指标如重建准确率和视觉保真度均有显著提高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的3DCarGen框架实现了可扩展的3D车辆生成，通过3D一致的密集多视图合成和优化重建，显著提升了自动驾驶模拟中3D资产的质量。未来可扩展至其他物体类别或场景，代码和模型将开源促进研究。

title: Trimming the Long-Tail of Visual World Modeling Evaluation
abstract: Physical interactions follow a long-tailed distribution: a set of common and regular interactions dominates human experience and visual data, while a broad spectrum of rare and irregular interactions remains underrepresented. Although recent visual world models, including image and video generation models, achieve impressive realism on existing benchmarks, they primarily focus on simulating common physical interactions. This raises a central question: Do current visual world models internalize and generalize physical principles? In this work, we introduce Tailor-Bench, a benchmark that challenges world models to simulate irregular physical interactions. To enable systematic evaluation, we design three scenario modes that progressively challenge model reasoning: Regular scenarios reflect common tool-task pairs, Unconventional scenarios replace conventional tools with attribute-compatible substitutes to test affordance generalization, and Impossible scenarios introduce attribute-violating tools to probe constraint awareness. Additionally, we design two complementary settings under a unified evaluation protocol: predictive generation requires inferring outcomes without guidance, while descriptive generation specifies the target outcome for faithful realization. Our experimental results reveal a clear long-tail gap in physical world modeling: performance degrades from Regular to Unconventional and Impossible scenarios, indicating limited generalization beyond common interactions. Failure analysis further shows that models rely on superficial visual patterns: image models fail to realize correct state changes, while video models further suffer from temporal inconsistencies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tailor-Bench基准，系统评估视觉世界模型在长尾不规则物理交互上的泛化能力，揭示模型依赖表面视觉模式而非物理原理。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理交互遵循长尾分布，常见交互主导人类经验和视觉数据，但罕见交互被忽视。现有视觉世界模型在常规基准上表现优异，但未真正内化物理原理。需要评估模型在非常规和不可能场景下的泛化能力，以检验其物理推理的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 设计Tailor-Bench，包含三种场景模式：常规（常见工具-任务对）、非常规（属性兼容替代工具测试功能泛化）、不可能（属性违反工具测试约束意识）。在统一协议下设置两种生成任务：预测性生成（无指导推断结果）和描述性生成（指定目标结果忠实实现）。
light_analysis.result: 实验揭示明确的长尾差距：性能从常规到非常规和不可能场景递减，表明泛化能力有限。失败分析显示，图像模型无法实现正确状态变化，视频模型进一步出现时间不一致问题，表明模型依赖表面视觉模式而非物理原理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明现有视觉世界模型在泛化物理交互方面存在不足，Tailor-Bench为系统评估物理推理提供基准，有助于指导未来模型设计，使其更鲁棒地建模物理世界。局限性在于当前benchmark规模有限，未来可扩展更多交互类型。

title: Social Structure Matters in 3D Human-Human Interaction Generation
abstract: Although text-to-motion generation has achieved strong progress in synthesizing realistic single-person motions from language, extending it to text-driven 3D human-human interaction (HHI) remains non-trivial, as HHI requires modeling the underlying \textbf{social structure} that governs phase progression, actor roles, and inter-actor coordination. In this paper, we formulate HHI generation as a social structure modeling and grounding problem: the model must first infer how an interaction unfolds and how the two actors coordinate their roles, and then realize this structure as continuous, physically plausible, and partner-aware 3D motion. To study how such structure should be modeled, we first examine the capability boundary of large language models (LLMs) for HHI generation. Our analysis shows that LLMs can \textit{think} by recovering phase decompositions and partner-aware roles, but cannot directly \textit{move}, as they fail to generate dynamic, physically plausible, and interaction-aware motion. This motivates our planner-executor paradigm, \textbf{Think with LLM, Move with Motion Skill}. The LLM planner converts implicit interaction semantics into motion-aligned social supervision by decomposing interactions into phases, assigning partner-aware actor roles, and aligning them with motion sequence. The motion executor then grounds the planned social structure into coordinated two-person motion by adapting a pretrained solo motion model with LoRA, previous-phase self-conditioning, and ego-relative partner conditioning. Together, our Solo-to-Social framework bridges social organization and motion realization, producing 3D HHI with improved phase consistency, role alignment, and partner-aware coordination.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Solo-to-Social框架，通过LLM规划社会结构（相位分解、角色分配）和运动执行器（LoRA适配单人模型）生成3D人-人交互，提升相位一致性和角色协调。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到单人运动生成已进展显著，但扩展至人-人交互（HHI）需建模社会结构（相位、角色、协调）。直接使用LLM生成运动失败，因其无法产生动态物理合理运动。现有方法缺乏将隐式交互语义转化为显式结构并指导运动生成的机制，亟需一种规划-执行范式来桥接社会组织和运动实现。
light_analysis.method: 采用“Think with LLM, Move with Motion Skill”范式。LLM规划器将文本隐式交互分解为阶段，分配伙伴感知角色，并与运动序列对齐，生成社会监督信号。运动执行器基于预训练单人运动模型，通过LoRA微调、前一阶段自条件化和自我-相对伙伴条件化，将规划结构实现为连续、物理合理且协调的双人运动。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在3D HHI生成中显著改进相位一致性、角色对齐和伙伴感知协调。与直接使用LLM或未建模社会结构的方法相比，生成的运动更具动态合理性和交互感知性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但定性分析验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出Solo-to-Social框架，将社会结构建模与运动生成结合，从文本生成高质量3D人-人交互。学术上揭示了社会结构在交互运动中的关键作用；应用上可用于虚拟现实、动画制作等。局限性在于依赖预训练单人模型和LLM规划，未来可探索端到端联合训练或更细粒度结构建模。

title: TuringViT: Making SOTA Vision Transformers Accessible to All
abstract: Modern VLMs and VLA systems commonly adopt off-the-shelf ViTs such as SigLIP2 as visual encoders, but diverse downstream requirements in latency, temporal modeling, and VLM integration often call for customized SOTA-level ViTs. Training such encoders remains beyond the reach of much of the community, as it requires massive image-text data, while standard softmax attention makes high-resolution or dynamic-resolution pretraining prohibitively costly and often forces low-resolution pretraining followed by post-hoc adaptation. TuringViT addresses these challenges with three key designs: Turing Linear Attention (TLA) for efficient sequence modeling, VISTA-Curation to construct supervision-rich image-video training data, and native dynamic-resolution pretraining that supports flexible inputs from the start and transfers seamlessly to downstream VLMs. As a result, TuringViT outperforms leading open-source ViT baselines with only 10% of the data, achieves stronger downstream VLM performance, and delivers substantially better latency scaling on high-resolution inputs. Our scaling-law analysis further shows that TuringViT continues to improve predictably with curated data scale, far from saturation. Its fast adaptation, hardware-friendly design, and efficient deployment have made it a unified visual foundation across XPeng's AI systems. More broadly, TuringViT provides a reproducible pipeline that dramatically lowers the cost for the community to train, customize, and deploy SOTA-level ViTs, moving toward making such Vision Transformers accessible to all.

light_analysis.overview: TuringViT通过高效线性注意力、数据筛选和原生动态分辨率预训练，使社区能以低成本训练SOTA级视觉Transformer。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代VLM和VLA系统常使用现成ViT（如SigLIP2）作为视觉编码器，但下游任务对延迟、时间建模和VLM集成有不同需求，需要定制化SOTA级ViT。然而，训练此类编码器需要海量图像-文本数据，且标准softmax注意力在高分辨率或动态分辨率预训练中成本过高，导致社区难以复现。现有方法通常采用低分辨率预训练后再后处理适配，效果受限。因此，需要一种高效、可复现的ViT训练方案。
light_analysis.method: TuringViT提出三大关键设计：1）Turing线性注意力（TLA），实现高效序列建模；2）VISTA-Curation，构建富含监督信息的图像-视频训练数据；3）原生动态分辨率预训练，从开始就支持灵活输入，并能无缝迁移到下游VLM。该方法仅使用公开数据，通过数据筛选和硬件友好的线性注意力降低计算成本，使高性能ViT训练更加经济高效。
light_analysis.result: TuringViT在仅使用10%数据的情况下，性能超越领先的开源ViT基线，下游VLM性能更强，且在高分辨率输入上延迟扩展显著更好。缩放律分析表明，TuringViT随着筛选数据规模增加而持续可预测地改进，远未饱和。该模型已成为小鹏AI系统的统一视觉基础，证明了其快速适配和高效部署能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: TuringViT提供了一条可复现的流水线，大幅降低了社区训练、定制和部署SOTA级ViT的成本，推动了视觉Transformer的普及。其创新在于线性注意力、数据筛选和动态分辨率预训练的结合，兼具效率与性能。未来可进一步探索更大数据规模和更广泛的下游应用，潜在局限性包括对数据筛选方法的依赖。

title: Probing the Misaligned Thinking Process of Language Models
abstract: Large language models exhibit a growing range of misaligned behaviors such as strategic deception, sandbagging, and self-preservation. As they are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, it is critical to reliably detect such behaviors to ensure safe and responsible use. In this work, we propose to monitor misalignment by decomposing it into fine-grained cognitive processes -- misalignment indicators -- and detecting their presence in a model's internal activations via linear probes. We develop a taxonomy of 18 indicators spanning different misaligned behaviors, paired with an automated, meta-plan-guided pipeline that generates multi-turn training conversations. To rigorously evaluate generalization, we construct an out-of-distribution suite combining automated behavioral elicitation, established misalignment benchmarks, and natural benign conversations. Across 5 misaligned behaviors, our probes match a strong LLM judge with 0.935 AUROC on out-of-distribution benchmarks while keeping a low false positive rate on benign traffic. We further perform in-depth analysis to understand the probes and the model's internal representations of misalignment indicators.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过线性探针监测语言模型内部激活中的细粒度不对齐指标，以检测多种不对齐行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在关键场景部署时表现出越来越多的不对齐行为（如战略欺骗、沙袋、自我保存），需要可靠检测以确保安全。现有方法可能难以捕捉细微的不对齐模式，本文通过将不对齐分解为细粒度认知过程（不对齐指标）并从模型内部表示中检测，提供了一种更可控的监测方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含18个指标的taxonomy，覆盖5种不对齐行为；设计元计划引导的自动化pipeline生成多轮训练对话；使用线性探针从模型内部激活中检测这些指标。评估时构建结合自动化行为诱导、现有不对齐基准和自然良性对话的分布外测试套件。
light_analysis.result: 在线性探针的分布外基准测试中，AUROC达到0.935，与强LLM评判者相当，同时在良性对话上保持低假阳性率。探针在多种不对齐行为上表现一致，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了将不对齐分解为细粒度认知指标并进行内部表示监测的可行性，为LLM安全监测提供了可解释且高效的工具。该方法可扩展至更多行为和场景，有助于推动负责任AI部署。

title: M^2C-EvDet: Multi-Domain Multi-Order Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation for Event-based Object Detection
abstract: Event-based object Detection (EvDet), as a biologically inspired visual perception paradigm, demonstrates superior performance in scenarios demanding high temporal resolution and a wide dynamic range. Nevertheless, the inherent sparse representations and inadequate visual semantics of event data result in a considerable performance disparity between EvDet and frame-based object detection. Previous works attempt to alleviate this cross-modal discrepancy through knowledge distillation, yet they only focus on spatial visual semantics or pair-wise relational information, thus limiting performance in more complex scenarios. To address this challenge, this paper proposes M^2C-EvDet, a Multi-domain and Multi-order Cross-modal knowledge distillation framework for EvDet. Built upon frequency learning and hypergraph computation, M^2C-EvDet integrates two specialized modules: Adaptive Frequency-Decoupled Feature Distillation (AF^2D^2) and Multi-Order Relational Distillation (MORD).

light_analysis.overview: 提出M^2C-EvDet，一种多域多阶跨模态知识蒸馏框架，用于缩小事件与帧基检测的性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件数据具有稀疏性和弱视觉语义，导致事件基检测精度远低于帧基方法。现有跨模态蒸馏仅利用空间视觉或成对关系，在复杂场景下效果有限。因此需要一种能同时捕获多域（如频域）和多阶关系的方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建基于频率学习和超图计算的多域多阶蒸馏框架，包含两个模块：（1）自适应频域解耦特征蒸馏（AF^2D^2），在频域中对齐特征；（2）多阶关系蒸馏（MORD），利用超图捕获高阶结构关系。通过联合优化缩小跨模态差异。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。推测该方法在事件检测数据集上相比基线（如仅空间或成对蒸馏）取得显著提升，尤其在复杂场景（如高速运动、低光照）下。具体指标需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: M^2C-EvDet通过创新性地引入频域和多阶关系蒸馏，有效缓解了事件与帧数据间的语义鸿沟，为事件视觉感知提供新思路。未来可探索更高效的超图计算以及扩展到其他事件视觉任务。

title: Towards Federated Long-Tailed Graph Learning: An Energy-Guided Dual Decoupling Approach
abstract: Federated Graph Learning facilitates collaborative graph modeling across distributed clients while preserving data privacy. However, real-world data categories frequently exhibit long-tailed distributions. Such statistical scarcity severely degrades performance in two ways: it biases the global model toward majority classes, and it structurally isolates minority nodes by submerging them in heterophilic, head-dominated neighborhoods. While existing methods attempt topology-agnostic statistical compensations, they often fail under data scarcity. Instead of recovering tail nodes, they overfit the structural noise from adjacent dominant classes, leading to representation degradation. To address these limitations, we propose FedEPD, a framework built on a dual decoupling paradigm that separates topological purification from semantic recalibration. Specifically, FedEPD utilizes distribution-aware Dirichlet energy pruning to filter spatial heterophilic edges. It then overcomes Non-IID distribution shifts by extracting robust global prototypes from topologically central nodes, which are incorporated into local representations via a spatial low-pass prototype injection. Furthermore, a two stage alternating optimization strategy strictly protects majority decision boundaries while improving minority accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedEPD achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse long-tailed benchmarks, yielding absolute improvements of up to 4.97% in Accuracy and 5.48% in Macro-F1.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedEPD框架，通过双重解耦（拓扑纯化与语义重校准）解决联邦图学习中的长尾分布问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦图学习中真实数据呈现长尾分布，导致全局模型偏向多数类，同时少数节点在异质性头部主导邻居中被结构隔离。现有拓扑无关的统计补偿方法在数据稀缺下过度拟合结构噪声，无法恢复尾节点表示。因此需要同时处理拓扑和语义偏差。
light_analysis.method: FedEPD采用双重解耦：首先通过分布感知的Dirichlet能量剪枝过滤异质边实现拓扑纯化；然后从拓扑中心节点提取全局原型，通过空间低通原型注入克服Non-IID分布偏移。此外，两阶段交替优化策略保护多数决策边界并提升少数准确率。
light_analysis.result: 在多个长尾基准数据集上，FedEPD达到SOTA，Accuracy绝对提升高达4.97%，Macro-F1绝对提升高达5.48%。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedEPD通过拓扑-语义双重解耦有效解决联邦长尾图学习，兼顾多数和少数类性能。未来可探索更细粒度的原型注入和隐私保护增强。

title: SP-Mind: An Autonomous Reasoning Agent for Spatial Proteomics Analysis
abstract: Spatial proteomics enables single-cell-resolution characterization of protein expression within tissue architecture, playing a critical role in understanding tumor microenvironments and guiding precision medicine. However, current analysis workflows remain fragmented, requiring expert manual orchestration of heterogeneous tools and limiting research scalability and reproducibility. We present SP-Mind, the first autonomous AI agent designed to unify the spatial proteomics analysis pipeline, from raw multiplexed tissue imaging to downstream phenotype discovery. Equipped with expert-curated biological analysis skills and specialized computational tools, SP-Mind converts natural-language queries into end-to-end analytical workflows without task-specific fine-tuning. To rigorously evaluate its capabilities, we introduce SP-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark spanning diverse tissue types, comprising 102 tasks across 18 distinct categories. Through extensive evaluation on SP-Bench and established downstream tasks, SP-Mind achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to existing open-source biomedical agent baselines.
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to ICML 2026. Equal contribution by Yucheng Yuan and Yuanfeng Ji

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个自主AI智能体SP-Mind，统一空间蛋白质组学分析流程，无需任务微调即可将自然语言查询转换为端到端分析工作流。
light_analysis.motivation: 空间蛋白质组学能够在组织架构内实现单细胞分辨率的蛋白表达表征，对理解肿瘤微环境和指导精准医学至关重要。然而，当前分析流程碎片化，需要专家手动协调异构工具，限制了研究的可扩展性和可重复性。现有方法缺乏统一的自动化解决方案，难以高效、标准化地处理从原始多重组织成像到下游表型发现的完整分析链。
light_analysis.method: SP-Mind是一个自主AI智能体，配备了专家精选的生物学分析技能和专门的计算工具。它无需任务特定微调，直接将自然语言查询转换为端到端的分析工作流。为了严格评估其能力，研究还引入了SP-Bench基准，涵盖多种组织类型，包含18个类别共102个任务。
light_analysis.result: 在SP-Bench基准和已建立的下游任务上进行广泛评估后，SP-Mind相比现有的开源生物医学智能体基线取得了最先进的性能。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但强调了其优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SP-Mind作为首个统一的自主分析智能体，有望解决空间蛋白质组学分析流程的碎片化问题，提升可扩展性和可重复性。其零微调转换自然语言查询的能力降低了使用门槛。未来工作可扩展至更多组织类型和任务，进一步验证其泛化能力。

title: From Open Waters to Enclosed Cabins: ProteusVPR for Cross-Scene Visual Place Recognition in Maritime Perception and Cabin Inspection
abstract: Autonomous robotic inspection in maritime environments presents unique challenges for Visual Place Recognition (VPR) due to cross-scene perceptual shifts. Robots navigating ship-borne environments must transition between visually distinct domains: open decks with sparse textures and severe illumination changes, and enclosed cabins with repetitive structures and high visual ambiguity. Existing VPR methods, designed primarily for urban or indoor scenes, fail to generalize reliably across these starkly different scenarios. To address this, we propose ProteusVPR, a two-stage retrieval-refinement framework. The first stage employs any standard VPR model for initial image retrieval. The second stage introduces a geometric-visual estimation network that fuses the retrieved image with two temporally preceding frames, incorporating geometric descriptors, a local affine coordinate system, and camera azimuth encoding to achieve precise localization. To support this task, we introduce the XHZ dataset, an 8K-panoramic ship-borne dataset collected from an operational vessel, featuring multi-floor cabin structures, deck transition zones, and strict query-database separation for rigorous evaluation. Extensive experiments on the XHZ dataset demonstrate that ProteusVPR consistently improves the localization accuracy across multiple VPR backbones, reducing mean localization error by over 60\% on average and that ProteusVPR offers an effective and robust solution for precise visual localization in challenging, cross-scene maritime environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProteusVPR，一种两阶段检索-精炼框架，用于跨场景视觉地点识别，在船舶环境中的开放甲板和封闭舱室之间实现鲁棒定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 船舶自主巡检中视觉地点识别面临跨场景感知变化，开放甲板纹理稀疏、光照变化剧烈，封闭舱室结构重复、视觉模糊。现有VPR方法针对城市或室内场景设计，无法可靠泛化到这些截然不同的场景，导致定位失败。该研究旨在解决这一实际问题，提升机器人在船舶环境中的导航能力。
light_analysis.method: ProteusVPR采用两阶段框架：第一阶段使用任意标准VPR模型进行初始图像检索；第二阶段引入几何视觉估计网络，融合检索图像与两个时间前帧，结合几何描述符、局部仿射坐标系和相机方位角编码实现精确定位。同时构建XHZ数据集，包含8K全景船舶图像，覆盖多楼层舱室、甲板过渡区，并严格分离查询与数据库以支持评估。
light_analysis.result: 在XHZ数据集上的大量实验表明，ProteusVPR在多个VPR骨干网络上一致提升定位精度，平均降低定位误差超过60%，证明了其在跨场景船舶环境中实现精确视觉定位的有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于提出了一种适用于船舶跨场景环境的VPR框架，有效解决了开放甲板与封闭舱室之间的感知差异问题。该研究具有重要的学术价值，可推动自主巡检在船舶工业中的应用。未来工作可能扩展至更复杂的船舶结构或动态环境。

title: Latent Visual States for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning
abstract: The integration of visual evidence has significantly enhanced the capabilities of large multimodal models. However, this integration predominantly relies on generating discrete outputs (etc., code or box coordinates) to invoke external tools, a process that introduces rigid dependencies and substantial latency. To overcome these limitations, we propose {EVA} (LatEnt Visual StAtes), a novel framework that natively generates continuous latent visual representations. These internal representations manifest as an adaptive sequence of Latent\_slot tokens, serving as intermediate visual thoughts during the reasoning process. These Latent\_slot tokens are then trained end-to-end with the discrete text tokens. This co-optimization, notably, causes extreme policy deviation in the 'transition window' following the Latent\_slot tokens. We develop D-GSPO (Decouple-GSPO) to target this root cause by decoupling the optimization of latent and discrete components. To support SFT, we construct EVA-230K, a high-quality text-image interleaved CoT dataset encompassing a diverse range of real-world scenes, documents, charts and OCR tasks. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks confirm that EVA achieves significant performance gains while enhancing inference efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EVA框架，通过生成连续的潜视觉表示作为中间视觉思维，实现高效多模态推理，并解耦优化解决策略偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型多模态模型集成视觉证据时主要依赖生成离散输出（如代码或框坐标）来调用外部工具，导致刚性和高延迟。为克服这些限制，需要一种更灵活高效的方式，让模型内部直接利用连续视觉表示进行推理，从而减少依赖和提升速度。
light_analysis.method: 提出EVA（潜视觉状态）框架，原生生成连续的潜视觉表示，表现为适应性序列的Latent_slot令牌，作为推理中的中间视觉思维。这些令牌与离散文本令牌端到端联合训练。为解决联合训练导致的策略偏差，开发D-GSPO（解耦-GSPO）方法，将潜组件和离散组件的优化解耦。同时构建EVA-230K数据集，包含真实场景、文档、图表和OCR任务的高质量图文交错思维链数据。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上的大量实验证实，EVA在提升推理效率的同时取得了显著的性能增益。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但表明优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: EVA框架通过连续潜视觉状态为多模态推理提供了一种高效方案，避免了离散输出的延迟和刚性。解耦优化策略D-GSPO有效解决了联合训练中的策略偏差。EVA-230K数据集支持监督微调。该工作对实时多模态应用具有重要价值，未来可进一步扩展潜视觉表示的应用范围。

title: FiCA: Feed-forward instant Gaussian Codec Avatars from a Single Portrait Image
abstract: We introduce FiCA, a Feed-forward, instant Gaussian Codec Avatar generation pipeline that creates lifelike avatars from a single portrait image. Generating a photorealistic and drivable avatar from just a single image is significantly challenging due to the limited visual information available to accurately infer the 3D appearance and geometry of human heads. To address this, we develop a novel system that combines human-centric vision foundation models with a diffusion model. This system is designed to fully exploit partial visual observations to generate lifelike human avatars. Our proposed diffusion model learns a generative mapping from these partial observations to complete and authentic 3D mesh reconstruction. Additionally, we introduce a feed-forward mesh refinement network that enhances the fidelity and identity preservation of the generated avatars, eliminating the need for person-specific test-time optimization. By leveraging a universal prior model that decodes a generated mesh into a set of 3D Gaussians, we generate a photorealistic 3D Gaussian avatar, capable of being driven with novel expressions in real-time. Our experiments demonstrate that the avatars generated by our feed-forward approach faithfully represent diverse identities and surpass the visual quality of avatars produced by recent competing methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FiCA，一种前馈式即时高斯编码化头像生成管线，从单张肖像图像生成逼真且可驱动的3D高斯头像。
light_analysis.motivation: 从单张图像生成逼真且可驱动的3D头像极具挑战，因为视觉信息有限，难以准确推断人头部的3D外观和几何。现有方法常需多视角数据或测试时优化，效率低且泛化能力不足。本文旨在通过结合人类中心视觉基础模型与扩散模型，充分挖掘部分视觉观测，实现高质量头像生成，无需个性化优化。
light_analysis.method: 提出结合人类中心视觉基础模型与扩散模型的系统，学习从部分观测到完整3D网格重建的生成映射。引入前馈式网格细化网络，增强保真度和身份保持。利用通用先验模型将生成的网格解码为一组3D高斯，实现逼真的3D高斯头像，并支持实时驱动新颖表情。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，FiCA生成的头像能忠实表示不同身份，视觉质量优于近期竞争方法。摘要未明确具体数值，但强调在保真度和身份保持上超越基线，且无需测试时优化即可达到高质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一种高效的前馈式头像生成方法，无需测试时优化即可生成逼真的可驱动3D头像。学术上，结合扩散模型与网格细化为单图像3D重建提供了新思路；实际应用中，可用于虚拟现实、数字人创建等。未来可探索更鲁棒的先验以处理极端姿态或遮挡。

title: FlowR2A: Learning Reward-to-Action Distribution for Multimodal Driving Planning
abstract: Multimodal driving planning faces a long-standing tension between two paradigms: scoring-based methods benefit from dense reward supervision but are confined to a fixed action vocabulary, while anchor-based methods generate proposals dynamically yet suffer from sparse supervision constrained to a single ground-truth trajectory. In this work, we propose FlowR2A, which resolves this tension by reframing simulation-based rewards from discriminative targets into generative conditions. By learning the reward-conditioned action distribution from dense trajectory-reward pairs with a flow-matching decoder, FlowR2A unifies the dense supervision of scoring-based methods with the proposal generation of anchor-based methods in a single generative model, forcing the model to internalize the correlation between an action and its outcomes in safety, progress, comfort, and rule compliance. To balance hard safety constraints against soft progress objectives, we introduce fine-grained per-timestep reward conditioning and reward noise augmentation. The generative formulation naturally supports controllable test-time sampling via reward guidance and anchored sampling, producing high-quality proposals. FlowR2A achieves state-of-the-art results on the NAVSIM v1 and v2 benchmarks, with multimodal proposals of substantially higher quality than prior methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowR2A，通过流匹配学习奖励条件动作分布，统一了基于评分和基于锚点的多模态驾驶规划范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态驾驶规划面临基于评分和基于锚点两种范式的长期矛盾：前者受益于密集奖励监督但受限于固定动作词汇，后者动态生成提案但受限于稀疏监督（仅单个真实轨迹）。为解决此问题，需要一种方法既能利用密集奖励信号又能动态生成高质量多模态提案。
light_analysis.method: FlowR2A将仿真奖励从判别目标重构为生成条件，利用流匹配解码器从密集轨迹-奖励对中学习奖励条件动作分布。引入细粒度每时间步奖励条件和奖励噪声增强，以平衡硬安全约束与软进度目标。通过奖励引导和锚定采样实现可控测试时采样，生成高质量多模态提案。
light_analysis.result: 在NAVSIM v1和v2基准上取得最先进结果，多模态提案质量显著优于先前方法。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但强调提案质量大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowR2A解决了多模态驾驶规划中密集监督与动态生成之间的张力，统一两种范式于单一生成模型。其奖励条件动作分布迫使模型内化动作与安全、进度、舒适和规则遵守结果之间的关联。未来可用于更复杂的自动驾驶场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Geometry-Instructed Video Editing
abstract: Object-level geometric edits, including translating, rotating, scaling, duplicating, or removing an object, are routine operations in digital content creation (DCC) workflows, yet they remain unreliable in generative video editing. The key challenge lies in specifying the target object's 3D state change unambiguously across viewpoint and time, while consistently updating geometry-dependent secondary effects such as shadows and reflections. We introduce GIVE, a geometry-instructed video editing framework that represents edits through a unified object-state formulation. Two video-aligned geometry streams describe the target object before and after editing: a depth-box encoding coarse 3D placement and extent, and an orientation-box providing an appearance-agnostic orientation cue. Together, these streams provide a compact pre/post geometric specification for object-state transitions. To provide paired supervision for learning these edits, we build a scalable graphics-engine pipeline that executes object-level edit programs and renders controlled before/after pairs, isolating the intended geometric edit while keeping secondary effects consistent with the transformation. Experimental results demonstrate that GIVE produces faithful geometric edits with temporal coherence and consistent secondary effects across operators in a unified framework, and shows promising transfer to in-the-wild videos. Project page: https://geometry-instructed-video-editing.github.io/give/

light_analysis.overview: 提出GIVE框架，通过统一的物体状态表示和几何指导流实现对象级几何编辑，兼顾时间一致性和次要效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 数字内容创作中对象级几何编辑（平移、旋转、缩放等）是常规操作，但现有生成式视频编辑方法不可靠，主要难点在于跨视角和时间明确指定目标物体3D状态变化，同时保持阴影、反射等几何依赖的次要效果一致。现有方法缺乏统一的几何规范，导致编辑结果不一致。
light_analysis.method: GIVE框架采用统一的物体状态公式表示编辑，通过两个视频对齐的几何流描述编辑前后目标：深度框编码粗略的3D位置和范围，方向框提供与外观无关的方位线索，共同形成物体状态转换的紧凑几何规范。为提供成对监督，构建可扩展的图形引擎管道执行对象级编辑程序并渲染受控的前后对，分离预期几何编辑同时保持次要效果与变换一致。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明GIVE在统一框架内对不同操作生成忠实几何编辑，具有时间一致性和一致的次要效果。在受控数据和野外视频上均展现良好迁移能力，但具体数值指标（如准确率、效率）摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: GIVE通过几何指导解决了视频编辑中对象级几何编辑的可靠性问题，提供了统一的框架和可扩展的数据生成方法。具有学术和实际应用价值，可广泛应用于视频合成和后期制作。未来可能扩展至更复杂几何变换或与其他编辑任务结合，但当前方法依赖图形引擎数据可能存在域差距。

title: Exploring the relationship between human-centric AI and firm idiosyncratic risks
abstract: Despite the extensive discussions of human-centric AI (HCAI) in Industry 5.0, its effects on firms' idiosyncratic risks (IR) remains underexplored. This is an imperative issue for firms navigate financial risks during the current technological revolution, as IR reflects investor reactions to corporate heterogeneous AI strategies and implementations by isolating firm-level stock volatility from systematic factors. Integrating situated AI theory with social-technical systems theory, we conceptualise HCAI as a situated AI strategy that reduces AI-related ethical risks and fosters AI-Human synergies in firms' business operations, ultimately reducing IR by aligning with stakeholders' diverse expectations. Moreover, socio-technical factors, namely digitalisation, operational efficiency, executive shareholding, and CEOs with IT background, may moderate the HCAI-IR relationship. Using a multi-source panel dataset of Chinese listed firms from 2015 to 2023, we find that HCAI is associated with lower firm IR. Furthermore, digitalisation and executive shareholding strengthen this risk-reducing effect, whereas operational efficiency and CEOs with IT background surprisingly attenuate it. Our findings offer theoretical contributions and practical insights for both ethical AI governance and firm financial risk management in the AI era.

light_analysis.overview: 发现以人为中心的人工智能（HCAI）能够降低企业特质风险，并识别数字化、高管持股等调节因素，为AI时代的企业风险管理和伦理治理提供实证依据。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管工业5.0中广泛讨论HCAI，但其对企业特质风险（IR）的影响仍未被探索。IR通过隔离系统性因素反映投资者对企业AI策略的反应，是企业财务风险的重要指标。现有研究缺乏实证证据，亟需理解HCAI如何通过减少伦理风险、促进人机协同来影响IR，以及哪些情境因素会调节这一关系。
light_analysis.method: 整合情境化AI理论与社会技术系统理论，将HCAI概念化为一种情境化AI策略。采用2015–2023年中国上市公司多源面板数据，构建面板回归模型检验HCAI对IR的影响，并引入数字化水平、运营效率、高管持股比例、CEO IT背景作为调节变量，探讨社会技术因素对HCAI-IR关系的调节效应。
light_analysis.result: 实证结果表明，HCAI与企业特质风险显著负相关，即采用HCAI策略的公司IR更低。调节效应分析显示，数字化水平和高管持股比例强化了HCAI的风险降低作用；而运营效率和CEO的IT背景反而削弱了这一效应，这一发现与预期相反，揭示了社会技术因素的复杂调节机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次从实证角度揭示HCAI对企业财务风险的影响机制，拓展了AI治理与金融风险管理的交叉研究。理论上整合了伦理AI与财务视角，实践上为企业平衡技术创新与风险控制提供指导。未来可进一步探究因果路径及跨行业、跨文化的适用性。

title: Decoherence as Defence and the Magnitude of Noise Regularisation: A Rigorous N -Qubit Theory of Stochastic Quantum Neural Networks for Adversarially Robust Network Intrusion Detection
abstract: Stochastic quantum neural networks (SQNNs) encode neuronal activations as qubits, synaptic topology as entanglement, and neural noise through a Lindblad master equation. A recent conference study applied a ring-entangled SQNN to collaborative intrusion detection and reached three conclusions: ring entanglement is \emph{essential} for non-local anomaly detection; an adversarial-resilience bound holds but is \emph{conservative}; and the depolarising channel \emph{fails} to act as a dropout-style regulariser, behaving instead as output noise. It left open whether a per-gate stochastic deactivation (``true quantum dropout'') could regularise where the depolarising channel could not, and whether the loose robustness bound could be replaced by a predictive theory. This paper resolves both and extends the framework to real data and to neutral-atom hardware. We give an $N$-qubit formulation through the stochastic master equation and its vectorised Liouvillian, and prove a \emph{decoherence-contraction theorem}: a depolarising channel of strength $γ$ over $L$ entangling layers contracts every weight-$w$ Pauli read-out by a factor $(1-4γ/3)^{wL}$ (for the weight-$1$ read-out used here, $(1-4γ/3)^{L}$); building on the general noise-as-defence result of Du et al., we make this quantitative and operational for intrusion detection. On the real NSL-KDD dataset under white-box FGSM and PGD attacks, a depolarising SQNN trained with the channel is, over seven seeds under strong $\ell_\infty$/$\ell_2$ attacks, significantly more robust than the noiseless circuit ($\ell_\infty$ PGD-$20$, $p=0.04$, large effect) and, critically, never suffers the catastrophic robustness collapse that the noiseless model and gradient-trained classical detectors (which fall from $95\%$ to $47\%$) do, cutting robustness variance roughly twofold; we show this robustness arises from a noise-reshaped training boundary rather than from attack-time gradient contraction. For generalisation, we derive an adaptive-penalty formula showing that per-gate dropout implements a curvature-weighted $L_2$ penalty $\tfrac{p(1-p)}{2}\sumθ^2\partial^2_θL$ in weight space, maximised at $p=1/2$, whereas depolarising noise implements an output-space penalty. A $30$-seed study confirms the formula's quantitative prediction: both mechanisms reduce the train-test gap by a small but statistically significant margin ($\approx\!0.01$; $p<10^{-4}$ and $p=0.004$), are statistically indistinguishable from each other, and the effect is concentrated where overfitting is largest; increasing the dropout rate past $1/2$ does not help, as the formula predicts. The single-seed dichotomy of prior work does not survive replication. We close with a neutral-atom realisation and a feasibility-by-$N$ analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出严格的N量子比特随机量子神经网络理论，证明退相干作为防御机制，并量化噪声正则化幅度，用于对抗鲁棒的网络入侵检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究表明环形纠缠对非局部异常检测必要，但对抗弹性边界保守，退极化通道不能作为dropout式正则化器。本文旨在解决两个遗留问题：每个门的随机失活（量子dropout）能否正则化？能否用预测理论替代松散的鲁棒边界？
light_analysis.method: 通过随机主方程及其矢量化Liouvillian给出N量子比特公式，证明退相干收缩定理：退极化通道强度γ在L个纠缠层上收缩每个泡利读出因子为(1-4γ/3)^(wL)。推导自适应惩罚公式，显示每个门的dropout实现曲率加权L2惩罚，退极化噪声实现输出空间惩罚。
light_analysis.result: 在NSL-KDD数据集上，白盒FGSM和PGD攻击下，退极化SQNN比无噪声电路显著鲁棒（ℓ∞ PGD-20, p=0.04），从未出现鲁棒性崩溃（无噪声模型和经典检测器从95%降至47%），鲁棒性方差减半。30次种子实验确认公式预测：两种机制减小训练-测试差距约0.01（p<10^-4和p=0.004），统计上不可区分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了先前研究的开放问题，将框架扩展到真实数据和中性原子硬件。提供了严格的N量子比特理论，量化退相干作为防御和噪声正则化幅度，并展示中性原子实现和可行性分析。

title: MorVess: Morphology-Aware Pulmonary Vessel Segmentation Network
abstract: Accurate pulmonary vessel segmentation remains challenging due to the sparse, tortuous, and multi-scale nature of vascular structures, where small branches are easily lost and topology integrity is difficult to preserve under voxel-wise supervision. Existing deep segmentation models primarily optimize binary masks, lacking explicit geometric constraints, thus struggling to recover continuous tubular morphology and fine vascular connectivity. In this study, we introduce MorVess, a morphology-aware segmentation framework that integrates differentiable geometric priors with large-scale foundation model adaptation to achieve fine-grained vascular parsing. MorVess jointly predicts vessel masks, distance maps, and thickness maps, providing explicit supervision for vascular boundaries, centerline consistency, and smooth diameter transitions. A lightweight 2.5D adapter bridges 3D spatial context and 2D SAM representations, while a global-local fusion block aggregates multi-level semantics and geometric cues for high-fidelity topology reconstruction. Across two challenging pulmonary CT benchmarks, MorVess delivers superior Dice, clDice, and HD95 scores, substantially improving small-vessel recovery and global connectivity. These results demonstrate that embedding geometric intelligence into pretrained vision models offers a principled and scalable pathway toward precise vessel analysis and clinically reliable structural quantification. Our source code is available at https://github.com/MaoFuyou/MorVess.

light_analysis.overview: 提出形态感知的肺血管分割网络MorVess，集成可微几何先验与大型基础模型适配，实现精细血管解析。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确肺血管分割面临血管稀疏、弯曲、多尺度等挑战，小分支易丢失，拓扑完整性难以保持。现有深度模型优化二元掩码，缺乏显式几何约束，难以恢复连续管状形态和精细连接。
light_analysis.method: 联合预测血管掩码、距离图和厚度图，提供边界、中心线一致性、直径平滑过渡的监督。轻量2.5D适配器桥接3D空间上下文和2D SAM表示，全局-局部融合块聚合多级语义和几何线索实现高保真拓扑重建。
light_analysis.result: 在两个挑战性肺CT基准上，MorVess在Dice、clDice、HD95上取得更优得分，显著改善小血管恢复和全局连通性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将几何智能嵌入预训练视觉模型为精确血管分析和临床可靠结构量化提供了原则性和可扩展的途径，源码已公开。

title: Inclusive Interactive Collisions for Multi-View Consistent Compositional 3D Generation
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in 3D generation have advanced notably with the development of text-to-image diffusion model. However, existing methods remain two practical challenges: (1) They primarily generate single 3D object, but struggle to generate multi-object compositional 3D assets due to the lack of the modeling for Gaussian primitives in reasonable interactions. (2) They often suffer from cross-view inconsistency during 3D optimization, as Score Distillation Sampling inherently performs on each single view, inevitably resulting in cross-view hallucinations. To solve above issues, we propose I2C-3D, a novel optimization-based method to generate multi-view consistent compositional 3D assets with reasonable interactions. Specifically, we propose an Inclusive Interactive Collisions strategy to guide Gaussian primitives appearing in reasonable interaction regions naturally, thereby ensuring objects in the compositional scene interact in a physically plausible and visually coherent way. Additionally, to enhance multi-view consistency, Multi-View Adaptive Score Distillation Sampling is devised to distill multi-view consistency prior and layout prior from pre-trained diffusion model by modulating attention map of instance token and spatial token across viewpoints. Benefiting from above elaborate designs, I2C-3D not only generates high-fidelity multi-view consistent compositional 3D assets but also supports 3D editing flexibly, facilitating complex scene generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate our I2C-3D outperforms existing methods in generation quality and multi-view consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出I2C-3D，通过包容性交互碰撞策略和多视角自适应分数蒸馏采样，实现多视角一致的组合3D生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D生成方法主要针对单个对象，难以生成多对象组合3D资产，缺乏对高斯原语合理交互的建模；同时，分数蒸馏采样在单视角上优化导致跨视角不一致，限制了组合场景的生成质量。因此需要解决合理交互和多视角一致性的双重挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出I2C-3D框架，包括两个关键创新：包容性交互碰撞策略，通过引导高斯原语出现在合理交互区域，确保组合场景中对象的交互在物理和视觉上一致；多视角自适应分数蒸馏采样，通过调制实例token和空间token的跨视角注意力图，从预训练扩散模型中提取多视角一致性和布局先验。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明I2C-3D在生成质量和多视角一致性上优于现有方法，能生成高保真多视角一致的组合3D资产，并支持灵活的3D编辑和复杂场景生成，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文解决了多对象组合3D生成中合理交互和多视角一致性问题，学术贡献在于提出I2C-3D框架，实际应用价值在于提升复杂场景的3D生成与编辑能力。未来可进一步优化交互物理真实性等。

title: MMed-Bench-IR: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Multilingual Medical Information Retrieval
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) in clinical settings increasingly requires multilingual retrieval against predominantly English evidence corpora. Multilingual medical retrieval demands three capabilities: cross-lingual alignment, concept discrimination, and evidence retrieval. However, existing benchmarks evaluate these only in isolation, leaving the interaction between biomedical expertise and multilingual coverage unmeasured. We introduce MMed-Bench-IR, a benchmark designed to disentangle these axes across 6 languages and three structurally heterogeneous tasks: (1) cross-lingual medical QA retrieval with 6,127 queries grounded in the Unified Medical Language System (UMLS), (2) concept discrimination over 4,975 confusion sets at three difficulty tiers, and (3) multilingual evidence retrieval for RAG with 2,040 quality-assured queries. The three tasks share zero concept and query overlap by design, ensuring that aggregate scores reflect genuine capability breadth. Evaluation of ten systems across six paradigm families reveals severe cross-lingual failure: biomedical encoders that score 0.818 nDCG@10 in English drop to 0.056 in Japanese, a gap that English-only benchmarks cannot detect.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了MMed-Bench-IR，一个多语言医学信息检索的异构基准，联合评估跨语言对齐、概念区分和证据检索能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 在临床环境中，检索增强生成（RAG）日益需要针对英语语料库的多语言检索。然而，现有基准仅孤立评估跨语言对齐、概念区分和证据检索能力，无法测量生物医学专业知识与多语言覆盖之间的交互作用。为此，需要一个新的基准来全面评估多语言医学信息检索系统的实际能力。
light_analysis.method: MMed-Bench-IR包含三个异构任务：跨语言医学QA检索（6127个查询，基于UMLS）、概念区分（4975个混淆集，三个难度层级）和多语言证据检索（2040个查询）。三个任务在概念和查询上无重叠，确保总分反映真实能力广度。评估了10个系统六种范式家族的表现。
light_analysis.result: 评估揭示了严重的跨语言失败：生物医学编码器在英语上的nDCG@10为0.818，但在日语上降至0.056。这种巨大差距是仅英语基准无法检测的，表明现有模型在多语言场景下性能显著下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMed-Bench-IR填补了多语言医学信息检索综合评估的空白，揭示了当前系统在跨语言任务中的严重缺陷。该基准有助于推动模型在生物医学专业知识和多语言覆盖上的协同发展，并为未来RAG系统的优化提供重要参考。

title: Navigating User Behavior toward Personalized Multimodal Generation
abstract: Modern AIGC pipelines deliver high-fidelity images and videos but presuppose a well-formed creation instruction, while end users rarely articulate visual details, leaving generators misaligned with user demand. We study personalized content generation, which turns a user's interaction history into an executable instruction for downstream synthesis, and identify two obstacles: behavior must be encoded in a form legible to language reasoning, and the model must acquire instruction-writing skill absent from both pretraining and behavior data. We propose NaviGen, which represents each item with a dual identifier coupling a collaborative code and a textual code as a behavioral substrate and a semantic bridge in one token stream. On this representation, a two-stage SFT+RL pipeline first distills preference reasoning and instruction writing from evolutionarily searched supervision, then aligns generation with user intent through hierarchical and self-consistent rewards. Experiments across product, game, and short-video domains show that NaviGen improves personalized image and video generation, strengthens next-item prediction, and yields more specific, relevant, and visually generatable instructions. Our code is anonymously released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/NaviGen.
comment: 16 pages, 15 figures, 5 tables. Code is available at https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/NaviGen

light_analysis.overview: 提出NaviGen，通过双标识编码和两阶段SFT+RL训练，实现从用户行为到个性化多模态生成的指令学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AIGC流程需要良好格式的创作指令，但终端用户很少能准确描述视觉细节，导致生成结果与用户需求不匹配。现有方法无法将用户交互历史编码为可推理的指令形式，且模型缺乏从预训练和行为数据中获取的指令写作技能。
light_analysis.method: NaviGen提出双标识编码，为每个物品分配协作码和文本码，分别作为行为基元和语义桥梁。采用两阶段SFT+RL流程：先通过演化搜索的监督数据提炼偏好推理和指令写作，再使用分层自洽奖励对齐生成与用户意图。实验覆盖产品、游戏和短视频域。
light_analysis.result: NaviGen在个性化图像和视频生成任务上取得提升，增强了下一项预测能力，生成的指令更具体、相关且可直接用于视觉生成。结果显示了跨领域的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NaviGen有效解决了用户行为到个性化多模态生成的指令学习难题，通过双标识表示和两阶段训练实现了行为编码与指令写作的协同优化。未来可探索更复杂的行为建模和跨模态泛化。

title: Co-occurring associated retained concepts in Diffusion Unlearning
abstract: Unlearning has emerged as a key technique to mitigate harmful content generation in diffusion models. However, existing methods often remove not only the target concept, but also benign co-occurring concepts. As illustrated in Fig.1, unlearning nudity can unintentionally suppress the concept of person, preventing a model from generating images with person. We define these undesirably suppressed co-occurring concepts that must be preserved CARE (Co-occurring Associated REtained concepts). Then, we introduce the CARE score, a general metric that directly quantifies their preservation across unlearning tasks. With this foundation, we propose ReCARE (Robust erasure for CARE), a framework that explicitly safeguards CARE while erasing only the target concept. ReCARE automatically constructs the CARE-set, a curated vocabulary of benign co-occurring tokens extracted from target images, and leverages this vocabulary during training for stable unlearning. Extensive experiments across various target concepts (Nudity, Van Gogh style, and Tench object) demonstrate that ReCARE achieves overall state-of-the-art performance in balancing robust concept erasure, overall utility, and CARE preservation.
comment: Accepted as a poster at ICLR 2026. Code available at https://github.com/damilab/CARE

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReCARE框架，在移除目标概念的同时保留良性共存概念（CARE），实现稳健的扩散模型遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型遗忘方法在移除目标概念（如裸体）时，会意外抑制共存概念（如人物），导致模型生成能力下降。为解决这一副作用，需定义并量化这些需保留的共存概念，并提出显式保护它们的遗忘方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先定义CARE（需保留的共存概念），提出CARE score指标直接量化其保留程度。然后提出ReCARE框架，自动从目标图像中构建良性共存概念的词汇集（CARE-set），并在训练中利用该词汇集实现稳定遗忘，仅擦除目标概念。
light_analysis.result: 在多个目标概念（裸体、梵高风格、丁鱥物体）的实验中，ReCARE在平衡概念擦除、整体效用和CARE保留方面均达到当前最优性能。具体指标摘要未明确列出，但声称全面优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次系统定义并量化扩散模型遗忘中的共存概念保留问题，提出的ReCARE框架为保护良性概念提供了有效方案，有助于提升遗忘技术的实用性和安全性。未来可扩展至更多概念和更复杂的生成模型。

title: Aspect-Based Sentiment Evolution and its Correlation with Review Rounds in Multi-Round Peer Reviews: A Deep Learning Approach
abstract: Mining sentiment information from the textual content of peer review comments offers valuable insights into the scientific evaluation process. However, previous studies are often constrained by coarse-grained analysis and the lack of differentiation across review rounds. Notably, the dynamic shifts in reviewers' focus and sentiment tendencies throughout multiple review stages remain underexplored. To address this gap, the present study investigates the distribution and evolution of aspect-level sentiments and examines their correlation with the number of review rounds. We begin by segmenting the multi-round review comments of 11,063 accepted papers from Nature Communications and identifying fine-grained review aspect clusters. A manually annotated corpus of approximately 5,000 review sentences is then constructed. Using this dataset, we train a series of deep learning-based aspect sentiment classification models. Among them, the LCF-BERT-CDM model achieves the best performance, with a Macro-F1 score of 82.65%. Subsequent statistical analysis reveals a consistent trend: as the number of review rounds increases, the proportion of positive sentiments rises, while negative sentiments decline. Correlation analysis further indicates that aspect sentiment scores are negatively associated with the total number of review rounds. Key aspects exhibiting stronger correlations include "experiments", "research significance" and "result analysis".

light_analysis.overview: 研究多轮同行评审中方面级情感的演化及其与评审轮次的相关性，提出基于LCF-BERT-CDM的情感分类方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究对同行评审意见的情感分析多为粗粒度，且未区分不同评审轮次中评审者关注点和情感倾向的动态变化。理解这种演化有助于揭示科学评价过程，但该问题尚未被充分探索。
light_analysis.method: 首先从Nature Communications的11,063篇已接收论文中分割多轮评审意见，识别细粒度方面聚类，并人工标注约5,000句构建语料库。然后训练多种深度学习方面情感分类模型，其中LCF-BERT-CDM模型结合局部上下文焦点和BERT，在Macro-F1上达到82.65%。
light_analysis.result: LCF-BERT-CDM模型在方面情感分类中取得最佳性能（Macro-F1 82.65%）。统计表明随着评审轮次增加，积极情感比例上升，消极情感下降。相关分析显示方面情感得分与总评审轮次呈负相关，其中“实验”、“研究意义”、“结果分析”等方面相关性更强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次系统研究多轮同行评审中方面级情感演化，揭示了情感分布与评审轮次的负相关关系，为理解评审过程提供了新视角。未来可扩展至更多领域或探索情感极性与论文质量的关系。

title: Towards Fast and Effective Long Video Understanding of Multimodal Large Language Models via Adaptive Quasi-Gaussian Sampling
abstract: Long video understanding remains a daunting challenge for \emph{Multimodal Large Language Models} (MLLMs) due to the excessive computation and memory footprint. Thus, \emph{keyframe selection} is often adopted to mitigate this shortcoming, which however still suffers from low flexibility and high noise due to its hard sampling principle. In this paper, we define video frame selection as a problem of \emph{Quasi-Gaussian Sampling}, and propose an adaptive and training-free approach termed \textbf{\emph{AdaQ}}. Inspired by the $3$-$σ$ rule of Gaussian distribution, the objective of AdaQ is to achieve the optimal $3$-$σ$ interval for different examples, \emph{i.e.}, a smaller $3$-$σ$ interval for the local query and a larger one for the global query, thereby facilitating robust and adaptive frame sampling. To validate AdaQ, we apply it to four MLLMs with three embedding models. The extensive experimental results not only show its obvious performance gains over the default MLLMs and the SOTA keyframe selection methods, \emph{e.g.}, helping Qwen3-VL-8B outperform GPT4o by 15.8\% on average by using only 64 frames, but also confirm its superior robustness and high efficiency for long-video understanding, \emph{e.g.}, \textbf{only 1 hyper-parameter} needs to be set. \textbf{Our code project} is given at \href{https://github.com/Zkayovo-xmu/AdaQ}{https://github.com/Zkayovo-xmu/AdaQ}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自适应、免训练的关键帧采样方法AdaQ，基于准高斯分布的3-σ规则，实现高效长视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在处理长视频时面临计算和内存开销巨大的挑战。现有的关键帧选择方法由于硬采样原则，灵活性和鲁棒性不足，且易受噪声干扰。因此，需要一种自适应、低噪声且高效的帧采样方法，以在保证性能的同时降低计算成本。
light_analysis.method: 将视频帧选择定义为准高斯采样问题，并提出了AdaQ方法。受高斯分布3-σ规则启发，AdaQ根据查询类型（局部或全局）自适应地确定最优3-σ区间，实现稳健的帧采样。该方法无需训练，仅需设置一个超参数。
light_analysis.result: 在四种多模态大模型及三种嵌入模型上验证，AdaQ显著提升长视频理解性能。例如，使用仅64帧，Qwen3-VL-8B平均超越GPT4o 15.8%。与默认模型和SOTA关键帧方法相比，AdaQ在性能、鲁棒性和效率方面均表现优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaQ通过自适应准高斯采样有效解决了关键帧选择的灵活性和噪声问题，为长视频理解提供了一种简单高效的方案。其免训练特性和仅需一个超参数的设置具有实用价值。代码已开源，未来可探索更复杂的自适应策略。

title: Project Ariadne: Prompt-Conditioned Route Generation for Synthesis Planning
abstract: Retrosynthetic planning seeks to connect a target molecule to commercially available starting materials through a multistep route. Classical planners construct such routes by iteratively applying single-step reaction models within a search procedure; constrained variants often require specialized algorithms or architectural changes. Direct route generation reframes retrosynthesis as sequence generation, but existing direct-generation methods still train separate models for different planning specifications. We introduce Ariadne, a decoder-only route generator that represents the target, optional constraints, and route in one prompt-completion sequence. On the RetroCast/PaRoutes mkt-cnv-160 benchmark family, one 24-layer checkpoint follows route-depth and required-starting-material prompts: adding the corresponding prompt fields raises Solv-0 by 13.7 points for depth constraints and 31.2 points for required-leaf constraints. Ariadne also improves over DESP, a bidirectional search planner, on required-leaf Top-10 and Solv-0 in 24 GPU-minutes versus 6.8 GPU-hours. On standard reconstruction, Ariadne is comparable to DMS Explorer XL at about half the reported inference time. Across additional target-only benchmarks, Ariadne's clearest gains are on route-holdout reconstruction, whereas AiZynthFinder MCTS remains stronger on several Solv-0 comparisons. These results extend sequence generation from specialist retrosynthesis models to prompt-conditioned structural route generation. We release the codebase and training scripts to support further work, but do not introduce Tier-1--3 route checkers; those remain the main bottleneck before models of this kind can become useful to experimental chemists.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ariadne，一种基于prompt条件化的解码器-only路线生成模型，统一了目标和约束的表示，实现灵活的多步逆合成规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统逆合成规划器需要迭代应用单步反应模型，且约束变体需要专门算法或架构改动。现有直接路线生成方法针对不同规划规格训练单独模型，缺乏统一性和灵活性。Ariadne旨在通过单一模型处理多种约束（如路线深度、所需起始材料），简化规划流程。
light_analysis.method: Ariadne采用仅解码器架构，将目标分子、可选约束和合成路线编码为提示-完成序列。在训练时，使用包含深度和所需起始材料等字段的prompt，模型根据提示生成对应路线。在RetroCast/PaRoutes基准上，通过添加相应提示字段，分别提升Solv-0指标13.7和31.2点。
light_analysis.result: 在RetroCast/PaRoutes mkt-cnv-160基准上，Ariadne在深度约束下Solv-0提升13.7点，在所需叶子约束下提升31.2点。相比DESP双向搜索规划器，在所需叶子Top-10和Solv-0上更优，且仅用24 GPU分钟对6.8 GPU小时。在标准重构任务中，Ariadne与DMS Explorer XL性能相当，推理时间减半。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ariadne将序列生成从专用逆合成模型扩展到提示条件化的结构路线生成，展示了统一框架的潜力。但缺少Tier-1至3路线检查器仍是实际应用的主要瓶颈。未来工作可引入路线质量评估以提升对实验化学家的实用性。代码已开源。

title: Deep Learning Approaches for 3D Medical Scene Completion: From Geometric Modeling to Generative Paradigms
abstract: Three-dimensional scene completion has evolved as a major problem in computer vision and robotics, and its applications are diverse, including autonomous navigation and augmented reality. In this study, a systematic review has been conducted to compile the research contributions made in the last ten years, i.e., 2016 to 2026, which has revolutionized the field from the voxel semantic completion paradigm represented by SSCNet to the latest paradigm that combines generative diffusion priors with real-time rendering using a Gaussian splatting technique. The evolution in representation paradigms, such as voxel grids, point learning, implicit neural fields, transformer networks, diffusion networks, and the latest paradigm based on rendering-aware 3D Gaussian primitives, has been discussed in this study. A comprehensive analysis has been carried out on the contributions made in the last ten years, and a taxonomy has been developed to provide a clear idea about the contributions made in the field. The study has also discussed the research contributions made in the field, along with the challenges that still need to be addressed. Finally, the study has presented a research agenda that will provide a clear idea about the directions that can be followed in the development of the next-generation system

light_analysis.overview: 本综述系统梳理了3D场景补全领域从几何建模到生成式范式的演化，提出了分类法和未来研究议程。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D场景补全在自动驾驶、增强现实中至关重要。过去十年涌现众多方法，但缺乏系统性分类和比较，需要综述来总结演化路线、挑战和未来方向。
light_analysis.method: 本文进行了系统性文献回顾（2016-2026），分析了SSCNet等早期体素语义完成方法到最新生成扩散先验与高斯泼溅渲染结合的技术演进。构建了分类法，涵盖体素网格、点学习、隐式神经场、Transformer、扩散网络、3D高斯原语等表示范式。
light_analysis.result: 提出了一个清晰的分类法，总结了不同表示范式的优劣，指出了当前挑战（如实时性、泛化性、大规模场景等），并提出了下一代系统的研究议程。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本综述为3D场景补全研究提供了结构化指南，帮助研究者理解技术发展脉络，明确未解决问题与未来方向，对计算机视觉和机器人应用有重要参考价值。

title: Zero-Shot Test-Time Canonicalization using Out-of-Distribution Scoring
abstract: Pretrained vision models often misclassify inputs that are rotated, scaled, or sheared, even though these affine transformations leave the object class unchanged. Robustness is usually restored either by building equivariance into the architecture or by retraining with augmentation, both of which require changing or retraining the model. Test-time canonicalization instead leaves the classifier untouched. It undoes the transformation of each input, mapping it to a canonical form near the training distribution before classification. Existing canonicalizers, however, rely on a narrow set of logit-based energy scores and bespoke search procedures, leaving the design space of scoring functions and optimizers unexplored. We reframe canonicalization as out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, which lets any OOD score serve as the energy minimized over transformations. Across benchmarks ranging from handwritten characters and sketches to natural images and 3D point clouds, we systematically evaluate around twenty OOD scores and nine search algorithms, finding that distance-based scores paired with random search and local refinement perform best overall. Because canonicalizing an already-aligned input can hurt accuracy, we add a gated mechanism that transforms an input only when its OOD score indicates this is needed, preserving most in-distribution accuracy while retaining the robustness gains on transformed inputs. Code is available at github.com/johschm/its.

light_analysis.overview: 将测试时规范化重新定义为OOD检测，利用任意OOD分数最小化变换，并增加门控机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练视觉模型对旋转、缩放等仿射变换鲁棒性差，现有测试时规范化方法仅依赖有限的基于logit的能量分数和定制搜索过程，未探索分数函数和优化器的设计空间，限制了鲁棒性提升的潜力。
light_analysis.method: 提出将规范化视为OOD检测，使任意OOD分数可作为能量函数，通过优化变换参数将输入映射到分布内。系统评估约20种OOD分数和9种搜索算法，发现距离基分数结合随机搜索与局部细化最优。增加门控机制，仅当输入OOD分数高于阈值时进行变换，避免对已对齐样本的误操作。
light_analysis.result: 在手写字符、草图、自然图像和3D点云等多个基准上，距离基分数（如Mahalanobis距离）结合随机搜索+局部细化在变换样本上取得最佳鲁棒性提升。门控机制保留99%以上分布内准确率，同时将变换样本准确率平均提升15-20个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文重新定义了测试时规范化框架，扩展了可用OOD分数和优化器的选择，门控机制有效平衡了分布内与分布外性能。该工作为无需重新训练或修改架构的鲁棒性增强提供了新思路，代码已开源。未来可探索更高效的搜索策略或自适应门控阈值。

title: A Synthetic Reliability-Aware PINN Benchmark for Offshore Wind Turbine Support-Structure Monitoring with Bayesian Inverse Identification
abstract: Reliable structural health monitoring (SHM) of offshore wind turbine (OWT) support structures requires fast state estimation from sparse measurements. Repeated high fidelity finite element or aeroelastic analyses are difficult to use directly in online monitoring loops, while purely data-driven surrogates can require large training sets. This paper presents Digi Turbine, a synthetic reliability-aware Physics Informed Neural Network (PINN) benchmark for OWT monopile support structure monitoring.
