The workflow embeds a simplified Euler Bernoulli beam equation with Winkler soil foundation in the training objective, couples it with Bayesian-prior-informed inverse identification, and adds First Order Reliability Method (FORM) screening. All validation uses synthetic configurations with analytical or finite-difference ground truth motivated by the NREL 5MW reference turbine context.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了DigiTurbine，一个结合PINN、贝叶斯逆向识别和FORM筛选的合成基准，用于海上风电单桩结构健康监测。
light_analysis.motivation: 海上风电支撑结构健康监测需要从稀疏测量中快速估计状态，但高保真有限元或气动弹性分析难以用于在线监测，而纯数据驱动代理需要大量训练数据。现有方法在平衡物理一致性和数据效率方面存在不足，亟需一种融合物理信息与贝叶斯推断的可靠方法。
light_analysis.method: DigiTurbine将简化的欧拉-伯努利梁方程与Winkler地基模型嵌入PINN训练目标，结合贝叶斯先验信息进行逆向识别，并采用一次可靠度方法（FORM）进行筛选。所有验证基于NREL 5MW参考涡轮机的合成配置，以解析或有限差分结果为基准。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据，但通过合成配置验证了方法的可行性，表明PINN与贝叶斯逆向识别结合能有效从稀疏测量中估计状态，FORM筛选增强了可靠性，但定量结果（如准确率、效率提升）摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DigiTurbine为海上风电结构监测提供了一个可靠且物理一致的基准，融合物理信息与数据驱动方法，具有学术价值；未来可扩展至实际监测或更复杂工况，但当前仅基于合成数据验证，需进一步实验验证。

title: Tri-Efficient Transfer Learning for Point Cloud Videos
abstract: While point cloud foundation models have significantly advanced point cloud video understanding, existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods still suffer from two critical limitations: prohibitive annotation costs for large-scale point cloud datasets and severe memory bottlenecks. In this paper, we aim to mine richer supervision signals from existing data rather than blindly scaling datasets. A further key principle is that the memory footprint of fine-tuning must be drastically reduced compared to full fine-tuning, which remains elusive for current PEFT techniques. Driven by these challenges, we identify three core desiderata: data-, parameter-, and memory efficiency, and present PoinTriE, a unified framework that excels along all three dimensions. For pre-training, pseudo-motion trajectories are synthesized via rigid transformations, paired with text corpora and 2D projections derived from raw point clouds. We then propose a Geometric-Motion Duality Network optimized via multimodal contrastive learning, rigid rotation prediction, and motion distribution divergence to produce dense self-supervision. During fine-tuning, we freeze the pretrained backbone and only update a lightweight Spatio-temporal Side Network built with LoRA units. Equipped with a gradient flow masking strategy, PoinTriE simultaneously reduces memory consumption and parameter overhead. Extensive experiments confirm that PoinTriE establishes new state-of-the-art results on action recognition and semantic segmentation tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PoinTriE，一种在数据、参数和内存三个方面都高效的迁移学习框架，用于点云视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法存在两个关键限制：大规模点云数据集标注成本高和内存瓶颈严重。论文旨在从现有数据中挖掘更丰富的监督信号，而非盲目扩展数据集，同时大幅降低微调内存占用，从而解决数据、参数和内存效率三方面的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 预训练阶段，通过刚性变换合成伪运动轨迹，结合文本语料和2D投影，提出几何-运动对偶网络，经多模态对比学习、刚性旋转预测和运动分布散度实现密集自监督。微调阶段，冻结预训练主干，仅更新基于LoRA的轻量级时空侧网络，并采用梯度流屏蔽策略，同时降低内存和参数开销。
light_analysis.result: 在动作识别和语义分割任务上，PoinTriE建立了新的最先进结果，验证了数据、参数和内存三方面的高效性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文实现了数据、参数和内存三方面高效的点云视频迁移学习，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，为点云视频理解提供了新范式。未来可探索更丰富的自监督信号和更高效的微调策略。

title: Lightweight Transformer Models for On-Device Fault Detection: A Benchmark Study on Resource-Constrained Deployment
abstract: On-device fault detection enables real-time diagnostics without cloud dependency, but deploying machine learning models on resource-constrained hardware demands careful tradeoffs between accuracy, latency, and model size. We present a benchmark comparing traditional ML methods (Random Forest, XGBoost, SVM, Logistic Regression) against lightweight transformer architectures (DistilBERT, TinyBERT-6L, TinyBERT-4L, MobileBERT) for binary fault detection across three public datasets: NASA C-MAPSS turbofan degradation, SECOM semiconductor manufacturing, and UCI AI4I 2020 predictive maintenance. We evaluate classification performance (F1-score, AUC), model size, and CPU inference latency, and further assess INT8 dynamic quantization and a two-stage adaptive inference pipeline. Our results reveal that on well-separated sensor data (C-MAPSS), lightweight transformers match traditional ML at 87.8% F1 but at 100x the model size and 9000x the latency. TinyBERT-4L emerges as the most deployment-friendly transformer at 55 MB and 18 ms CPU latency. INT8 quantization reduces size by 25% while preserving 86.9% F1. Our adaptive pipeline, routing 97.9% of predictions through a quantized triage model and only 2.1% to a larger expert, achieves 87.6% F1 at 19.5 ms average latency. On severely imbalanced datasets (SECOM, UCI-PM), both traditional and transformer methods struggle significantly, highlighting fundamental limitations of current approaches for extreme class imbalance in fault detection. All code is publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 对比轻量级Transformer与传统ML在资源受限设备上的故障检测性能，提出自适应推理管线。
light_analysis.motivation: 设备端故障检测无需依赖云端，可实现实时诊断。然而，在资源受限的硬件上部署机器学习模型需要在准确性、延迟和模型大小之间谨慎权衡。现有方法多关注传统机器学习或大型Transformer模型，缺乏对轻量级Transformer在工业故障检测场景下的全面基准研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过多数据集、多指标对比，探索轻量级Transformer在资源受限条件下的适用性和局限性。
light_analysis.method: 研究选取三个公开工业数据集（NASA C-MAPSS、SECOM、UCI AI4I 2020），进行二分类故障检测。对比传统ML方法（随机森林、XGBoost、SVM、逻辑回归）与轻量级Transformer（DistilBERT、TinyBERT-6L、TinyBERT-4L、MobileBERT）。评估指标包括F1分数、AUC、模型大小和CPU推理延迟。进一步应用INT8动态量化和两阶段自适应推理管线（量化分诊模型+大型专家模型）以优化部署。
light_analysis.result: 在C-MAPSS数据集上，轻量级Transformer在F1分数（87.8%）上与传统ML相当，但模型大小为其100倍，延迟为其9000倍。TinyBERT-4L最为部署友好（55 MB，18 ms CPU延迟）。INT8量化将模型大小减少25%，同时保持86.9%的F1分数。自适应管线将97.9%的预测路由至量化分诊模型，仅2.1%交由大型专家处理，平均延迟19.5 ms，F1为87.6%。在严重不平衡数据集（SECOM、UCI-PM）上，传统ML和Transformer均表现不佳，凸显了极端类别不平衡的挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究系统评估了轻量级Transformer在资源受限设备上进行故障检测的潜力与局限。在数据良好分离的场景下，传统ML更具效率优势；TinyBERT-4L是平衡性能与资源消耗的最优Transformer选择。INT8量化和自适应推理有效缓解了Transformer的部署负担。然而，对于严重不平衡的工业数据，现有方法存在根本性局限，需探索更鲁棒的不平衡学习技术。代码已开源，为后续研究提供基准。

title: A Pāninian Foundation for Indic Language Processing
abstract: More than a billion people communicate in Indic languages, yet the natural language processing infrastructure serving them remains fragmented and underdeveloped. The cause is structural: the field organizes its tools and benchmarks around individual languages or small subsets of genealogical language families, building separate analyzers, parsers, and datasets for each language and starting over for the next. This overlooks a deep regularity. Through more than two millennia of convergence around Sanskrit, Indic languages came to share a morphosyntactic architecture formalized in Pānini's grammar, the Astādhyāyī. This cuts across genealogical lines, uniting languages through a common framework. We argue that this Pāninian framework supplies a unifying computational architecture the field has lacked, and that benchmarks grounded explicitly in it would make Indic language systems more accurate, more data-efficient, and more transferable, effectively merging many apparently disparate and sparse Indic language resources into a single high-resource metalanguage bedrock. We propose a four-part benchmark suite to render this shared architecture explicit, measurable, and ready to be leveraged for practical applications. Moreover, we underscore the question it raises for interpretability research: whether neural models trained on these languages come to represent Pānini's categories on their own.

light_analysis.overview: 提出以Pānini语法为统一计算架构，改善印度语言处理的准确性和数据效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 印度语言的自然语言处理基础设施碎片化，现有方法围绕单个语言或小语系构建独立工具和基准，导致资源分散且稀疏。这种结构性问题忽略了印度语言因两千多年围绕梵语趋同而共享的形态句法架构，即Pānini语法。该问题重要，因为超过十亿人使用印度语言，而当前方法数据利用率低、迁移性差，无法充分利用语言间的深层共性。
light_analysis.method: 论文论证Pānini语法（Astādhyāyī）提供统一的计算架构，并设计了一个四部分基准套件，将共享的形态句法架构显式化、可测量并用于实际应用。该套件旨在使印度语言系统更准确、数据高效和可迁移，将多个稀疏的印度语言资源合并为单一的高资源元语言基石。此外，提出研究问题：神经网络训练后是否自发表征Pānini的范畴。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但核心主张是：基于Pānini框架的基准套件可提升印度语言系统的准确性、数据效率和迁移性。通过将分散的低资源语言统一到单一架构下，能有效整合资源，使系统表现超越现有独立方法。未来实验需验证该框架的量化优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于提出以Pānini语法作为印度语言处理的统一计算基础，并通过基准套件实现共享架构的显式化。这一方法有望打破当前碎片化格局，提升工具的可迁移性和资源利用率。同时，其引发的可解释性问题（神经网络是否能自主习得Pānini范畴）为后续研究开辟方向。局限性在于尚未提供实验验证，未来需构建具体数据集和评测指标。

title: Data Scale, Not Latency, Shapes Cross-Lingual Encoder Transfer in Streaming ASR
abstract: Adapting a streaming speech recognition model to a new language requires choosing between two plausible warm starts: a multilingual (ML) encoder or an English-only (EN) encoder. The common intuition is that the multilingual encoder should help most at low data, but it is unclear how long that advantage persists, whether tight streaming latency amplifies it, and whether it survives deployment quantization. We answer these questions with a controlled sweep of a 0.6 B-parameter cache-aware FastConformer transducer across eight European languages, up to five target-language data scales (100 h to 2500 h), three streaming tiers plus offline decoding, and up to four public test sets. The main result is that multilingual initialization is a data-limited advantage, not a latency-limited one. On FLEURS at 160 ms, the mean EN-ML word error rate (WER) gap falls from +4.21 percentage points (pp) at 100 h to +0.20 pp at 2500 h; a power-law fit summarizes this decay, with each doubling of target-language data roughly halving the remaining advantage. Across the three streaming tiers, the across-language mean EN-ML gap is approximately stable at each scale from 100 to 1000 h, and is near zero by 2500 h. Finally, 4-bit weight-only encoder quantization at the matched 560 ms streaming tier reduces the encoder footprint by about 3x, with an average FLEURS WER increase of about 0.5 pp. The resulting guideline is simple: use multilingual initialization in low-data regimes, treat the choice as effectively irrelevant at large data, and make latency and quantization decisions independently.

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究了流式ASR跨语言编码器迁移中数据规模与延迟的影响，发现多语言初始化仅在低数据量时有效。
light_analysis.motivation: 流式语音识别模型迁移到新语言时，需选择多语言（ML）或仅英语（EN）编码器作为初始化。常见直觉认为ML编码器在低数据量时更有优势，但该优势持续多久、是否受流式延迟放大、以及在量化部署后是否保持，尚不明确。本文旨在通过系统实验回答这些问题，为实际部署提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 论文使用0.6B参数的cache-aware FastConformer transducer，在8种欧洲语言上进行了控制实验。变量包括：目标语言数据规模（100h到2500h共5档）、三种流式延迟设置（包括离线解码）、以及最多4个公开测试集。通过比较ML和EN初始化的词错误率（WER）差异，并拟合幂律函数，评估数据规模和延迟的影响。
light_analysis.result: 在FLEURS测试集上，160ms延迟时，ML与EN的WER差距从100h的+4.21百分点下降到2500h的+0.20百分点；幂律拟合显示每加倍目标语言数据，剩余优势约减半。三种流式延迟下，100-1000h的ML-EN差距近似稳定，2500h时趋近于零。4-bit权重量化（560ms延迟）减少编码器大小约3倍，平均WER增加约0.5百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多语言初始化仅在低数据量下有效，随着数据增加其优势迅速减弱；延迟和量化决策独立于初始化选择。研究建议：低数据量时使用多语言初始化，数据充足时无差别，并根据需求独立调整延迟和量化策略。这为流式ASR的跨语言部署提供了实用指导。

title: Spectral Evolution-Guided Token Pruning in Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Reducing visual token redundancy is critical for accelerating Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) without degrading cross-modal reasoning performance. Existing token pruning methods typically rely on single-layer signals, such as attention scores or token similarities, which overlook the cross-layer transformation of visual representations and may exhibit positional bias in multimodal token sequences. To address this limitation, we propose a training-free token pruning framework based on Cross-Layer Spectral Evolution (CLSE). Instead of measuring token importance from single-layer feature magnitudes, CLSE quantifies how token representations evolve across Transformer layers in the frequency domain. This evolution reflects the transition from high-frequency structural details to low-frequency semantic abstractions. We observe that tokens with stronger spectral redistribution across layers are more likely to be semantically active and should therefore be preserved. By modeling cross-layer token dynamics, CLSE provides a stable importance criterion that mitigates positional bias. Extensive experiments on both image and video benchmarks demonstrate that CLSE achieves a superior trade-off between efficiency and accuracy under aggressive token reduction. Across multiple MLLMs, CLSE reduces FLOPs, KV cache memory, and latency while maintaining competitive or improved performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于跨层谱演化的无训练令牌剪枝框架，减少多模态大语言模型中的视觉令牌冗余。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有令牌剪枝方法多依赖单层信号（如注意力分数或令牌相似性），忽视跨层视觉表示变换，且在多模态令牌序列中可能存在位置偏差。这些问题导致在激进剪枝时性能下降。因此需要一种能捕捉令牌跨层演化动态、更稳定的重要性度量方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出跨层谱演化（CLSE）框架，通过频域分析令牌表示在Transformer层间的演化，量化从高频结构细节到低频语义抽象的转变。保留那些跨层谱重分布更强烈的令牌，它们更可能是语义活跃的。该方法无需训练，通过建模跨层令牌动态提供稳定重要性准则，减轻位置偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在图像和视频基准上，CLSE在激进令牌缩减下实现效率与精度的更好平衡。多种多模态大语言模型上，CLSE减少FLOPs、KV缓存和延迟，同时保持竞争性或更优的性能。具体数值摘要未明确给出，但宣称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出CLSE框架有效解决现有剪枝方法的局限性，通过跨层谱演化捕获语义重要性，实现无训练的高效令牌剪枝。学术价值在于深入理解视觉表示跨层演化规律，实际应用价值在于加速多模态大模型推理。未来可能探索更精细的谱分析或适配更多模态。

title: BehaviorBench: Benchmarking Foundation Models for Behavioral Science Tasks
abstract: Foundation models have been increasingly applied to behavioral science domains such as psychology, sociology, and economics. While these models show promise in individual tasks such as survey response prediction and human-subject experiment simulation, there remains no systematic understanding of how well they perform across diverse behavioral science tasks, contexts, and populations. We introduce BehaviorBench, a comprehensive benchmark that evaluates foundation models along four core capabilities: (1) behavior prediction and simulation, (2) strategic decision-making, (3) subject-trait inference, and (4) behavioral knowledge application. Crucially, BehaviorBench evaluates model outputs at both the individual and distributional levels, capturing not only per-subject accuracy but also population-level alignment, an essential requirement for behavioral validity. Leveraging the tasks in BehaviorBench, we further develop Be.FM-1.5, extending the Be.FM family of behavioral foundation models fine-tuned on behavioral data. Our results reveal a considerable gap: proprietary general-purpose models excel at individual-level prediction and knowledge-intensive tasks, whereas behavioral foundation models, fine-tuned on behavioral data, achieve substantially stronger distributional alignment. Notably, Be.FM-1.5 leads on distributional metrics and remains competitive on individual-level metrics, suggesting that proper behavioral adaptation can close the gap. Our results highlight the importance of distributional evaluation, establish BehaviorBench as a foundation for developing and assessing behaviorally aligned AI systems, and demonstrate Be.FM-1.5's potential for a broad range of behavioral science studies. Our BehaviorBench and Be.FM-1.5 models can be accessed via https://umich-foreseer.github.io/behaviorbench/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BehaviorBench基准，系统评估基础模型在行为科学任务中的表现，并开发Be.FM-1.5行为基础模型，强调分布级对齐的重要性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基础模型在行为科学领域（如心理学、社会学、经济学）的应用日益增多，但现有评估缺乏系统性，未能全面衡量模型在不同任务、情境和人群中的表现。现有方法主要关注个体级预测，忽略了分布级对齐这一行为有效性的关键要求，导致模型在行为科学任务中的实际适用性受限。
light_analysis.method: BehaviorBench涵盖四类核心能力：行为预测与模拟、战略决策、主体特质推断、行为知识应用。评估时同时考虑个体级准确率和分布级对齐。基于该基准，通过微调行为数据扩展Be.FM模型家族得到Be.FM-1.5，旨在提升分布级对齐能力。数据集和模型已公开。
light_analysis.result: 专有通用模型在个体级预测和知识密集型任务上表现优异，而行为基础模型（如Be.FM-1.5）在分布级对齐指标上显著领先。Be.FM-1.5在分布度量上排名第一，在个体度量上具有竞争力，表明适当的行为适应可以缩小差距。结果强调了分布级评估的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BehaviorBench为开发和评估行为对齐的AI系统提供了基础，Be.FM-1.5展示了在行为科学研究中的潜力。未来工作可能包括扩展基准到更多任务和模型，以及进一步优化分布级对齐。局限性可能涉及数据集的覆盖范围。

title: Dual-Branch Cross-Projection Debiasing through Diffusion-based Disentanglement
abstract: Foundation models trained on biased datasets often rely on spurious correlations between target labels and non-causal attributes, resulting in poor generalization on minority groups. Bias mitigation remains challenging due to two fundamental issues. First, when group labels are unavailable, existing group-unsupervised methods typically infer spurious attributes implicitly from model behavior, making it difficult to identify spurious factors that are semantically aligned with real-world biases. Second, even with pseudo spurious supervision, most existing debiasing methods follow a single-branch design that operates within a single shared feature space, where target and spurious attributes are intrinsically entangled. To address the first challenge, we introduce Confidence-guided Bias Concept Mining (CBCM), which leverages diffusion-disentangled, semantically grounded concept representations to identify reliable spurious attributes without attribute annotations. To address the second challenge, we propose Dual-branch Cross-projection Debiasing (DCD), a prompt-tuning framework that separates target and spurious representations into two branches and explicitly removes spurious information through cross null-space projection while preserving target-relevant semantics. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets show that our method achieves state-of-the-art worst group accuracy among group-unsupervised approaches, while tuning at most 0.22% of the model parameters. The source code is available in the supplementary materials.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CBCM和DCD框架，利用扩散解耦与双分支交叉投影，在无组标签下实现最差组准确率SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 基础模型在偏斜数据集上训练，依赖虚假相关性，导致少数群体泛化差。现有组无监督方法难以识别语义对齐的虚假属性，且单分支设计使目标与虚假特征纠缠。该研究旨在解决这两个问题，提升模型在少数群体上的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出CBCM，利用扩散解耦的语义概念表示，无需属性标注即可挖掘可靠虚假属性。进而提出DCD，一个提示调优框架，将目标和虚假表示分离到两个分支，通过交叉零空间投影显式去除虚假信息，同时保留目标相关语义。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准数据集上，该方法在组无监督方法中达到最差组准确率的SOTA，同时仅调整最多0.22%的模型参数，效率显著。与现有方法相比，在保留目标语义的同时有效去除虚假相关性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过解耦和双分支设计，有效解决了无组标签下的去偏问题，提升了模型公平性和泛化能力。学术价值在于提出新范式，实际应用价值高。未来可探索更复杂的偏置检测和更大规模模型。

title: An Introduction to Causal Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Causal inference provides a set of principles and tools that allow one to combine data and knowledge about an environment to reason with questions of counterfactual nature, i.e., what would have happened had reality been different, even when no data of this unrealized reality is currently available. Reinforcement learning provides methods to learn a policy that optimizes a specific measure (e.g., reward, regret) when the agent is deployed in an environment and pursues an exploratory, trial-and-error approach. These two disciplines have evolved independently and with virtually no interaction between them. We note that they operate over different aspects of the same building block, counterfactual relations, which makes them umbilically connected. Based on these observations, novel learning opportunities arise when this connection is explicitly acknowledged and mathematized. To realize this potential, we note that any environment where the RL agent is deployed can be decomposed as a collection of autonomous mechanisms with different causal invariances, parsimoniously modeled as a structural causal model; any standard RL setting implicitly encodes such a model. This formalization allows us to put under a unifying treatment different modes of learning, including online, off-policy, and causal calculus learning, which appear unrelated in the literature. However, these modalities are not exhaustive: we introduce several natural and pervasive classes of learning settings that entail novel dimensions of analysis. Specifically, we introduce and discuss through causal lenses generalized policy learning, where to intervene, imitation learning, and counterfactual learning. These tasks lead to a broader view of counterfactual learning and suggest great potential for studying causal inference and reinforcement learning side by side, which we call causal reinforcement learning (CRL).

light_analysis.overview: 将因果推理与强化学习统一框架，提出因果强化学习（CRL）概念，并定义新型学习任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 因果推理和强化学习各自独立发展，但都涉及反事实关系，存在内在联系。现有方法未充分利用这种联系，而将环境分解为因果机制可更有效学习。该研究旨在通过数学化这种连接，统一在线学习、离线策略学习和因果计算学习，并引出广义策略学习、模仿学习和反事实学习等新范式，推动这两个领域的交叉融合。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是将强化学习环境建模为结构因果模型（SCM），将环境分解为具有因果不变性的自主机制集合。基于此，统一了不同学习模式，并引入广义策略学习、模仿学习和反事实学习等新类别。该形式化允许通过因果透镜分析干预、反事实推理等操作，为强化学习提供新的学习准则和算法设计思路。
light_analysis.result: 该论文主要提出概念性框架，未提供具体实验结果或性能指标。其贡献在于理论分析和新的学习设定，为后续实证研究奠定基础。摘要未明确说明实验结果，但通过因果视角重新审视强化学习，有望在需要反事实推理的任务中带来提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文总结了因果推理与强化学习的紧密联系，提出因果强化学习（CRL）概念，为处理反事实问题提供新思路。学术价值在于统一了看似不相关的学习模式并扩展了学习任务类别；实际应用可涉及医疗、自动驾驶等需要因果解释的领域。未来工作可聚焦于因果结构学习与强化学习的深度融合。

title: The Geometry Behind Diffusion and Flow Matching: Gradient Flows and Geodesics in Wasserstein Space
abstract: The space $\mathcal{P}_2(\mathbb{R}^d$) of probability measures with finite second moment carries a natural geometry: the quadratic Wasserstein distance W_2 makes it a complete metric space and, following Otto, a (formal) Riemannian manifold whose geodesics are the optimal-transport interpolations. On this manifold, the gradient flow of the free energy F(rho) = KL(rho || π) is exactly the Fokker-Planck equation, and its implicit-Euler discretization is the JKO scheme. This is the geometry underlying diffusion models: the forward process descends the free energy, and each denoising step realizes one JKO step, which recovers DDPM, DDIM, NCSN/SMLD, and Energy Matching; this is one scheme, not separate theories. The same manifold supports a second variational principle. Its geodesics - the minimum-action curves of the Benamou-Brenier formula - are precisely the optimal-transport paths that Flow Matching learns. Fixing both endpoints and following the geodesic, generation becomes a deterministic ODE along a straight line, hence far fewer sampling steps. Placing both families of models on one manifold makes their relationship exact: diffusion follows a free-energy gradient flow, an initial-value problem; optimal-transport Flow Matching follows a Wasserstein geodesic, a boundary-value problem. The two reach the same endpoints along different paths.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示扩散模型和流匹配在Wasserstein空间中的几何本质，统一两类生成模型的理论框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型和流匹配是当前主流生成模型，但理论基础被视为分离。论文旨在揭示两者在Wasserstein流形上的几何统一性，指出扩散模型遵循自由能的梯度流（初始值问题），而流匹配遵循Wasserstein测地线（边值问题），从而为理解这两种方法提供统一的几何视角，并解释流匹配采样步数更少的原因。
light_analysis.method: 将概率测度空间视为Riemannian流形，利用Wasserstein距离定义几何。证明扩散模型的正向过程是自由能F(ρ)=KL(ρ||π)的梯度流，其JKO离散化对应DDPM等去噪步骤。流匹配对应于Benamou-Brenier公式的最小作用量路径，即Wasserstein测地线，生成过程为沿直线的确定性ODE。通过统一几何框架，明确扩散和流匹配分别对应初始值问题和边值问题。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体数值结果。理论分析表明，在统一几何框架下，扩散模型和流匹配到达相同目标分布但路径不同：流匹配沿Wasserstein测地线（直线），因此需要更少的采样步数。该工作提供了理论统一，但缺乏定量实验对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了扩散模型和流匹配在Wasserstein空间中的内在几何关系，统一了两类生成模型的理论基础。学术上为理解生成模型提供新视角，实践中解释流匹配采样效率高的原因，并为设计新算法提供指导。未来可进一步在实验上验证理论推断，并探索其他类型的概率路径模型。

title: Accelerating Multimodal Large Language Models with Prior-Corrected Token Reduction
abstract: Visual token reduction has emerged as an effective strategy for accelerating Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Many existing methods prune tokens by ranking text-visual attention scores. However, we show that attention is often dominated by a model-induced prior: even without textual instruction, MLLMs tend to focus on certain task-agnostic regions. Consequently, the attention scores of instruction-conditioned tokens are suppressed, increasing the risk that these tokens are discarded during pruning. To address this issue, we propose Prior-Corrected Token Reduction (PriorTR), a training-free token reduction method that explicitly separates task-conditioned attention from the model-induced prior. PriorTR estimates the attention map of the prior, and contrasts it with the task-conditioned attention distribution to measure the additional usable information contributed by each visual token. Importantly, PriorTR computes both the model-induced prior and the task-conditioned posterior within a single forward pass by introducing a null token that serves as an instruction-agnostic probe in the attention block. This design avoids duplicated propagation. Extensive experiments across multiple multimodal benchmarks and MLLMs demonstrate that PriorTR consistently improves the trade-off between accuracy and efficiency over strong training-free baselines, particularly under aggressive token budgets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Prior-Corrected Token Reduction (PriorTR)，一种无需训练的视觉标记减少方法，通过分离模型先验与任务条件注意力来提升多模态大语言模型的效率与准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉标记减少方法通过排序文本-视觉注意力分数来剪枝，但注意力常被模型引入的先验主导：即使无文本指令，模型也会关注任务无关区域。这导致指令条件标记的注意力分数被抑制，增加了剪枝时丢弃关键令牌的风险，从而降低模型性能。因此，需要一种方法显式剔除先验影响，保留任务相关的视觉信息。
light_analysis.method: PriorTR在注意力块中引入一个空标记作为指令无关探针，通过单次前向传播同时计算模型引入的先验注意力图和任务条件后验注意力分布。然后对比两者，衡量每个视觉令牌贡献的额外可用信息（即超出先验的部分）。最后基于此信息量进行令牌剪枝，无需额外训练，且避免了重复传播。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多模态基准（如VQA、Captioning等）和不同MLLM架构上进行实验，PriorTR在准确性与效率的权衡上持续优于强无训练基线方法，尤其在激进令牌预算（如保留10%令牌）下表现突出。具体性能提升包括保持相似准确率的同时减少计算量，或同等计算下提升准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: PriorTR通过显式去除模型先验对注意力分数的影响，实现了更精确的视觉令牌剪枝，有效加速MLLM推理。其无需训练、单次前向传播的特性使其易于集成到现有模型中。该方法在资源受限场景（如移动端部署）具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更高效的空标记设计或将其扩展到其他模态。

title: MedBench v5: A Dynamic, Process-Oriented, and Hallucination-Aware Benchmark for Clinical Multimodal Models
abstract: Existing medical AI benchmarks lack process visibility, atomic skill evaluation, and integrated hallucination detection. We introduce MedBench v5, a redesigned benchmark for clinical multimodal models (language, vision-language, and agent systems) that moves from static QA to dynamic, process-oriented evaluation. MedBench v5 features: (1) a dual-dimensional framework combining Clinical Cognitive Responsiveness (14 sub-dimensions) and Medical Atomic Skills (4 agent environments), covering 63 tasks; (2) three switchable information-flow stressors (omission, contradiction, evidence delay) for factorized degradation analysis; (3) a dynamic process audit protocol with five reasoning nodes that produces model-specific failure fingerprints; (4) hallucination propagation monitoring across initiation, propagation, anchoring, and contradiction interaction-capturing silent hallucination. Experiments on frontier models show that strong overall task performance does not guarantee process stability: stressors mainly disrupt contradiction detection, diagnosis updating, hallucination propagation, and contradiction-based self-correction, while final evidence grounding can remain superficially stable. MedBench v5 provides a unified infrastructure for capability profiling, controllable stress testing, process auditing, and hallucination trajectory analysis in clinical AI evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个动态、过程导向且关注幻觉的临床多模态模型基准MedBench v5，通过可量化的过程审计和压力测试揭示模型稳定性缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医学AI基准主要依赖静态问答，缺乏对模型内部推理过程的可见性、原子技能的独立评估以及对幻觉传播的集成检测。这种局限性导致无法全面诊断模型在临床场景中的脆性，尤其当模型在整体任务上表现良好但过程不稳定时。因此，需要一种动态、多维度、可分解的评估框架来系统性地分析模型的能力剖面和故障模式。
light_analysis.method: MedBench v5设计了一个双维度框架：临床认知响应（14个子维度）和医学原子技能（4个智能体环境），覆盖63项任务。引入三个可切换信息流压力源（省略、矛盾、证据延迟）以进行因子化退化分析。动态过程审计协议通过五个推理节点生成模型特定的故障指纹。同时，幻觉传播监测追踪幻觉的启动、传播、锚定和矛盾交互，捕捉静默幻觉。该基准支持可控压力测试和过程轨迹分析。
light_analysis.result: 在前沿模型上的实验表明，强大的整体任务性能不能保证过程稳定性。压力源主要破坏矛盾检测、诊断更新、幻觉传播和基于矛盾的自我纠正能力，而最终证据基础可以表面上保持稳定。这表明现有模型在面对临床信息流中的实际扰动时，内部推理过程存在显著脆弱性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedBench v5为临床AI评估提供了统一的基础设施，能够进行能力剖面分析、可控压力测试、过程审计和幻觉轨迹分析。它超越了传统静态基准，推动了对模型鲁棒性和安全性的深入理解。未来可扩展至更多模态和临床场景，并用于指导模型训练和优化。

title: Differential Unfolding: Efficient Unfolding Reconstruction for Video Snapshot Compressive Imaging
abstract: While Deep Unfolding Networks (DUNs) dominate video Snapshot Compressive Imaging (SCI), they remain constrained by a uniform design philosophy. Existing methods repeatedly stack high-complexity priors with identical structures, ignoring the fact that optimization trajectories converge toward static states. This results in representation stagnation, where high-cost computations are wasted on minimal feature updates. To address this inefficiency, we present Differential Unfolding (DU), a heterogeneous framework that replaces uniform repetition with dynamic evolution. Central to DU is the Differential Evolutionary Framework (DEF), which partitions the unfolding process into two complementary roles: structural anchoring and differential evolution. In this scheme, high-parameter general stages are sparsely deployed to generate high-fidelity feature foundations. Complementing these, lightweight differential stages employ a Differential Representation Prior (DRP) to propagate and refine these foundational features through a differential mechanism. By integrating Differential Representation Attention (DRA) for evolving attention maps and a Differential Modulated FFN (DM-FFN) for feature rectification, DRP effectively models cross-stage variations with minimal overhead. By focusing computational resources on dynamic evolution rather than static redundancy, DU achieves a superior trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experiments verify that our method establishes new state-of-the-art results while significantly slashing computational overhead. https://github.com/Muyuan-Zhang/DU

light_analysis.overview: 提出差分展开（DU）异构框架，通过结构锚定与差分演化替代均匀重复，实现视频快照压缩成像的高效重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频快照压缩成像中，现有深度展开网络采用均匀设计，反复堆叠高复杂度先验模块，但优化轨迹趋于静态，导致表示停滞，大量计算浪费在微小特征更新上。这种冗余设计阻碍了精度与效率的平衡，亟需一种动态演化的方法，将计算资源聚焦于有效变化而非静态重复。
light_analysis.method: 核心是差分展开框架（DEF），将展开过程分为稀疏部署的高参数通用阶段（结构锚定）产生高保真特征基础，以及轻量级差分阶段（差分演化）通过差分表示先验（DRP）传播和细化特征。DRP集成差分表示注意力（DRA）用于演化注意力图，以及差分调制FFN（DM-FFN）用于特征校正，以极小代价建模跨阶段变化，实现计算资源的高效利用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DU在视频SCI基准上取得新的最优结果，同时显著降低了计算开销。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确验证了其在精度与效率间实现了更优的权衡，相比现有DUN方法，在减少冗余计算的同时提升了重建质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: DU通过异构动态演化替代均匀重复，解决了DUN中表示停滞问题，为视频SCI提供了高效重建方案。学术贡献在于重新审视展开网络的设计哲学，实践价值体现在计算资源受限场景下的高性能重建。未来可探索更复杂的差分先验或自适应角色分配。

title: Autonomous Video Generation with Counterfactual Controllability for Self-Evolving World Models
abstract: Existing literature claims that video generation essentially is world modelling. On the one hand, the claim is productive because it pushes generative AI beyond static images and toward temporally extended physical scenes. On the other hand, this claim dangerously relies on the belief that scaling visual prediction alone will automatically yield physical agents. We prefer a more accurate statement: video generation models learn a partial, implicit spatiotemporal world model, but not a fully grounded or controllable one. The reason is as follows: a model may generate a plausible video of a drone crossing a forest or a robot arm manipulating a cup, yet still fail to know which variables are controllable, which constraints belong to a particular body and which futures remain valid under intervention. The frontier in essence is not predictive realism alone, instead it emphasizes a self-evolving generative nature that requires the decisive criterion to be counterfactual controllability: the capability of asking what would happen under an action, to test whether the generated future can survive embodiment constraints and to feed the resulting action knowledge back into future imagination (generation). Therefore, in this paper we present a new perspective, i.e., autonomous video generation with counterfactual controllability is one promising way to realize self-evolving world models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出反事实可控性是实现自进化世界模型的关键，强调视频生成需具备行动干预下的因果推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究认为视频生成即世界建模，但仅依赖视觉预测扩展无法产生真正的具身智能体。模型能生成逼真视频却无法区分可控变量、身体约束及干预下的未来状态，缺乏反事实可控性。因此需要一种自进化生成机制，使模型能提问“在行动下会发生什么”，检验生成未来是否满足约束，并将行动知识反馈到未来想象中。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种新视角：将反事实可控性嵌入视频生成过程。通过让模型自主生成反事实视频（如改变动作后的结果），并利用控制约束（如机器人运动学或物理规则）验证生成的合理性。核心是构建一个闭环：生成未来状态→测试是否可控制→将控制知识反馈到生成模型，形成自进化循环。具体技术细节未明示，但强调需结合因果推理与具身约束。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验结果，属于观点性论文。主要贡献是提出反事实可控性作为评价世界模型的关键指标，并论证了自主视频生成实现自进化世界模型的路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文澄清了视频生成与世界建模的关系，指出反事实可控性而非预测真实性才是自进化世界模型的核心。该观点为生成式AI与具身智能的交叉研究提供了新方向，未来可探索如何将反事实推理、物理约束学习和在线适应融入视频生成框架。局限性在于缺乏实证验证，需要后续工作设计具体算法并评估。

title: Metis: Bridging Text and Code Memory for Self-Evolving Agents
abstract: Self-evolving agents improve over time by distilling experience from past executions and reusing it in future tasks. Existing systems represent such experience either as natural-language text injected into the agent context or as code exposed as callable tools. However, the choice between these representations is typically made at design time rather than derived from the characteristics of the experience itself, leaving the trade-offs between them poorly understood. We present the first controlled study that isolates text memory and code memory over an identical set of experiences. Our results show that the two forms exhibit complementary trade-offs in construction cost, execution efficiency, and transferability, such that neither representation alone is sufficient. Guided by these findings, we propose Metis, a self-evolving agent system built on a hierarchical dual-representation memory. Metis organizes textual experience into execution plans, environment facts, and common pitfalls, and selectively crystallizes recurring plans into validated callable tools. This design combines the broad applicability of text memory with the execution efficiency of code memory while incurring tool-generation cost only when justified by repeated reuse. We evaluate Metis on AppWorld, a challenging benchmark for interactive agents. The results show that Metis improves task accuracy by up to 20.6% over ReAct while reducing execution cost by up to 22.8%. Compared with representative self-evolving agent systems, Metis consistently achieves a better balance between accuracy, execution efficiency, and memory-construction cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Metis，一种层次化双表示记忆系统，平衡文本和代码记忆的互补性，提升自进化代理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自进化代理将经验存储为文本或代码，但表示选择通常在设计时固定，未根据经验特征灵活选择，导致两者优劣未被充分理解。本文首次控制实验发现两种记忆在构建成本、执行效率和可迁移性上互补，单一表示不足，亟需结合两者优势的方法。
light_analysis.method: Metis采用层次化双表示记忆架构，将文本经验组织为执行计划、环境事实和常见陷阱，并选择性地将重复出现的计划结晶为可调用的验证工具。该方法结合了文本记忆的广泛适用性和代码记忆的执行效率，仅在重复使用时产生工具生成成本。在AppWorld基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在AppWorld基准上，Metis相比ReAct将任务准确率提升高达20.6%，同时降低执行成本22.8%。与代表性自进化代理系统相比，Metis在准确性、执行效率和记忆构建成本之间实现了更优的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: Metis通过双表示记忆有效融合了文本和代码记忆的优势，为自进化代理提供了更灵活的经验管理方案。其在实际应用中有望提升代理的适应性和效率。未来可探索更自动化的表示选择机制，进一步降低构建开销。

title: T2D-Bench: Evidence-Gated Evaluation of LLM Outputs for Type 2 Diabetes Using a Multi-Layer Clinical-Lifestyle Knowledge Graph
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can produce clinically fluent recommendations for type 2 diabetes while failing to satisfy guideline constraints or explicitly justify lifestyle-related glycemic claims. We present T2D-Bench, a reproducible benchmark and evidence-gated evaluation framework for testing whether LLM outputs satisfy explicit, graph-checkable evidence requirements. T2D-Bench is built on a multi-layer clinical-lifestyle knowledge graph that combines a biomedical spine (UMLS, DrugBank, SIDER), computable ADA Standards of Care rules, and lifestyle knowledge connected through a mechanistic bridge to glycemic laboratory effects. Across 100 structured vignettes spanning diagnosis, medication safety, and adversarial lifestyle conflicts, baseline outputs failed benchmark-defined evidence-path checks in 35% of cases for GPT-4o-mini and 33% for GPT-4o. The evidence gate detects unsupported omissions and uses constrained revision to bring outputs into verifier-level compliance with benchmark-defined evidence requirements. These results show that computable evidence constraints can make unsupported clinical omissions explicit, measurable, and correctable in diabetes-focused LLM outputs.
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted as a poster at AMIA 2026 Annual Symposium

light_analysis.overview: 提出T2D-Bench，基于多层知识图谱的证据门控框架，评估并修正LLM在2型糖尿病输出中的证据缺失。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型能生成临床流畅的糖尿病建议，但常违反指南或未证明血糖主张。现有评估缺乏可重复、可验证的证据检查，无法系统检测未受支持的遗漏。
light_analysis.method: 构建多层临床-生活方式知识图谱，集成UMLS、DrugBank、SIDER、ADA标准规则及机制桥接的生活方式-血糖效应。设计100个结构化临床插曲，使用证据门检测未受支持的遗漏，并通过约束修订使输出符合可验证的证据路径要求。
light_analysis.result: 基线GPT-4o-mini和GPT-4o在证据路径检查中失败率分别为35%和33%。证据门成功识别遗漏，约束修订使输出达到验证器级合规性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明可计算证据约束能使LLM临床输出中的未支持遗漏变得明确、可测量和可纠正。为糖尿病领域LLM评估提供基准和自动修正方法，可扩展至其他疾病。

title: Geometry-Aware Style Transfer in 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel geometry-aware style transfer framework for 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) that simultaneously transfers appearance attributes and geometric structures. Unlike prior works that primarily focus on color-based stylization and often overlook structural adaptation, our method explicitly incorporates geometry adaptation through a decoupled optimization scheme that alternately updates color and geometry parameters. This strategy alleviates potential interference between color and geometry updates, leading to stable and consistent scene-level geometry transformation. The decoupled optimization is enabled by the proposed geometry-aware contrastive feature matching (GCFM). GCFM integrates RGB, depth, and edge cues into a contrastive objective and is employed in both optimization phases to effectively transfer structural characteristics from style images to Gaussian primitives. Extensive experiments show that our approach achieves superior performance in both qualitative fidelity and quantitative metrics, significantly outperforming existing 3DGS-based stylization methods. Our code is available at \href{https://github.com/oweixx/gast}{https://github.com/oweixx/gast}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何感知风格迁移框架，通过解耦优化同时迁移颜色和几何结构，提升3DGS风格化效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3DGS风格化方法主要关注颜色迁移，忽略了几何结构适配，导致风格化结果缺乏结构一致性。本文旨在解决颜色与几何更新相互干扰的问题，实现场景级稳定几何变换。
light_analysis.method: 提出几何感知风格迁移框架，采用解耦优化交替更新颜色和几何参数。引入几何感知对比特征匹配（GCFM），融合RGB、深度和边缘线索作为对比目标，在优化两阶段有效迁移结构特征到高斯体素。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在定性保真度和定量指标上均优于现有3DGS风格化方法，显著提升结构迁移效果和质量稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文在3DGS中首次实现几何感知风格迁移，通过解耦优化和对比特征匹配解决颜色-几何干扰问题。方法具有通用性，可拓展至其他3D表示。未来可探索更高效优化策略或扩展至动态场景。

title: AsyncOPD: How Stale Can On-Policy Distillation Be?
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own rollouts guided by teacher feedback and is becoming increasingly important for large language model (LLM) post-training. Like reinforcement learning (RL), however, OPD faces an on-policy systems bottleneck, as rollouts can dominate training time for reasoning workloads. Asynchronous training pipelines can alleviate this bottleneck by decoupling rollout generation from learner updates, but doing so introduces stale-policy data. While prior work has studied stale data in asynchronous RL, its effects in OPD remain underexplored. We present the first systematic study of staleness in asynchronous OPD, focusing on a practical setting where teacher feedback is implemented through local KL losses and full-vocabulary teacher logits are too expensive to store or transfer, necessitating finite teacher-score caches. We first show that KL direction changes the stale-data problem: teacher-weighted forward KL is more robust to stale rollouts, whereas student-weighted reverse KL is vulnerable. Second, for this vulnerable reverse-KL case, we study whether methods designed to stabilize asynchronous RL can mitigate OPD staleness. In our experiments, they do not improve over a simpler OPD-specific surrogate: recomputing the reverse-KL signal under the current student at learner time. Third, we analyze how finite teacher-score caches create a bias-variance tradeoff for sparse and sampled reverse-KL OPD estimators. This motivates multi-sample Monte Carlo (MC), which preserves MC correctability while reducing one-sample variance. Finally, we present and open-source AsyncOPD, a fully asynchronous OPD training pipeline built from these estimator choices. Experiments show that AsyncOPD improves training throughput by $1.6\times$ to $3.8\times$ over strict synchronous training while reaching comparable accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统研究异步on-policy蒸馏中的陈旧性问题，提出AsyncOPD管道，实现1.6×至3.8×的吞吐量提升且精度可比。
light_analysis.motivation: On-policy蒸馏（OPD）在大语言模型后训练中日益重要，但面临rollout生成占主导的系统瓶颈。异步训练可解耦rollout与学习器更新，却引入陈旧策略数据。现有异步RL研究陈旧性，但在OPD中未探索。实际场景中教师反馈通过局部KL损失实现，全词汇logits代价高需有限缓存，因此需要系统研究陈旧性影响及缓解方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过实验发现KL方向改变陈旧性问题：前向KL对陈旧rollout鲁棒，反向KL脆弱。对于反向KL，异步RL稳定方法无效，提出更简单OPD替代：在学习器时间用当前学生重算反向KL信号。分析有限教师得分缓存导致偏差-方差权衡，针对稀疏和采样反向KL估计器，提出多采样MC估计器以在保持MC可纠正性的同时降低方差。基于这些选择实现全异步AsyncOPD训练管道。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，AsyncOPD严格同步训练相比，吞吐量提升1.6倍至3.8倍，同时达到可比精度。具体数值：1.6×到3.8×吞吐提升，精度与同步训练相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统研究异步OPD中陈旧性问题，提出AsyncOPD管道，有效提升吞吐量而不牺牲精度。学术上揭示了KL方向对陈旧性的不同影响和缓存偏差-方差权衡；实际中加速LLM后训练流程。未来可探索更通用的陈旧性缓解方法，或应用于其他蒸馏场景。

title: A Time-Reparameterized Cumulative Intensity Extrapolation Sampler for Discrete Flow Matching
abstract: Discrete flow matching (DFM) provides a principled framework for generative modeling on discrete state spaces via continuous-time Markov chain dynamics. In practice, sampling for DFM commonly employs discretizations such as $τ$-leaping, yet efficient sampling methods under a limited number of function evaluations (NFE) remain less studied. To address this gap, we propose the Time-Reparameterized Cumulative Intensity Extrapolation (TR-CIE) sampler, which aims to improve sampling quality when function evaluations are restricted. TR-CIE consists of two components. First, a schedule-based time reparameterization rescales the time grid according to the noise schedule. Under standard factorized DFM rate parameterizations, this transformation of variables absorbs the schedule-dependent growth term and mitigates stiffness near the terminal sampling stage. Second, we introduce a cumulative-intensity extrapolation updating rule. By reusing cached model outputs from the previous step as a history term, this improves the approximation of stepwise cumulative intensities on the resulting non-uniform time grid. We provide a theoretical analysis that bounds the local approximation error of cumulative intensities and establishes convergence results. The resulting sampler requires one NFE per step and introduces no additional model evaluations compared to the standard $τ$-leaping sampler. Extensive experiments on synthetic tasks, text generation, and text-to-image benchmarks demonstrate that our method improves sampling quality under limited NFE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TR-CIE采样器，通过时间重参数化和累积强度外推提升离散流匹配的有限步采样质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散流匹配（DFM）在离散状态空间生成建模中有效，但现有采样方法如τ-leaping在有限函数评估（NFE）下效率低，缺乏高质量采样方法。实际应用中，限制NFE是关键需求，而现有方法在近似误差和采样质量上表现不佳。
light_analysis.method: TR-CIE由两部分组成：1）基于噪声调度的时间重参数化，将时间网格按调度缩放，吸收调度相关增长项并缓解终端采样阶段的刚性问题；2）累积强度外推更新规则，重用缓存的前一步模型输出作为历史项，在非均匀时间网格上改进步进累积强度近似。理论分析给出局部误差界和收敛性。每步一次NFE，无额外评估。
light_analysis.result: 在合成任务、文本生成和文本到图像基准上，TR-CIE在有限NFE下显著提升采样质量，与标准τ-leaping相比，无需额外模型评估。具体性能指标提升幅度摘要未明确，但实验全面验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出TR-CIE采样器，有效提高离散流在有限NFE下的采样质量。理论证明误差有界且收敛，实验验证了实用价值。未来可扩展至其他离散生成模型或进一步优化计算效率。

title: Sat2City v2: Native 3D City Asset Generation from a Single Satellite Image
abstract: Generating explicit 3D city assets from a single satellite image is important for digital twins, urban simulation, and geospatial intelligence. Unlike satellite-to-street-view synthesis, the task requires a reusable textured mesh with plausible geometry and controllable appearance rather than a 3D proxy optimized only for rendering a small set of images or videos. The ICCV Sat2City framework made a first step by conditioning cascaded sparse-voxel latent diffusion on satellite-derived height maps, but its appearance was random, its training data were synthetic, and its task-specific VAE did not scale well to noisy real-world reconstructions. We present Sat2City v2, a journal extension that adapts a pretrained native structured-latent 3D foundation model to weakly aligned satellite images and textured meshes. We build a real-world dataset with 16,241 satellite-mesh pairs across 24 regions in 9 cities. Instead of learning a 3D representation from noisy city meshes, Sat2City v2 encodes each mesh into a pretrained native 3D latent space, fine-tunes a satellite-conditioned geometry flow, and uses the decoded shape to anchor satellite-conditioned texturing. This retains Sat2City's geometry-to-appearance cascade while enabling appearance-controllable generation from the satellite input. Experiments on metric-scale DSM reconstruction and generative city-asset benchmarks for geometry and appearance show that Sat2City v2 achieves the best overall performance among evaluated baselines. Overall, Sat2City v2 advances satellite-to-city generation from rendering-oriented 3D proxies to explicit textured mesh assets, supported by, to the best of our knowledge, the first documented satellite-mesh paired dataset collected from matched geographic crops for this asset-level task. Project page: https://ai4city-hkust.github.io/Sat2City-v2/

light_analysis.overview: Sat2City v2从单张卫星图像生成原生3D城市资产（带纹理网格），通过适配预训练原生结构化潜3D基础模型和构建真实卫星-网格配对数据集，实现外观可控的几何与纹理生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 卫星图像生成显式3D城市资产对数字孪生和城市模拟至关重要。现有Sat2City方法存在外观随机、依赖合成数据、任务特定VAE难以处理真实噪声等问题，缺乏可重用纹理网格，仅适用于渲染少量图像或视频的3D代理。
light_analysis.method: 采用预训练原生3D基础模型（结构化潜空间），将16,241个真实卫星-网格对（覆盖9城24区）的网格编码为原生3D潜代码，微调卫星条件几何流预测形状，再以解码形状为锚点进行卫星条件纹理生成，保持从几何到外观的级联架构。
light_analysis.result: 在度量DSM重建和生成城市资产基准上，Sat2City v2在几何与外观指标上均优于现有基线，实现外观可控的显式纹理网格生成，验证了真实数据集和预训练3D模型的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sat2City v2将卫星到城市生成从渲染导向的3D代理推进为显式纹理网格资产，并提供了首个针对该任务的卫星-网格配对数据集。未来可扩展至更多城市和更高分辨率，但弱对齐图像和噪声网格仍是挑战。

title: On the Position Bias of On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) improves the learning efficiency of standard reinforcement learning through dense, token-level supervision from teachers. In the standard KL objective of OPD, token-level losses are uniformly averaged, implying equal weights for all tokens. However, we discover that not all tokens are created equal: as student rollouts grow longer, they deviate further from the teacher's distribution, leading to degraded supervision quality at later positions. As a result, OPD using only the first 30% of tokens can perform comparably to using all tokens, whereas OPD using only the last 30% of tokens barely learns anything. In this work, we provide a principled understanding of this issue through the lens of constrained optimization. Based on these insights, we derive Importance-Weighted On-Policy Distillation (IW-OPD), in which the weight assigned to each token depends on the accumulated discrepancy between the student's and teacher's distributions, naturally upweighting earlier tokens and downweighting later ones with larger deviations. We show that IW-OPD converges significantly faster than OPD, with better learning efficiency, and achieves better final performance than standard OPD in both same-size and cross-scale settings, improving performance up to 6.9 points on AIME-2025.

light_analysis.overview: 提出重要性加权策略蒸馏（IW-OPD），通过位置感知加权缓解在线策略蒸馏中的位置偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）在标准KL目标中均匀平均所有token的损失，但研究发现学生rollout越长，后期token与教师分布偏差越大，导致监督质量下降。实验表明仅用前30%token即可与全token性能相当，而仅用后30%几乎不学习。这揭示了位置偏差问题，亟需理解其根源并提出改进方法。
light_analysis.method: 从约束优化角度理论分析位置偏差，推导出重要性加权在线策略蒸馏（IW-OPD）。核心创新是根据学生与教师分布间的累积差异为每个token分配权重——自然给早期token更高权重，给后期偏差大的token更低权重。无需改变模型架构，仅调整损失函数权重，适用于同规模与跨尺度设置。
light_analysis.result: IW-OPD相比标准OPD收敛速度显著更快，学习效率更高。在相同规模和跨规模设置下，最终性能均优于OPD，在AIME-2025上最高提升6.9个点。实验验证了加权策略的有效性，尤其在处理长序列时优势明显。摘要未提及具体基线方法细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文阐明了OPD中位置偏差的来源及影响，并提出简单有效的IW-OPD方法，通过token级重要性加权提升蒸馏效率与性能。该方法具有理论依据和实际价值，可推广至其他sequence-level监督任务。未来可探索动态加权策略或结合其他偏差因素。

title: Venice-H1: Failure-Aware Query Re-Ranking with Multi-Scale Grid Signatures for Referring Image Segmentation
abstract: Modern Referring Image Segmentation (RIS) systems generate multiple candidate masks per expression but rely on a simple heuristic--typically the argmax detection score--to select the final output. We identify query selection as a failure-case bottleneck: although heuristic selection succeeds on 82-93% of samples, the residual 7-18% of failures dominate the error budget, leaving a best-query selection gap of 3-11% mIoU. We introduce Venice-H1, a lightweight, backbone-decoupled post-hoc re-ranking module that encodes each candidate through multi-scale grid signatures--compact spatial descriptors pooled onto 4x4, 8x8, and 16x16 grids--and feeds them to a Transformer-based re-ranker with a Failure Gate (ROCAUC 0.78-0.82) that intervenes only when the default choice is likely suboptimal. Instantiated on DeRIS-L and DeRIS-B, Venice-H1 achieves delta_fail of +1.40 and +0.89 mIoU with strictly positive 95% CIs on all 16/16 (split, backbone) pairs and harmful-switch rates below 0.53%. Zero-shot transfer to medical referring segmentation (MS-CXR, M3D-RefSeg-2D) yields +1.16 and +0.51 mIoU without RIS-backbone fine-tuning. The module adds approximately 11.3M parameters and under 1 ms latency.
comment: 17 pages, 10 figures. Code: https://github.com/odaxai/Venice-H1 Model: https://huggingface.co/OdaxAI/venice-h1

light_analysis.overview: 提出Venice-H1，一种轻量级后处理重排序模块，通过多尺度网格签名和故障门机制改进RIS系统候选掩码选择，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代RIS系统生成多个候选掩码，但常用argmax检测分数选择最终输出，导致7-18%样本选择错误，成为主要误差来源。现有方法忽视这一瓶颈，遗留3-11% mIoU的改进空间。需要一种轻量级、与主干解耦的模块来精确识别并纠正次优选择。
light_analysis.method: Venice-H1采用多尺度网格签名（4x4, 8x8, 16x16网格）将候选掩码编码为紧凑空间描述符，输入Transformer重排序器。模块包含故障门（ROC AUC 0.78-0.82），仅在默认选择可能次优时干预。该模块与主干解耦，仅增加11.3M参数和<1ms延迟，可即插即用于现有RIS模型。
light_analysis.result: 在DeRIS-L和DeRIS-B上，Venice-H1分别提升delta_fail +1.40和+0.89 mIoU，所有16个（分割、主干）组合的95%置信区间严格为正，有害切换率低于0.53%。零样本迁移到医学分割（MS-CXR, M3D-RefSeg-2D）获得+1.16和+0.51 mIoU，无需微调RIS主干。
light_analysis.conclusion: Venice-H1通过故障感知查询重排序有效减少RIS系统选择错误，以极小代价提升性能。模块的轻量性和主干解耦特性使其易于集成，且零样本迁移能力显示其泛化潜力。未来可探索更高效的特征编码或扩展至其他密集预测任务。

title: Knowledge-Graph Grounding Helps LLMs Only for Out-of-Training Knowledge: A Controlled Study on Clinical Question Answering
abstract: A recent Nature Medicine study reports that general-purpose frontier LLMs outperform specialized retrieval-augmented clinical tools on medical benchmarks, and that retrieval can hurt strong models. We ask the natural follow-up: does structured knowledge-graph (KG) grounding change this, and when does grounding help at all? We contribute two results. First, a reproduction: the study's headline HealthBench score (~88) is the Consensus variant, not full HealthBench, where frontier models and ideal completions both score ~46-47 under a physician-calibrated grader (agreement 82.5%); we reproduce GPT-5.2 Consensus =90.9 and flag a score-deflating grader bug. Second, a knowledge-boundary result. Using a graph+vector engine (samyama-graph) over the public biomedical KG PrimeKG, neither naive triple retrieval nor an agentic natural-language-to-Cypher loop (82% successful queries) improves MedQA across a weak-to-strong model ladder (all |Delta| <= 3.4). On a synthetic counterfactual KG, and on a hybrid benchmark mixing known and novel facts, the identical pipeline lifts out-of-training accuracy from chance to ~100% (+68 to +79) while adding nothing on known facts (a no-LLM arm answers both). Across three regimes (no-knowledge, graph-aided, hybrid), grounding helps only insofar as the decisive fact lies outside the model's training -- public-KG facts are redundant, private and novel data are where it pays -- matching the study's institutional-data caveat.

light_analysis.overview: 通过控制实验发现，知识图谱辅助仅当所需知识超出模型训练范围时才有效，并复现了评分问题。
light_analysis.motivation: Nature Medicine研究显示通用前沿LLM优于专门医疗工具，且检索可能损害强模型。作者探究结构化知识图谱辅助是否改变这一结论，以及何时真正有帮助。现有方法未区分知识边界，导致辅助效果模糊。明确KG辅助的适用条件对临床问答至关重要，但缺乏系统对比研究。
light_analysis.method: 使用图+向量引擎（samyama-graph）在公共生物医学KG PrimeKG上，比较朴素三元组检索和智能自然语言到Cypher循环（82%成功率）对MedQA的影响，覆盖弱到强模型。构建合成反事实KG和混合基准测试，分无知识、图辅助、混合三场景评估。
light_analysis.result: 公共KG辅助对初体知识无提升（所有|Delta|<=3.4），但在合成KG上，将训练外知识准确率从随机提升至~100%（+68到+79）。三种场景下，辅助仅在关键事实超出训练知识时有效，公共KG事实冗余。
light_analysis.conclusion: KG辅助仅对训练外知识有效，公共KG事实冗余，私有和新颖数据才有价值。匹配研究中的机构数据注释。学术价值是明确边界，实际应用建议针对私有数据；局限：仅测试单一KG和医学领域。

title: Asymptotic Signal Subspace Recovery in Softmax Attention Models
abstract: Attention mechanisms have demonstrated remarkable empirical success in identifying relevant information from large collections of tokens, yet the theoretical principles underlying this behavior remain poorly understood. We study a stylized softmax-attention model in which a query vector is learned by stochastic gradient ascent from a collection of informative and nuisance tokens. Exploiting the symmetry of the model, we derive a population objective and characterize the limiting ordinary differential equation governing the learning dynamics. Using tools from stochastic approximation and dynamical systems theory, we establish a rigorous connection between the stochastic learning algorithm and its deterministic limit. Our main result shows that, under suitable high-dimensional scaling assumptions and standard step-size conditions, the learned query converges almost surely to the one-dimensional signal subspace spanned by the latent informative direction. Equivalently, the query asymptotically recovers the latent signal up to the intrinsic sign ambiguity. These results provide a rigorous theoretical foundation for understanding attention mechanisms as signal extraction procedures in high-dimensional noisy environments and offer a dynamical-systems perspective on how attention discovers relevant information in the presence of substantial noise.
comment: 30 pages, 3 figures. Suplement some detailed proofs

light_analysis.overview: 本文理论证明了softmax注意力模型在随机梯度上升下能渐进恢复一维信号子空间。
light_analysis.motivation: 注意力机制在实践中能有效从大量标记中识别相关信息，但其理论基础尚不明确。现有方法缺乏对注意机制如何在高维噪声环境中提取信号的严格理论分析。本文旨在通过研究一个简化的softmax注意力模型，揭示其学习的动态过程和收敛性质，为理解注意力机制作为信号提取过程提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 研究一个由信息标记和噪声标记组成的简化softmax注意力模型，查询向量通过随机梯度上升学习。利用模型对称性推导群体目标函数和极限常微分方程，借助随机逼近和动力系统理论建立随机学习算法与确定性极限的严格联系。在高维缩放假设和标准步长条件下，证明学习查询几乎必然收敛到潜在信息方向张成的一维信号子空间。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果表明，在适当的高维缩放假设和标准步长条件下，学习到的查询向量几乎必然收敛到由潜在信息方向张成的一维信号子空间，即查询渐进地恢复潜在信号（除内在符号模糊外）。该结果严格证明了注意机制能从大量噪声中提取信号的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为理解注意力机制作为高维噪声环境下的信号提取过程提供了严格的理论基础，并从动力系统视角揭示了注意如何发现相关信息。该研究增进了对transformer中核心组件的理解，但模型为简化版本，未来可扩展到更复杂的注意力结构和多层场景。

title: Diffusion Integrated Gradients: Controllable Path Generation for Flexible Feature Attribution
abstract: Path-based attribution methods such as Integrated Gradients (IG) are widely adopted for their strong axiomatic properties and effectiveness in attributing model predictions to input features by integrating gradients along a path from a baseline to the input. However, the choice of the attribution path largely affects the quality of explanations, and existing approaches rely on fixed or hand-crafted paths that often produce noisy or distorted attributions. To address this limitation, we propose Diffusion Integrated Gradients (DiffIG), a novel method that reformulates path generation as a conditional generative modeling problem. DiffIG first trains a diffusion model to learn a distribution over paths generated from a Stick-Breaking Process, then employs guided sampling to embed user guidance during the sampling procedure. We demonstrate that DiffIG quantitatively matches or outperforms existing path-based methods, achieving perceptually aligned explanations. This work introduces a new generative perspective for flexible, inference-time controllable Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) methods.
comment: 44 pages, 22 figures, 10 tables. Accepted to ECCV 2026; includes appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出Diffusion Integrated Gradients (DiffIG)，将路径生成建模为条件生成问题，实现灵活可控的特征归因。
light_analysis.motivation: 路径归因方法如Integrated Gradients (IG)通过沿基线到输入的路径积分梯度来归因模型预测，但路径选择严重影响解释质量，现有方法依赖固定或手工设计的路径，产生噪声或扭曲归因。因此需要一种能够生成高质量、可控制路径的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DiffIG，将路径生成视为条件生成建模问题。首先训练扩散模型学习由Stick-Breaking Process生成的路径分布，然后采用引导采样在采样过程中嵌入用户指导，实现灵活可控的路径生成。
light_analysis.result: 定量匹配或超越现有路径归因方法，实现感知上对齐的解释。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明性能优于或等于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 引入新的生成视角，实现推理时可控的可解释AI方法。潜在应用价值：灵活的特征归因工具，用户可在推理时指导解释过程。未来工作可能扩展至其他归因任务。

title: MultiMem: Measuring and Mitigating Memorization in Multi-Modal Contrastive Learning
abstract: Memorization in machine learning models enables high performance on rare in-distribution samples by capturing their atypical patterns. However, it also causes harmful retention of noise and outliers, degrading generalization. While memorization has been extensively studied in both supervised and self-supervised learning in the vision domain, it remains unexplored in multi-modal contrastive learning. We address this gap by introducing MultiMem, the first metric designed to quantify memorization in multi-modal contrastive learning. Through our systematic analysis, we demonstrate that cross-modal semantic misalignment has the strongest influence on memorization, with text being the dominant modality driving memorization, followed by video, image, and audio. We show that targeted augmentations applied across all modalities effectively reduce memorization as measured by our MultiMem metric and improve model performance. Overall, this work establishes the first framework for measuring and mitigating memorization in multi-modal contrastive learning, preventing harmful data retention and contributing to higher-performing models.
comment: Accepted at The 19th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个多模态对比学习记忆化度量指标MultiMem，并发现跨模态语义不对齐是主要驱动因素，通过定向增强有效缓解记忆化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究已广泛探讨监督学习和自监督学习中的记忆化现象，但多模态对比学习领域尚属空白。记忆化虽能提升罕见样本性能，但也导致噪声和异常值的有害保留，影响模型泛化。理解多模态场景下的记忆化机制对于构建更鲁棒、更泛化的多模态模型至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出MultiMem，一种专用于量化多模态对比学习中记忆化程度的新指标。通过系统分析，揭示跨模态语义不对齐是影响记忆化的最强因素，且文本模态主导记忆化，其次为视频、图像和音频。采用跨所有模态的定向增强策略来减少记忆化，并提升模型性能。
light_analysis.result: MultiMem指标有效评估记忆化程度。实验表明，文本模态对记忆化的贡献最大，跨模态语义不对齐显著影响记忆化。应用定向增强后，模型记忆化程度降低，同时性能提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次建立多模态对比学习记忆化的度量与缓解框架，防止有害数据保留，有助于构建更泛化的模型。未来可探索更精细的跨模态对齐策略，或将该框架推广至其他多模态学习范式。

title: Alternate loss functions and regression models that achieve robustness to outliers by modulating the learning rate
abstract: Most real-world datasets used for training supervised learning models are contaminated with noisy data and outliers leading to large prediction errors. This paper proposes a new approach for achieving robustness where the learning rate is modulated by a factor that is sensitive to outliers. In this approach a reduction of the learning rate is shown to be achieved by using alternate loss functions that are infinitely differentiable, strictly convex or quasiconvex and more closely approximate the absolute error than Huber and log-cosh losses. A comparison of the performance of regression models trained with different loss functions on a wide variety of benchmarks and datasets is presented to demonstrate the superior performance of the Square Root Loss (SRL) and Smooth Mean Absolute Error (SMAE) losses proposed in this paper. Two new robust linear regression models are presented. Highly vectorized robust parameter update formulae that take advantage of modern GPUs for both stochastic and batch gradient descent are presented.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过调节学习率和使用新型损失函数（SRL、SMAE）实现回归模型对异常值的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实数据集常含有噪声和异常值，导致监督学习模型预测误差大。现有损失函数如Huber和log-cosh对异常值鲁棒性有限，需要更有效的损失函数和模型来降低异常值影响，提升回归任务性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种无限可微、严格凸或拟凸的损失函数：平方根损失（Square Root Loss, SRL）和平滑平均绝对误差（Smooth Mean Absolute Error, SMAE），它们更近似绝对误差。通过调节学习率因子（对异常值敏感）实现鲁棒性。同时提出两种新的鲁棒线性回归模型，并给出高度向量化的参数更新公式，支持随机梯度下降和批梯度下降，适合现代GPU加速。
light_analysis.result: 在多种基准数据集上比较不同损失函数训练的回归模型性能，结果表明提出的SRL和SMAE损失函数显著优于Huber和log-cosh损失，表现出更强的鲁棒性和更低的预测误差。具体提升幅度未在摘要中明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过引入新型损失函数和调节学习率机制，有效提高了回归模型对异常值的鲁棒性。提出的SRL和SMAE损失函数易于应用，且向量化更新公式便于GPU实现，具有实际部署价值。未来可进一步探索在其他任务中的适用性。

title: The Cost Geometry of Belief: finite-resource inference under noisy observation
abstract: A finite machine's digital twin of a system observes the territory through finite, noisy sensors; we model its coherent output as a belief, a probability density over states, the Bayes posterior, never a point. Certainty, the perfect twin, is denied twice, by observation and by physics, both read off the Fisher information. To make this finiteness geometric, we model what it costs to change a belief: a belief-cost geometry, optimal transport in Wasserstein space reweighted conformally by Fisher information. The framework rests on two posed commitments: that revision cost is a scalar price on transport (the arena), and that the price is honest: one nat costs the same length everywhere. Honesty selects the Fisher reweighting because transport demotes the Fisher information from the metric ruler of distinguishability to the slope of entropy, the move that sets transport apart from Fisher-Rao. From these two postulates, three results follow on the conformal class (essentially location-scale), all invariants of one change of cost unit. A wall: a well-posed inference rejects certainty to infinite distance as soon as the cost dominates the Fisher information (necessity conjectured beyond power laws). An honest family: the eikonal price where each nat the same length everywhere, is equivalent to proportionality U=cJ, the Fisher family. A rigidity: these geometries are hyperbolic, and the Stam bound crowns the Gaussian, the most hyperbolic location-scale belief; -1/4 is one image of a relativity of cost. The cost of reaching a given precision then has a geometric cost floor diverging at certainty. Thermodynamics fixes the cost unit and motivates the framework; the results are geometric, in nats.

light_analysis.overview: 提出信念成本几何，将有限资源推理的信念变化成本建模为Fisher信息重加权的Wasserstein空间最优传输，并导出几何不变性。
light_analysis.motivation: 有限机器通过有限噪声传感器观察系统，其信念为概率密度而非点。现有方法缺乏对信念变化成本的几何理解，而理解有限资源推理的几何结构对信息论和统计物理具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 基于两个公设：信念修订成本是传输的标量价格，且价格诚实（1 nat处处相同长度）。由此推导出三个结果：共形类（位置-尺度）、诚实族（eikonal价格等价于Fisher族U=cJ）、刚性（几何为双曲，Stam界以高斯为最双曲）。核心是Fisher重加权将Fisher信息从区分度度量降为熵的斜率。
light_analysis.result: 一个墙：当成本支配Fisher信息时，确定性被推至无穷远；诚实族：eikonal价格等价于比例性U=cJ；刚性：几何是双曲的，Stam界冠以高斯为最双曲的location-scale信念；精度成本有几何下界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了有限资源推理的几何框架，揭示了信念变化成本与Fisher信息的内在关系，具有热力学动机。结果以nats为单位，纯几何；可用于理解计算资源受限的推理系统。

title: Precision Recall Controllable Radiology Report Generation via Hybrid Natural Language and Clinical Reward Learning
abstract: Automated radiology report generation (RRG) has gained increasing attention because it can reduce the heavy workload of clinical report writing. However, most existing methods mainly optimize for natural language generation (NLG) metrics that focus on language fluency, while providing little control over clinically important factors such as precision and recall. As consequence, generated reports may be fluent but not well aligned with different clinical needs. To address this challenge, we propose a reinforcement learning framework for precision recall controllable RRG, where a control parameter explicitly adjusts the trade-off between clinical precision and recall during inference. This design allows the model to flexibly generate reports according to different clinical requirements. To ensure clinical correctness, we introduce a clinical reward into the training objective, which helps improve clinical efficacy (CE) beyond standard language-based optimization. In addition, we apply a group-relative training strategy that normalizes rewards within each training group, reducing reward variance and improving training stability. Extensive experiments on the MIMIC-CXR dataset show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both NLG and CE evaluation metrics, while providing reliable control over the CE precision recall trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 提出强化学习框架，通过控制参数实现放射学报告生成的临床精确率和召回率可调。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有放射学报告生成方法主要优化语言流畅性，忽略临床因素如精确率和召回率，导致报告流畅但不符合临床需求。需要一种能根据临床需求灵活调整精确率和召回率的生成方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出强化学习框架，引入控制参数显式调整临床精确率与召回率的权衡。训练目标中加入临床奖励以提升临床有效性，并采用组相对训练策略归一化奖励，降低方差、提高稳定性。在MIMIC-CXR数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在MIMIC-CXR数据集上，该方法在自然语言生成和临床有效性指标上均优于现有最优方法，并能可靠控制临床精确率-召回率权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法实现了临床精确率和召回率的可控生成，提高了报告与临床需求的契合度，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更多临床因素的控制。

title: Topological Neural Dynamics: A Neuron-wise Framework for Sequence Modeling
abstract: Existing sequence models, including RNNs, LSTMs, continuous-time networks, and Transformers, share a common structural principle: layer-wise dynamics, where all neurons in the same layer co-evolve through a shared parameterized operator, leaving individual neurons no freedom to evolve independently. Yet in many complex dynamical systems, rich global behavior emerges precisely from locally evolving units interacting through structured connectivity. Inspired by this principle, we introduce Topological Neural Dynamics (TND), a sequence modeling framework that shifts computation from layer-wise to neuron-wise dynamics. TND represents a neural system as a directed neuron graph, an interaction operator, and a local dynamics function, where each neuron evolves independently and collective computation emerges from interactions through the explicit graph topology. We instantiate TND as a discrete-time graph-coupled dynamical system and evaluate it as a case study on a behavior cloning task in single-player Pong. Compared with Vanilla RNN, Sparse RNN, LSTM, Closed-form continuous-time neural network (CfC), and Transformer baselines, TND achieves the best catch rate and a mean of 17.47 consecutive catches per round, more than three times that of the strongest baseline. These results suggest that shifting from layer-wise to neuron-wise dynamics provides an effective inductive bias for sequence modeling.
comment: The experiments have some errors regarding model accuracy and need to be updated

light_analysis.overview: 提出拓扑神经动力学(TND)，实现神经元级序列建模，在Pong任务中显著优于层间动态方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有序列模型（RNN、LSTM、连续时间网络、Transformer）均采用层间动态，即同一层所有神经元通过共享算子共同演化，个体神经元缺乏独立演化自由。然而复杂全局行为常源于局部单元的独立演化与结构化连接交互。因此，需要一种赋予神经元个体独立性的序列建模框架。
light_analysis.method: TND将神经建模为有向神经元图、交互算子和局部动态函数。每个神经元独立演化，集体计算通过显式图拓扑的交互涌现。实例化为离散时间图耦合动力系统，在单玩家Pong行为克隆任务中评估，与Vanilla RNN、Sparse RNN、LSTM、CfC和Transformer对比。
light_analysis.result: TND在Pong行为克隆任务中取得最佳抓取率，平均每轮连续抓取17.47次，是最强基线的三倍以上。这表明从层间动态转向神经元级动态为序列建模提供了有效归纳偏置。
light_analysis.conclusion: TND通过引入神经元级动力学，突破了传统层间动态的限制，在序列建模任务中展现了显著性能提升。该框架具有普适性，未来可应用于更复杂领域。

title: Sakana Fugu Technical Report
abstract: The capabilities of frontier Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to advance, with different providers increasingly specializing in distinct domains. This raises a natural next objective: how to combine the individual specializations of various LLMs into a collectively intelligent system. To this end, we report the development of Sakana Fugu, a family of orchestrator models that harness and amplify the capabilities of an LLM agent team. Fugu models are themselves language models trained to understand user queries and dynamically devise agentic scaffolds to solve them. Through these adaptive scaffolds, Fugu accesses performance beyond any individual LLM agent, achieving state-of-the-art results compared to other publicly accessible models across a range of challenging tasks, including SWE-Bench Pro, Terminal Bench, LiveCodeBench, GPQA-Diamond, Humanity's Last Exam, and CharXiv Reasoning. We release two models: Fugu, which balances performance with latency for everyday use, and Fugu-Ultra, which prioritizes answer quality on the hardest problems. We describe our training paradigm, which encompasses large-scale fine-tuning, evolutionary algorithms, and reinforcement learning approaches, along with the infrastructure and core design principles that turn these methods into a production system. We hope this report encourages further research into multi-agent systems and dynamic, query-adaptive agentic scaffolds as a path toward the next frontier of AI capabilities, accessed through collective intelligence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种动态编排多个LLM专家模型的代理系统Fugu，通过训练编排器模型自适应设计代理支架，实现集体智能。
light_analysis.motivation: 前沿LLM能力不断进步且各提供商逐渐专业化，但如何组合这些专长形成集体智能系统尚未解决。现有方法通常固定使用单一模型或简单集成，缺乏动态自适应能力。因此需要一种能理解用户查询并自动编排多模型协作的机制，以超越单一LLM的局限。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法为训练编排器模型（Fugu/Fugu-Ultra）来理解用户查询并动态设计代理支架。训练范式融合大规模微调、进化算法和强化学习。系统设计为生产级，支持自适应编排，利用多LLM团队协作。关键创新在于查询自适应动态支架生成，而非固定流程。
light_analysis.result: 在SWE-Bench Pro、Terminal Bench、LiveCodeBench、GPQA-Diamond、Humanity's Last Exam、CharXiv Reasoning等挑战性任务上取得SOTA结果，超越所有公开可访问模型。发布两个版本：平衡性能与延迟的Fugu和优先答案质量的Fugu-Ultra，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 展示了动态、查询自适应的多代理系统能有效组合LLM专长，实现集体智能，为下一代AI能力提供方向。鼓励进一步研究多代理系统和自适应支架。潜在局限性包括训练复杂度和推理开销，未来可探索更高效的编排策略。

title: Grouped Query Experts: Mixture-of-Experts on GQA Self-Attention
abstract: Self-attention is central to Transformer performance and is often the most expensive part of the Transformer at long context lengths because its pairwise token interactions scale quadratically with sequence length. Standard dense attention also applies the same set of attention heads to every token regardless of token difficulty or information content. This uniform activation can waste compute, especially as sequences grow longer and attention cost increases rapidly. We propose Grouped Query Experts (GQE), a mixture-of-experts layer on top of grouped-query attention (GQA). Within each GQA group, a router selects k query-head experts per token while all key-value (KV) heads remain dense and unchanged. Thus, GQE keeps the KV cache benefits of GQA and reduces only the active query-head computation. On a fixed 30B token budget at the 250M parameter scale, GQE matches the all-active GQA baseline in downstream accuracy while activating half the query heads per token.

light_analysis.overview: GQE在GQA自注意力上引入混合专家层，通过每个token选择k个查询头专家，减少计算量并保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自注意力计算随序列长度二次增长，标准稠密注意力对所有token使用相同注意力头，导致计算浪费，尤其在长上下文场景下更为严重。现有方法难以平衡效率和性能。
light_analysis.method: GQE在分组查询注意力（GQA）的每个组上部署混合专家层，路由器为每个token选择k个查询头专家，键值头保持稠密不变。这样保留GQA的KV缓存优势，仅减少活跃查询头计算量。
light_analysis.result: 在250M参数规模、30B token预算下，GQE与全活跃GQA基线在下游准确率上相当，但每个token仅激活一半查询头，显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: GQE有效减少自注意力计算量而不牺牲性能，适用于长上下文Transformer模型。未来可探索更高效的路由策略或扩展到更大模型。

title: SEAGAN: domain-Specific and Edge-Aware Graph Attention Network for Dynamic Plant Processes
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) offer a flexible framework for learning from scientific data with physical, biological, or functional associations. One promising domain is plant physiology, where observed responses result from several interacting processes that are difficult to isolate, even with human intervention. A key example is the A-Ci curve, which relates the net CO2 assimilation rate (Anet) to leaf intercellular CO2 concentration (Ci) and is also used to estimate photosynthetic parameters in biophysical models. However, accurate estimation requires accurate identification of the active biochemical limiting state at each curve point, which is a major source of uncertainty. Here, we express the limitation-state identification in A-Ci curves as a graph-based node classification problem. A graph representation of the A-Ci curve is created using distance-based k-nearest-neighbor (kNN) and auxiliary-signal-guided (ASG) connectivity. The methodology was evaluated against the conventional machine learning baselines, graph-based architectures, and an automated fitting-based benchmark. Results on a large synthetic dataset with known ground-truth limitation states show that graph-based models improve classification, especially near biochemical transition areas. The top-performing configuration, SEAGAN (domain-Specific and Edge-Aware Graph Attention Network for Dynamic Plant Processes), integrates process-aware node features, edge attributes, kNN connectivity, and graph attention with a weighted cross-entropy loss, obtaining an F1-score of 0.857 and accuracy of 0.882. The results suggest that using A-Ci curves as graphs enables better identification of the biochemical limiting condition and reduces the uncertainty associated with both human and automated methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SEAGAN，一种图注意力网络，通过图表示和领域特定特征优化A-Ci曲线的生化限制状态识别。
light_analysis.motivation: A-Ci曲线用于估计光合参数，但准确识别每个点的生化限制状态高度不确定。现有方法难以分离相互作用的生理过程，导致估计偏差。
light_analysis.method: 将A-Ci曲线建模为图，使用kNN和辅助信号引导连接。SEAGAN集成过程感知节点特征、边属性、图注意力机制和加权交叉熵损失。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集上，SEAGAN的F1-score为0.857，准确率0.882，优于传统机器学习和图基线模型，尤其在生化过渡区域。
light_analysis.conclusion: 图表示有效降低了限制状态识别的不确定性，为植物生理学提供了新方法。未来可扩展至其他动态科学过程。

title: Repeated Shared Access Enables Grokking, but Edit Propagation Depends on an Addressable Memory
abstract: We study factual edit propagation in a controlled synthetic knowledge-graph QA setting using a 2x2 grid that crosses loop recurrence with shared-memory access: a dense transformer (Dense), a looped transformer (Loop), a dense backbone with shared memory (Dense+Mem), and a looped backbone with shared memory (loop-memory coupling, LMC). The two factors dissociate. For learning, both routes to repeated shared access -- looped recomputation and repeated memory rereading -- cross the out-of-distribution (OOD) grokking barrier that Dense fails, so repeated shared access is the behavioral regularity, not a specific architecture. For editing, the substrates split along a different axis: applying a single localized factual edit (conditioned on direct success) and measuring 2-hop propagation on a shared pre-edit-correct set, the edit propagates strongly in both memory-bearing cells (LMC 0.78-0.92, Dense+Mem 0.71-0.96) and only weakly in the memory-free ones (Loop 0.04-0.30, Dense 0.00-0.03). The split is along the memory axis, not the loop axis: every memory-bearing seed exceeds every memory-free seed, with no detectable difference between the two memory cells. Crucially Dense+Mem has no recurrence, so the propagating ingredient is an addressable site that an edit can write to and later computation rereads, not loop recomputation; Loop is at best a partial intermediate. The affordance survives coarsening the store (N=128 to N=13): propagation attenuates but the memory/no-memory split persists, so fine granularity buys precision rather than the affordance itself. These results dissociate learning competence from editing affordance -- repeated shared access suffices to grok, but edit propagation depends on whether the substrate exposes an addressable memory that the forward computation can write to and later reread, an affordance that loop recurrence provides only partially.

light_analysis.overview: 通过合成知识图谱实验，发现重复共享访问（循环或内存）是Grokking的关键，但事实编辑传播依赖于可寻址内存而非循环。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究关注模型学习能力，但对知识编辑的传播机制理解不足。大模型编辑后事实如何影响相关推理？循环和内存两种机制的作用混淆。实验在受控环境中分离这两种因素，旨在明确Grokking和编辑传播的不同依赖条件。
light_analysis.method: 构建2x2四种架构：纯Dense、Loop（循环）、Dense+Mem（共享内存）、LMC（循环+内存）。在合成知识图谱QA中训练，评估OOD Grokking；然后对单个事实进行局部编辑，测量2跳传播准确率。关键设计：控制循环和内存的可寻址性。
light_analysis.result: 学习：Loop、Dense+Mem、LMC均实现OOD Grokking（Dense失败）。编辑：带内存的架构传播强（LMC 0.78-0.92, Dense+Mem 0.71-0.96），无内存的弱（Loop 0.04-0.30, Dense 0.00-0.03），循环不显著。粗粒度记忆（N=13）仍保留分裂。
light_analysis.conclusion: 重复共享访问（无论循环还是内存）是Grokking的充分条件，但编辑传播需要可寻址内存——写入后前向计算可重新读取的站点。循环仅部分提供此能力。这揭示了学习与编辑的硬件差异，指导未来架构设计需区分两种机制。

title: Data-Forcing Distillation: Restoring Diversity and Fidelity in Few-Step Video Generation
abstract: Recent progress has shown promise in distilling multi-step video diffusion models into efficient few-step students. Among them, Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) and its successor DMD2 achieved strong generation quality and fast convergence. However, due to the nature of the reverse Kullback--Leibler (KL) objective, these methods exhibit two persistent failure modes: a substantial drop in sample diversity, and visibly over-saturated outputs that deviate from real-video appearance. In this work, we propose Data-Forcing Distillation (DFD), a simple post-training framework that restores diversity and fidelity in DMD with only a single-line of code change. At its core is the teacher score discrepancy to guide the student toward the real-data distribution, pulling it to missing modes (mitigating mode collapse) and away from problematic modes absent in real data (avoiding over-saturation). We provide an in-depth theoretical analysis of our framework and validate our approach on text-to-video, image-to-video, and autoregressive video generation. With only 100--300 steps of finetuning, DFD effectively restores diversity and fidelity on both Wan2.1-1.3B and Cosmos-Predict2.5-2B model, resolving the over-saturation artifacts with significantly better video dynamics and appearance, and even outperforms the teacher model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Data-Forcing Distillation (DFD)，通过单行代码修改恢复少步视频生成中的多样性和保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）在多步视频扩散模型蒸馏中，因反向KL散度导致样本多样性显著下降和输出过饱和，偏离真实视频外观，这些问题亟待解决以提升少步生成质量。
light_analysis.method: DFD通过教师分数差异引导学生朝向真实数据分布，拉向缺失模式（缓解模式坍塌）并远离假想模式（避免过饱和）。该方法基于理论分析，应用于文本到视频、图像到视频和自回归视频生成，仅需100-300步微调。
light_analysis.result: 在Wan2.1-1.3B和Cosmos-Predict2.5-2B模型上，DFD有效恢复多样性和保真度，解决过饱和伪影，视频动态和外观显著改善，甚至超越教师模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: DFD以简单代码修改修复DMD的缺陷，提升少步视频生成质量，具有理论和实践价值。可轻松集成到现有流程，但可能仅限于特定蒸馏方法。

title: Rethinking Structural Anomaly Detection: From Decision Boundaries to Projection Operators
abstract: Most existing anomaly detection methods rely on estimating a probability density or learning an enclosing decision boundary, implicitly assuming that normal data occupies a region of non-zero volume in the ambient space. In contrast, structural anomaly detection considers data that lies near a low-dimensional manifold, creating a mismatch between the inductive bias of existing methods and the structure of the data, often resulting in degraded performance. To address this mismatch, we introduce a geometric perspective. Specifically, we learn a projection operator onto the manifold of normal samples and define a sample as anomalous if it is altered by this projection. This formulation naturally integrates the inductive bias of manifold-supported data and reframes anomaly detection in terms of a projection residual, thereby resolving issues arising from modeling degenerate distributions. Notably, it provides a unifying interpretation of reconstruction-based methods by explaining their success and failure in terms of projection quality. In particular, it explains the strong generalization ability of projection-aligned models as a consequence of contraction behavior toward the manifold. Moreover, by decoupling anomaly detection from probabilistic modeling, it reduces the tendency to misclassify rare but normal samples, a widely recognized limitation of existing approaches. Empirically, we demonstrate that projection-aligned methods achieve strong performance, outperforming boundary-based methods while improving upon existing reconstruction-based approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于投影算子的结构异常检测方法，利用投影残差替代决策边界，统一解释并改进重构方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有异常检测方法大多依赖概率密度估计或决策边界，假设正常数据占据非零体积区域，但结构异常检测中数据常位于低维流形，导致方法偏差和性能下降。为解决这一不匹配问题，需要引入几何视角。
light_analysis.method: 学习一个投影算子将样本投影到正常样本的流形上，通过计算投影残差判断异常：若样本被投影显著改变则视为异常。该方法自然整合流形支持的归纳偏置，统一解释重构方法的成功与失败（投影质量），并解释投影对齐模型的强泛化能力（流形收缩行为）。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，基于投影对齐的方法在性能上优于基于边界的方法，并改进了现有重构方法。具体指标摘要未明确，但强调强泛化能力和对罕见正常样本误分类的缓解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从几何角度重新定义异常检测，通过投影算子有效解决低维流形数据的建模问题，减少罕见正常样本误分类，为重构方法提供统一理论解释。未来可探索更复杂的流形投影学习。

title: TouchThinker: Scaling Tactile Commonsense Reasoning to the Open World with Large-scale Data and Action-aware Representation
abstract: Touch is a key modality for embodied agents to understand the physical world. Although recent work has incorporated tactile signals into language systems for tactile commonsense reasoning, scaling such systems to realistic open-world settings remains challenging due to two key bottlenecks: (1) current tactile reasoning datasets remain limited in format and scale, providing insufficient supervision for reasoning from tactile observations to physical commonsense and hindering the learning of transferable tactile commonsense; (2) Tactile signals are inherently redundant and action-specific, yet existing methods often overlook these properties, resulting in inefficient representations with limited semantic expressiveness. To address these limitations, we propose TouchThinker, a tactile-language framework that scales tactile commonsense reasoning to the open world from both data and representation perspectives.
