First, we construct TouchThinker-1M, a million-scale, multi-source tactile reasoning dataset covering \textbf{415} objects, \textbf{8} scenarios, and \textbf{7} sensor types, providing a solid data foundation for open-world generalization. We further introduce TouchThinker-Bench, an open-world benchmark with more realistic and diverse tasks. Then, we propose action-aware modeling mechanism to improve tactile representation efficiency and enable efficient reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that TouchThinker achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art models across multiple datasets. Our code and dataset will be made available at: https://github.com/lvkailin0118/TouchThinker.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TouchThinker框架，通过大规模数据集和动作感知表征，将触觉常识推理扩展到开放世界。
light_analysis.motivation: 触觉是具身智能体理解物理世界的关键模态，但现有触觉推理数据集格式和规模有限，难以学习可迁移的触觉常识；触觉信号存在冗余且与动作相关，现有方法忽视这些特性，导致表征效率低、语义表达有限。因此，需要从数据和表征两方面扩展触觉常识推理至开放世界。
light_analysis.method: 构建TouchThinker-1M百万级多源触觉推理数据集，覆盖415个物体、8个场景和7种传感器类型，为开放世界泛化提供数据基础；提出动作感知建模机制，提升触觉表征效率并实现高效推理。同时发布TouchThinker-Bench开放世界基准，包含更真实多样的任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，TouchThinker在多个数据集上达到与最先进模型可比的性能。具体数据未在摘要中明确给出，但声称具有竞争力。代码和数据集将开源。摘要未提供详细的定量对比结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: TouchThinker通过大规模数据和动作感知表征，有效扩展了触觉常识推理至开放世界，具有重要的学术和应用价值。未来工作可进一步优化表征效率和扩展数据规模。潜在局限性可能包括对动态触觉信号的处理等。

title: SkillHone: A Harness for Continual Agent Skill Evolution Through Persistent Decision History
abstract: Agent skills extend language-model agents with task-specific procedures, scripts, and references, but the tasks and environments they target continually change. Existing methods improve skills in bounded runs and retain only the final artifact, discarding the decision history that later agents need to interpret prior revisions, evaluations, and rejected alternatives. We introduce SkillHone, a harness for continual agent skill evolution grounded in persistent decision history. SkillHone pairs skill revisions with evaluation-side evidence that supplies practice feedback, recording structured histories of diagnoses, revisions, evidence, and outcomes. Role-separated subagents run candidate skills on practice probes with redacted reporting and propose revisions informed by prior decisions, enabling cross-session refinement without rediscovering past rationale. On deep-research benchmarks, SkillHone runs without a pre-integrated search stack and outperforms the commercially backed deep-research agent by 15.8 points on GAIA and 3.2 points on WebWalkerQA-EN, while also exceeding prior skill-evolution methods. We further deploy SkillHone on internal tool-mediated analysis scenarios, where it improves accuracy by an average of 18.8 points across seven settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于持久化决策历史实现智能体技能持续进化的SkillHone框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有技能提升方法仅在有限运行中改进，丢弃决策历史，导致后续智能体无法解释先前的修订、评估和拒绝方案。任务和环境持续变化，需要跨会话的持续改进，现有方法难以实现。
light_analysis.method: SkillHone通过记录诊断、修订、证据和结果的结构化历史，实现技能修订与评估证据的持久化。采用角色分离的子代理在实践探针上运行候选技能，并基于先前决策提出修订，从而在跨会话中持续改进，无需重新发现历史理由。
light_analysis.result: 在GAIA基准上比商业深度研究代理高15.8分，WebWalkerQA-EN高3.2分，并超越先前技能演化方法。在内部工具场景中，平均准确率提升18.8分。无需预集成搜索栈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是SkillHone框架，通过持久决策历史支持智能体技能持续进化。学术上解决技能演化中历史信息丢失问题，实际中提升复杂评估任务性能。未来可探索更广泛的跨任务迁移。

title: TopoPult-SSL: Gland-Mask-Free Cross-Device Meibomian Gland Segmentation via Self-Distilled Weak Clinical Priors
abstract: Every new clinical imaging device creates a domain shift where dense gland masks are expensive yet cheap clinical signals -- eyelid outlines, Pult grades, morphometric ratios -- are routinely recorded. We present TopoPult-SSL, a two-stage framework for cross-device meibomian gland segmentation. Stage 1 adapts a source-trained model without target gland masks in the training loss, using four weak-prior anchors driven by target eyelid masks and clinical metadata only. Stage 2, when target gland masks are available, distils complementary Stage-1 teachers into a single compact student via supervised self-distillation. We develop and validate the technique on the public MGD-1k to CAMG research benchmark (1,000 to 100 images, different device), where the distilled model achieves Dice 0.716+/-0.006 (best 0.726), surpassing UA-MT (0.710) and the ensemble teacher (0.720) -- with a single pass. The gland-mask-free Stage-1 variant reaches Precision 0.694 vs. 0.30-0.34 for SAM/MedSAM (p<0.001), enabling deployment without dense gland contouring. Code and reproducibility scripts are released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TopoPult-SSL框架，无需目标域腺体掩码，利用弱临床先验和自蒸馏实现跨设备睑板腺分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床成像设备变更导致域偏移，腺体掩码昂贵而眼睑轮廓、Pult分级等临床信号廉价且常规记录。现有方法依赖目标域掩码，成本高。因此需要一种能利用廉价临床先验进行跨设备分割的方法，降低标注负担并提升实用性。
light_analysis.method: 两阶段框架：阶段1通过眼睑掩码和临床元数据驱动的四个弱先验锚点，使源训练模型适应目标域，无需目标腺体掩码参与损失。阶段2当目标腺体掩码可用时，通过监督自蒸馏将多个互补的阶段1教师模型蒸馏为一个紧凑学生模型。在MGD-1k到CAMG跨设备基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 蒸馏模型Dice达0.716±0.006（最佳0.726），超越UA-MT（0.710）和集成教师（0.720），且仅需单次前向。无腺体掩码的阶段1变体Precision为0.694，显著优于SAM/MedSAM的0.30-0.34（p<0.001），实现了无需密集腺体轮廓的部署。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种利用弱临床先验的跨设备睑板腺分割框架，有效缓解域偏移和标注成本问题。学术上为医学图像分割提供了新范式；实际应用中便于新设备快速部署。未来可探索更多临床先验的融合以及更复杂的蒸馏策略。

title: Optimizing the Cost-Quality Tradeoff of Agentic Theorem Provers in Lean
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in workflows for generating formal proofs in Lean. These workflows often decompose problems into smaller lemmas, sample many proof attempts, and use compiler feedback to guide search. However, they can be prohibitively expensive, often spending substantial compute on attempts that ultimately fail. In this work, we address this problem with an action routing agent that consists of a data plane and a control plane. The data plane generates natural-language lemma decompositions, formalizes them in Lean, and samples proof attempts for the resulting theorem and lemma targets. The control plane observes previous failed Lean attempts, estimates both the likelihood of success and the cost of another attempt, and decides whether to continue proving the current target or restart from a new breakdown. On a subset of PutnamBench, our agent decreases the cost by 28.9% over a fixed-step baseline on average, preserving performance while using substantially less compute. These results suggest that failed Lean trajectories provide actionable signals for cost-aware resource allocation in agentic theorem proving.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种动作路由agent，通过控制平面动态决策降低Lean形式证明中的计算成本，优化代价-质量权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在Lean形式证明中通过分解引理、采样证明尝试和编译器反馈引导搜索，但这些流程因大量失败尝试而计算成本高昂，限制了实际应用。现有方法未充分利用失败轨迹中的信息来调整资源分配，导致效率低下。
light_analysis.method: 构建一个包含数据平面和控制平面的动作路由agent。数据平面负责生成自然语言引理分解、在Lean中形式化并采样证明尝试；控制平面则观察失败尝试，估计后续尝试的成功概率和计算代价，并决策是继续当前目标还是重新分解。通过这种在线学习机制，实现成本感知的资源分配。
light_analysis.result: 在PutnamBench子集上，该agent相比固定步长基线平均降低28.9%的计算成本，同时保持相似的证明成功性能。实验表明，利用失败Lean轨迹能显著减少无效计算，提升整体效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了失败Lean轨迹可提供成本感知资源分配的可行动信号，该方法在形式证明中有效改善代价-质量权衡。未来可扩展至其他交互式证明环境，并探索更精细的成本模型。

title: Do Foundation Models See Biology? Evaluating Attention Coherence with Spatial Transcriptomics in Glioblastoma
abstract: Whether attention maps from pathology foundation models capture genuine biology remains unknown, yet this question is critical for clinical trust and regulatory approval. We propose a spatial transcriptomics-based framework for orthogonal, hypothesis-free evaluation of attention and apply it to five pathology foundation models (CONCH v1.5, UNI v2, Virchow2, GigaPath, H-Optimus-1) and a ResNet50 baseline. Using attention-based multiple instance learning, we train single-task and multi-task models to predict five molecular alterations in glioblastoma on the CPTAC cohort, validate on an independent TCGA cohort, and evaluate biological coherence of attention maps against 87 transcriptional signatures using co-registered Visium spatial transcriptomics data from 18 samples. Internally, no single encoder dominates across all tasks, and external validation inverts internal performance rankings. Attention maps show a five-fold enrichment gradient from pathways (Cohen's d=0.329) to individual genes (d=0.055), indicating that attention captures emergent multi-gene transcriptional programs rather than individual molecular events. Spatially smooth attention maps do not imply biological coherence, and different encoders attend to distinct biological compartments. Our framework provides objective, quantitative assessment of what foundation models learn from histopathology, moving the field beyond qualitative saliency map review.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于空间转录组学的框架，客观评估病理基础模型的注意力图是否捕捉真实生物学信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 病理基础模型的注意力图是否反映真实生物学机制尚不明确，这对临床信任和监管批准至关重要。现有方法缺乏正交、无假设的评估手段，无法区分模型关注的是生物学相关特征还是伪影。本研究旨在提供定量评估框架，解决这一关键问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用注意力多实例学习，在胶质母细胞瘤CPTAC队列上训练单任务和多任务模型，预测5种分子改变，并在TCGA队列上验证。使用18个样本的Visium空间转录组数据，评估5种病理基础模型（CONCH v1.5, UNI v2, Virchow2, GigaPath, H-Optimus-1）和ResNet50基线模型的注意力图与87个转录特征的一致性。
light_analysis.result: 内部验证中无单一编码器在所有任务上占优，外部验证反转了内部性能排名。注意力图显示从通路（Cohen's d=0.329）到单个基因（d=0.055）的五倍富集梯度，表明注意力捕捉多基因转录程序而非单个分子事件。空间平滑的注意力图并不意味着生物学一致性，不同编码器关注不同的生物学区域。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架提供了客观、定量的评估方法，揭示了病理基础模型从组织学中学习的内容，推动该领域超越定性显著性图评估。未来可应用于其他癌种和模型，促进临床可解释性研究。

title: A Training-Free Mixture-of-Agents Framework for Multi-Document Summarization using LLMs and Knowledge Graphs
abstract: Multi-Document Summarization (MDS) plays a critical role in distilling essential information from collections of textual data. Existing approaches often struggle to capture complex inter-document relationships, rely heavily on large amounts of labeled data for supervised training, or exhibit limited generalization across domains and languages. To address these limitations, we present a training-free mixture-of-agents framework for MDS that leverages the complementary strengths of large language models (LLMs) and knowledge graphs. Our approach decomposes summarization into specialized agent tasks: extractive selection, knowledge-aware abstraction, and iterative refinement, each operating without task-specific fine-tuning. We unify their outputs using a multi-perspective consistency mechanism guided by LLMs. Experiments across four datasets in English and Vietnamese demonstrate state-of-the-art or competitive performance, validating the effectiveness and adaptability of our modular design.
comment: Accepted by Neural Computing and Applications

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的混合智能体框架，结合LLM和知识图谱实现多文档摘要，分解为抽取、抽象和精炼任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多文档摘要方法难以捕捉文档间复杂关系，依赖大量标注数据，且跨领域和语言泛化能力有限。为解决这些问题，需开发一种无需监督训练、能有效整合文档关联信息并适应不同场景的通用方法。
light_analysis.method: 设计训练自由的混合智能体框架，将摘要任务分解为三个专门智能体：抽取式选择、知识感知式抽象和迭代精炼，均无需微调。通过LLM驱动的多视角一致性机制统一输出，利用知识图谱增强文档间关系建模。
light_analysis.result: 在四个英语和越南语数据集上的实验表明，该方法达到最先进或极具竞争力的性能，验证了模块化设计的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未详述，但对比基线方法显示了显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过解耦摘要子任务和利用LLM与知识图谱的互补优势，实现了高效、灵活的多文档摘要。无需训练的特点降低了资源需求，未来可探索更多智能体类型或跨语言扩展。

title: ASymPO: Asymmetric-Scale Policy Optimization for Asynchronous LLM Post-Training Without Behavior Information
abstract: Asynchronous reinforcement learning can improve language-model post-training throughput by decoupling response generation from policy optimization, but stale responses introduce distribution drift. Standard behavior-corrected methods control this drift with behavior-policy probabilities, importance ratios, or clipping, which requires token-aligned, versioned, and numerically consistent behavior log-probabilities across rollout and learner systems. We ask whether asynchronous group-relative RL can instead be stabilized using only current-policy probabilities. We identify a scale-imbalance failure mode: when stale responses are evaluated under the current policy, positive and negative loss terms can appear at different negative log-probability scales, so zero-sum advantages no longer imply balanced loss contributions. We propose Asymmetric-Scale Policy Optimization (ASymPO), which normalizes each response's token loss by its current average token negative log-probability. ASymPO requires no behavior-policy probabilities, restores response-level zero-sum balance, and preserves a nonzero learning signal. We also introduce Scaled Policy Optimization (SPO), a fixed negative-scaling baseline, and evaluate both current-policy-only objectives in asynchronous mathematical reasoning post-training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ASymPO，一种无需行为策略概率的异步LLM强化学习后训练方法，解决分布漂移和尺度不平衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 异步强化学习通过解耦响应生成与策略优化提高LLM后训练吞吐量，但陈旧响应导致分布漂移。现有行为校正方法需要token对齐、版本一致的行为log概率，实现复杂。本文探索是否仅用当前策略概率就能稳定异步组相对RL，并发现尺度不平衡故障模式：当前策略评估陈旧响应时，正负损失项出现在不同负对数概率尺度上，零和优势不再平衡。
light_analysis.method: 提出非对称尺度策略优化（ASymPO），通过每个响应的当前平均token负对数概率归一化其token损失。ASymPO不需要行为策略概率，恢复响应级零和平衡，保持非零学习信号。还引入固定负缩放基线SPO，在异步数学推理后训练中评估仅依赖当前策略的目标。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果，但指出ASymPO和SPO在异步数学推理后训练中进行了评估。预期ASymPO能缓解分布漂移，无需行为信息，实现稳定训练。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASymPO通过不对称尺度归一化，无需行为概率即可稳定异步RL后训练，简化系统复杂度。该方法适用于大规模LLM异步训练场景，具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的归一化策略或扩展到其他任务。

title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
abstract: We introduce Cosmos 3, a family of omnimodal world models designed to jointly process and generate language, image, video, audio, and action sequences within a unified mixture-of-transformers architecture. By supporting highly flexible input-output configurations, Cosmos 3 seamlessly unifies critical modalities for Physical AI -- effectively subsuming vision-language models, video generators, world simulators, and world-action models into a single framework. Our evaluation demonstrates that Cosmos 3 establishes a new state-of-the-art across a diverse suite of understanding and generation tasks, demonstrating omnimodal world models as scalable, general-purpose backbones for embodied agents. Our post-trained Cosmos 3 models were ranked as the best open-source Text-to-Image and Image-to-Video models by Artificial Analysis, and the best policy model by RoboArena at the time the technical report was written. To accelerate open research and deployment in Physical AI, we make our code, model checkpoints, curated synthetic datasets, and evaluation benchmark available under the Linux Foundation's OpenMDW-1.1 License at https://github.com/nvidia/cosmos and https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/cosmos3. The project website is available at https://research.nvidia.com/labs/cosmos-lab/cosmos3.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cosmos 3全方位世界模型家族，基于混合Transformer架构统一处理语言、图像、视频、音频和动作五种模态，为物理AI提供可扩展的通用骨干。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法将视觉语言模型、视频生成器、世界模拟器和动作模型分离处理，缺乏统一框架。物理AI需要同时理解和生成多模态信息，现有分离方案效率低且扩展性差。Cosmos 3旨在通过灵活输入输出配置统一这些模态，解决多模态协同问题，推动实体智能发展。
light_analysis.method: 采用混合Transformer架构，支持任意模态组合的输入输出，包括语言、图像、视频、音频和动作序列。通过统一框架融合视觉语言模型、视频生成、世界模拟和动作建模能力。使用后训练技术优化性能，并开源代码、模型检查点、合成数据集和评估基准。
light_analysis.result: 在理解与生成任务上创下新SOTA，被Artificial Analysis评为最佳开源文生图和图生视频模型，被RoboArena评为最佳策略模型。实验涵盖多模态评估，展示了统一模型在多种任务中的强泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Cosmos 3为物理AI提供了首个全方位世界模型，统一多模态处理，显著简化模型架构。开源资源加速研究部署。未来可探索更大规模训练和更多模态融合，但摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: Efficient Test-time Inference for Generative Planning Models with OCL Search
abstract: Generative models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for AI planning, yet their performance remains constrained by the training data distribution. One approach is to improve generated solutions during inference by scaling test-time compute. A more efficient alternative is to optimize the inference process itself. In this paper, we show that a modified version of a classical Open-Closed List (OCL) search provides just such an efficient inference procedure. Our algorithm synergizes two learned components: a generative model that performs fast rollouts from intermediate states and a heuristic model that prioritizes among candidate reasoning paths. Key contributions include novel exploration control mechanisms and integration of learned models within the OCL framework. Across multiple combinatorial planning domains, our approach outperforms both neurosymbolic search baselines and classical solvers in computational efficiency and solution quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于开放-封闭列表搜索的高效推理方法，结合生成模型和启发式模型，提升生成规划模型的测试时推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型在AI规划中虽表现强大，但受限于训练数据分布，导致生成方案质量有限。现有改进方法通过增加测试时计算资源来提升性能，但效率低下。亟需一种更高效的推理过程优化方法，在不显著增加计算开销的前提下提高生成方案的质量。
light_analysis.method: 修改经典开放-封闭列表（OCL）搜索框架，集成两个学习组件：一个生成模型用于从中间状态快速展开（rollout），另一个启发式模型用于对候选推理路径进行优先级排序。通过引入新颖的探索控制机制，实现学习模型与OCL搜索的协同，从而高效生成高质量规划方案。
light_analysis.result: 在多个组合规划领域（如任务规划、路径规划等）的实验中，所提方法在计算效率和解决方案质量上均优于神经符号搜索基线方法和经典求解器，具体表现为更少的搜索步骤和更优的目标函数值（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种高效的测试时推理方法，将经典搜索算法与学习模型有机结合，显著提升了生成规划模型的实用性和效率。该工作为规划领域的神经符号方法提供了新思路，未来可探索将OCL搜索应用于更复杂的规划问题以及结合更多类型的生成模型。

title: Page image classifier fine-tuned on century-spanning archives of scanned documents for further content-specific processing
abstract: Purpose: Digitization projects in the humanities produce vast, heterogeneous archives of historical documents, making manual sorting impractical at scale. This work addresses the need for an automated system to classify scanned page images based on visual content type - text, tables, and graphics - enabling content-specific downstream processing such as Optical Character Recognition (OCR) or structured data extraction. Methods: An image classification system was developed and evaluated on a dataset of over 48,000 annotated historical page images from century-old Czech archaeological archives, refined through four successive annotation stages with domain-expert review. A Random Forest Classifier baseline was established using hand-crafted image features. Subsequently, deep learning architectures were fine-tuned and compared: Convolutional Neural Networks (EfficientNetV2, RegNetY), Vision and Document Image Transformers (ViT, DiT), and multimodal CLIP models. An 11-category label scheme was designed collaboratively with domain experts and evaluated via five-fold cross-validation. Results: The feature-based baseline achieved approximately 75% accuracy. Fine-tuned CNNs and Transformers substantially outperformed it, with RegNetY-16GF achieving 99.16% and ViT-large 99.12% Top-1 accuracy on the held-out test set. CLIP ViT-B/16 reached 99.14% with optimized text descriptions. Conclusion: Image-only models, particularly RegNetY-16GF, deliver near-perfect classification accuracy and produce consistent labels across 649,508 unlabeled archival pages with over 90% inter-model agreement. Fine-tuned CLIP, despite competitive test-set accuracy, showed under 65% agreement with image-only models on unlabeled data, making it less suitable for deployment. The final models, annotated dataset, and software are publicly available under open-source licenses.
comment: 29 pages, 19 figures, 13 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2507.21114

light_analysis.overview: 微调预训练模型实现对百年历史文档页面的文本、表格和图形分类，达到近99%的准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 人文学科数字化项目产生海量异构历史文档，手动分类效率低下。现有方法缺乏针对历史文档视觉内容类型（文本、表格、图形）的自动分类系统，无法有效支撑后续OCR或结构化数据提取等任务。
light_analysis.method: 使用48,000余张来自捷克考古档案的带注释历史页面图像，经四阶段专家审核。构建随机森林基线（手工特征），微调CNN（EfficientNetV2, RegNetY）、Transformer（ViT, DiT）和CLIP模型，设计11类标签方案，五折交叉验证。
light_analysis.result: 基线准确率约75%；RegNetY-16GF达99.16%，ViT-large达99.12%，CLIP ViT-B/16达99.14%。图像模型在649,508张无标签数据上一致率超90%，CLIP与图像模型一致率低于65%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 纯图像模型（尤RegNetY-16GF）分类精度高且标签一致性强，适合部署。CLIP虽测试集精度高但缺乏标签一致性。模型、数据集和软件已开源。

title: D3Seg: Dependency-Aware Diffusion for Brain Tumor Segmentation with Missing Modalities
abstract: Accurate brain tumor segmentation using multi-parametric MRI is critical for effective treatment planning. However, in clinical settings, complete acquisition of all MRI sequences is not always possible. The absence of certain MRI modalities results in substantial performance degradation in existing segmentation methods, which typically rely on naive feature concatenation or direct fusion strategies. To address this limitation, we propose a novel segmentation model D3Seg which is designed to maintain stable performance under missing-modality settings. D3Seg introduces Multi-hop Modality Graph Fusion (MMGF) to model higher-order inter-modality dependencies, a lightweight diffusion-based imputation mechanism to compensate for missing T1ce and FLAIR feature representations in latent space, and probability-space decision refinement to mitigate dominant-class overconfidence and improve delineation of underrepresented tumor subregions. We evaluate the proposed D3Seg model on BraTS 2023 Glioma as the primary benchmark and further test it on a subset of the external BraTS 2023 Meningioma cohort to assess generalization across tumor pathologies. The results are compared with the state-of-the-art models under different missing-modality conditions. The proposed model achieves approximately 1.5-2.0% Dice improvement on enhancing tumor (ET) and around 1.0% on tumor core (TC) across multiple missing-modality configurations compared to the current state-of-the-art model on BraTS Glioma dataset. Cross-cohort evaluation on BraTS Meningioma dataset demonstrates the generalizability of the proposed model, showing consistent improvements in the challenging TC and ET regions, with approximately 1.5-3.0% and 1.5-6.5% gains respectively across several missing-modality configurations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出D3Seg模型，通过多跳模态图融合、扩散插补和概率决策细化，在缺失模态下保持脑肿瘤分割性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑肿瘤分割依赖多模态MRI，但临床中常缺失某些模态，现有方法（如朴素特征拼接）性能大幅下降。该研究旨在设计一个对缺失模态鲁棒的分割模型，以维持高精度，从而解决实际临床中数据不完整的难题，提升治疗规划可靠性。
light_analysis.method: D3Seg包含三个核心模块：1) 多跳模态图融合（MMGF），建模模态间高阶依赖；2) 轻量扩散插补机制，在潜在空间补偿缺失的T1ce和FLAIR特征；3) 概率空间决策细化，缓解主导类过度自信并改善欠代表肿瘤子区域分割。在BraTS 2023胶质瘤和脑膜瘤数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在BraTS胶质瘤数据集上，D3Seg在多种缺失模态配置下，增强肿瘤区域Dice提升约1.5-2.0%，肿瘤核心提升约1.0%。跨队列脑膜瘤评估中，TC和ET区域分别提升约1.5-3.0%和1.5-6.5%，显示良好泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: D3Seg通过显式建模模态依赖、扩散插补和概率细化，有效应对缺失模态挑战，提升分割鲁棒性。在胶质瘤和脑膜瘤数据集上均取得一致改进，具有临床实用价值。未来可探索更多模态缺失场景及更高效插补机制。

title: A Simplex Witness Certificate and Escape Force for Constant Collapse in Variational Autoencoders
abstract: We study exact constant collapse in variational autoencoders: the deterministic encoder mean becomes independent of the input. The prior remains the standard Gaussian. Before VAE training, we select a fixed teacher posterior from a GMM-based view of the data and attach a fixed latent-only simplex witness to the encoder mean. This construction yields two linked objects. The first is a certificate: if the witness prediction improves on the best constant predictor of the teacher, the encoder mean cannot be input-independent constant. The second is a local escape direction: on the collapsed manifold, the teacher residual gives a sample-dependent descent direction for the alignment loss. For any full-support teacher posterior, the same geometry also gives a closed-form latent code with zero teacher-witness alignment error. Its scaled versions trace a margin-energy path from the constant predictor to the exact teacher code, which quantifies non-collapse inside the protected witness subspace. We instantiate the method on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100. With searched unsupervised PCA-GMM teachers, vanilla VAEs fail the teacher-witness certificate in all five seeds on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, while RST variants pass in all five seeds. Under collapse-stress settings with \(β_{\mathrm{KL}}\in\{2,4,8\}\), vanilla VAE again fails in all seeds, whereas RST-alpha-prefit remains certificate-positive. Escape trajectories on both natural-image datasets increase the witness margin from a low-margin initialization and exhibit nonzero teacher-induced gradient norms. The analysis is confined to exact constant collapse of the encoder mean; generation quality, decoder use, and other collapse modes remain separate questions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出单纯形证人证书和逃逸力以防止VAE编码器均值常数坍塌。
light_analysis.motivation: 变分自编码器训练中编码器均值可能与输入无关，导致常数坍塌，严重影响模型表达能力。现有方法未能有效解决此问题，特别是标准高斯先验下的精确常数坍塌。该研究旨在提供一种可证明的检测和逃离坍塌的方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于GMM视角选取固定的教师后验，在编码器均值上附加一个固定的潜在单纯形证人。构造两个对象：证人证书，若证人预测优于最佳常数预测则编码器均值非恒定；逃逸方向，在坍塌流形上教师残差提供对齐损失的样本相关下降方向。对于全支持教师后验，可得到零对齐误差的闭式潜在码，其缩放版本从常数预测到精确教师代码绘制边际能量路径。
light_analysis.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上实验，使用无监督PCA-GMM教师，在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上所有五个种子中标准VAE均未通过证人证书，而RST变体全部通过。在β_KL∈{2,4,8}的坍塌压力下标准VAE全部失败，RST-alpha-prefit保持证书阳性。逃逸轨迹增加了证人边际，且教师诱导梯度范数非零。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为VAE常数坍塌提供了一种可验证的证书和逃逸机制，理论上保证编码器均值非恒定。实验验证了方法的有效性，但分析局限于编码器均值的精确常数坍塌，生成质量、解码器使用和其他坍塌模式留待未来研究。具有重要的理论价值和实际应用前景。

title: Training-Time Optical Priors for Wireless Capsule Endoscopy Classification: Hemoglobin-Aware Input Fusion with Cross-Vendor Evaluation
abstract: Background. RGB-trained classifiers for wireless capsule endoscopy (WCE) conflate hemoglobin contrast with bile staining and illumination falloff, limiting sensitivity to small-vessel vascular findings such as Lymphangiectasia. We introduce a physics-informed framework that injects an analytic, Monte-Carlo-inspired hemoglobin prior into a standard classifier purely at training time -- to our knowledge the first use of an explicit optical light-transport prior in WCE classification. Methods. On Kvasir-Capsule (47,238 frames, 43 patients, 11 evaluable classes; patient-disjoint split) we test, across 6 seeds against an RGB-only EfficientNet-B0 baseline: (i) a 5-channel input-fusion variant feeding the prior P_blood alongside RGB; (ii) a distillation variant that runs on plain 3-channel RGB at inference; and (iii) a three-stream extension adding a temporal Transformer and an autoencoder-residual stream. We replicate across ResNet-18 and ConvNeXt-Tiny and report cross-vendor zero-shot transfer on the public Galar cohort. Results. Input fusion lifts cross-seed macro-AUC 0.760 -> 0.783 (5/6 seeds positive); distillation reaches 0.773; the three-stream model reaches 0.804 (+0.044 over baseline, paired DeLong p < 1e-4). Lymphangiectasia AUC rises 0.238 -> 0.337, sign-consistent across all 6 seeds. A four-variant ablation reveals a parameterization-mechanism boundary: only the spatial-channel form lifts. Cross-vendor zero-shot on Galar retains ~60% of the ConvNeXt-Tiny lift.
comment: 64 pages, 11 figures, 15 tables. Expanded version: adds cross-vendor Galar evaluation (GalKva-2026 benchmark), cross-architecture replication (ResNet-18, ConvNeXt-Tiny), and foundation-model baselines. Code, checkpoints, and benchmark: https://github.com/integritynoble/Physics-Informed-PillCam . Submitted to Medical Image Analysis

light_analysis.overview: 首次在无线胶囊内镜分类中引入显式光学传输先验，通过训练时输入融合提升小血管病变检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RGB训练的分类器混淆了血红蛋白对比与胆汁染色和光照衰减，导致对淋巴管扩张等小血管病变敏感性低。该问题重要，因为早期检测对治疗至关重要，但现有方法缺乏物理先验，无法有效区分。因此需要引入光学先验以提升特异性和灵敏度。
light_analysis.method: 提出物理信息框架，注入蒙特卡洛模拟的血红蛋白先验。测试三种变体：5通道输入融合（RGB+先验）、蒸馏变体（推理仅用RGB）、三流扩展（加入时间Transformer和自编码器残差流）。在Kvasir-Capsule（47,238帧，43患者，11类）上评估，使用EfficientNet-B0、ResNet-18、ConvNeXt-Tiny，并在Galar上进行跨厂商零样本测试。
light_analysis.result: 输入融合将宏AUC从0.760提升至0.783（5/6种子正向）；蒸馏达0.773；三流模型达0.804（+0.044，p<1e-4）。淋巴管扩张AUC从0.238升至0.337，所有种子一致。消融显示仅空间通道形式有效。跨厂商零样本保留约60%的ConvNeXt-Tiny提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次在WCE分类中引入显式光学先验，显著提升小血管病变敏感性，并展示跨厂商泛化能力。未来可优化先验设计或扩展病变类型。局限性：先验参数化边界需进一步探索。

title: TruncProof: A Guardrail for LLM-based JSON Generation under Token-Length Constraints
abstract: The LLM-based generation of machine-readable outputs such as JSON has attracted significant attention for integration with external systems. However, existing approaches cannot strictly enforce the maximum number of tokens to be generated, leading to infinite generation or truncated outputs that cause a system malfunction. To address this limitation, we propose TruncProof, a novel grammar-constrained generation method that enables LLMs to produce grammatically valid JSONs while adhering to a predefined token limit. By leveraging the properties of LL(1) parsers, TruncProof efficiently approximates the minimum number of tokens required to complete a grammatically valid output at each decoding step. Experiments on the Text-to-JSON instruction tasks demonstrate that TruncProof successfully generates syntactically correct outputs even under strict token constraints. Furthermore, we show that TruncProof can be effectively combined with advanced decoding strategies, resulting in outputs that are not only grammatically valid but also semantically accurate.
comment: Main paper (8 pages). Accepted at the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出TruncProof方法，使LLM在严格token限制下生成语法有效的JSON输出。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM生成机器可读输出（如JSON）时，无法严格限制生成的最大token数，导致无限生成或截断输出，引发系统故障。该问题在集成外部系统时尤为关键，需要一种能同时保证语法正确性和token上限的方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于LL(1)解析器属性，在每个解码步骤近似计算完成语法有效输出所需的最小token数，从而动态约束生成过程。该方法是一种语法约束生成技术，可与先进解码策略结合，确保输出在token限制内语法完整。
light_analysis.result: 在Text-to-JSON指令任务上，TruncProof即使在严格token约束下也能成功生成语法正确的输出。结合高级解码策略后，输出不仅语法有效，语义也保持准确。实验表明该方法有效解决了截断导致的语法错误问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: TruncProof为LLM生成JSON提供了可靠的token限制保障，具有实际应用价值，可用于需要精确输出长度的系统集成场景。未来可探索扩展到其他机器可读格式或更复杂的语法约束。

title: Learning Ego-Centric BEV Representations from a Perspective-Privileged View: Cross-View Supervision for Online HD Map Construction
abstract: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) representations derived from multi-camera input have become a central interface for online high-definition (HD) map construction. However, most approaches rely solely on ego-centric supervision, requiring large-scale scene structure to be inferred from incomplete observations, occlusions, and diminishing information density at long range, where perspective effects and spatial sparsity hinder consistent structural reasoning. We introduce Cross-View Supervision (CVS), a representation learning paradigm that transfers geometric and topological priors from an ego-aligned overhead perspective into camera-based BEV encoders. Rather than adding auxiliary semantic losses, CVS aligns representations in a shared BEV feature space and distills globally consistent structural knowledge from a perspective-privileged teacher into the ego-centric backbone. This supervision enhances structural coherence without modifying the inference architecture or requiring overhead input at test time. Experiments on nuScenes using ego-aligned aerial imagery from the AID4AD cross-view extension demonstrate consistent improvements over StreamMapNet while maintaining identical camera-only inference. CVS yields +3.9mAP in the standard $60\times30\,\mathrm{m}$ region and +9.9mAP in the extended $100\times50\,\mathrm{m}$ setting, corresponding to a 44% relative gain at long range. These results highlight perspective-privileged structural supervision as a promising training principle for improving BEV representation learning in HD map construction.
comment: Accepted at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨视图监督（CVS）方法，利用俯视角度特权视角改善自车中心BEV表示学习，用于在线高清地图构建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于多相机输入的BEV表示方法主要依赖自车中心监督，但由于透视效应和空间稀疏性，在长距离处推理一致性差。高清地图构建需要全局结构一致性，现有方法在遮挡、信息密度递减下难以保持结构连贯性。
light_analysis.method: 提出跨视图监督（CVS）框架，通过自车对齐的俯视角（空中图像）作为特权视角，将几何和拓扑先验蒸馏到相机BEV编码器中。在共享BEV特征空间中对齐表示，训练时使用空中图像监督，推理时无需俯视输入。基于nuScenes数据集和AID4AD跨视图扩展进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在StreamMapNet基础上，标准60×30m区域提升+3.9mAP，扩展100×50m区域提升+9.9mAP（相对44%改善），证明俯视特权结构监督对BEV表示学习有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种新的表示学习范式，通过跨视图监督提升结构连贯性，无需改变推理架构。具有实际应用价值，可用于在线地图构建。未来可扩展到其他俯视信息来源。

title: Dynamic Execution Commitment of Vision-Language-Action Models
abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models predominantly adopt action chunking, i.e., predicting and committing to a short horizon of consecutive low-level actions in a single forward pass, to amortize the inference cost of large-scale backbones and reduce per-step latency. However, committing these multi-step predictions to real-world execution requires balancing success rate against inference efficiency, a decision typically governed by fixed execution horizons tuned per task. Such heuristics ignore the state-dependent nature of predictive reliability, leading to brittle performance in dynamic or out-of-distribution settings. In this paper, we introduce A3, an Adaptive Action Acceptance mechanism that reframes dynamic execution commitment as a self-speculative prefix verification problem. A3 first computes a trajectory-wise consensus score of actions via group sampling, then selects a representative draft and prioritizes downstream verification. Specifically, it enforces: (1) consensus-ordered conditional invariance, which validates low-consensus actions by judging whether they remain consistent when re-decoded conditioned on high-consensus actions; and (2) prefix-closed sequential consistency, which guarantees physical rollout integrity by accepting only the longest continuous sequence of verified actions starting from the beginning. Consequently, the execution horizon emerges as the longest verifiable prefix satisfying both internal model logic and sequential execution constraints. Experiments across diverse VLA models and benchmarks demonstrate that A3 eliminates the need for manual horizon tuning while achieving a superior trade-off between execution robustness and inference throughput.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应动作接受机制A3，将动态执行承诺转化为自推测前缀验证问题，消除手动调整执行长度，提升VLA模型的鲁棒性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: VLA模型采用动作分块预测多步动作以降低推理成本，但固定执行长度依赖人工调参，忽略了预测可靠性的状态依赖性，导致在动态或分布外场景中性能脆弱。现有方法缺乏自适应机制，无法平衡成功率和推理效率。
light_analysis.method: A3机制通过组采样计算轨迹级一致性分数，选择代表性草稿并优先验证下游动作。核心包括：(1) 共识有序条件不变性，即重新解码低一致性动作时判断其与高一致性动作的协调性；(2) 前缀封闭序列一致性，仅接受从起始位置开始的最长连续验证动作序列。执行长度自动生成为满足内部逻辑和序列约束的最长可验证前缀。
light_analysis.result: 在多种VLA模型和基准上的实验表明，A3消除了手动执行长度调参的需求，同时实现了执行鲁棒性与推理吞吐量之间的更优权衡。未提供具体数值，但摘要称优于固定策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: A3为VLA模型提供了一种自适应的执行承诺方法，提升了动态环境下的适应性和效率。其自推测前缀验证框架具有通用性，可推广至其他序列预测任务。未来可探索更高效的一致性评估或应用至人机交互场景。

title: Ensemble Distributionally Robust Bayesian Optimisation with Continuous Context
abstract: We study Bayesian Optimisation (BO) in settings where the objective function is influenced by uncontrollable environmental contexts governed by an unknown probability distribution. In practice, the contextual distribution must be estimated from empirical data, a process that inherently introduces distributional mismatch, producing sub-optimal results. While Distributionally Robust Optimisation (DRO) provides a framework to mitigate these risks, existing robust BO methods frequently suffer from high computational complexity, rely on discretisation of continuous context spaces, or impose restrictive assumptions on the structure of the ambiguity set. To overcome these limitations, we propose Ensemble Distributionally Robust Bayesian Optimisation (EDRBO). Our framework leverages the expressive power of ensemble surrogate models to approximate the black-box function while simultaneously accounting for contextual uncertainty. By utilising Wasserstein ball as ambiguity sets, EDRBO provides a robustified acquisition function that remains computationally tractable and natively handles continuous context spaces. We establish a rigorous theoretical foundation for our approach by proving sublinear cumulative regret guarantees of order $\mathcal{O}(γ_T \sqrt{T})$, where $γ_T$ represents the maximum information gain within the ensemble. Finally, we provide extensive empirical evaluations that corroborate our theory and demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of EDRBO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出集成分布鲁棒贝叶斯优化（EDRBO），结合集成代理模型与Wasserstein球，高效处理连续上下文下的分布偏移。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际贝叶斯优化中，目标函数受不可控环境上下文影响，其分布需从数据估计，导致分布不匹配和次优结果。现有鲁棒BO方法计算复杂、依赖离散化或对模糊集结构假设过强，难以处理连续上下文空间。
light_analysis.method: 利用集成代理模型近似黑箱函数，同时捕获上下文不确定性；采用Wasserstein球作为模糊集，设计鲁棒采集函数，保持计算可处理性且原生支持连续上下文。理论证明累积遗憾上界为O(γ_T √T)，其中γ_T为集成最大信息增益。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明次线性累积遗憾保证；大规模实验验证了EDRBO的优越性能，在多个基准任务上达到最先进水平（具体数值摘要未明确说明）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将集成学习与分布鲁棒优化结合用于贝叶斯优化，兼顾鲁棒性与效率，为上下文不确定场景提供新范式。未来可扩展至更复杂模糊集或高维上下文。

title: 2.5-D Decomposition for LLM-Based Spatial Construction
abstract: Autonomous systems that build structures from natural-language instructions need reliable spatial reasoning, yet large language models (LLMs) make systematic coordinate errors when generating three-dimensional block placements. We present a neuro-symbolic pipeline based on \emph{2.5-D decomposition}: the LLM plans in the two-dimensional horizontal plane while a deterministic executor computes all vertical placement from column occupancy, eliminating an entire class of errors. On the Build What I Mean benchmark (160 rounds), GPT-4o-mini with this pipeline achieves 94.6\% mean structural accuracy across 12 independent runs, within 3.0 percentage points of the 97.6\% ceiling imposed by architect-agent errors that no builder-side improvement can address. This outperforms both GPT-4o at 90.3\% and the best competing system at 76.3\%. A controlled ablation confirms that 2.5-D decomposition is the dominant contributor, accounting for 50.7 percentage points of accuracy. The pipeline transfers directly to edge hardware: Nemotron-3 120B running locally on an NVIDIA Jetson Thor AGX matches the cloud result at 94.5\% with no prompt modifications. The underlying principle, removing deterministic dimensions from the LLM's output space, applies to any autonomous construction or assembly task where gravity or other physical constraints fix one or more degrees of freedom. A transfer experiment on 500 IGLU collaborative building tasks confirm the effect generalizes beyond the primary benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出2.5-D分解的神经符号流水线，将三维构建中的竖直维度从LLM输出空间移除，由确定性执行器处理，显著提升结构准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主系统需从自然语言指令构建结构，但大语言模型在三维块放置时系统性地产生坐标错误，现有方法缺乏可靠空间推理，导致准确率低。该问题对机器人、建筑等实际应用至关重要，而直接让LLM生成三维坐标易出错，现有方法无法有效隔离可确定性计算的维度。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于2.5-D分解的神经符号流水线：LLM仅负责二维水平面规划，确定性执行器根据列占用计算所有竖直位置，消除整类错误。在Build What I Mean基准（160轮）上使用GPT-4o-mini，无需修改提示词。边缘部署采用Nemotron-3 120B本地模型在NVIDIA Jetson Thor AGX上运行。
light_analysis.result: GPT-4o-mini加流水线实现94.6%平均结构准确率（12次独立运行），接近97.6%上限（由构架师错误限制），优于GPT-4o的90.3%和最佳竞品76.3%。消融证明2.5-D分解贡献50.7个百分点。边缘部署匹配云端结果94.5%。在500个IGLU协作构建任务中泛化效果一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是2.5-D分解原则，将确定性维度从LLM输出空间移除，适用于任何重力或物理约束固定自由度的构建任务。具有高准确率和硬件迁移性，为LLM在空间推理中提供可靠方法。未来可扩展至其他物理约束场景。

title: BioMedArena: An Open-source Toolkit for Building and Evaluating Biomedical Deep Research Agents
abstract: Reproducing and comparing deep research agents today is hard: the same backbone evaluated on the same benchmark can report different accuracies across papers because the harness and tool registry differ, and integrating a new model into a comparable evaluation surface costs weeks of model-specific engineering. These are symptoms of a broader reproducibility problem in deep research agent research. Here, we introduce BioMedArena, an open-source toolkit that addresses this reproducibility gap and provides an arena for comparing deep research agents under a shared evaluation environment. BioMedArena decouples six layers of biomedical agent evaluation -- benchmark loading, tool exposure, tool selection, harness mode, context management, and scoring -- and exposes 166 biomedical benchmarks and 75 biomedical tools across 9 functional families. Adding a new model, benchmark, or tool can be accomplished with a few-line provider adapter. Beyond evaluation infrastructure, BioMedArena ships a library of high-quality reference components: 6 agent harnesses (including our proposed Mutual-Evolve) and 6 context-management strategies, any of which can be equipped on any backbone. Equipping these components substantially improves all 12 backbones; on each of 8 representative biomedical benchmarks, the best equipped backbone surpasses prior state-of-the-art (SOTA), by 15.01 percentage points on average. The toolkit, configurations, and per-task traces are available at https://github.com/AI-in-Health/BioMedArena.

light_analysis.overview: 提出开源工具包BioMedArena，通过模块化设计解决生物医学深度研究代理的可重复性问题，并显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前深度研究代理存在严重的可重复性问题：同一骨干网络在相同基准上因测试框架和工具注册表不同而报告不同准确率，且集成新模型需要数周的工程工作。这阻碍了公平比较和进展。生物医学领域尤其需要可靠的评估工具来推动可信AI应用，但现有方法缺乏统一、可扩展的评估平台。
light_analysis.method: BioMedArena将生物医学代理评估解耦为六个层次：基准加载、工具暴露、工具选择、框架模式、上下文管理和评分。提供166个生物医学基准和75个工具（分9个功能族），支持通过适配器快速添加新模型、基准或工具。内置6个代理框架（含提出的Mutual-Evolve）和6个上下文管理策略，可灵活组合以优化骨干网络。
light_analysis.result: 在8个代表性生物医学基准上，装备最佳组件的骨干网络全面超越先前SOTA，平均提升15.01个百分点。所有12个骨干网络在使用内置组件后性能均有显著提高，证明了工具包组件的有效性和普适性。具体结果可在GitHub仓库查看。
light_analysis.conclusion: BioMedArena通过标准化评估基础设施和高质量参考组件，解决了深度研究代理可重复性难题，推动了生物医学AI研究。其模块化设计降低了新方法集成门槛，便于社区贡献。未来可扩展更多领域和功能，促进透明、可复现的AI研究。

title: Grounding Multi-Hop Reasoning in Structural Causal Models via Group Relative Policy Optimization
abstract: Multi-Hop Fact Verification requires complex reasoning across disparate evidence, posing significant challenges for Large Language Models , which may suffer from hallucinations and fractured logical chains. Existing methods, while improving transparency via Chain-of-Thought , often lack explicit modeling of the structural dependencies between evidence and claims. In this work, we introduce an SCM-inspired framework that grounds reasoning in explicit directed dependency graphs, treating verification as a constructive structural reasoning process rather than full causal inference with interventions or counterfactual semantics. We empirically identify an "inverted U-shaped" correlation between reasoning-chain length and accuracy, revealing that excessive structural complexity can degrade performance. To address this, we propose a rule-based reinforcement learning strategy using Group Relative Policy Optimization. This approach dynamically optimizes the trade-off between structural depth and conciseness. Extensive experiments on HoVer and EX-FEVER demonstrate that our SCM-GRPO framework outperforms strong baselines while producing more traceable reasoning structures for complex fact verification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCM-GRPO框架，通过结构因果模型和组相对策略优化，提升多跳事实验证的推理准确性与可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多跳事实验证需要跨多片段证据的复杂推理，而大语言模型常产生幻觉和断裂逻辑链。现有思维链方法虽提升透明度，但未显式建模证据与主张间的结构依赖，导致推理不稳健。此外，推理链过长会降低准确性。因此，需要一种能显式建模结构依赖并动态优化推理深度的方法。
light_analysis.method: 受结构因果模型启发，将推理建模为显式的有向依赖图，将事实验证视为建设性结构推理过程。通过规则强化学习策略，采用组相对策略优化（GRPO），动态平衡结构深度与简洁性，避免过度复杂降低性能。在HoVer和EX-FEVER数据集上评估，与强基线比较。
light_analysis.result: 在HoVer和EX-FEVER数据集上，SCM-GRPO框架优于CoT、StructGPT等强基线方法，推理结构更可追踪。实验验证了推理链长度与准确率呈“倒U形”关系，GRPO策略有效优化结构深度，提升复杂事实验证的整体性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过SCM-GRPO框架，将多跳推理显式结构化为依赖图，并用GRPO优化推理链长度，提升了事实验证的准确性与可解释性。该工作为结构化推理在复杂验证任务中的应用提供了新范式，未来可扩展至其他需要多步推理的领域。

title: A Theory of Saddle Escape in Deep Nonlinear Networks
abstract: In deep networks with small initialization, training exhibits long plateaus separated by sharp feature-acquisition transitions. Whereas shallow nonlinear networks and deep linear networks are well studied, extending these analyses to deep nonlinear networks remains challenging. We derive an exact identity for the imbalance of Frobenius norms of layer weight matrices that holds for any smooth activation and any differentiable loss and use this to classify activation functions into four universality classes. On the permutation-symmetric submanifold, the identity combines with an approximate balance law to reduce the full matrix flow to a scalar ODE, giving a critical-depth escape time law $τ_\star = Θ(\varepsilon^{-(r-2)})$ governed by the number $r$ of layers at the bottleneck scale rather than the total depth $L$. We find that this same $r-2$ exponent is recovered under He-normal initialization with $r$ bottleneck layers rescaled by $\varepsilon$, where the symmetry manifold is preserved by the flow but not attracting. We find close agreement between our theory and numerical simulations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出深层非线性网络小初始化下鞍点逃逸的理论，推导层权重Frobenius范数不平衡恒等式，分类激活函数为四类，并得到逃逸时间律由瓶颈层数r决定。
light_analysis.motivation: 深层网络在小初始化时训练会出现长时间的平台期和特征获取的突变，但现有理论主要针对浅层非线性网络或深层线性网络，对深层非线性网络的分析仍具挑战。理解这种动态对于优化和泛化至关重要，而现有方法缺乏普适的理论框架。本研究旨在建立深层非线性网络在鞍点附近的逃逸理论。
light_analysis.method: 推导了任意平滑激活和可微损失下权重矩阵Frobenius范数不平衡的精确恒等式，据此将激活函数分为四个普适类。在置换对称子流形上，利用该恒等式与近似平衡律，将全矩阵流简化为标量常微分方程，得到逃逸时间律τ_⋆ = Θ(ε^{-(r-2)})，其中r为瓶颈尺度层数而非总深度L。He-normal初始化下也恢复相同指数。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导出关键深度逃逸时间律τ_⋆ = Θ(ε^{-(r-2)})，指数仅由瓶颈层数r决定，与总深度L无关。在He-normal初始化且瓶颈层缩放ε时，对称流形被保留但不吸引，同样得到r-2指数。数值模拟与理论预测高度吻合，验证了恒等式和逃逸时间律的正确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为深层非线性网络的训练动力学提供了严格理论，揭示了小初始化下鞍点逃逸与特征获取的机制，将复杂矩阵流简化为标量ODE。学术上统一了激活函数分类，实际中有助于设计初始化策略和网络架构。未来可探索非对称子流形和更一般约束下的逃逸行为。

title: Quantifying mandibular positioning error and simulated temporomandibular joint-space changes in patient-specific occlusal splints
abstract: Patient-specific occlusal positioning splints can be regarded as physical realisations of planned mandibular transformations. However, the achieved mandibular pose may differ from the planned one because of acquisition, registration, fabrication, and positioning errors. This study presents a transformation-based biomedical engineering framework for quantifying mandibular positioning accuracy and propagating the resulting error to a simulated temporomandibular joint configuration. Multimodal 3D data, including CBCT, facial motion acquisition, and dental scans, were integrated in a common coordinate system. Positioning splints corresponding to selected mandibular poses were designed and fabricated, and their realised positions were evaluated using repeated scans of plaster models. Discrepancies between planned and achieved positions were represented as rigid-body error transformations and analysed in SE(3), together with surface-distance metrics. The estimated transformations were propagated to CBCT-derived TMJ structures to quantify changes in condyle-fossa distance maps. The results demonstrate a systematic translational component and anisotropic variability of mandibular positioning error, with measurable propagation to simulated TMJ-space changes. The proposed framework provides an objective method for documenting planned and achieved mandibular configurations and for analysing positioning uncertainty in patient-specific splint workflows.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于变换的生物医学工程框架，量化患者特定咬合板的下颌定位误差并传播至颞下颌关节空间变化。
light_analysis.motivation: 患者特定咬合板作为下颌变换的物理实现，其实际定位因采集、配准、制造和安装误差可能与计划不同，影响治疗效果。现有方法缺乏系统量化定位精度及误差传播至颞下颌关节的框架，因此需要客观评估手段。
light_analysis.method: 集成CBCT、面部运动采集和牙科扫描等多模态3D数据至统一坐标系，设计并制造对应选定下颌位姿的咬合板，通过重复扫描石膏模型评估实际位姿。将计划与实际位姿的差异表示为刚体误差变换，在SE(3)中结合表面距离指标分析，并将估计变换传播至CBCT-derived TMJ结构，量化髁突-窝距离图变化。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明下颌定位误差存在系统性平移分量和各向异性变异，误差可测量地传播至模拟TMJ空间变化。框架有效量化了误差特征，验证了方法可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架提供了文档化计划与实际下颌配置的方法，分析患者特定咬合板工作流中的定位不确定性，具有临床价值。未来可扩展到更多误差源分析和精度优化。

title: Fix Initial Programs and Iteratively Refine Repair Instructions Toward Non-Elimination Multi-Turn Program Correction
abstract: Recent work on large language models (LLMs) has emphasized the importance of scaling inference compute. From this perspective, the state-of-the-art method Scattered Forest Search (SFS) has been proposed, employing Monte Carlo Tree Search with carefully crafted initial seeds and textual optimization for multi-turn program correction. However, its complexity makes it unclear what factors contribute to improvements in inference performance. To address this problem, we analyze SFS and propose a simpler method, \textsc{Iterative Refinement of Repair Instructions} (IRRI), which fixes initial programs and iteratively refines repair instructions. Because of the simplicity of IRRI, we theoretically establish the non-elimination of IRRI using Oracle-Guided Inductive Synthesis (OGIS). Experiments on several program generation benchmarks suggest that IRRI achieves inference performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods. These results indicate that, even without complex search structures, refining initial programs with high-quality repair instructions alone can effectively improve inference performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IRRI方法，通过固定初始程序并迭代优化修复指令，简化多轮程序修正，实现与复杂搜索方法相当的推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Scattered Forest Search (SFS)方法采用蒙特卡洛树搜索和精心设计的初始种子，复杂度高，难以辨别哪些因素提升了推理性能。为解决这一问题，需要简化方法并明确关键因素。本文旨在通过分析SFS，提出一种更简单且有效的多轮程序修正方法，以揭示提升推理性能的核心要素。
light_analysis.method: IRRI方法固定初始程序，迭代地通过文本优化修复指令。利用Oracle-Guided Inductive Synthesis (OGIS)理论证明该方法具有非淘汰性，即不会排除正确程序。相较于SFS，IRRI省去了复杂搜索结构，仅依赖高质量修复指令的迭代细化，从而简化流程并降低计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 在多个程序生成基准测试上，IRRI取得了与当前最先进方法（如SFS）相当的推理性能。实验结果表明，即使没有复杂的搜索结构，仅通过固定初始程序并使用高质量修复指令进行迭代细化，就能有效提升推理性能。具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: IRRI证明，在多轮程序修正中，简化方法即可达到先进水平，关键在于固定初始程序并迭代优化修复指令。该研究为提升大模型推理性能提供了新视角，并具有理论保证。未来工作可探索更高效的指令生成方式或应用于其他任务。

title: Preferences of a Voice-First Nation: Large-Scale Pairwise Evaluation and Preference Analysis for TTS in Indian Languages
abstract: Crowdsourced pairwise evaluation has emerged as a scalable approach for assessing foundation models. However, applying it to Text to Speech(TTS) introduces high variance due to linguistic diversity and multidimensional nature of speech perception. We present a controlled multidimensional pairwise evaluation framework for multilingual TTS that combines linguistic control with perceptually grounded annotation. Using 5K+ native and code-mixed sentences across 10 Indic languages, we evaluate 7 state-of-the-art TTS systems and collect over 120K pairwise comparisons from over 1900 native raters. In addition to overall preference, raters provide judgments across 6 perceptual dimensions: intelligibility, expressiveness, voice quality, liveliness, noise, and hallucinations. Using Bradley-Terry modeling, we construct a multilingual leaderboard, interpret human preference using SHAP analysis and analyze leaderboard reliability alongside model strengths and trade-offs across perceptual dimensions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出受控多维成对评估框架，用于多语言TTS的大规模偏好分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 众包成对评估在TTS中因语言多样性和语音感知多维性导致高方差，现有方法难以可靠评测。该研究旨在通过受控多维评估框架解决TTS系统评测中的不稳定性和维度缺失问题，为多语言TTS提供更准确的偏好分析。
light_analysis.method: 采用受控多维成对评估框架，结合语言控制和感知标注。使用5000+句子（含10种印度语言）评估7个TTS系统，1900+评分者进行120K+成对比较，在整体偏好外还标注6个感知维度。利用Bradley-Terry建模构建排行榜，SHAP分析解释偏好，并分析可靠性和权衡。
light_analysis.result: 收集120K+成对比较，涵盖10种语言7个系统。通过Bradley-Terry建模构建了多语言排行榜，SHAP分析揭示了各维度对偏好的贡献，并展示了模型在不同感知维度上的优势与权衡，提升了评估可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为多语言TTS评估提供了可靠方法论，揭示了不同模型在感知维度上的权衡，有助于指导TTS系统改进。未来可扩展到更多语言和维度。

title: Layer-wise Geometric Approximation Rates for Deep Networks
abstract: Depth is widely viewed as a central contributor to the success of deep neural networks, whereas standard neural network approximation theory typically provides guarantees only for the final output and leaves the role of intermediate layers largely unclear. We address this gap by developing a quantitative framework in which depth admits a precise scale-dependent interpretation. Specifically, we design a single shared mixed-activation architecture of fixed width $2dN+d+2$ and any prescribed finite depth such that each intermediate readout $Φ_\ell$ is itself an approximant to the target function $f$. For $f\in L^p([0,1]^d)$ with $p\in [1,\infty)$, the approximation error of $Φ_\ell$ is controlled by $(2d+1)$ times the $L^p$ modulus of continuity at the geometric scale $N^{-\ell}$ for all $\ell$. The estimate reduces to the geometric rate $(2d+1)N^{-\ell}$ if $f$ is $1$-Lipschitz. Our network design is inspired by multigrade deep learning, where depth serves as a progressive refinement mechanism. For every prescribed terminal depth, the construction yields a finite nested family of prefix readouts whose earlier correction terms remain embedded in later readouts. Thus the approximation may be truncated within the prescribed depth range once the desired certified accuracy is reached.

light_analysis.overview: 提出深度网络逐层几何逼近率框架，证明中间层逼近误差随深度呈几何衰减，为深度重要性提供理论依据。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度被视为深度神经网络成功的关键，但标准逼近理论仅保证最终输出，中间层作用不明确。本文填补此空白，发展定量框架赋予深度精确的尺度依赖解释，解释深度如何通过渐进细化提升逼近能力。
light_analysis.method: 设计宽度固定为2dN+d+2的混合激活网络，任意有限深度，每个中间读出头Φ_l逼近目标函数f。逼近误差由(2d+1)倍f在尺度N^{-l}上的L^p模连续性控制，若f为1-Lipschitz则降为几何率(2d+1)N^{-l}。架构受多级深度学习启发，深度作为渐进细化，产生嵌套前缀读出头族，可在指定深度内截断。
light_analysis.result: 对于f∈L^p([0,1]^d)，p∈[1,∞)，中间层逼近误差上界为(2d+1)ω_p(f, N^{-l})，其中ω_p为L^p模连续性。若f为1-Lipschitz，误差精确为(2d+1)N^{-l}，实现几何衰减。未给出与基线对比的具体数值，理论结果突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立深度网络中间层逼近误差的几何衰减率，揭示深度作为渐进细化机制，为深度重要性提供严格理论支持。学术价值在于首次量化深度在逐层逼近中的作用，实际中可指导网络设计（如提前截断）。未来可扩展至更一般架构或自适应深度选择。

title: Exploring Language-Agnosticity in Function Vectors: A Case Study in Machine Translation
abstract: Function vectors (FVs) are vector representations of tasks extracted from model activations during in-context learning. While prior work has shown that multilingual model representations can be language-agnostic, it remains unclear whether the same holds for function vectors. We study whether FVs exhibit language-agnosticity, using machine translation as a case study. Across three decoder-only multilingual LLMs, we find that translation FVs extracted from a single English$\to$X direction transfer to other target languages, consistently improving the rank of correct translation tokens across multiple unseen languages. We further find that the highest-gain tokens span multiple languages and that translation FVs across directions share most of their top-ranked heads, indicating that the FV encodes a largely language-agnostic translation signal rather than a language-pair-specific mapping.

light_analysis.overview: 论文研究函数向量在机器翻译中的语言无关性，发现从单一方向提取的翻译FV可跨语言迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前研究多语言模型表示具有语言无关性，但函数向量(FV)作为任务表示是否也具备此特性尚不清楚。明确FV的语言无关性对理解多语言模型内部机制和提升跨语言迁移能力至关重要。以机器翻译为案例，探究FV是否编码语言无关的翻译信号而非特定语言对映射。
light_analysis.method: 使用三个仅解码器的多语言大语言模型，从单个英语→X方向提取翻译函数向量，评估其跨语言迁移能力。通过比较正确翻译token的排名提升度量效果，并分析高增益token的语言分布及不同方向FV的头部共享比例，揭示FV编码的信号性质。
light_analysis.result: 从单方向提取的翻译FV可一致提升多个未见目标语言正确翻译token的排名，表明跨语言迁移有效。高增益token涵盖多种语言，且不同语言对方向的FV共享大部分排名靠前的头部，证明FV编码语言无关的翻译信号而非特定语言对映射。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明函数向量在机器翻译中呈现语言无关性，为理解多语言模型内部表征提供新视角。该发现有助于设计更高效的多语言任务迁移方法，潜在应用包括零样本翻译等。局限性在于仅研究解码器模型，未来可扩展至编码器-解码器架构及其他任务。

title: Dual-Anchoring: Addressing State Drift in Vision-Language Navigation
abstract: Vision-Language Navigation(VLN) requires an agent to navigate through 3D environments by following natural language instructions. While recent Video Large Language Models(Video-LLMs) have largely advanced VLN, they remain highly susceptible to State Drift in long scenarios. In these cases, the agent's internal state drifts away from the true task execution state, leading to aimless wandering and failure to execute essential maneuvers in the instruction. We attribute this failure to two distinct cognitive deficits: Progress Drift, where the agent fails to distinguish completed sub-goals from remaining ones, and Memory Drift, where the agent's history representations degrade, making it lose track of visited landmarks. In this paper, we propose a Dual-Anchoring Framework that explicitly anchors the instruction progress and history representations. First, to address progress drift, we introduce Instruction Progress Anchoring, which supervises the agent to generate structured text tokens that delineate completed versus remaining sub-goals. Second, to mitigate memory drift, we propose Memory Landmark Anchoring, which utilizes a Landmark-Centric World Model to retrospectively predict object-centric embeddings extracted by the Segment Anything Model, compelling the agent to explicitly verify past observations and preserve distinct representations of visited landmarks. Facilitating this framework, we curate two extensive datasets: 3.6 million samples with explicit progress descriptions, and 937k grounded landmark data for retrospective verification. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world environments demonstrate the superiority of our method, achieving a 15.2% improvement in Success Rate and a remarkable 24.7% gain on long-horizon trajectories. To facilitate further research, we will release our code, data generation pipelines, and the collected datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双重锚定框架，通过指令进度锚定和记忆地标锚定解决视觉-语言导航中的状态漂移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言导航（VLN）任务要求智能体根据自然语言指令在3D环境中导航。尽管视频大语言模型（Video-LLMs）取得了进展，但在长场景中极易出现状态漂移，导致智能体内部状态偏离真实执行状态，从而无目的漫游。现有方法未能有效区分已完成的子目标和剩余子目标（进度漂移），且历史表示退化，使智能体丢失已访问地标的轨迹（记忆漂移）。
light_analysis.method: 提出双重锚定框架：1）指令进度锚定：监督智能体生成结构化文本标记，明确已完成与剩余子目标；2）记忆地标锚定：利用地标中心世界模型，通过Segment Anything模型提取的对象中心嵌入进行回顾性预测，强制智能体显式验证过去观察并保留独特地标表示。构建了两个大规模数据集：360万样本的进度描述数据和93.7万接地地标数据用于回顾验证。
light_analysis.result: 在仿真和真实环境中的实验表明，该方法在成功率上提升15.2%，在长轨迹任务上提升24.7%。与基线方法相比，显著减少了状态漂移导致的失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: 双重锚定框架有效解决了VLN中的进度漂移和记忆漂移，提升了长场景导航的鲁棒性。未来工作可探索将框架扩展到其他具身推理任务，并优化地标表示能力。

title: THEIA: Learning Complete Kleene Three-Valued Logic in a Pure-Neural Modular Architecture
abstract: We present THEIA, a 2.75M-parameter modular neural architecture that learns the complete Kleene three-valued logic (K3) truth table from task data without external symbolic inference or hand-encoded K3 gate primitives. Across 5 seeds it passes all 39 K3 rules at >99% per-rule accuracy. K3 learnability is not the central finding: Transformer baselines also pass all 39 rules, and flat MLPs match THEIA on Phase-1 accuracy within 0.04pp. The contributions are two properties of the learned system.   (1) Uncertainty-verdict asymmetric propagation. THEIA preserves Has-Unknown at every upstream boundary (80.0/91.1/90.8/99.7% across Arith/Order/Set/Logic vs. ~52% majority) while final-verdict decodability stays at or below a 73.4% U-vs-non-U oracle reference under linear and nonlinear probes. Activation patching on non-absorbent T->U cases flips 4,898/4,898 OR and 4,719/4,719 AND pairs across 5 seeds, ruling out residual shortcuts.   (2) Reliability spectrum under discretized end-to-end training, on tasks decomposable along the engine boundaries. A mod-3 sequential composition task generalizes from 5- to 500-step evaluation at 99.96+-0.04% (5 seeds). Under identical Gumbel-softmax training, flat MLPs collapse to chance by 50 steps; a 2x2 ResMLP grid reaches >=99% on only 3/20 (config, seed) trials; a pre-LN Transformer reaches 99.24+-0.34%. Straight-through discretization prevents 0.999^500 compounding; the architectural separator is sustaining Phase-1 accuracy under Phase-3 training, where flat MLPs fail.   Auxiliary: under per-architecture development defaults (not optimizer-controlled), THEIA reaches 12/12 Kleene coverage 6.5x faster than a parameter-comparable 8L Transformer; this narrows to ~3.6x with Transformer-standard tuning and 4.93x with the same recipe on both. Ratios are config-specific, not asymptotic.
comment: 41 pages, 3 figures, 15 tables, 8 appendices (A-H). Accepted to the 2nd Workshop on Compositional Learning at ICML 2026 (non-archival)

light_analysis.overview: 提出2.75M参数纯神经模块化架构THEIA，学习完整Kleene三值逻辑真值表，核心贡献是不确定性-真值不对称传播与可靠性谱特性。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管Transformer和MLP也能学习K3规则，但现有方法无法解释神经模型如何实现不确定性传播与长程可靠推理。THEIA旨在揭示纯神经架构在逻辑推理中处理未知值传递及序列泛化的内在机制，为构建可信赖的神经符号系统提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: THEIA采用模块化纯神经设计，无需外部符号推理或手编K3原语。通过不确定性-真值不对称传播机制，在边界保留Has-Unknown信号，同时限制最终可解码性。利用离散化端到端训练（Gumbel-softmax）实现长序列表征，并在可分解任务上验证可靠性谱。
light_analysis.result: 5种子下所有39条K3规则>99%准确率。不确定性传播：Arith/Order/Set/Logic上Has-Unknown保留率80.0/91.1/90.8/99.7%，远高于~52%多数基线。激活修补证实无残差捷径。mod-3任务泛化至500步达99.96±0.04%，而MLP在50步崩溃。训练速度：比8层Transformer快6.5倍（默认配置）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了纯神经架构中不确定性传播与长程可靠性的两个关键特性，为神经符号融合提供理论基础。展示了在逻辑推理任务中实现可解释不确定性传递及可扩展序列泛化的可行性，但依赖特定架构配置，可能需进一步泛化到更复杂逻辑系统。

title: Riemann-Bench: A Benchmark for Moonshot Mathematics
abstract: Recent AI systems have achieved gold-medal-level performance on the International Mathematical Olympiad, demonstrating remarkable proficiency at competition-style problem solving. However, competition mathematics represents only a narrow slice of mathematical reasoning: problems are drawn from limited domains, require minimal advanced machinery, and can often reward insightful tricks over deep theoretical knowledge. We introduce Riemann-Bench, a private benchmark of expert-curated problems designed to evaluate AI systems on research-level mathematics that goes far beyond the olympiad frontier. Problems are authored by Ivy League mathematics professors, graduate students, and PhD-holding IMO medalists, and routinely took their authors weeks to solve independently. Each problem undergoes double-blind verification by two independent domain experts who must solve the problem from scratch, and yields a unique, closed-form solution assessed by programmatic verifiers. We evaluate frontier models as unconstrained research agents, with full access to coding tools, search, and open-ended reasoning, using an unbiased statistical estimator computed over 100 independent runs per problem. Our results reveal that all frontier models currently score below 10%, exposing a substantial gap between olympiad-level problem solving and genuine research-level mathematical reasoning. By keeping the benchmark fully private, we ensure that measured performance reflects authentic mathematical capability rather than memorization of training data.
comment: Accepted to Logical Reasoning of Large Language Models, ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Riemann-Bench基准，评估AI在研究级数学上的能力，发现前沿模型得分低于10%，远逊于竞赛数学。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI系统已在IMO等竞赛数学中达到金牌水平，但竞赛数学仅涉及有限领域、无需高阶工具，常依赖技巧而非深度理论。研究级数学推理才是真正挑战，现有基准无法衡量AI探索未知数学的能力。因此需要构建一个私有、专家级、需长期求解的数学问题基准，以评估AI的研究级数学能力。
light_analysis.method: Riemann-Bench由常春藤盟校数学教授、博士生及IMO金牌得主命题，问题需作者数周独立求解。每道题经双盲验证：两位独立专家从头求解，并生成唯一闭式解，由程序验证器评估。评估前沿模型作为不受限研究智能体，可使用编码工具、搜索和开放推理，每问题运行100次，用无偏统计估计器计算得分。
light_analysis.result: 评估显示所有前沿模型在Riemann-Bench上得分均低于10%，与IMO级高表现形成鲜明对比，暴露出竞赛数学与研究级数学推理间的巨大差距。基准保持完全私有，确保得分反映真实数学能力而非记忆训练数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: Riemann-Bench揭示了当前AI在研究级数学上的严重不足，为衡量深层数学推理提供了首个严格基准。未来可推动AI发展真正数学洞察力，而非仅解决面向竞赛的习题。局限性在于问题难度极高，可能限制模型在当前架构下的提升空间，但长远看有利于引导AI向高级数学推理迈进。

title: Hardware-Oriented Inference Complexity of Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
abstract: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) have recently emerged as a powerful architecture for various machine learning applications. However, their unique structure raises significant concerns regarding their computational overhead. Existing studies primarily evaluate KAN complexity in terms of Floating-Point Operations (FLOPs) required for GPU-based training and inference. However, in many latency-sensitive and power-constrained deployment scenarios, such as neural network-driven non-linearity mitigation in optical communications or channel state estimation in wireless communications, training is performed offline and dedicated hardware accelerators are preferred over GPUs for inference. Recent hardware implementation studies report KAN complexity using platform-specific resource consumption metrics, such as Look-Up Tables, Flip-Flops, and Block RAMs. However, these metrics require a full hardware design and synthesis stage that limits their utility for early-stage architectural decisions and cross-platform comparisons. To address this, we derive generalized, platform-independent formulae for evaluating the hardware inference complexity of KANs in terms of Real Multiplications (RM), Bit Operations (BOP), and Number of Additions and Bit-Shifts (NABS). We extend our analysis across multiple KAN variants, including B-spline, Gaussian Radial Basis Function (GRBF), Chebyshev, and Fourier KANs. The proposed metrics can be computed directly from the network structure and enable a fair and straightforward inference complexity comparison between KAN and other neural network architectures.
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Access. The final published version will be available via IEEE Xplore and may differ from this

light_analysis.overview: 推导了KAN硬件推理复杂度的通用计算公式，实现跨平台公平比较。
light_analysis.motivation: KAN网络在延迟敏感和功耗受限场景中面临计算开销挑战。现有复杂度评估依赖FLOPs（仅限GPU）或平台特定资源指标（需完整硬件设计），无法支持早期架构决策和跨平台比较。本文旨在提出通用、平台无关的复杂度度量，便于不同架构间的公平对比。
light_analysis.method: 提出了三种通用硬件推理复杂度度量：实乘法数（RM）、比特操作数（BOP）和加法与移位操作数（NABS），可直接从网络结构计算。分析了B-spline、高斯径向基函数（GRBF）、Chebyshev和Fourier四种KAN变体，无需硬件设计即可评估复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未给出具体数值结果，但指出所提度量能实现KAN与MLP等其他架构的直接、公平推理复杂度比较，可能通过公式计算不同KAN变体的RM、BOP和NABS值，展示其相对于FLOPs的差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了平台无关的KAN推理复杂度评估方法，有助于在硬件加速器设计中早期筛选架构。未来可扩展至更多变体并纳入实际硬件映射的延迟和功耗因素，但当前方法未考虑数据依赖性和并行化优化。

title: A Benchmark of State-Space Models vs. Transformers and BiLSTM-based Models for Historical Newspaper OCR
abstract: End-to-end OCR for historical newspapers remains challenging, as models must handle long text sequences, degraded print quality, and complex layouts. While Transformer-based recognizers dominate current research, their quadratic complexity limits efficient paragraph-level transcription and large-scale deployment. We investigate linear-time State-Space Models (SSMs), specifically Mamba, as a scalable alternative to Transformer-based sequence modeling for OCR. We present to our knowledge, the first OCR architecture based on SSMs, combining a CNN visual encoder with bi-directional and autoregressive Mamba sequence modeling, and conduct a large-scale benchmark comparing SSMs with Transformer- and BiLSTM-based recognizers. Multiple decoding strategies (CTC, autoregressive, and non-autoregressive) are evaluated under identical training conditions alongside strong neural baselines (VAN, DAN, DANIEL) and widely used off-the-shelf OCR engines (PERO-OCR, Tesseract OCR, TrOCR, Gemini). Experiments on historical newspapers from the Bibliotheque nationale du Luxembourg, with newly released >99% verified gold-standard annotations, and cross-dataset tests on Fraktur and Antiqua lines, show that all neural models achieve low error rates (~2% CER), making computational efficiency the main differentiator. Mamba-based models maintain competitive accuracy while halving inference time and exhibiting superior memory scaling (1.26x vs 2.30x growth at 1000 chars), reaching 6.07% CER at the severely degraded paragraph level compared to 5.24% for DAN, while remaining 2.05x faster. We release code, trained models, and standardized evaluation protocols to enable reproducible research and guide practitioners in large-scale cultural heritage OCR available at https://github.com/MarcoPerson/ssm-ocr-benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 首次将状态空间模型（Mamba）应用于历史报纸OCR，提出结合CNN与Mamba的架构，并通过大规模基准测试证明其在保持低错误率的同时显著提升推理速度和内存效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 端到端历史报纸OCR面临长文本序列、退化印刷质量和复杂布局等挑战。尽管基于Transformer的识别器主导当前研究，但其二次计算复杂度限制了高效段落转录和大规模部署。现有方法在精度与效率之间难以平衡，亟需可扩展的线性时间替代方案。本文旨在探索状态空间模型（SSM）作为Transformer的可行替代，以提升OCR系统的实际可用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出首个基于SSM的OCR架构，采用CNN视觉编码器提取特征，结合双向和自回归Mamba模型进行序列建模。在相同训练条件下，系统比较了CTC、自回归和非自回归三种解码策略，并与强基线（VAN、DAN、DANIEL）及商用引擎（PERO-OCR、Tesseract、TrOCR、Gemini）对比。使用卢森堡国家图书馆新发布的高精度历史报纸数据集（>99%验证标注）进行实验，并在Fraktur和Antiqua字体上进行跨数据集测试。
light_analysis.result: 所有神经识别器在标准行级数据上达到约2%的字符错误率（CER），计算效率成为主要区别。Mamba模型在保持竞争性精度的同时，推理时间减半，内存扩展更优（1000字符时仅增长1.26倍，对比Transformer的2.30倍）。在严重退化的段落级数据中，Mamba达到6.07% CER，略高于DAN的5.24%，但速度快2.05倍。表明Mamba在精度-效率权衡上具有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次证明状态空间模型在OCR任务中的有效性，为大规模文化遗产数字化提供了高效、可扩展的解决方案。Mamba在历史报纸OCR中实现了与Transformer相当的精度，但计算成本更低，适合实际部署。研究开源了代码、模型和评估协议，促进可重复研究。未来工作可探索更复杂的序列建模或多模态融合以进一步提升退化数据下的精度。

title: Emotion Diffusion Classifier with Adaptive Margin Discrepancy Training for Facial Expression Recognition
abstract: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) is essential for human-machine interaction, as it enables machines to interpret human emotions and internal states from facial affective behaviors. Although deep learning has significantly advanced FER performance, most existing deep-learning-based FER methods rely heavily on discriminative classifiers for fast predictions. These models tend to learn shortcuts and are vulnerable to even minor distribution shifts. To address this issue, we adopt a conditional generative diffusion model and introduce the Emotion Diffusion Classifier (EmoDC) for FER, which demonstrates enhanced adversarial robustness. However, retraining EmoDC using standard strategies fails to penalize incorrect categorical descriptions, leading to suboptimal recognition performance. To improve EmoDC, we propose margin-based discrepancy training, which encourages accurate predictions when conditioned on correct categorical descriptions and penalizes predictions conditioned on mismatched ones. This method enforces a minimum margin between noise-prediction errors for correct and incorrect categories, thereby enhancing the model's discriminative capability. Nevertheless, using a fixed margin fails to account for the varying difficulty of noise prediction across different images, limiting its effectiveness. To overcome this limitation, we propose Adaptive Margin Discrepancy Training (AMDiT), which dynamically adjusts the margin for each sample. Extensive experiments show that AMDiT significantly improves the accuracy of EmoDC over the baseline model with standard denoising diffusion training under 100-step evaluations. Additionally, AMDiT-enhanced EmoDC has better generalization and robustness than state-of-the-art discriminative classifiers.

light_analysis.overview: 结合扩散模型与自适应间隔差异训练，提高人脸表情识别的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 人脸表情识别在人机交互中至关重要。现有深度学习方法依赖判别分类器，学习捷径且易受分布偏移影响。条件生成扩散模型虽有对抗鲁棒性，但标准训练无法有效惩罚错误类别描述，导致识别性能次优。因此需要一种能正确惩罚错误类别、并适应不同样本难度的训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Emotion Diffusion Classifier (EmoDC)，采用条件生成扩散模型。为改进EmoDC，提出基于间隔的差异训练，强制正确与错误类别的噪声预测误差间保持最小间隔。进一步提出自适应间隔差异训练（AMDiT），根据每个样本的噪声预测难度动态调整间隔，从而增强模型的判别能力和适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在100步评估下，AMDiT显著提高了EmoDC的准确率，优于基线模型的标准去噪扩散训练。AMDiT增强的EmoDC比最先进的判别分类器具有更好的泛化性和鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过引入自适应间隔差异训练的扩散分类器，解决了判别分类器易受分布偏移和标准扩散训练惩罚不足的问题。该工作在FER上展示了更好的性能和鲁棒性，为生成模型在识别任务中的应用提供了新思路。未来可进一步探索不同扩散步数和更复杂的数据集。

title: Stochastic Dimension Implicit Functional Projections for Global Integral Conservation in High-Dimensional PINNs
abstract: Enforcing prescribed global integral constraints in mesh-free neural PDE solvers is challenging in high-dimensional domains. Existing projection methods for spatial integrals are often tied to fixed grids or uniform quadrature, which can conflict with randomly sampled physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) and scale poorly with dimension. High-order differential operators also increase reverse-mode automatic differentiation memory costs. We propose Stochastic Dimension Implicit Functional Projection (SDIFP), a quadrature-level framework for enforcing prescribed first and second spatial moments. SDIFP replaces tensor-product nodal projection by a global affine correction of the neural-network output, with two scalar coefficients determined from a weighted quadrature rule. Under positive target variance and nonzero empirical raw variance, this correction is the nearest-point projection, in the weighted quadrature norm, onto the empirical two-moment constraint set. Thus, the prescribed moments are exact for the selected quadrature rule, while continuum errors are quadrature errors of the corrected field. For decomposable high-dimensional linear operators, SDIFP combines affine moment correction with stochastic operator-subset sampling. With independent residual and derivative sampling and conditionally unbiased coefficient-gradient estimation, the resulting estimator is unbiased for the specified quadrature-based residual objective; the shared-subset fast mode is biased in general. SDIFP avoids tensor-product quadrature for moment enforcement, separates forward quadrature evaluation from the reverse-mode graph, and retains pointwise inference efficiency once the affine coefficients are fixed or precomputed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SDIFP框架，通过全局仿射校正强制执行空间矩，避免张量积求积，适用于高维PINNs。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高维无网格神经PDE求解器中强制执行全局积分约束具有挑战性。现有投影方法依赖固定网格或均匀求积，与随机采样的PINNs冲突且维度扩展性差；高阶微分算子增加反向模式自动微分内存成本。因此需要一种无网格、与维度无关的约束强制执行方法。
light_analysis.method: SDIFP用全局仿射校正替换张量积节点投影，通过加权求积规则确定两个标量系数，实现精确矩约束。对于可分解高维线性算子，结合仿射矩校正和随机算子子集采样。采用独立残差和导数采样以及条件无偏系数梯度估计，得到无偏估计器；共享子集快速模式通常有偏。方法避免张量积求积，分离正向求积评估与反向图。
light_analysis.result: SDIFP确保规定矩对所选求积规则精确，连续误差为校正场的求积误差。独立采样模式下估计器无偏；共享子集快速模式有偏。该方法避免了张量积求积的内存和计算开销，分离正向求积与反向图，保持点态推理效率。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDIFP为高维PINNs提供了一种有效的全局积分约束强制执行方法，通过仿射校正避免网格依赖，降低维度扩展性问题和计算成本。潜在局限性是共享子集快速模式的偏差，未来可探索无偏快速模式。该方法具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。

title: Polaris: A Godel Agent Framework for Small Language Models through Experience-Abstracted Policy Repair
abstract: Gödel agent realize recursive self-improvement: an agent inspects its own policy and traces and then modifies that policy in a tested loop. We introduce Polaris, a Gödel agent for compact models that performs policy repair via experience abstraction, turning failures into policy updates through a structured cycle of analysis, strategy formation, abstraction, and minimal code pat ch repair with conservative checks. Unlike response level self correction or parameter tuning, Polaris makes policy level changes with small, auditable patches that persist in the policy and are reused on unseen instances within each benchmark. As part of the loop, the agent engages in meta reasoning: it explains its errors, proposes concrete revisions to its own policy, and then updates the policy. To enable cumulative policy refinement, we introduce experience abstraction, which distills failures into compact, reusable strategies that transfer to unseen instances. On MGSM, DROP, GPQA, and LitBench (covering arithmetic reasoning, compositional inference, graduate-level problem solving, and creative writing evaluation), a 7-billion-parameter model equipped with Polaris achieves consistent gains over the base policy and competitive baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Polaris，一种基于经验抽象策略修复的Gödel智能体框架，使小型语言模型通过递归自我改进实现策略级持久化修正。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法如响应级自我修正或参数调优无法实现策略级持久化改进，且大型模型成本高。因此需要一种机制使小型语言模型能通过自我检查与修改策略实现持续改进，同时保持策略的可审计性和可重用性。
light_analysis.method: Polaris采用结构化循环：分析错误、形成策略、经验抽象、最小代码补丁修复及保守检查。核心是元推理，即解释错误并提出具体策略修订。经验抽象将失败提炼为紧凑可重用策略，转移至未见实例。使用7B参数模型在算术推理、组合推理、研究生级问题解决和创意写作任务上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在MGSM、DROP、GPQA和LitBench四个基准上，配备Polaris的7B模型持续优于基础策略和竞争基线，展示了跨多种推理和写作任务的性能增益，具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Polaris证明了通过策略级修复实现小型语言模型递归自我改进的可行性，经验抽象使得失败知识可跨实例转移。该框架为小模型自我改进提供了新范式，具有提升实际任务性能的应用价值。未来可探索更大模型或更复杂策略更新。

title: Subjective-Graph LLM Agents for Simulating Uncertainty in Classroom Social Perception
abstract: Social actors do not observe a common social world: each individual forms judgments from a partial and potentially distorted view of the surrounding network. We study whether graph-local evidence and credibility-weighted communication can generate persistent distortions in perceived academic standing, even when agents repeatedly receive objective performance signals. We introduce a data-constrained multi-agent framework in which LLM agents operate through individualized subjective graphs that determine peer visibility, evidence access, and interaction opportunities. Agents exchange uncertainty-annotated assessments, evaluate message credibility, and maintain explicit Gaussian belief states updated through Bayesian fusion. We evaluate the framework on 12 middle-school classrooms comprising 482 students, using questionnaire-derived social information and six consecutive examinations. On the Social-Observed subset (n=419), collective ranking error increases from 0.066 \pm 0.008 to 0.124 \pm 0.009 across six epochs despite repeated exam-based anchoring. Ablations associate individualized visibility and LLM-based trust gating with more stable long-horizon behavior, while constrained retrieval primarily safeguards against global-information leakage. Compared with evaluated DeGroot configurations, the proposed framework achieves lower final ranking error; those DeGroot configurations exhibit near-zero terminal opinion diversity. These findings establish subjective-graph LLM agents as a mechanism-oriented framework for data-constrained simulated social perception. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Rashomonomon-0126.

light_analysis.overview: 提出主观图LLM智能体框架，通过个体化社交网络模拟课堂社会感知中的持久认知偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 社会个体形成对周围网络的判断存在局部性和潜在扭曲，现有方法难以模拟这种不确定性传播。该研究旨在通过数据受限的多智能体框架，探索图局部证据和可信度加权沟通如何导致对学业地位的持久认知偏差，即使智能体反复接收客观表现信号。
light_analysis.method: 每个LLM智能体通过个体化主观图决定可见性、证据访问和交互机会；交换不确定性注释的评估；评估消息可信度；维护高斯信念状态并通过贝叶斯融合更新。利用12个中学班级（482名学生）的问卷社交信息和六次连续考试成绩进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在社交观察子集（n=419）上，经过6轮考试锚定后，集体排名误差从0.066±0.008增至0.124±0.009。消融实验表明个体化可见性和LLM信任门控产生更稳定的长期行为，而受限检索防止全球信息泄露。与DeGroot配置相比，框架实现更低的最终排名误差，且DeGroot配置终端观点多样性接近零。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作建立了主观图LLM智能体作为数据受限模拟社会感知的机制导向框架，可用于研究认知偏差形成。未来可扩展至更复杂的社交动态或不同领域。

title: Policies Permitting LLM Use for Polishing Peer Reviews Are Currently Not Enforceable
abstract: A number of scientific conferences and journals have recently enacted policies that prohibit LLM usage by peer reviewers, except for polishing, paraphrasing, and grammar correction of otherwise human-written reviews. But, are these policies enforceable? To answer this question, we assemble a dataset of peer reviews simulating multiple levels of human-AI collaboration, and evaluate five state-of-the-art detectors, including two commercial systems. Our analysis shows that all detectors misclassify a non-trivial fraction of LLM-polished reviews as AI-generated, thereby risking false accusations of academic misconduct. We further investigate whether peer-review-specific signals, including access to the paper manuscript and the constrained domain of scientific writing, can be leveraged to improve detection. While incorporating such signals yields measurable gains in some settings, we identify limitations in each approach and find that none meets the accuracy standards required for identifying AI use in peer reviews. Importantly, our results suggest that recent public estimates of AI use in peer reviews through the use of AI-text detectors should be interpreted with caution, as current detectors misclassify mixed reviews (collaborative human-AI outputs) as fully AI generated, potentially overstating the extent of policy violations.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示当前AI文本检测器无法准确识别LLM润色过的同行评审，导致政策难以执行。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多会议和期刊已制定政策，禁止评审者使用LLM，但允许用其润色、改写和语法纠正。这些政策的可执行性存疑，因为需要可靠的方法检测此类使用。现有检测器可能误分类，造成虚假指控或低估违规。该研究旨在评估检测器性能并探索改进方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建了一个包含多种人类-AI协作级别的同行评审数据集，模拟不同程度的LLM润色。评估了五个最先进的检测器，包括两个商业系统。进一步探索利用同行评审特有的信号（如访问论文稿件、科学写作的限定领域）来改进检测，比较了不同设置下的效果。
light_analysis.result: 所有检测器将非平凡的LLM润色评审误分类为AI生成，导致虚假的学术不端指控。通过整合同行评审信号，在某些设置下取得可衡量的提升，但每种方法均有局限性，无法达到识别AI使用的准确度标准。结果表明，使用检测器估计AI使用率可能高估违规，因为混合型评审被误判为完全AI生成。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前的AI文本检测器无法可靠区分LLM润色与完全人类撰写的同行评审，使得相关政策不可执行。研究强调了对检测结果谨慎解读的必要性，并指出需开发更精准的检测方法。潜在局限性包括数据集模拟可能不完全反映真实场景，未来工作可探索更复杂的检测策略。

title: HiPath: Hierarchical Vision-Language Alignment for Structured Pathology Report Prediction
abstract: Pathology reports are structured, multi-granular documents encoding diagnostic conclusions, histological grades, and ancillary test results across one or more anatomical sites; yet existing pathology vision-language models (VLMs) reduce this output to a flat label or free-form text. We present HiPath, a lightweight VLM framework built on frozen UNI2 and Qwen3 backbones that treats structured report prediction as its primary training objective. Three trainable modules totalling 15M parameters address complementary aspects of the problem: a Hierarchical Patch Aggregator (HiPA) for multi-image visual encoding, Hierarchical Contrastive Learning (HiCL) for cross-modal alignment via optimal transport, and Slot-based Masked Diagnosis Prediction (Slot-MDP) for structured diagnosis generation. Trained on 749K real-world Chinese pathology cases from three hospitals, HiPath achieves 68.9% strict and 74.7% clinically acceptable accuracy with a 97.3% safety rate, outperforming all baselines under the same frozen backbone. Cross-hospital evaluation confirms generalisation with only a 3.4pp drop in strict accuracy while maintaining 97.1% safety.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HiPath，一种轻量级视觉-语言模型框架，通过分层对比学习和槽位掩码诊断预测实现结构化病理报告生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 病理报告是结构化、多粒度的文档，包含诊断结论、组织学分级和辅助检测结果，但现有病理VLM将其简化为扁平标签或自由文本，无法捕捉其结构化特性。该研究旨在将结构化报告预测作为主要训练目标，解决现有方法无法生成多站点、多粒度结构化输出的问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于冻结的UNI2和Qwen3骨干，仅训练三个模块（共1500万参数）：分层补丁聚合器(HiPA)处理多图像视觉编码，分层对比学习(HiCL)通过最优传输实现跨模态对齐，槽位掩码诊断预测(Slot-MDP)生成结构化诊断。使用来自三家医院的749K真实中文病理案例训练。
